不会又要我跑腿了吧，唉…
Do I have to run errands again...?
哪、哪儿能呢！你、你们已经帮了我们太多。这是我们内、内部的事，我们自、自己会解决。
O—Of course not! Y—You have already done so much for us. This is an in—internal affair. We will d—deal with it ourselves.
毕、毕竟，我们「地火」接管下、下层区也很多年了……
A—After all, we have been in charge of the Underworld for years...
我们中的一些成、成员，本来就对大守护者有意见，现在更是不、不想乖乖听她的话了。
Some of our m—members have always had a problem with the Supreme Guardian. Now, they've found a better excuse to n—not to listen to her.
不过，没关系…我会配合奥、奥列格老大，想办法说、说服他们的。
Still, everything is alright... Together with O—Oleg, I'll try to c—convince them.
嗯…现在应该只缺「逻辑语言中枢」了吧。
Hmm... The only thing missing is a language module, right?
是啊，就缺这个了，但这种模组现在可不好弄啊…哎，真让人头大。
Yeah, it's all that's missing. It's hard to get hold of one... *sigh* What a headache.
…好烦好烦。总不能从史瓦罗大佬身上拆下来用吧，真是的。
... This is so annoying. I can't just take Svarog's, can I? *sigh*
……哎、哎？！你什么时候凑过来的？没听到我刚才说的话吧……
...Hmm? When did you get here? Did you hear what I just said...?
Why are you acting like it's a big deal?
…看你这反应，明明就听到了吧！
唉，算了算了，让你知道也无所谓，反正也不是什么了不得的秘密。
*sigh* Whatever. I guess it's okay if you know. It isn't really a huge secret anyway.
是张生面孔呢…找我有什么事吗？
You seem new here... What can I do for you?
不然呢？除了机械师，也没人会制作机器人了吧？
Of course. No one but a mechanic could make robots, could they?
…不过硬要说的话，那群流浪者里也有不少人有这种手艺啦。
...Well, actually, many people among the vagrants also possess that skill.
但我和他们可不一样！那些家伙制造机器人就是为了办什么「改造机器人争霸赛」，让自己造出来的东西互殴到底…我反正无法理解那种趣味。
But I'm different from them! They make robots for the Modified Robot Fight — the robots they make fight each other... I don't get the fun in it.
你要「逻辑语言中枢」做什么？
What do you need a language module for?
这…你对别人的兴趣就这么好奇嘛？
It's... Why are you being so nosey?
告诉你吧…其实我正在试着制造一台能与人类进行「情感互动」的机器人。
Okay, I'll tell you... I'm trying to build a robot that can interact with humans emotionally.
——不是那种只会按照预先定好的程序、你一问它一答的机器！是真正能理解人的语言，并且能像正常人类一样说话、做事的机器人。
Not the kind of machine that only follows a program or answers the question you ask — A robot that understands human language, and speaks and acts like a normal human being.
为什么要制作这种机器人？
Why do you want to build something like that?
为啥？当然是…因为梦想呀！
Why? Because it's my dream, of course!
造出带有人类情感的机器人…那就是我作为业余机械师的终极梦想！
I want to create a robot with emotions... it's my ultimate goal as an amateur mechanic!
仿生人？那是什么，听着让人怪不舒服的…我现在只想给机器人搭载逻辑语言模块，然后再在这个基础上做些优化改进。
Android? What's that? It sounds weird... Right now, all I want to do is to equip the robot with a language module and do some additional optimization and improvement.
在我看来，机械结构可比人体美妙多了…我才不会傻到把机器人做成和人类一样的外观呢，真无趣。
In my opinion, mechanical structures are much more beautiful than the human body... I'm not stupid enough to try to make a robot look like a human. How boring would that be?
我还以为是能驾驶的人形机甲呢。
I thought you were making a humanoid mech that could be driven.
那种事我也考虑过…听说男孩子都梦想着能驾驶人形机甲作战？
I've thought about that... I heard that boys all dream of fighting in mechs.
我也能理解他们的浪漫幻想啦。不过对我自己来说，能让机器人拥有近似人类的感情，才是最值得投入精力的研究目标……
I get why they think that's cool. But for me, the most worthwhile research is to make robots that have human emotions...
总之就是这样啦。你还有别的问题吗？
Anyway, that's all. Do you have any other questions?
没什么，你继续研究机械吧。
Nevermind. You can go back to your mechanical research.
哦，你又来啦？我还没找到「语言逻辑中枢」呢……
Hey, it's you again? I haven't found a language module...
唔，怎么突然这么问？最近难道又有什么大新闻吗？
Why are you asking that all of a sudden? Is something big going on at the moment?
你不知道吗？大矿区出乱子了！
You haven't heard? There's chaos at the Great Mine!
天啊，真的吗？我一直在专心研究自己的机器人，完全不知道这件事！
Oh no, really? I've been so focused on my robot that I haven't heard a thing!
我记得大矿区有很多机器人在协助矿民工作…怎么样，那些小机器人没受伤吧？
I remember there being lots of support robots in the Great Mine... What about them, are those little robots all okay?
啊，其实是上下层解除封锁了…
Ah, actually the Overworld and the Underworld are being reunited...
你不知道吗？上下层解除封锁了！
Haven't you heard? The Overworld and the Underworld are being reunited!
你不知道吗？今天洞螈肉半价！
Haven't you heard? Olm meat is half price today!
天啊，真的吗？我一直在专心研究自己的机器人，完全不知道这件事！
Oh no, really? I've been so focused on my robot that I haven't heard a thing!
不过我也不爱吃洞螈肉…这「新闻」倒是和我关系不大啦。还有什么其他新闻吗？
Olm meat isn't my favorite anyway... So this "news" has nothing to do with me. Got any other news for me?
啊～原来如此。这件事我倒是听别人聊过，不过我还以为他们是开玩笑呢。
Oh, so that's how it is~ I heard some people chatting about this, but I thought they were only joking.
上下层区解除封锁…在我看来是件好事啊。下层区能搞到的机械零件就那么点，要不就是垃圾堆里翻出来的残次品……
Reuniting the Overworld and the Underworld... seems like a good idea to me. There's hardly any spare parts down in the Underworld. Just piles of defective junk...
上层区就不一样了。听说那里有一家远近闻名的「机械屋」——我老早就想去那里看看了！搞不好在那里能弄到我想要的「逻辑语言中枢」，还有其它珍稀的零件……

It's different in the Overworld. I heard there's a famous "workshop" up there — I've always wanted to see it! Maybe I can get the language module I've been looking for up there — or other rare parts...
事不宜迟，我这就开始收拾行李！谢谢你提供的宝贵情报啦！
Without further ado, I'll start packing! Thanks so much for this valuable intel!
哦，你来啦！你瞧，我的机器人已经造好啦。
Oh, here you are! Look! I've finished building my robot.
您好，欢迎光临歌德宾馆！
Hello! Welcome to the Goethe Hotel!
请问您是要住店，还是想来杯宾馆特色下午茶？
Are you staying with us? Or would you like to try our special afternoon tea?
I'm here as I was attracted by the hotel's fame.
宾馆只是开得比较久，在贝洛伯格留了点虚名而已。
The hotel has just been here for a long time and it became a bit famous in Belobog.
来者都是客，你也不用太拘谨，尽管逛吧，只要别打扰住店的客人就行。
Make yourself at home. Feel free to take a tour, as long as you are not interrupting the other guests.
I am only passing by. I'll have a look around.
正好我眼下也没什么事要做，你要不介意，可以跟我寒暄几句。
I happen to have some free time. If you don't mind, you can chat with me.
我想订个客房休息会儿。
I would like to reserve a room.
行，麻烦来前台登记下你的身份信息。
Sure, please register at the reception.
I would like to try your afternoon tea.
噢，就在大堂两边，先找个沙发随便坐，我这就去安排。
Oh, it's on the sides of the lobby. Find yourself a sofa and take a seat. I'll arrange it.
我打小就在这里长大，不敢说对行政区了如指掌，但这宾馆，还有宾馆附近有过什么变化，又有过什么样的故事，我多少也知道点。
This is where I grew up. I wouldn't say that I know all about the Administrative District. But I do know the history and goings-on around these parts fairly well.
你要是感兴趣，尽管问我就是了。
Just let me know if you are interested.
尽管问吧！有问必答也是待客之道。
Sure! Answering the guests' questions is a way to show your hospitality.
About Old Goethe and Goethe Hotel...
噢，你对这个感兴趣？歌德是我的姓氏，宾馆是我家的产业，说起来都是些陈芝麻烂谷子的老事了。
Oh, that's what you're interested in? Goethe is my family name and Goethe Hotel is my family business. Well, it all began a long, long time ago.
歌德家族以前也算兴盛一时，祖辈们投资了不少产业，可惜因为经济不景气，终归还是没落了。先辈心灰意冷，卖空所有家产以后搬到了下层区居住。

The Goethe family used to be prosperous. My ancestors invested in many industries. Unfortunately, due to poor economics, our family declined. Frustrated, my ancestors sold all of their properties and moved to the Underworld.
但好在家族后来又出了一位志向高远的伟人——那位先辈从下层白手起家，振兴祖业，又成功把歌德宾馆开回了上层。
Luckily later on another ancestor from my family started empty-handed and revived our family business. Once again, Goethe Hotel was moved back to the Overworld.
接待过什么特别的住客吗？
Have you received any special guests?
那要看你是怎么定义「特别的住客」的了。住过这儿的客人一茬接一茬的，的确留下过不少故事。
Well, it depends on how you define special guest. Many guests have stayed with us. Indeed there are a lot of stories.
比如说——有位逃婚的大小姐穿着睡衣从二楼客房跳窗逃跑，听说她自此下落不明……
For example, a lady from a rich family escaped her wedding and jumped out of the window on the second floor in her pajamas. No one ever heard from her since...
有对剧院明星夫妻，看起来很恩爱，但来宾馆度蜜月的时候，两个人却分别开了两个房间……
There was a couple who were theater celebrities. They appeared as though they were in love but they stayed in different rooms when they were here for their honeymoon...
还有位女士，经常在她家人的工作时间过来开个单人间。她总是待在房间里画画，画完就会大哭一场，也不知道是经历了什么……

And there was a lady who would always stay in a single room when her family was at work. She was always drawing in her room. And she would cry every time she finished drawing. I wonder what she's been through...
我们这行就是这样，时间长了总能碰上些稀罕事儿。
It happens a lot in our industry. We always encounter weird things, especially when we've been in the industry for a long enough time.
Any recommendations on food around here?
哈哈，不是我自夸，我们宾馆的下午茶是贝洛伯格的一绝。
Haha, I'm not trying to brag, but our afternoon tea is a specialty of Belobog.
有几道甜品，整个行政区里就我们家能做得出来，在外面你压根吃不到。每到节假日，就有不少年轻人特意过来，人多的时候还要排队呢。
There are a few desserts that only we can make. You can't eat them anywhere else in the Administrative District. Many young people visit us during holidays. Sometimes people have to line up.
这附近有什么景点推荐吗？
Any recommendation on sightseeing around here?
我推荐你去西区逛逛，西区以文艺气息而闻名，黄金歌剧院就在那儿，剧院明星、限定周边，应有尽有。
I'd recommend the Western District, which is known for its artistic atmosphere. The Golden Theater is right there. You'll find everything from celebrities to merchandise.
不过你得注意，别赶在首演日去，像《白衣之后》和《星尘玫瑰》这种粉丝多的，会把你挤到怀疑人生……
But be careful, don't go on their premiere day. For example, shows with many fans like Beneath the White Cloak and Stardust Rose will make the area totally over-crowded...
最好是自己开车去，你要是没车…从宾馆一出门就是阿丽萨大道，搭电车或者沿着轨道步行都很方便。
It's best to drive there. If you don't have a car... Alisa Avenue is right outside the hotel. You can take a tram or walk there along the track.
I don't have any other questions.
谢谢，还是让我自己转转吧。
Thank you. I'll walk around by myself.
欢迎，有空可以常来店里坐坐。
您好，欢迎光临歌德宾馆！
Hello! Welcome to the Goethe Hotel!
是你啊，这次来可不是来观光的吧？是来住店、吃饭，还是特意来找老头子我聊聊的？
It's you. You're not here for sightseeing, are you? Are you here to stay or for our afternoon tea? Or did you come here to chat with me?
I'd like to chat with you.
行啊，我平时也没什么事，难得有人愿意来陪我说会儿话。
Sure. I'm usually quite free. I'd love to have a chat with someone.
What do you want to chat about?
你是问宾馆的生意呢，还是问老头子我啊？宾馆的话还好，不算特别忙。至于我，这日子倒是挺有盼头。
Do you mean how's business been, or how I've been doing? The hotel's fine, not too busy. As for me, I'm looking forward to good times.
噢，谢谢，我最近还不错，甚至称得上是「意气风发」了，哈哈。也不怕你笑话，这两天我还在想怎么把白发遮一遮。
Oh thanks, I've been pretty good recently — "full of beans" even, you could say, haha! And I'm not afraid of your jokes. I've been thinking about how I can cover up this white hair of mine.
过不了多久就能见到下层区的亲戚朋友们了…十几年过去了，大家肯定都变化很大吧？
Soon we'll be able to see friends and relatives from down in the Underworld again... Things must be quite different after a dozen or more years, right?
Are good times on the horizon?
好事将近？你猜得倒准。现在这城里发生了不少事…我听我认识的一些朋友说，你好像也出了不少力？
Good times? Correct. There's lots going on in the city right now... I hear from friends of mine that you seem to be up to lots, too?
总之啊，过不了多久我就能和下层区的亲戚朋友们见面了。这么多年过去了，也不知道他们过得好不好……
Anyway, soon I'll be able to see friends and relatives from down in the Underworld. After all these years, I hope they've been doing well...
到了我这个年纪，很多亲戚朋友都在慢慢走出我的生活。有时候我也不免怀念从前的青葱岁月……
At my age, I have lots of friends and families leaving my life. Sometimes I can't help but miss those halcyon days gone by...
哈哈，在你这种年轻人面前，还是不谈这个了。好好生活吧。
Haha, I shouldn't be talking about such stuff with a young'un like you. Live well!
当然可以。你想了解什么？
Sure. What do you want to know?
「正当权益会社」——顾名思义，我们的目标便是维护每个人的「正当权益」。
The Rightful Rights Society — as the name implies, our goal is to uphold the rightful rights of every individual.
简单来说，就是让每个人都能暂时逃离家庭和责任的束缚，自由自在地发展自己的兴趣爱好、或者只是单纯地休息一下……
In short, we can get everyone to temporarily escape from the bindings of family and duty, to freely develop their hobbies, or just to take a break...
…总之，毫无疑问，我们是个造福社会的公益组织。听了我方才的描述，想必你已经完全理解「会社」的职责了吧。
...Anyways, we are undoubtedly an organization established for the good of the Society. After listening to my explanation, you should have a full understanding of the Society's mission now.
原来你还有这种隐藏身份…
So this is your secret identity...
没错。毕竟我们平时都需要隐秘行动，所以不能在外声张自己的身份——这也是我最初请你帮忙时有所犹豫的原因。
That's right. We usually act in secrecy and don't announce our identities, which is why I hesitated to ask for your help.
首先，如果你感到自己需要一些休闲时间却脱不开身，你就可以求助社友，拜托他们替你打掩护；其次，你也可以在有空时协助配合其他成员。

Firstly, if you ever feel you need some time to relax but can't get away from your duties, you can ask other Society members to help cover for you. Secondly, you can also cover for other members whenever you can.
当然，这并不意味着你可以随便差使社友…要想享受权利，你就必须有过帮助他人的记录才行。
This certainly doesn't mean you get to order other members about... To enjoy the rights, you must first have a record of helping others.
一次帮助可抵两次求助——我们鼓励大家相互支援，一起享受休闲时光。
Helping others once grants you two requests for help. We encourage everyone to support each other so that everyone can enjoy some leisure time.
不过，你似乎从来没有在联络群中提请过他人帮助…但你放心，对于这种情况，我们也有备案。
It seems like you've never asked for help in the group chat, though... Don't worry. We have measures in place for such cases.
每隔一段时间，我们就会盘点一次会员们未用尽的请求支援余额，并发送短信提醒会员折现。
We periodically review members who have not used their request quotas, and send them text reminders to exchange those for cash.
I can exchange that for cash?
呵呵，当然…毕竟，请求他人帮助是你的权利。如果你因各种缘故未能行使权利，我们自然会想办法弥补你的。
You bet... After all, it's your right to request help from others. If you are unable to exercise your right due to various reasons, we have to find a way to compensate you.
总之，只要记住我们会定期给你发送短信便是。如果收到了，就不妨来找老头子我问问看吧。
Anyway, just bear in mind that you will receive messages from us regularly. If you receive one, please don't hesitate to ask me about it.
呵呵…愿你在「会社」得以享受闲暇时光。
Hehe... I hope you get to enjoy some leisure time in the Society.
哟，你们回来啦。怎么样，累不累？奥列格大哥没为难你们吧？
Ah, you're back. How did it go? Are you tired? How did Oleg treat you?
哈哈，这你可说对了！奥列格大哥虽然平时总板着脸，但其实可照顾大家了。
Haha, that's true! Although Oleg usually looks quite serious, he takes good care of everyone.
一天到晚跑腿，确实受不了…
My legs are so sore after running around for the whole day...
哈哈…真是辛苦你了，不过能者多劳嘛！
Haha... With great power comes great responsibility!
好啦，你跑了一天，肯定累坏了吧，快回房间歇歇！我这就去下厨，等下做好就给你把饭端上去！
Well, you must be exhausted after running around the whole day. Take a rest in your room. I'll bring the food over when it's ready!
哈哈哈，不麻烦！既然来到我们「歌德大饭店」，那大家就都是朋友了！
Hahaha, you're welcome! We are all friends now that you're staying at the Goethe Grand Hotel!
哎呀！你瞧我这记性，都忘了问了…被褥枕头合不合适？房间的温度呢？地髓炉没出故障吧？
Oh! I almost forgot... How do you find the bed and pillow? And what about the room temperature? Is the Geomarrow Furnace working fine?
要是还有什么其他需要，尽管和我说啊！
If you need anything, please let me know!
好呀，现在正好不是很忙。
Sure. I'm not too busy right now.
推荐菜？来，你把柜台边上那本食评册拿来，看看对里边哪个有兴趣，我给你好好讲讲——这可都是我的得意之作！
Dishes? Check the food review book on the wardrobe and see what interests you. They are all my masterpieces!
对，这道菜的主要食材是洞穴里的苔藓，清爽酸甜，特别推荐用来下饭。虽然卖相不好，但据大家反映口感确实没问题。

Yes, moss in the cave is the main ingredient. It is refreshing, sour and sweet, and especially good to open your appetite. Although it doesn't look too appealing, the taste is just fine according to our customers' feedback.
不过，这苔藓实在是不太好挖，没办法作为常驻供应就是了……
However, the moss is really not easy to dig. This dish is not always available...
啊，不要看这个…看下面这个——改良型！这道菜是专门用了铁罐来闷炖洞螈肉，这样的话肉的口感会非常好…这是我从书上学来的，哈哈哈。

Ah, not this one... look at the one below — this is the modified version! We specifically use an iron pot to braise olm meat. That way the meat becomes really tender... I learned it from a book, hahaha.
大家都反映这道菜非常好吃，所以很快就上架供应啦。你要是馋了的话，我现在就可以做！
People love this dish. It should be available very soon. I can cook some for you if you are hungry.
哦，这是道冷菜！餐前开胃用的。
Oh, it's a cold dish, as an appetizer.
你能吃辣吗？这里边用了铁锤辣椒碎提味，不习惯辣口的话可不要轻易尝试啊。
Can you eat spicy food? I use hammer pepper powder to enhance the flavor. Don't try this if you can't take spicy.
啊…这道菜已经改名成「风味肉冻」啦！这可是磐岩镇的特色菜哦，我强烈建议你尝试一下。
Well... I've renamed this Flavorful Jelly! This is a specialty of Boulder Town. Highly recommend!
只要你别被原来的名字吓跑就行…哈哈哈。
Don't get scared away by its original name... Hahaha.
至于其他的，就先不用看啦…那些菜做出来效果都不是很好，我还在想办法改进呢。实在不好意思呀。
That's all for now... The rest of the dishes don't come out very nice. I'm still working on them. I'm so sorry.
Do you usually have a lot of guests?
客人是不少，但是基本都是来吃饭的，住店客人相对少一些……
Many people come here for our food. But not many people stay in our hotel...
毕竟大部分都是磐岩镇本地的熟面孔嘛。大家收工之后经常过来打个尖儿、歇歇脚，倒也挺热闹的。
After all, most of our guests are from Boulder Town. People would gather here after work to chill and chat with each other. It's pretty lively.
我不光是饭店老板，还是这儿的厨师长哦！很多客人都是冲着我的手艺来的。
I'm the owner and also the chef of the hotel! Many people come here because of my cooking.
你们外来者见多识广，要是饭菜上有什么喜好，可以多跟我讲讲。我也能趁机跟你们多学两手！
You outsiders are certainly very well-traveled. Let me know if you have any preferences for food, maybe I can also learn something from you!
Is this hotel under the administration of Wildfire?
哈哈哈！瞧你们这话说的，把「地火」当作什么啦。
Hahaha! What do you think Wildfire is?
「地火」只是在银鬃铁卫撤走之后，下层区人自发筹建的维和组织而已。一定要和我们饭店扯上关系的话…我想大概是「客人」吧。

Wildfire is just a peacekeeping organization started by people in the Underworld after the withdrawal of the Silvermane Guards. If there is a relationship between us... I would probably say they are our guests.
加入「地火」的可都是热心肠的好人哪，奥列格可不会允许游手好闲的小混混加入组织。我有个侄子也在里边工作呢，听说每天还挺忙的。
The people who join Wildfire are all kindhearted, good folk. Oleg wouldn't let any lazy good-for-nothings join. I have a nephew who works for Wildfire, he says they are really busy every day.
能说说上层的「歌德宾馆」吗？
Can you tell me about the Goethe Hotel in Overworld?
当然可以！不过我得先想想，从哪里开始说比较好呢……
Sure! Let me think where I should begin with...
先简单说说我们歌德家族吧！毕竟这两家饭店都是我们家族产业。据说我们家族从寒潮之前就存在了，还和大守护者阿丽萨•兰德关系不错哩。

I'll start with the Goethe family! After all, both hotels are our family business. It is said that our family was already here before the Eternal Freeze. We had a good relationship with Alisa Rand, the Supreme Guardian.
所以，我们家族当时也算是个首屈一指的大家族——现在的「朗道」家族，你听过吗？我猜啊，那阵子我们估计和他家现在差不多！
Our family used to be very influential. Have you heard of the Landau family? I guess we were similar to what they are today!
哈哈哈，那都是过去的事了，不值一提。
Hahaha, that's all in the past. It's not worth mentioning.
你别说，我还认识朗道家的人呢。
I do know the Landau family.
真的？那你现在又认识我们歌德家的人了，恭喜你！哈哈哈。
Really? Now you know the Goethe family too. Congratulations! Hahaha.
到后来，家族里出了几个败家子，把家产都败光咯。不过好在后边又有人努力重振家业，这才在这下层区开了家大饭店。
After that, several scoundrels in the family lost all of our wealth. Fortunately, later on, someone revived our family business and they opened a hotel in the Underworld.
居然有这么悠久的历史…
I didn't know it had such a long history...
确实啊，我估计得有几百年了吧。爹娘也没和我具体讲过，只说这饭店是祖上传下来的遗产。
True. Hundreds of years. My parents never told me the details. They just said this hotel was a legacy from my ancestors.
那为什么在地上还有一家？
Then why is there another one in the Overworld?
哎呀，你别急！这不就快要讲到了嘛。
Be patient! I was about to talk about that.
后来，我们这饭店生意越做越大，就有人想要去上层区拓展业务咯。
As our hotel's business grew, some people wanted to expand the business to the Overworld.
没想到啊，这位歌德可是个大能人，居然在行政区最豪华的地段拿下了商铺！所以，上层区的「歌德宾馆」就是这么来的。
That Goethe must be very talented to be able to buy a shop in the busiest area of the Administrative District! That's how the Goethe Hotel in the Overworld was started.
不过，我们家族也因此分了家，分别成为上下层区两支啦。
However, our family was divided ever since then, and now there are two separate branches in the Overworld and Underworld.
那你认识上层区的老歌德吗？
Do you know Old Goethe from the Overworld?
当然认识啊！虽然我刚说分了家，但我们两支还是经常来往的。像什么煦日节啊之类的节日，我们都会举办家族聚会呢。
Of course! Although our family was divided, we do keep in touch. We hold family gatherings during festivals such as the Solwarm Festival.
至于你说的那个老歌德…按辈分论的话，我和他其实是同辈呢，哈哈哈！
As for the Old Goethe you mentioned... According to seniority, we are actually the same generation, hahaha!
不过自从上下层区封锁之后，我们就再也没聚过了。这都过去多少年了呢……
But we haven't been able to get together since the Overworld and the Underworld were blocked. It's been many years...
Thank you. I shouldn't keep you.
甭客气，来了下层区就都是我的客人嘛。有什么需要尽管说！
No worries. You are now my guest since you are in the Underworld. If you need anything, just let me know!
哟，今天忙完啦？我这儿正好做了锅蘑菇汤…你先歇会，晚点记得下来尝尝口味如何！
Yo, have you finished your work today? I just made a pot of mushroom soup... Take a break first and come try it later!
瞧你问的，真是时候！这不，我前阵子才收到上层区亲戚的信呢。这都多少年没收到过信啦，时间过得可真快啊……
You've got great timing! Why, I just got a letter from a relative up in the Overworld. It's been years since I heard from them. Time really flies...
Could you not get letters before?
是啊，自打大守护者封锁上下层区之后，别说人想往返地面，就连信都不让寄咯。
Yeah, ever since the Supreme Guardian blockaded the Underworlds, nobody was allowed to go back and forth between them — not even the mail.
这都快十年了，我终于收到第一封信…看来贝洛伯格是要变天了！你看看，我这亲戚信里也说了：「大守护者马上就要解除封锁政策」……

It's been almost ten years, and I've finally received my first letter... Looks like Belobog is back, bay-bee! Check it out, my relative even said in their letter, "The Supreme Guardian is lifting the blockade soon"...
哎呀，这信里说的东西可真不少。不过除了些家长里短，这还有个大新闻呢！你看看，我这亲戚信里说了：「大守护者马上就要解除封锁政策」……
Ah, there's lots to go over in this letter. But besides all the family gossip, there's some big news! Check it out, they said here, "The Supreme Guardian is lifting the blockade soon"...
真要是这么回事啊，到时候我就歇业几天，收拾行李到上层区探亲去！哈哈哈。
If that's the case, I'm gonna take a few days off, pack up my things, and go up to the Overworld to see some family! Hahaha.
哎，这都多少年了，终于能见上一面…真不容易哪。
Ah, after all these years, I can finally go up... all these years...
Did you manage to buy a gift?
噢，你是说拍卖会那事吧！买到啦买到啦，多谢你关心。
Oh, you mean at the auction! Yup, I got something. Thanks for remembering.
当时我不是没拍下那只大熊玩偶嘛，后来我又想到个法子——娜塔莎大夫心灵手巧，又喜欢照顾小孩，搞不好能让她帮忙出出主意哩。
I didn't bid on the big old bear at the time, but thought of something later — Natasha is ingenious, and loves taking care of kids. She'd have a back-up plan for me, I was sure.
结果啊，我这一问就把事情解决了！娜塔莎三下五除二就给我缝了只兔子玩偶，可爱得很嘞。我把这玩偶送给侄女，她也可喜欢了。
And sure enough, she did! Natasha sewed up a rabbit doll for me just like that, and it was so cute. I gave it to my niece, and she loved it.
哎，娜塔莎姑娘可真是个好医生啊。我们磐岩镇能有这样一位大夫，那真是我们的福气！
Ahhh, Natasha is such a good doctor. We're blessed to have someone like her here in Boulder Town!
说到这个，奥列格大哥也是我们饭店的老客户了，他尤其喜欢吃「铁罐焖螈肉」——这也是我们的招牌菜，建议你有机会尝试一下！
Speaking of which, Oleg is also our regular customer. "Iron Pot Braised Olm," our signature dish, is his favorite. You should try it!
「矿灯」已经停止鉴定服务了，详情都在公告上面，请您挪步……
"Miner's Lamp" has stopped all appraisal services. The announcement has all the details. Please leave...
嗯？等会儿…你们是从「外面」来的吧？你们的事，大街小巷都传遍了。
What? Hold on... Are you from the Outside? Everyone's talking about your story!
哈哈，难怪你们不认识我。我刚才的态度多有冒犯，你们别介意啊！
Haha, no wonder you don't know me. That was embarrassing. Please excuse me!
我叫巴列维，是古代遗物鉴定的专家，这里认识我的人都叫我「矿灯」。幸会幸会。
My name is Balaway. I am an expert in relic appraisal. People all call me Miner's Lamp. Nice to meet you.
总之，本「矿灯」巴列维即日起停止一切鉴定服务——说来话长，我这有份公告，你拿去自己看吧。
Anyway, effective from today, I, "Miner's Lamp" Balaway will stop all appraisal services. It's a long story. You can have a look at this notice.
还是说你有别的什么事？
Or do you have other business?
…你当真不是来拿我寻开心的？
...Are you sure you're not here to mess with me?
算了算了，我理解。外来人嘛，不懂贝洛伯格的历史很正常。
Fine, fine. I understand. You are an Outsider. It's normal that you don't know the history of Belobog.
既然你都这么问了，那我就给你简单讲一讲——你知道「大寒潮」吧？
Now that you've asked, let me explain to you. Do you know the "Eternal Freeze?"
不错，看来你多少了解过这里的历史。
Good. You seem to know some of the history here.
…你们真是打外边来的？真没骗我？
...Are you really from the Outside? You are not lying?
虽然这城墙里面一年到头都暖和得很，但城墙外可是铺天盖地的暴风雪——如果你们真是从外面来的，想必是已经亲眼见过了。
Although it's warm inside the wall all year round, there are constant snowstorms outside the wall. If you are really from the Outside, you must have seen it.
这暴风雪可不是偶尔刮两阵就算完事…从七百年前到现在，这大雪就一分一秒也没停过。
This snowstorm isn't just temporary... Since seven hundred years ago, this heavy snow hasn't stopped for a minute.
而在暴风雪来临之前，贝洛伯格的科技水平要比现在高得多——贝洛伯格居民一般就把那段时期称呼为「古代」。
Before the snowstorm, Belobog's technology level was way much higher than it is now. Belobog residents call that "ancient times."
所以，顾名思义，「古代遗物」自然是大寒潮来临之前的遗留物了。
As the name suggests, relics are antiques from before the Eternal Freeze.
Why did you stop doing appraisals?
唉…说来话长，我这有份公告，你拿去自己看吧。
Well... It's a long story. This is the announcement. Have a look.
哈！那可多了去了，两三天也说不完。
Ha! Too many! I can keep talking about it for two or three days.
不过啊，要说最有意思的，那当属旧世界的刑具。
But the most interesting thing is the torture device from the Old World.
比如什么…箍在脖子上的项圈，或者是能自动加热的铁砧？啧啧，旧世界罪犯的日子可真难过唷。
Like... collar around the neck or anvil that automatically heats up? Tsk tsk, the life of criminals in the Old World must be hard.
你的鉴定流程是怎么样的？
这个嘛…首先，肯定得要客人把古代遗物带到我这边来，对吧？
Well... First of all, people bring their relics to me, okay?
交到我手里之后呢，就轮到我进行鉴定了。鉴定过后，我会给出相关功能说明和价格参考。
After it is handed over to me, I will start to evaluate it. After the appraisal, I will tell them the relevant functions and a price reference.
基本上到这里就完事了，最后就是我根据鉴定难度收费的环节而已。
Basically, that's it. The last step is I'll charge according to the difficulty of appraisal.
我对你的鉴定方法有点兴趣。
I'm interested in your appraisal method.
How do you distinguish the difficulty of the appraisal?
这个说起来可有点复杂。大部分尺寸比较小的物件结构也相对简单，只要简单参考些资料，那就能对它的功能构造略知一二了。
It's a bit complicated. Most smaller items have relatively simple structures. You can find out its function structure by referring to respective documents.
麻烦的是那些大件。一般来说，我得把他们彻底拆解，仔细检查一遍才行。
The bigger items are the real trouble. Generally speaking, I have to disassemble them and check everything carefully.
没错。很多遗物的功能和价值，只有完全拆解之后才能准确判断。
Right. The function and value of relics can only be appraised accurately after they are disassembled.
顺带一提，古代遗物拆解之后都有无法复原的风险。
By the way, once the relics are disassembled, there is a risk that they can't be reassembled.
而这个风险嘛…自然是要各位顾客自己承担咯。
And the risk... Naturally is to be borne by customers themselves.
旧世界留下的报纸和杂志残页，我全都给收集起来了。
I have collected all the remaining newspapers and magazines left from the Old World.
这些残页上刊登了模样和功能都比较类似的物品，一般还是很有参考价值的。
There are articles that show items with similar appearance and function. They are of a great reference value.
这古代遗物里的门道不少吧？今天就算是让你们这些外行开开眼了，哈哈！
There is a lot of knowledge about relics, right? It must be eye-opening for laymen like you, haha!
I don't have any other questions.
好吧，不能鉴定可真遗憾。
Well, it's a pity that you don't do appraisals anymore.
能有我遗憾吗？算了，不说了……
It's more of a pity for me. Forget it...
走开走开，我这边已经停止鉴定古代遗物的业务了……
Go away. The relic appraisal service is no longer offered...
不过你要是有别的什么事，不妨说来听听。
But you can tell me if you have some other business.
就那样呗，反正是不做鉴定古代遗物的行当了。
Same as always. Anyway, I'm not in the relic appraisal business anymore.
不过，我倒是在考虑要不要重启这项业务……
However, I've been thinking about getting back into it...
哈哈，就冲你这句话——你要是找我做鉴定，我肯定给你八折优惠！
Haha, if that's the case, then I'll give you twenty percent off if you come see me for your appraisals!
要是磐岩镇的人都像你一样讲道理，我哪儿还犯得着暂停鉴定业务啊。还好马上就能去上层区了……
If the people of Boulder Town were more like you, I'd never have stopped my appraisal business. Fortunately, we'll be allowed up in the Overworld soon...
How can you be so impulsive?
嗐，这不是要顺应时代潮流嘛。你也听说了吧？上下层区估计最近就要重新开放往来了——
Hey, I'm just following the trend, right? Haven't you heard the same? They're opening up the Overworld and the Underworld again...
上层区的人可都是讲道理的人。哪像磐岩镇的这帮矿民，一言不合就要卸我胳膊腿……
They're all reasonable people up there in the Overworld. Not like these miners down here in Boulder Town who'd carve me up if I say the wrong thing...
既然没有生命危险了，那我为什么不重新开始鉴定古代遗物呢？回头我要是开张了，你也记得来捧个场啊，哈哈哈。
Now that my life's not in danger, why don't I start over with my relic appraisal business? Remember to stop by next time and give me some business, haha!
居然提前放工了…得去找点事情做。
Can't believe I finish work early today... I gotta find something to do.
听说洞螈肉最近涨价了，要是能抓到一两只，今天也算是没有浪费……
I heard olm meat has risen in price recently. It'd be a day well spent if I could catch a few...
Eh, did I say that aloud? Sorry...
是啊。今天收工比较早，大家都回去啦。
Yeah, we finish early today. Everyone's left.
Eh, did I say that aloud? Sorry...
是啊。今天收工早，所以我自己出来找点事做。
Yeah, we finish early today. I'm out on my own trying to look for something to do.
那个，我们之前有见过吗？抱歉，我好像没什么印象了…
Er, have we met before? Sorry, I don't seem to remember...
是我把你从大矿区救出来的…
I saved you from the Great Mine...
啊！我想起来了！抱歉，我的视力很差，居然连自己的救命恩人都没看清楚！
Ahhhh! I remember now! Sorry, I have poor vision. Can't believe I didn't recognize the person who saved my life!
我们是刚从矿坑里出土的…
We were just unearthed from a mine...
欸！矿坑里挖出了大活人？我可没听说有这种事啊…你不介意让我贴近点看看吧？
What? Living humans from the mine? I've never heard of that... Do you mind if I take a closer look?
哎呀，原来是你！抱歉，我的视力太差了，居然连自己的救命恩人都没看清楚！
What? It's you! I'm sorry I have poor vision. Can't believe I didn't recognize the person who saved my life!
之前在大矿区能获得你的帮助，我真是太幸运了…要不然的话，我的全部积蓄都可能被那群流浪者给抢走了……
I was so lucky to be saved by you in the Great Mine... Or my entire savings would've been taken away by those tramps...
那个，现在暂时没看到有洞螈活动的迹象…请问你有什么想聊的吗？
Well, I don't think there are signs of olm activities right now... is there anything else you want to chat about?
地下有什么值得去的地方吗？
值得去的地方吗？我想想……
歌德大饭店应该算一个吧？然后好像就剩搏击俱乐部了。
The Goethe Grand Hotel probably. And then it's the Fight Club.
Tell me about the Goethe Grand Hotel.
歌德大饭店就在那边，喏。怎么样，很气派吧？毕竟这是歌德家族在下层区的头家店铺呢，而且还是贝洛伯格的总店哦！
The Goethe Grand Hotel is right there. It's fancy, isn't it? After all, this is the Goethe family's first shop in the Underworld. It's the main store in Belobog!
饭店的主人是歌蒂大婶，也是我师傅，不知道你们见过没…
Gertie is the owner of the hotel and also my master. Not sure if you've met her...
她的厨艺很棒的，你们有机会一定要尝一尝。
She's a great cook. You should try the food she makes.
Tell me about the Fight Club.
搏击俱乐部…据说每天都有职业拳手的搏击表演，甚至还有怪物什么的…晚上总是很热闹。
The Fight Club... it's said that there are professional boxers fighting and monsters everyday... it's especially lively at night.
不过我不喜欢看那些，有点害怕，就…其实我也没去过。这些都是我道听途说的，不好意思呀。
But I don't like those. They scare me... I've never been there. I only heard this from other people. I'm sorry.
没事没事！虽然这地下不像上层区那么气派，但也希望你们能在这儿玩得开心！
No worries! Although the Underworld is not as fancy as the Overworld, I hope you'll enjoy your time here!
Why do you want to catch olms?
虽然这个答案听起来像玩笑，但事实就是这样哦。洞螈在这下层区可是经常上餐桌的呢，很多人都会买来吃的。
It may sound funny but it's true. Olms are a common food in the Underworld. Many people would buy them for cooking.
说到这个——你们要是有机会去歌德大饭店的话，可一定要尝尝他们家的铁罐焖螈肉。
Speaking of which, make sure you try the Iron Pot Braised Olm at the Goethe Grand Hotel.
我敢和你们打包票：这是下层区最美味的洞螈料理，没有之一！
I can assure you, that is the most delicious olm dish in the Underworld!
啊…一想到那香酥的面包皮和多汁鲜嫩的洞螈肉，我的口水都要流下来啦。真不愧是歌蒂师傅啊……
Ahhh... it makes me drool whenever I think of the crispy puff and the juicy olm meat. Master Gertie is such a wonderful cook...
Do you take any side jobs?
唔…基本上是吧？平时放工之后我就会拿着捕网去捉洞螈……
Well... I do. I will grab a net to catch olms after work...
不过，总感觉挣不到什么钱呢。我经常是好不容易捉到两三只，想要拿去卖掉的时候，就被告知洞螈已经降价了……
However, I don't think I'm making any money. I usually can only catch two or three. When I try to sell them, I am told the price of olm has dropped...
你试过捉洞螈以外的兼职吗？
Have you ever tried any other part-time job than catching olms?
嗯…是有尝试过啦，还不少呢。
Well... I did, actually quite a few.
不过也就仅限于尝试啦…毕竟我到最后总会发现，其他活计做起来比捉洞螈累姑且不说，挣得也没有这么多……
But I only tried once or twice... In the end I realize the other jobs are more tiring than catching olms. Also, I'm not making much more money...
可是捉洞螈也赚不了多少嘛！真搞不懂为什么会这样…是我运气太差了吗？呜呜……
But catching olms is already not very profitable! I really don't get it... am I just unlucky? *sob*
I shouldn't keep you. Best of luck.
好像有什么东西钻出来了…
Hey? Did the olm come out?
不好意思，我得去拿捕网了…先失陪啦。
Sorry, I have to get my net... Excuse me.
唉，今天还一条洞螈都没抓到呢…是我太着急了吗？
*sigh* I haven't caught any olms today... Is it because I'm not patient enough?
…咦？你是什么时候来的？不好意思呀，我在抓洞螈呢，没注意到你。
...Hey? When did you arrive? Sorry, I was catching olms and I didn't notice you were here.
不过估计一时半会也抓不到洞螈啦…要先来聊聊天吗？
But I don't think I can catch any olms any time soon... Do you want to chat with me?
最近？我正打算去上层区找点兼职呢，嘿嘿。
Well, I plan to look for some part-time jobs in the Overworld, hehe.
是啊…忙活了这么久，抓洞螈赚的钱还不够我去集会所买杯饮料呢。不过我的洞螈烹饪手艺倒是有进步……
Yes... I can't even afford a drink at the Gathering Place with what I've earned from catching olms. Still, I've become a better cook of olm dishes...
那你矿场的工作怎么办？
What about your job at the mine?
只是去兼职，矿场的工作当然不会耽误啦。反正坐缆车通勤也花不了多长时间，我已经做好心理准备了。
I'll only be working part-time, so it won't affect my job at the mine. It doesn't take long to commute by cable car anyway. I'm mentally prepared for it.
每天都去上层区？不累吗？
Wouldn't it be tiring to travel to the Overworld daily?
我倒是考虑过这个问题…不过坐缆车通勤也花不了多长时间嘛，我已经做好心理准备啦。
I've considered the issue. It doesn't take long to commute by cable car and I'm mentally prepared for it.
总之，现在就等上下层区正式开放咯，不知道能找到什么样的工作呢？啊，走之前还得和歌蒂师傅说一声……
Anyway, I'm just waiting for the Over and Underworlds to open up. I wonder what kind of job I'll be able to land. Oh, I should talk to Master Gertie before I leave.
假如一直低着头行走，每一步都害怕陷进泥潭…我们的脚步一定会越发沉重，士气也会变得低迷。
If you walk with your head down and your heart full of fear, your steps will grow heavier and your spirit will suffer.
如果我们找到了某样值得仰望的东西…满怀希望地上路，步子都会变得轻盈，就算被绊倒了也能很快振作起来，重新出发。
But if you find something to look up to and move forward with hope, then your steps will grow lighter... and if you should fall, you'll be on your feet before you know it.
——谢谢你们教会了我这些，开拓者。
...Thank you for teaching me this, Trailblazers.
有时间聊聊吗，布洛妮娅？
Do you have time to chat, Bronya?
当然有，{NICKNAME}。和你谈话总能让我受益良多。
Of course, I do, {NICKNAME}. I've always benefited lots from our discussions.
当上「大守护者」的感觉如何？
How does it feel to be the Supreme Guardian?
于我而言，「大守护者」不过是个称号，仅此而已。不管有没有这个头衔，我都会坚持做正确的事。
For me, it's just a title and nothing more. I'll still stick to doing the right thing with or without this title.
…但站在民众的角度来看则不然。「大守护者」在他们眼中是一个分量极重的符号——它象征的不仅是城市的领袖，更是未来的希望。
...But not from the point of view of the people. For them, the Supreme Guardian is a powerful symbol — not just of the city's leadership, but also of a future with hope.
所以，我必须更加严格地审视自己的思想。必须时刻记住，我的每一个决策都可能影响成百上千人的生活……
So I have to re-examine my thinking more critically. I have to always bear in mind that every decision I make could affect the lives of thousands of people...
这个担子很重。实话说，我也不知道自己能否胜任。但我很幸运——因为我不需要独自承受这一切。
It's a heavy load to bear. To be honest, I don't even know if I can do it. But I'm lucky — because I don't have to go through it all alone.
What plans do you have next?
头等大事当然是振兴贝洛伯格…啊，听上去还是太笼统了，对吧？
The number one priority is to revitalize Belobog... Ah, it still sounds so vague, doesn't it?
落实到具体的行动上，我认为排在第一位的莫过于重新梳理贝洛伯格的经济环境。
As for specific actions, I think the number one priority is to reorganize the economy of Belobog.
封锁令对上下层区的财政状况造成了巨大的影响。眼下，普通的下层区矿民根本无法承受行政区的物价。
The blockade has had a huge impact on the Overworld and Underworld economies. Right now, ordinary miners in the Underworld can't bear the high cost of living in the Administrative District.
假如现状不能改变，那上下层区的再融合也就无从谈起。我已经安排了与几位财政大臣的会面，希望能商量出基本的改革方向。

If things don't get better, then you can forget about reintegrating the Overworld and the Underworld. I've booked meetings with several of the finance ministers to try to hammer out a basic direction for reforms.
——当然，这只是振兴计划的第一环。希望这能成为一个好的开始。
— Of course, this is only the first step in a great revitalization plan. I hope it will be a strong start.
关于母亲…我只能尽力不去回想她临终前的样子。
As for Mom... All I can do is keep myself from remembering how she looked before she passed.
{NICKNAME}，不管她在你们眼里是什么形象，可可利亚大人都是我唯一的亲人。我之所以能成为今天的布洛妮娅…很大程度上归功于她的教导。
{NICKNAME}, no matter what she might look like to you, Madam Cocolia was my only living family. Everything that has made me into the person I am... I owe it to her teachings.
我不知道她是从何时开始踏入了歧途，但一直以来，她倾注在我身上的只有纯粹的爱…我不相信那也是「星核」干涉的结果。
I don't know when she started going astray, but this whole time, all she's ever done has been to shower me with love... And I don't think that's the Stellaron's influence.
与其杵在这死气沉沉的办公室里，她更想用自己的双手改变现状。何况她心里始终挂念着下层区的事，想强行留住也难。
She wants to get stuck into some material change, rather than stick around in this lifeless office. She was always thinking about the Underworld. You can't stop someone like that from leaving.
希儿是个行动派，她在互相推诿的会议桌上没法发挥自己的强项。她清楚自己最擅长什么…作为朋友、战友，我理应支持她的选择。
Seele is a doer. She can't do what she does best at the negotiation table. She knows where her strengths lie... And as a friend and fellow fighter, I support her choice.
况且，只要我发出需要帮助的讯号…我知道她一定会回到我身边。这样就够了。
Besides, if I send a signal asking for her help... I know she'll return to me. And that's all I need.
感谢你的时间，布洛妮娅。
再见，{NICKNAME}。祝愿你们的旅途一切顺利。
So long, {NICKNAME}. I wish you all the best on your journey.
虽然现在的贝洛伯格千疮百孔…但只要观察得足够细致，就总能发现它迷人的一面。
Despite Belobog being in a terrible state these days... You can always find its charming side, if only you look carefully enough.
我相信你拥有一双能够发觉细微之美的眼睛，「开拓者」。希望你能在贝洛伯格度过一段美好的时光。
I trust you have a meticulous eye for beauty, Trailblazer. I hope you have a great time in Belobog.
不瞒你说，一想到我再也看不到她的面容…想大哭一场的冲动就会一个劲地涌上来。但我现在绝对不能表现出懦弱。
Honestly speaking, the thought of not seeing her again... always wells me up with tears. Yet, now is not the time for me to show my vulnerable side.
So, let's talk about something else, {NICKNAME}.
能聊聊和公司打交道的事吗？
Can we talk about dealings with the IPC?
当然可以——关于这件事，值得聊的内容可太多了…正好现在咱们都有空，那就好好展开说说吧。
Of course we can talk about that! There's much that is worth discussing... We're both free, what's on your mind?
What do you think about Topaz?
Miss Topaz... She is very complex.
从她给我的信里，我能看到她真诚的一面；但她也会对我隐瞒重要的信息，用手段逼迫我们照她的思路行事。
From the letter she gave me, I could sense her sincerity. Yet she would also withhold important information from me, and coerce and manipulate us into doing what she desires.
但我能感受到，她的确是打心底在为这颗星球的未来着想——哪怕她坚持的方式无法被所有人接受。
However, I can feel that she is sincerely working for the future of this planet from the bottom of her heart, even if not everyone can accept her methods.
没错，还好她能站在我们这边…这就叫因祸得福吧？贝洛伯格经历了一番重大的考验，但也因此获得了一位强大的盟友。

You're right. It's a relief that she is on our side... I guess this is what you'd call a blessing in disguise, right? Though Belobog experienced a great trial, it also gained a powerful ally because of it.
这一点，我跟你看法相同。但她所代表的势力，以及她展现出来的手腕，也让我们不得不心怀戒备。
This is something we agree on. Though the power that she represents and the calculated schemes that she has displayed have caused us to remain guarded.
幸好她现在能站在我们这边…这就叫因祸得福吧？贝洛伯格经历了一番重大的考验，但也因此获得了一位强大的盟友。
It's a relief that she is on our side now... I guess this is what you'd call a blessing in disguise, right? Though Belobog experienced a great trial, it also gained a powerful ally because of it.
但愿这能让「公司」暂时打消干预雅利洛-Ⅵ的念头。希望托帕小姐的承诺有足够的分量……
My wish is that this will make the IPC abandon their idea of interfering with Jarilo-VI. I hope Miss Topaz's promise carries enough weight...
你当时差点就签了合同。
You almost signed the contract back then.
没错…我当时正处在崩溃的边缘。幸好姬子小姐及时出现，带来了事件的全貌。
That's right... At that moment, I was on the verge of breaking down. Fortunately, Miss Himeko appeared in time and explained the whole picture.
我不知道托帕为什么没在信里提及那些数字和概率…是她对自己足够自信？还是她在刻意隐瞒？
I wonder why Topaz didn't mention the numbers and probability in her letter... Was she confident enough in herself? Or did she deliberately hide them from me?
…但那都不重要了，我该反思的是自己当时的状态。我差点就被压力击倒了…在那个瞬间，我能想到的只有逃避责任、一了百了。

...Well, that's no longer important. What I need to reflect on is how I felt at that moment, I almost caved to the pressure... At that moment, all I wanted was to escape my responsibilities, once and for all.
如果事情没有出现转机，我可能会辜负全城民众的信任…还有希儿的信任。我必须吸取教训，继续成长——我的意志必须更加坚定。
If things had not turned around, I may have betrayed the trust of all our citizens... and Seele's, too. I must learn from this lesson and continue to grow. My will must be stronger!
There are many IPC people in the city.
对，是我同意让他们驻留在贝洛伯格的。
Indeed, I permitted them to station in Belobog.
留在这里的都是托帕小姐最信任的员工，他们似乎管这叫「技术支援类外派驻场」。
Those that are stationed here are all Topaz's most trusted employees. It seems they call this place an "Exo-Technical Support Dispatch Zone."
不管怎么说，我们一定用得上公司的技术。如果他们能安分守己地协助市民开展工作，贝洛伯格说不定能在一代人的时间里就完成他们口中的「技术跃迁」……

Whatever the case, we can definitely make use of the IPC's technology. If they can know their place and assist the citizens in their work, Belobog may even complete this "tech-leap" they speak of within a generation...
你能想象吗，{NICKNAME}？或许有朝一日——等我卸下大守护者的职责之后——我们真的可以并肩旅行。这不再是个白日梦了。
Can you imagine, {NICKNAME}? There may come a day — once I step down from my role as Supreme Guardian — that we could really set out to travel together. This is no longer just a pipe dream.
有关造物引擎和造物之柱…
About the Engine of Creation and Pillars of Creation...
诸位出发去找托帕以后，我立即通过贝洛伯格的城市广播进行了宣讲。
When you went in search of Topaz, I immediately made an appeal to the people on the Belobog city radio.
我将和公司相关的一连串事件背景都告知了民众，并呼吁他们拿起身边的工具，跟随铁卫一同前往北方，投入重铸造物引擎的工程。

I told the citizens everything behind the events surrounding the IPC, and urged them to pick up their tools and join the Silvermane guards northward, to direct their efforts toward the rebuilding of the Engine of Creation.
结果各位也看到了——不论背景出身、身份高低，上下层区的贝洛伯格人团结在了一起，为了维护这个世界的自由自主贡献力量。

And you all saw the outcome. The citizens of Belobog — regardless of background and status, both Underworlder and Overworlder — have all come together to contribute to maintaining the freedom and autonomy of this world.
我很高兴，{NICKNAME}…这一次我不必再编织话术，不必再为了安稳牺牲真诚。
I'm so happy, {NICKNAME}... I no longer have to concoct a lie this time. I don't have to sacrifice my sincerity for the sake of stability.
或许有那么一天…人们也能坦然地接受那个真相。
Perhaps, one day... people will also be able to calmly accept "that truth."
哟，{NICKNAME}。没想到你还没走啊——怎么，还在留恋贝洛伯格？
Hey, {NICKNAME}. I didn't expect you to still be here — don't tell me you've fallen in love with Belobog?
…也是。你们去过那么多世界，肯定见过不少神奇的景色。贝洛伯格这巴掌大的地方，恐怕没什么吸引力吧？
...Kinda. You've been all over the place and seen so many incredible sights. I bet a small place like Belobog has nothing to write home about, right?
嘿，我还以为贝洛伯格这巴掌大的地方入不了你的法眼呢。
Hmm, I thought a small town like Belobog would be beneath someone like you.
贝洛伯格——下层区是我的家，我唯一熟悉的地方。有机会的话，我也想去见识见识外面的广阔世界…但绝对不是现在。
Belobog... the Underworld's my home, the only place I've ever known. If I get the chance, I'd love to see the world out there... But definitely not right now.
这里的人们需要帮助。我必须陪在他们身边，尽自己的一份力。
People here need help. I have to stay with them and do my part.
好啊，趁着现在有空——你想聊什么？
Okay, I'm free at the moment — What do you want to talk about?
你不待在布洛妮娅身边吗？
成天待在那座冰冰凉的大城堡里？放过我吧，我可习惯不了那种生活。
Staying all day cooped up in that ice castle? Spare me — I could never get used to that lifestyle.
真不知道布洛妮娅是怎么做到的——每天翻看那么多文件，听那么多人在耳边叨叨…换成我的话，迟早会疯掉。
I have no idea how Bronya does it — poring over all those documents every day, having to listen to all that idle chit-chat... I would've gone mad long ago.
我还是更适合户外的工作。况且，下层区还有很多我认识的人需要帮忙。这些想法我都跟布洛妮娅说了，她很支持。
I prefer working outside. Besides, there's a lot of people I know in the Underworld who need help. I've shared these thoughts with Bronya, and she's supportive.
当然，如果她需要我的话…我立马就会赶回去。即使站在她的位置，很多事情也必须借我之手解决…分工明确，没什么可抱怨的。
Of course, if she needs me... I'll be back in a snap. Even she needs somebody like me to help solve certain matters... We know our roles, and there's nothing to complain about.
How are things down in the Underworld?
不怎么样，不过已经有些好转的征兆了。
Not good — but there're some signs of improvement.
娜塔和奥列格头儿每天都在四处奔忙，帮忙协调上下层区的贸易重启。我对商业、经济什么的一窍不通，不想去给他们添倒忙。
Nat and Oleg run around every day, helping to coordinate getting trade started again. I don't know a thing about commerce, so I don't wanna bother them.
反倒是流浪者那边——据我所知，他们中的大部分都步入正轨了，但也免不了有些混球想借这个机会发笔横财。
But the vagrants — most of them are on the right track as far as I know, but naturally there're a few ne'er-do-wells who are trying to line their pockets with ill-gotten gains.
我现在就专注于教训那些家伙。得让他们明白，不论处于什么时期，干偷鸡摸狗的勾当都是会被惩罚的。
I'm just focusing on teaching those guys a lesson. Gotta make them understand that if they break the law, they're gonna be punished — no matter what era we're living in.
Are you still working for Wildfire?
当然。从懂事起，帮「地火」做事就是我生活中最重要的部分。
Sure. Since I was a child, helping Wildfire has become the most important thing in my life.
我知道，「地火」的组建原本就是为了弥补银鬃铁卫的缺席，如果上下层区恢复了往常的样子，那「地火」也就没必要存在了。

I know that Wildfire was originally formed due to the absence of any Silvermane Guards. If things are back to normal between the Overworld and the Underworld, then there's no need for Wildfire to keep going on.
但…只要娜塔觉得「地火」还有存在的必要，那我就不会摘掉这条红绸带。
But... if Nat thinks there's still a need for Wildfire, then who am I to disagree?
哪场？哦——你是说和可可利亚的战斗？
Which one? Oh — you mean the fight with Cocolia?
说来奇怪，有关那场战斗的细节我已经记不太清了。我只记得你被那个女人的武器贯穿，然后又神奇地站了起来……
Weirdly enough, I can't remember any details from that fight. I just remember you getting impaled by that woman's weapon, and then miraculously getting straight up again...
老实说，我完全没搞懂那时发生了什么。不过你居然有原地起死回生的能力，仔细想想还真是方便啊……
To be honest, I have no idea what was going on then. But it's incredible to think of you just coming back from the dead like that...
Actually, that wasn't any power of mine...
不是吗？那你到底是怎么……
No? Then how did you do it...
欸，打住打住——你是不是又要说什么「星神」、「命途」之类的玩意了？我可没兴趣啊，还是留着下次再说吧。
Ah, stop it — don't give me that fluff about "Aeons" and "Paths" again. I'm not interested. Save it for next time.
That's right. I have the power!
嚯，自信真好。不过你也确实有吹牛的资本。
Well, it's good to have confidence. But I suppose in this case, you really do have bragging rights.
要不是最近都快忙不过来了，我真想抽空跟你切磋切磋，交流一下作战技巧——以后总有机会的，你觉得呢？
I would really wanna take some time to learn from you and trade combat skills if I weren't so busy — but we'll get our chance some day. Right?
下次见，替我跟三月和丹恒问好。
So long. Say hello to March and Dan Heng for me.
这里是我的家，我唯一熟悉的地方。有机会的话，我也想去见识见识外面的广阔世界…但现在还不是时候。
This is my home, the only place I've ever known. If I get the chance, I'd love to see the world out there... but now's not the time.
这个世界需要时间恢复，娜塔和布洛妮娅也需要我帮忙。我必须陪在他们所有人身边，尽自己的一份力。
The world needs time to recover. Nat and Bronya need my help. I have to stay with them and do my part.
我就知道她会做出正确的决定。
I knew that she would make the right choice.
星球没有被抢走，也没有更多人受伤——皆大欢喜，是吧？
Our planet was not taken over, and no more people were harmed... All's well that ends well, right?
Indeed, all's well that ends well.
You look like it's still weighing on your mind.
…被你看出来了啊。的确，我脑子里一直在复盘这整件事……
...You can see right through me. Yep, my mind has been going over this whole thing non-stop...
我原本以为，没了「星核」的祸害，这里的日子肯定会一天比一天好过。但现实和设想却差了好远。
I originally thought that without the Stellaron's destruction, life here would just get better by the day. However, the reality was far from how I imagined.
过去，任何问题似乎都可以靠拳头解决——不管发生了什么，我手里这柄镰刀就是硬道理。
In the past, it seemed that you could solve any problem with your fists... No matter what happened, the scythe in my hand made the rules.
但拿这次的事来说，面对不能靠蛮力战胜的对手…我不擅长处理这种问题，和人交涉、互相算计什么的…这对我来说太难了。

But just look at what happened this time. The enemy can't be beaten with brute force... I'm no good at things like this. Negotiating with people, plotting against each other... This is all just too difficult for me.
老实说，我会感觉有点迷茫…到底该怎么做才能算是帮到了布洛妮娅，帮到了贝洛伯格的大家？
To be honest, I feel a little lost... what am I supposed to do to help Bronya and the people of Belobog?
我要学的东西实在太多了。除了继续锻炼变强，我还得用其它方式武装自己。
There's just too much that I need to learn. I have to arm myself in other ways, not just through training and getting stronger.
冷静的头脑是最强大的武器。
A calm and composed mind is the most powerful weapon.
这话怎么听着这么耳熟…啊，想起来了！我最近在读的《斯维特兰娜战术集》里有一句话，好像和你说的是一个意思。
Why does that phrase sound familiar... Ah, I remember! There was a quote in "Svetlana's Stratagems" that I was reading recently, I think it said the same thing.
不必给自己那么大压力。
There's no need to put so much pressure on yourself.
呵，倒不是压力——我只是觉得事到如今，学习已经成了我必须尽到的责任。
Hah, that's no pressure! I just think that with the way things are now, studying is a responsibility that I must accept.
我最近在读一本叫《斯维特兰娜战术集》的书，军事相关的——里面有一句话让我印象深刻。
I've recently been reading a book called "Svetlana's Stratagems" about military strategy... There was one phrase in there that left a deep impression on me.
「在任何时候都能保持冷静的、批判性的思维方式，不被时而涌现的情绪蒙蔽，是身为将领最基本、却也是最难得的品质。」
"Being able to remain calm and maintain critical thought at any time, without allowing bursts of emotions to blind you, is the most basic, yet also the most rare quality of a leader."
…我离书里说的境界还差得很远。之前在大矿区的时候，我果然还是被一时的火气给左右了…要不然，我说不定还能从那些黑衣人嘴里套出更多信息。

...I am still far from the standard this book sets out. When I was in the Great Mine, I was thrown off by a moment of rage... If I had stayed cool, I might have been able to get a little more information from those people in black.
你已经成长很多了，希儿。
You have already grown a lot, Seele.
你当真这么觉得？不是单纯在顺着我的话往下说？
Do you really think so? You're not just trying to appease me?
贝洛伯格能有你是种幸运。
Belobog is lucky to have you.
怎、怎么突然这么一本正经地夸人，怪不像你的……
Wh—What are you doing? You can't just randomly praise people like that. It's not like you...
…呵，算了，反正我要做的事都是一样。在下层区荒废的这些年，我要靠加倍…不，三倍的努力给追回来，至少不能被那群铁卫正规军给看扁了！

...Hah, forget it. What I have to do remains the same. I have to double... no, triple my efforts to get back all those years I wasted in the Underworld. I can't allow myself to be underestimated by those official Silvermane Guards!
毕竟我答应了布洛妮娅，要和她一起把守那个秘密——要是我不到半程就掉队，压在她身上的担子可就太重了。
After all, I promised Bronya that I would protect that secret with her... If I were to drop out halfway, the burden would be too heavy for her to carry alone.
话说回来，那些黑衣人，他们虽然惹出不少乱子，但一个个的好像都挺见多识广的……
Having said that, those people in black clothes... though they've caused a lot of trouble, they all seem pretty educated...
…嗯，就这么决定了。从今天起，我要多跟那些外派的公司员工交流，看看能不能从他们身上学到些有用的技能。
...Alright, I've decided. From today forth, I will communicate more with those external IPC workers and see if I can learn any useful skills from them.
希望你们的探索有所进展，{NICKNAME}，也希望病痛远离你们的旅程。
I hope your exploration will make progress, {NICKNAME}, and your journey will be free of pain.
当然，就算不小心受了伤也不用慌张，全都交给医生就好了。
Of course, even if you get injured by accident, no need to panic. Just leave it to the doctor.
We meet again, {NICKNAME}. How have you been?
托你们的福，这里的人们重新找回了希望。和上层的贸易渠道重新打通以后，很多此前浑浑度日的人也重拾了生活的动力。
With your help, the people here have regained hope. Reopening trade routes with the Overworld has given life new meaning for people who were once struggling just to get by.
尽管还有很多问题有待解决…但这无疑是个美妙的开端。这些都要归功于你，开拓者。
Even though there're still many things to fix... it sure is a great start. And it's all thanks to you, Trailblazer.
You want to talk with me? Any time.
下层区的大家过得如何？
How's everyone going down in the Underworld?
忙碌，充实。并不是每个人都能一下适应生活中发生的剧变，或许也有人的生意会因为封锁解除受到影响……
Busy, and well. Not everyone can just get used to all the changes so fast, and some businesses might be impacted by the lifting of the blockade...
但我没有听到什么抱怨的声音。我想，下层的每个人都知道自由来之不易，值得好好珍惜。
But I haven't heard any complaints at all. I think everyone in the Underworld knows that freedom is hard-earned — and worth cherishing.
你为他们…为我们重新点燃了信念。相信「只要付出汗水和努力，生活就一定会给我们报偿」的信念。
You've rekindled hope for them... for us. You know the saying: "As long as we put in the hard work, life will pay out dividends." I believe that.
Have lots of people been getting sick?
…诊所还是人满为患呢。虽然上层区的医疗设施更完备，人手也更充足……
...The clinic's still packed with patients. Even though there're better medical facilities and more health staff up in the Overworlds...
但是大部分下层区人都付不起高昂的医疗费用。而且，据我所知…他们也不太信得过上层区的那些医生。
Most people down from the Underworld can't afford expensive medical bills. And as far as I know... They don't really trust those Overworld doctors.
我和妈妈又聊过几次，她会想办法为下层区居民提供就医支持。不过，对于那些已经习惯了我的治疗方式的患者来说…要做出改变大概很困难吧？
I've been talking it over with Mom, and she'll do her best to give medical support for the Underworld people. But will all those patients who're used to my style... be able to make that change?
有人的地方就摆脱不了病痛损伤的陪伴。只要我的手脚还能活动自如，我就会继续履行医生应尽的责任。
Wherever there are people, so there must be pain and sickness. As long as I can still move these arms and legs of mine, I'll keep performing my duty as a doctor.
啊…关于瓦赫的事，我也想再次向你道谢。
Ah, Vache. I want to thank you again for that.
偶尔会有一种想法在我脑海中浮现——如果给我一个机会回到从前，我是不是有办法阻止哥哥误入歧途……
I sometimes get this thought popping up in my head — if I had the chance to go back in time, could I have stopped him from being led astray...
但类似的想法只会存在一瞬间。我们改变不了过去——在永远单向的人生旅程上，我们不断地选择、犯错…并为自己造成的后果担起责任。

But such thoughts only last for a second. We can't change the past — we're constantly making choices and mistakes on this one-way journey into the future that we call life... and also taking responsibility for our actions.
瓦赫为他犯下的罪恶付出了代价。万幸他在生命的最后没有继续沉沦，为这座城市留下了自己的研究结晶。
Vache has paid the price for his crimes. Fortunately, he'd turned things around before the end of his life, leaving his research behind for the good of the city.
好坏参半，这样的人生已经足够完整，我不必替他感到遗憾。
For better or for worse, such a life is so complete that I don't have to feel sorry for him anymore.
老实说，你们带来胜利的消息以后，我的第一反应就是…「地火」这些年来的任务终于结束了。
To be honest, after you brought news of the victory, my first reaction was... Wildfire's mission after all these years is finally over.
有些话我不会对满腔热情的年轻成员说——但对你，我可以完全坦诚。
There are some things I can't say to our younger members — but with you I can be completely candid.
维持下层区秩序的工作总有一天会被交还到银鬃铁卫手中，这是必然的结果。「地火」来自民间，最终也会归于民间。
The job of maintaining public order down in the Underworld will one day be handed back to the Silvermane Guards. Wildfire came out of the community, and will ultimately return to the community.
啊，听上去好像有些伤感呢。不过在未来可见的一段时间里，「地火」肯定还会活跃在下层区。毕竟，外面还有太多繁杂的事务需要有人处理。
Ah, that all sounds a little sad. However, Wildfire will remain active in the Underworld for the foreseeable future. After all, there's too much trouble out there that needs someone to help handle.
It's always a pleasure to talk with you, {NICKNAME}.
再见，{NICKNAME}。诊所的大门永远都为你敞开。
Goodbye, {NICKNAME}. The doors of our clinic will always be wide open for you.
公司的处理你还满意吗？
Are you happy with how the IPC are handling things?
其实从公司决定介入这件事起，我们就没有多少选择的余地。如果不是那位托帕小姐高抬贵手，现在的局势想必会麻烦许多。

Honestly, ever since the IPC decided to get involved, we've ceased to have any freedom to make our own decisions. If it weren't for the mercy of Miss Topaz, the current situation would be a lot more dire.
面对强权不卑不亢、面对刁难据理力争，布洛妮娅已经证明了她作为大守护者的优秀品质，我对她的评价又涨了一分。

Unawed when faced with overwhelming power and malevolence, fighting to get any advantage she can — Bronya has proven her outstanding qualities as a Supreme Guardian. My opinion of her has only improved.
这颗星球需要时间，托帕为我们争取到的权益不一定长久。为了预防公司在未来的某天收回承诺，我们必须加快脚步。
This planet needs time. The rights that Topaz has fought to earn us may not last forever. We need to speed up our progress in case the IPC someday backtracks on its commitments.
不过，贝洛伯格的命运尚且掌握在它的孩子们手中，没有什么比这更值得欣慰的了。
Although, there is nothing more comforting than knowing that the fate of Belobog still lays in the hands of its children.
哟，这不是帮我修过东西的「外来者」嘛？
Hey, aren't you the outsider who helped me fix my stuff?
今天找我有什么事？机修、聊天或者听歌都可以哦。
What are you after today? Repairs, a chat, or just listening to music?
啊，难不成你下定决心要做我的助手了？欢迎欢迎～
Ah, so you've made up your mind about becoming my assistant, then? Welcome!
哈哈，刚刚只是开玩笑。想聊些什么？
机械屋到底是做什么的？
What does the workshop actually do?
看看这装潢——想必你也能猜到了吧？这里当然是维修机械的店铺啦。
Just look at the decor — you can probably guess, right? It's a mechanical repairs shop, of course.
You can fix all kinds of machines?
当然咯～这贝洛伯格可没有我修不好的东西。
Of course! There's nothing in Belobog that I can't fix.
小到地髓供暖器，大到汽车引擎，甚至是铁卫制式的自动机兵，对我来说都不成问题——啊，不过汽车和机兵车当然不能在这里修，有需要的话我会上门的。

Anything as small as a Geomarrow radiator to as large as a car engine — or even a Silvermane automaton — ah, but of course cars and automatons can't be dragged into this small room. I offer an outcall service for those.
另外，除了常见设备的维修翻新，机械屋还提供新功能附装的服务。比如，为推雪机增加外悬挂钻头、为烤面包机加装弹道计算装置……
As well as maintenance and renovations of everyday things, we also had a modding service — like fitting an external drill bit to a snowplow, or a ballistic computer to a toaster...
总之，我们机械屋的服务宗旨就是——没有我们做不到，只有你想不到！有什么需求就尽管来找我吧，姐姐可以给你个友情价哦。
Put simply, the motto of our workshop is: Nothing is unfixable, as long as you can imagine it! Come see us if there's anything we can do, we'll give you a friendly price.
哈哈哈，开个玩笑。我这机械屋的生意嘛，说多不多、说少不少，收入基本和我日常开销持平吧。
Haha, just kidding. There's not much to say about our workshop's business. I make about as much as we spend each day.
不过我也不打算卯着劲挣钱——人生苦短，这一辈子光挣钱有什么意思？有时间还不如多搞搞自己的兴趣爱好呢。
But I don't plan on just working for a crust — life is short, so what's the point of just living to make money? If I've got the time, I'd rather be tinkering on my hobbies.
啊，说到这个…我们机械屋偶尔也会有「摇滚演出」——你要是感兴趣的话，不如来捧个场？
Ah, speaking of which... We sometimes put on rock gigs here at the workshop. Why don't you come check it out, if you like?
What else would you like to chat about?
I heard there are gigs here sometimes?
是啊，你听谁说的？那人真有眼光！
That's right. Who told you that? They must have great taste!
在这上层区，把我们的摇滚艺术称作「演出」的人可算不多…大多数人都管我们的表演叫「噪音」，哈哈。
Not many people up in the Overworld consider our rock art a "gig"... Most people just call it "noise," haha.
We're called Mechanical Fever — cool eh?
哈，这你可问到点子上啦。
Ha, you've gotten straight to the point.
吉他手兼主唱嘛，当然是我啦。键盘手是我们朗道家最小最可爱的妹妹——玲可。
Guitar and vocals are handled by me, of course. The keyboardist is the youngest and cutest of us Landaus — Lynx.
鼓手是银鬃铁卫的要员之一，名叫佩拉。她经常在外面做义工…最近应该是在广场上给小孩子当导游吧？
On drums is Pela, one of the Silvermane Guards. She's always out on duty... These days, she should be out in the plaza watching over the kids.
至于贝斯手，我们乐队暂时没有……
As for the bassist, we don't have one...
原因嘛，和可可利亚有点关系…具体的细节就不方便透露啦。
And it's got something to do with Cocolia... I can't really say more than that.
演出？随缘咯～想起来就开，想不起来就算了…这就是摇滚的精神！
Gig? Whenever we want~ If we want it, we do it — otherwise, we don't. That's rock music!
像你这样对我们乐队感兴趣的人还挺少见的，还想聊些什么吗？
It's pretty rare to have someone like you who's so interested in our band. What else would you like to chat about?
行，之后还想聊天的话我也随时有空。
Cool, I'll be free to chat later whenever you want.
…咦？这不是被大守护者通缉的「外来者」嘛！铁卫正满世界找你们呢！
...Huh? Aren't you that outsider who's wanted by the Supreme Guardian!? The guards are out hunting all over the place for you!
我看你们就别大摇大摆地在外面闲逛了，先在我这机械屋避避风头吧。
I think you should stop strutting outside so brazenly, and keep your head down here in my workshop.
这节骨眼上还想着聊天啊…不过我没什么意见——想聊什么？
Chatting at a time like this... But that's okay with me. What would you like to chat about?
出了这机械屋我可就没办法罩着你了，在外边千万要小心啊。
I can't protect you if you step out of the workshop, so please be utterly careful outside.
哟，这不是「开拓者」{NICKNAME}嘛。欢迎光临机械屋！
Oh hey, it's {NICKNAME} the Trailblazer. Welcome to the workshop!
估计你也不是来修东西的…啊，我这不是在抱怨，别误会～
I'll hazard a guess that you didn't come looking for repairs... I'm not complaining. Don't get me wrong.
看在咱俩的交情上，把机械屋当成自己家就好啦——累了就在这儿随便休息吧。
Based on our friendship, you can just treat the workshop like your second home — come have a rest any time you're feeling tired.
好啊，之后想聊天的话我也随时都在哦。
Alright. I'll be here any time if you want to chat later.
啊，你是说铁卫禁区那件事吗？老弟他只受了些皮肉伤，没什么大碍，放心吧——他可是铁卫的戍卫官，没那么脆弱。
Oh, you mean the thing in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone? He just suffered a few flesh wounds, nothing serious. Don't worry — he's captain of the Silvermane Guards, so he isn't that fragile.
在你们深入北方的裂界之后，我和老弟带着铁卫又勉强抵挡了几波攻势，最后瞅准了时机才把禁区大门重新关上。
After you went north into the Fragmentum, Gepard and I held off several waves of attack with some Silvermane Guards. We finally took our chances and shut off the entrance to the restricted zone.
有一说一，那场面可真是太惊险了…怪物没完没了地从裂界里涌出来，冲向禁区——我差点以为我们要撑不住了，好在有老弟兜底……

To tell the truth, the whole thing was thrilling... Endless monsters pouring out from the Fragmentum, rushing to the restricted zone. I almost thought we weren't gonna make it, but luckily I had my best guy with me...
以前的裂界攻势可没这么凶猛。啊，是说我还在铁卫任职的时候。
The previous Fragmentum attacks were nowhere near this vicious. *sigh* I mean back when I was still in the Silvermane Guards.
现在这状况…真是难为老弟了。
Now though... Things are really tough for Gepard.
算是吧——虽然我是技术部的人，但我的专攻方向是「裂界」和「星核」。想在这些课题上弄出些名堂，可不能每天只泡在实验室里。

Pretty much — I may be from the Technology Division, but my areas of expertise are Fragmentum and Stellarons. And you can't remain confined to the lab if you want to make a name for yourself in these fields.
你以前好像不是很担心杰帕德？
You didn't seem to worry much about Gepard before?
怎么可能，那可是我老弟呀。我这做姐姐的，不管嘴上怎么说，心里都还是会挂念着他的。
Not true. He's my little brother. And no matter what, as his big sister, I will always be worrying about him.
只是我以前总想「朗道家的人各有各的坚持」，再加上老弟他确实武艺高强…我也就说服自己不再去担心他了。
It's just that I've always thought every Landau has their own drive. And my brother's really good at martial arts... I convinced myself that I wouldn't have to worry about him.
可见过如今的裂界攻势之后，我的想法也有所转变……
But seeing how the Fragmentum attacks have been developing has changed my mind...
…等老弟下次回来，我一定得拉上佩拉一起，给他好好打打气。
...When he comes back next time, I'll definitely bring Pela along and we'll back him up.
嗐，这有什么！朗道家绝大部分人都走上了军旅生涯，这种场面没看惯也听惯了。
No big deal! Most Landaus members work their ways into military careers, and we're used to this.
只要你们这趟裂界之行有所收获，我们的努力就算是没白费啦。
It's worth our time as long as you're making valuable gains from your trips to the Fragmentum.
茉莉这姑娘嘛，大大咧咧的。脾气来得快，去得也快…和我还挺像，哈哈。
Molly? That girl's so carefree, and her temper can flip like the wind... A little bit like me, haha.
前阵子那件事也没让她消沉多久，这两天又转头和我一起研究她的传家宝盒子了。
She wasn't depressed for long after that last thing, and she's been working with me the past two days on her heirloom box.
这不，我估计她一时半会儿也回不了家，正考虑要不要邀请她当我的助手呢。
Right? I guess she won't be able to go home for a while, so I'm thinking about asking her to become my assistant.
这姑娘手脚麻利，干起活来毫不含糊…难怪她在技术部任职的时候能一个人揽下来那么多脏活累活。
This girl is so nimble and good at her work... No wonder she was able to handle so much manual labor by herself over at the Technology Division.
而且，我能看得出来，她是真心喜欢机械工程。要是再让她回到技术部那种乌烟瘴气的地方去，那就太可惜了……
Moreover, I can tell she loves mechanical engineering. It'd be such a pity to send her back to that stuffy vibe over at the Technology Division...
你要是问这个，那我可就不困了啊，哈哈～
Now that's a question that's perked me up, haha~
我跟你说，我就知道自己的眼光准出不了问题——不是我夸张啊，茉莉她真是难得一遇的机械天才！
Let me tell you, I knew there was nothing wrong with my eye — I'm not exaggerating here when I say, Molly is a rare mechanical genius!
——天才！天才的含金量你懂吗？她和我实在是太有共同语言了！
— Genius! Do you know the value of a true genius? She and I have so much in common!
Are you saying that you're a genius, too?
那可不——不管是机械、科研还是摇滚，我可是样样精通喔。
Of course! Be it mechanics, research, or rock music — I'm a genius at all of them!
茉莉这姑娘干起活来毫不含糊呢，还对各种机械结构有自己独到的见解……
Molly's such a good worker, and she forms her own insight into various mechanical structures...
有些连我都犯难的问题，她三下五除二就解决了。你说她是不是天才？
Some things that even I have trouble with, she can resolve meticulously. If that's not genius, what is?
不过有一点还是挺可惜的——这姑娘好像对摇滚不太感兴趣……
But it's just a pity that this kid isn't into rock 'n' roll...
…哈，下一个目标这不就有了吗！得想办法让茉莉爱上摇滚，看看她能不能胜任「机械热潮」的贝斯手……
...Ha, looks like we have our next target to work towards, then! I have to find a way for Molly to fall in love with rock music, and see if she'll be the bassist for Mechanical Fever...
要不拿这件事写首歌吧。
Why don't you write a song about it?
哈哈，我们想到一块去了。
其实，我最近正琢磨歌词呢——这种难得的好灵感，我可不会让它白白溜走！
Actually, I've been slogging through writing some lyrics recently. When inspiration strikes, I'll put it to good use!
你真的下定决心要离开了吗？
Have you really made up your mind to leave?
是啊，我做了好久思想准备呢。要是这会儿再反悔，那我不是亏大了嘛～
Yes, I've been preparing myself mentally for a long time. If I back out now, it'll be a huge loss.
你舍得让杰帕德一个人留着吗？
Can you bear to leave Gepard here by himself?
嗯…如果我说舍得，你会信吗？
Well... would you believe me if I said yes?
哈哈，那可是我亲生弟弟啊，怎么会舍得扔下他一个人走呢？不过…我也别无选择就是了。
Haha, he is my brother by blood after all. How can I leave him all alone? But... I don't have any other choice.
话说回来，我又不是永远不回来了。再者，实在想他的话…我发信息骚扰他不就好了？
Also, i—it's not like I'm never coming back. And if I really miss him... I can just pester the heck outta him over the phone, right?
想联系的话总有办法啦，不用担心！
There's always a way for me to contact him if I need to, so don't worry!
你想离开的原因应该没那么简单吧？
The reason you want to leave isn't so simple, is it?
Ah... you can see right through me.
不过，这其中的原因我并不想和人说…还希望你能多理解一下啦。
I'm sorry, I'm not ready to talk to anyone about the reasons behind my decision... I hope you can understand.
哈哈，谢谢你。今后也请你多关照啦。
Haha, thank you. Make sure you look after me now~
Hmm? Why are you asking me that all of a sudden?
…啊，你是说之前在永冬岭发生的事吧？
...Ah, you mean that thing back at Everwinter Hill?
狠话也放了，吉他也砸了…我要是再不从阴影里走出来，那可就太不摇滚了——你说是吧？
I did the growly voice and smashed up my guitar... It wouldn't be very rock 'n' roll if we just hid in the shadows and said nothing, right?
家庭也好，友情也好…面对挫折，以前的我只知道逃避，从没考虑过该怎么从根本上解决问题。
Whether it's family or friendships... In the face of setbacks, all I used to know how to do was escape. I never thought about trying to fix the root of the matter.
但现在不一样了——多亏了你和老弟的支持，我终于下定决心改变自己了。
But everything's different now — thanks to you and my bro's support, I've finally made the decision to make myself better.
对于贝洛伯格这座城市来说，我掌握的知识还能派上不少用场。我要用自己的能力去多帮助周围的人，把逃离这里的念头暂且放一放。
As for the city of Belobog, I can put my knowledge to lots of different uses. I'll use my talents to help people around me, and put aside for now any thoughts of escape.
不过话说回来，我对于旅行的兴趣也不是装出来的——希望等到时机成熟的那天，我能和你们一起踏上「开拓」之旅！
But then again, I'm not faking it when I say I love travel — I hope once the time's right that I can go out there and trailblaze together with you!
看来你在工地干得不错？
Looks like work is coming along well?
哟，你什么时候变成知心{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}了？居然还会关心我的职业体验。
Ah, when did you become such a caring {F#young lady}{M#young man}? It's nice that you'd express concern in my work.
说真的，这里确实挺适合我。过去我在机械屋修的都是些钟表、供暖器之类的小玩意。这么个大家伙，够我琢磨好久了。

Honestly, this place suits me very well. All I'd ever fix back in the workshop were trivial things like watches and heaters. A big guy like this is something that I can really mull over for a long time.
而且现在大伙可仰仗我了，每天来请教问题的工人比演唱会观众都多——虽然不太摇滚，但这感觉还真有点小爽。
Plus, everyone is seriously counting on me now. I get so many people asking me things every day. It's like a crowd at a concert! It may not be rock'n'roll, but it's kind of cool.
工程结束后有什么打算吗？
Do you have any plans for when construction is complete?
等大机器人修好之后，这颗星球也会重获新生吧？不过我可不打算待到那天。
When the giant robot is all fixed, this planet will be reborn, right? But I don't plan on sticking around here until then.
只要工程一步入正轨，我就把担子丢给佩拉，自己找个地方逍遥快活去。
As soon as construction gets on track, I'll hand the reins over to Pela and find a place to enjoy myself.
估计到那时候，我已经成为白发苍苍的老希露瓦了吧，哈哈哈~
I imagine by that time, I'll already be old-lady Serval with gray hair, hahaha~
啊...你放心，我的灵魂才不会被重力束缚呢。
Ah... Don't worry, my spirit can't be weighed down.
等地上的工作完成后，我还是可以想办法来一次星间旅行。指不定到时候就不是被你们载着，而是和你们并排前进了。
When the work on the ground is complete, I'll still be able to plan my own interstellar journey. Who knows, maybe by then you won't be carrying me, but advancing alongside me.
啊，是你们！谢谢你们为我和女儿做的一切…你们有什么事也请尽管提，我一定尽力帮忙！
Hey, it's you! Thank you for everything you've done for me and my daughter... If there's anything you need, please feel free to ask. I'll do my best to help.
好啊，正好我手头没什么事。
No problem. I just so happen to be free right now.
Have you been back home yet?
不过我已经向上级请假回家探亲了。看在我解决了失控机器人问题的份上，应该可以批准我回去吧？
But I've applied for a few days off to visit my family, and I think it will be approved since I solved the Malfunctioning Robot problem.
这次回去，我可一定要向母女俩好好道歉才行…
Once I get back home, I must apologize to my wife and my daughter...
哎，突然还有点紧张，心里揪得慌…这好不容易回趟家，我怎么还害怕起来了呢？啊哈哈……
*Sigh* I'm getting a little nervous. My heart is beating so fast... Finally, I am going to get to visit them, but why am I so scared?
回去和莉拉好好聊聊天！
Enjoy your father-daughter time with Lila!
你说得对。她都已经长成大姑娘了，我都没能和她真正地谈过心…
You're right. She's a big girl now and we've never really talked...
嗐，我现在才觉得自己之前根本就是自找麻烦。有什么事情非得自己憋着，没准和家人聊一聊，问题就都解决了呢……
I feel like I was asking for trouble by keeping everything to myself. Maybe all those problems could have been solved if I had just talked to my family...
你也是，内心有什么困惑一定要和自己的亲友好好谈谈！可别像我一样憋在心里，差点耽误了一辈子啊。
You too should talk to your friends or family about any confusion you feel inside! Don't keep everything to yourself as I did. It almost ruined my life.
这就是过来人的经验，哈哈哈哈！
This is coming from an old man, who knows from experience. Hahahaha!
能吃上一顿家里的饭，是件幸事。
Eating a home-cooked meal is indeed a fortunate thing.
哎呦，说得我都有点馋了，哈哈哈。
Yes! You are making me hungry. Hahaha.
我妻子的厨艺…算不上多好。但这么长时间过去了，我对那味道有点古怪的家常菜反倒有些期待……
My wife's cooking skills... aren't great. But after all this time, I've come to really love and look forward to that weird-smelling home-cooked aroma...
将来要是有机会的话，一定请你来我家做客，尝尝她的手艺。哈哈哈！
You have to come to my place someday to try her cooking. Haha!
What have you been up to lately?
老样子：矿石封装检查，军备例行维护之类的。
Same old, same old. Ore pack inspection, maintaining armaments—stuff like that.
以前总觉得这些活实在没意思…现在终于想通了，干起活来也有劲了。
I used to think that these jobs were boring as heck... Now I've finally let that go and I find them more interesting.
这都多亏了你啊。要不是你帮我和宝贝女儿通了信，我现在怕还是浑浑噩噩的吧…真的非常感谢你！
It's all thanks to you. If you hadn't helped me communicate with my daughter, I would still be in a slump... Thank you so much!
趣事？实话说，这禁区里的活计就那么些——该上前线的上前线，该搞后勤的搞后勤…内容基本都没啥变化。
Interesting? Honestly, nothing. Apart from logistics and front-line battles, there is not much going on in the restricted zone... Every day is basically the same.
…啊，我突然想到一个。就前两天…那个邓恩，你认识不？就那个军阶挺高的年轻人，禁区里管事的那个——你知道他以前在乐队里做过吧？
... Ah, I got one. Two days ago, Dunn... Do you know Dunn? The young man with a high rank, that's in charge of the restricted zone. You know he used to be in a band, right?
…不认识？呃，关系不大，反正就是个玩过乐队的年轻军官。
...You don't know? Huh, no big deal. He is just a young officer who once played in a band.
那我接着说。那天，戍卫官杰帕德来后方例行巡查。那个邓恩，平时有事没事就在军队里把弄他那把琴…结果你猜怎么着？
I'll go on. Two days ago, Dunn played his guitar as usual, and Officer Gepard came to the rear for a routine inspection... Guess what happened?
He forgot to put the guitar away that day!
军队里连弹琴都不让吗？
Music isn't allowed in the military?
禁区虽说不禁止铁卫自娱自乐，但值岗期间开小差可是要记大过的。
It's okay to entertain yourself in the restricted zone, but neglecting your responsibilities while on duty is a major offense.
不过嘛，他那小队里有个铁卫小伙，总是替他背黑锅——好像是叫萨克雷？总之，那天邓恩也把萨克雷推出去顶锅了。
There is a member in his squad who always takes the blame for him. His name is Zackery, I think? Anyway, that day, Dunn blamed it on Zackery again.
杰帕德看见琴，就问：「这琴是谁的？」刚说完，萨克雷就第一个站出来喊：「报告长官，是我的！」
When Gepard saw the guitar, he asked, "Whose is this?" Right after speaking, Zackery stepped forward and said: "Sir, it's mine!"
然后你猜怎么着？杰帕德居然让那小子当场来一段！
You'll never guess what happened next! Gepard asked the boy to play something, right there on the spot!
这下萨克雷露怯了呀，听人说，他被吓得两腿直打哆嗦，哈哈哈！
It scared the heck out of Zackery. I heard that his legs were shaking uncontrollably. Hahaha!
后来实在没办法，邓恩只好出来自首。不过好在杰帕德戍卫官宽宏大量，这事就算过去了。
So Dunn had to give himself up. Luckily, officer Gepard is a lenient man. He let it go.
不过我又听说了些传闻，说是这两人过去认识…嗐，谁知道呢！
I heard that they knew each other... Hmmm, who knows what's true!?
I'll leave you to your work.
有什么需要帮忙的吗？有的话就尽管说——我虽然官不大，但在这禁区里还是有些人脉的。
Anything I can help with? Just say the word — I may not hold a high office but I've still got my connections around the restricted zone.
最近我还在等请假流程审批呢。听说排在我前面的人还有不少……
I've still waiting to hear back about my leave application. I heard there are a lotta people ahead of me in the line...
不过最近我们这前线的压力小了很多，估计大家都想偷个闲回家看看吧。只是不知道几时能排到我啊……
But pressure on the front line has receded a lot these days, so everyone just wants to take a break and reunite with their families. I just have no idea how long it's gonna take until my turn...
What's changed on the front line?
听说最近前线的怪物明显变少了…不过这都是听说啊。毕竟我只是个后勤，根本没上过战场。
Well, I heard the monsters on the front line have dwindled recently... But that's just some people talking. I'm just a logistics guy, I've never set foot on the battleground before.
不过这里的气氛最近确实变了。以前战事吃紧的时候，这禁区里根本就是一副死气沉沉的样子。现在你去看，大家的精气神那是明显不一样……
But the vibe here has really changed. Back when things were more serious, this restricted zone used to seem so solemn. But now, just look — everyone's spirits are completely different...
挺好的，那祝你早日回家。
That's good then. I wish you a speedy return to your homelands.
Hope you can get home soon.
哈哈，借你吉言！等我回了家，可得抓紧时间好好陪陪家人……
Haha, here's hoping! Once I get home, I'll have to catch up on spending time with the family...
冬城的孩子，「存护」骄傲的子民，抬起你们的头来！不要被忙碌且庸俗的日常磨平了棱角，时刻铭记筑城者和大守护者的教导！

Children of the Everwinter City, proud citizens of Preservation: Hold your heads up high! Grind NOT against the mundane vulgarities of your everyday lives. ALWAYS remember, deep in your hearts, the teachings of the Architects and the Supreme Guardian!
（他好像非常投入…要不要听他说完呢？）
(He seems rather involved... Would you like to hear him finish his preaching?)
你们心中存有疑虑，这很正常——因为你们左右张望，却看不到「存护」之所在；你们四处寻觅，却始终找不到「存护」存在的证据。

Normal it is, for you to have doubts in your hearts — because you look around yourselves, and you can't SEE Preservation anywhere; you cast your eyes hither and thither, and nary do you see ANY evidence of the very existence of Preservation.
——而我今天将解开诸位的疑虑，让你们切身感受到「存护」恩典的实在，让你们叹服筑城意志的伟大……
...And yet comes this very day, I shall resolve your doubts and let you feel the true grace of Preservation, let you marvel at the almighty will of the Architects...
…「存护」是克里珀精神的具现，它无时无刻不与我们同在。它于无形中塑造着我们的人格，影响着我们生命中的重要决策——

...Preservation is the embodiment of Qlipoth, and is with us all the time. It's the secret force that imperceptibly shapes our personalities, impacting all the important decisions that we make during our lives...
——你之所以无法寻见它的踪影，是因为「存护」的恩典早已与我们熟悉的世界融为一体：它弥散于空气，夹带于光明，自人类降生之际便温柔地将它裹于怀中。

...The reason why you struggle so to find it, is because Preservation's grace is integrated with the world we know, diffused throughout the air we breathe, refracted through the light we see. It has gently embraced us in its bosom since the very dawn of our existence.
大守护者的训诫提醒我们，绝不要将「存护」的恩典视作理所当然！我们必须继承筑城者先祖们的精神，在这个世界上坚韧地生存，与一切灾祸勇敢抗争！

The Admonishments of the Supreme Guardian remind us to never take Preservation's grace for granted! We must inherit the spirit of our Architect ancestors: To persevere and survive in this world of ours, and to bravely defy any calamities we face!
「裂界」、「寒潮」——不过是贯彻「存护」意志路上的小小磨难！兄弟姐妹们，和筑城者站在一起，和大守护者站在一起！追随她的步伐——我们注定胜利！

The Fragmentum and the Eternal Freeze — These are just bumps in the road on the path to carrying out the will of Preservation! O brothers and sisters, stand together with thine Architects and our Supreme Guardian! Follow in her footsteps — for victory is our destiny!
听听围观的人们在议论什么。
Listen to what the crowd is saying.
听听，多么慷慨激昂的演讲！赞美这位筑城者，他的言语给我黯淡的生命重新注入了信心……
Hear that? What an impassioned speech! Praise the Architects, as his words have reinvigorated my lust for life...
…有你说的那么夸张吗？要我说，这些筑城者天天就会说些假大空的话——有时间搞这些表面功夫，不如想想怎么改善大伙的生活条件……

...Is it really as great as you say? If you ask me, these Architects just say the same empty rhetoric day in day out — and if you've got time for all this bluster, you've got time to help improve everyone's living conditions around here...
我都走了一圈回来了，怎么还没结束啊…现在的年轻人，话可真多。
I've been off for a big walk, and come back. It's still going!? Kids these days, they never shut up.
——记住！「存护」无所不在，你迈出的每一小步都在祂的注视之下！
...Remember! Preservation is everywhere around us. Every little step you take is under THEIR watch!
牢记你心中的道德律法，将筑城者的意志贯彻到生活的点点滴滴当中！永远、永远不要辜负伟大的克里珀！
Remember the moral law in your heart, and carry out the will of the Architects in each and every part of your life! Never, ever fail the almighty Qlipoth!
冬城的孩子，「存护」骄傲的子民，抬起你们的头来！不要被忙碌且庸俗的日常磨平了棱角，时刻铭记筑城者和大守护者的教导！

Children of the Everwinter City, proud citizens of Preservation: Hold your heads up high! Grind NOT against the mundane vulgarities of your everyday lives. ALWAYS remember, deep in your hearts, the teachings of the Architects and the Supreme Guardian!
眼前的男人醉心于他精心编织的演讲内容，似乎完全没有意识到你的到来。
The man before you seems so engrossed in the elaborate speech performance that he doesn't seem to have noticed your arrival.
大守护者换人了，你怎么看？
The Supreme Guardian has been replaced. What do you think?
…这位听众，打断他人的演讲是极不礼貌的行为——我作为筑城者的代表，必须对你表示谴责！
...This congregation member... Interrupting a sermon is extremely rude — As a representative of the Architects, I must express their condemnation!
但针对你的合理提问，我还是会给出公正的回答：布洛妮娅大人是「存护」意志忠诚的追随者，她将引领我们走向琥珀色的温暖黎明！
But I'll still give your reasonable question a fair answer: Lady Bronya is a loyal follower of the will of Preservation. She will lead us to its warm amber dawn!
可可利亚大人的牺牲令人痛心。她用一生的时间对抗「存护」的敌人…即使不被理解，即使遭受非议，她的内心仍然牵挂着人民，她的牺牲将被世代铭记！

Madam Cocolia's sacrifice was heartbreaking. She spent her whole life fighting against enemies of Preservation... Even if she was misunderstood and sometimes criticized, her heart still cares about the people. Her sacrifice will be remembered for generations!
由这样一位伟大的守护者挑选、培养出来的接班人，注定不会令人民、令筑城者失望。赞美「存护」，赞美布洛妮娅大人！
A successor hand-selected and trained by the Supreme Guardian is destined not to disappoint the people or the Architects. Praise Preservation, and praise Lady Bronya!
你来了！虽然我们之前交过手，但还是请允许我重新自我介绍一下吧。
You came! Even though we've faced off against each other before, please allow me to re-introduce myself.
我叫邓恩，直属于杰帕德戍卫官，目前担任这片军事禁区的总管。
My name's Dunn, and I serve under Captain Gepard. And I'm the current head of this military restricted zone.
杰帕德大人已经吩咐过我，允许各位「外来者」在禁区中自由活动。
Gepard's already instructed me to give Outsiders like yourselves free access here in the restricted zone.
如果你们在这禁区中遇到问题就告诉我，我会为你们出面解决的。
If you get into any trouble around here, let me know and I'll remedy it for you.
对不起，之前下手狠了点…
I apologize if I was a little rough last time...
你是说跟希露瓦一起擅闯禁区那件事？
Are you talking about that time you and Serval broke into the restricted zone?
不提也罢…我当时只是在执行命令而已。既然杰帕德戍卫官已经承认了你们的身份，那我自然也没有再刁难的必要了。
Let's not mention it... I was just carrying out my orders at the time. Since Captain Gepard has already acknowledged your identities, naturally, I didn't have to make things difficult back then.
不过当时我真的以为你们要下死手…唉，希露瓦她…真是狠心……
But at that time I really thought you guys were going to kill me... *sigh* Serval... Can't believe she'd have the heart to do that to me...
咳，没什么，这事就让它过去吧。这就叫不打不相识，是吧？
Anyway, let bygones be bygones. That fight actually made us closer, right?
Is there anything I can help you with?
哈哈，暂时没有。如果有的话，我会主动联系你的。
Haha, not right now. If I do, I'll get right in touch with you.
你误会了，我的意思是你身手不凡，将来或许还能帮上我们铁卫的忙……
You misunderstood me. I mean since you have extraordinary combat skills, in the future maybe you can help us Guards out...
好了，聊了这么多，我也该回去工作了…你还有什么问题吗？我会尽可能为你解答。
Alright, after all this chit-chat, it's time for me to get back to work... Anything else you'd like to ask? I'll do my best to answer.
Alright, what would you like to chat about?
I heard you also do a bit of rock and roll?
哈哈，那都是我在士官学校读书时的事情了…虽然说我们是军官预备役，但大家毕竟都还是学生。精力过剩嘛，只好课后搞点兴趣爱好发泄一下了。

Haha, it all happened when I was still in cadet school... Although we were reserve officers, we were still students at the end of the day. So we needed some after-school hobbies to spend our excess energy.
我和几个志同道合的朋友就这么组成了摇滚乐队，当时在军官学校还算小有名气吧。
I formed a rock band with a few like-minded friends, which was quite famous in the cadet school back then.
希露瓦，她是我们的吉他手兼主唱。她真的很有魅力，既潇洒又有才华，当之无愧。
Serval, she's our guitarist and lead singer. She was absolutely charming and talented. She totally deserved her position.
我是她的键盘手…我们两人向来配合得相当好。我一直觉得我俩…咳，没事。
I was her keyboardist... and the two of us always worked quite well together. I always felt like we were... Ahem, nothing.
接下来就是鼓手了——这位可是个重量级人物！你要不猜猜是谁？给你点提示，这位也是银鬃铁卫的一员。
The next one is the drummer — this one will shock you! Do you want to guess who it is? Here's a hint — they're also a member of the Silvermane Guards.
呃…他确实是铁卫里的高官，但他和他姐老不对付了。
Uh... he's a high-ranking officer in the Guards for sure, but he doesn't get along with his sister.
这你都能猜到？她不会和你聊过这事吧？
What a guess! She didn't tell you beforehand, did she?
正确答案就是佩拉。想不到吧？这么个一丝不苟的情报官小姑娘，私下里竟然是个爆裂的摇滚鼓手…大概是工作压力太大了吧？
The correct answer is Pela. Hard to believe, right? The petite, meticulous intelligence officer is actually a drummer in a rock band... I guess there's too much pressure on the job?
我听外面的人说，佩拉和希露瓦现在还经常一块排练，演出。真怀念……
I heard that Pela and Serval still do band practice and live performances together regularly, just like old times...
