There were only three of you in the band?
不对，我记得还有另外一个人…是谁来着？一下居然想不起来……
No, I remember there was another person... Who was it again? I can't believe it, I actually can't remember who it was...
摇滚乐队不需要贝斯吗？
Doesn't a rock band need a bass player?
噢——对对对，就是贝斯！你这一说我才想起来，哈哈哈…可他叫什么来着？不对，这人是男是女的来着……
Ah—yes, yes, the bass player! I just remembered it after hearing it from you. Haha...but what was his name again? Wait, was the bass player a guy or a girl...
I don't know much about rock bands, sorry.
…算了，想不起来，我放弃了。忘了那人吧，不重要。
...Eh, never mind. I just can't remember. Don't worry about that person, it's not important.
都是过去式了。有些时候放手才是最好的选择……
It's history already. Sometimes letting go is the best choice...
你在军队里是做什么工作的？
What kind of job did you do in the military?
我负责禁区后方的综合管理。军需、后勤、能源…这些都归我管。
I am responsible for the general management of the support lines in the restricted zone. Munitions, logistics, energy... all of these are under my control.
我还负责和前线的直接沟通。假如前线被攻破了…我和弟兄们就要组成最后一道防线，防止敌人渗透城市。

I am also responsible for direct communication with the front line. If the front line was breached... my boys and I would have to form the last line of defense to prevent the enemy from infiltrating the city.
幸好有杰帕德戍卫官在…类似的事还一次都没发生过。
Fortunately, we have Captain Gepard... So things like that have never happened.
多亏了杰帕德戍卫官…至少到目前为止，还从来没有裂界怪物穿越禁区的记录。
It's all thanks to Captain Gepard... At least so far, there has never been a record of a Fragmentum monster getting out of the restricted zone.
I have other things to do. Talk to you later.
前线压力越来越大，现在必须得调整铁卫的战术策略了……
The pressure on the front lines is increasing, and now the strategy of the Silvermane Guards must be adjusted...
外来者，来聊聊吧——你现在方便吗？
Outsider, let's talk. Are you free right now?
你问的真是时候，杰帕德戍卫官不久前才发了通知，说是裂界活动的频率明显放缓了——禁区的铁卫总算有时间喘口气了。

Impeccable timing. Captain Gepard just sent out a bulletin saying that the frequency of Fragmentum activity has noticeably diminished — all the Silvermane Guards around the restricted zone can finally take a breather.
听说很多长期驻扎前线的军官这次都能申请到休假…真不容易啊，唉。
I heard many officers who were stationed on the front line for long periods can finally take their leaves... A long time coming, I'd say.
虽说我只是个后勤官，不知道你们之前强闯禁区到底是为了什么…但从结果来看，裂界活动的减弱八成跟你们有关吧？

I'm just an insignificant logistics officer. I don't claim to know why you broke into the restricted zone last time... But whatever happened, I'm guessing the cut in Fragmentum activity has an <unbreak>80%</unbreak> chance of being directly caused by you, right?
是啊，就是我们拯救了贝洛伯格。
Yeah, we're the ones who saved Belobog.
哈哈，我就知道…那看来我们能放假都多亏了你啊。感激不尽！
Ha, I knew it! It seems like we all owe you a debt of gratitude for our vacations. Thanks so much!
我懂，我懂…杰帕德长官也不让我们过多过问，这个话题就此打住吧。
Got it, got it... Captain Gepard doesn't like us asking too much either, so let's park this topic for now.
我就是没闯过军事禁区，想试试。
I've never busted into a restricted zone before, and wanna give it a try.
哎…只可惜可可利亚大人她…她为了守护贝洛伯格选择了牺牲自己。真是伟大。
*sigh* If only Madam Cocolia hadn't... Hadn't needed to sacrifice herself to save Belobog. What a noble woman.
希望布洛妮娅大人能继承她的意志……
I hope Lady Bronya can inherit her iron will...
公司的事已经顺利解决了。
The problem with the IPC has been taken care of.
是啊，我听说了。好在布洛妮娅大人没有签订那份协议。
Yeah, I heard. Thankfully Lady Bronya didn't sign that agreement.
虽然铁卫内部还是不太信任那些黑衣人，不过我认为，现在我们走在正确的道路上。
Although the Silvermane Guards still do not fully trust those people dressed in black, I believe that we are now on the correct path.
You were quite worked up about it before.
我们当然不能接受黑衣人的不平等条约。但必须承认，没有他们的技术，贝洛伯格的复兴将异常艰难。
Naturally, we cannot accept an unequal treaty from those people dressed in black. However, I admit that without their technology, the revival of Belobog would be extremely difficult.
如今我们已经展现了重建家园的决心。这份合作是我们赢来的，不是他们的施舍。
Today we have shown our determination to rebuild our home. This cooperation was won by us. It was not their charity.
当然，还是没法排除他们单方面反悔的可能性。银鬃铁卫会严加监管这些人的动向。
Of course, we cannot rule out the possibility of them backing out of this. The Silvermane Guards will be monitoring their movements closely.
如果他们真的密谋对贝洛伯格不利，我会第一时间提醒大守护者的。
If they really are conspiring against Belobog, I will alert the Supreme Guardian immediately.
嗯，看来筑城<unbreak>232</unbreak>年的档案没有错漏。接下来该是……
Hmm, it seems like the archives of Fortification Year <unbreak>232</unbreak> are in order. The next should be...
先别打扰我，我正在整理档案……
Don't disturb me. I'm sorting out the archives...
那能请你别悄无声息地站在人身后，然后又冷不丁吓人一跳吗？
Could you not stand behind people so quietly like that? It's kinda creepy!
Hah, did I give you a fright?
啊啊…！真是的，幼不幼稚啊——你都多大个人了！
Argh! How old are you? Stop acting like a kid!
要帮你整理书架上面的档案吗？
Do you need help in organizing the archives on the bookshelf?
…我能够得着。谢谢你关心，下次别关心了。
...I can reach them. Thanks for your concern, but please don't do that again.
呃，我刚刚清点到哪一年了来着……
Um, which year was it just now?
哎，算了…收拾了一整天，顺势休息会也好。
Alas, forget it... It's time I take a break after all the work.
我就陪你聊聊天吧。找我有什么事吗？
I'll keep you company then. What can I do for you?
I'd like to chat with you...
情报官的工作到底是什么？
What does an Intelligence Officer do?
搜集战场情报，将其中有用的信息逐条析出，整理好之后便能用于指导银鬃铁卫的大小战略战术了。
I collect battlefield intelligence, extract useful information, and sort them out. The information will be used to formulate strategies and tactics for the Silvermane Guards.
除了作战方面的事，我平时也会协助杰帕德整顿军务——简单总结，都是一些涉及脑力的工作。
Besides assisting work at the frontline, I also help Gepard to manage military affairs. In other words, my job involves a lot of thinking.
工作本身倒没多辛苦。不如说，从杂乱的信息中梳理出有序的部分反而会令我感到快乐。
It isn't as tough as it sounds. Rather, I actually take pleasure in making things in order from a mess.
确实，我也很享受这份工作——从杂乱的信息中梳理出秩序的部分，恐怕没有比这更让人愉悦的事情了。
Indeed, and I really enjoy my work. Nothing is more fun than making things in order from a mess.
听起来似乎不包括整理书架…
It sounds like your job scope doesn't include organizing bookshelves.
就知道你会这么说。整理书架当然不在铁卫情报官的工作职责范围内——这只是义工罢了。
I knew you would say that. Organizing bookshelves is certainly not part of my job — it's just volunteer work.
你能再多说说工作的细节吗？
Can you tell me the details about your job?
很遗憾，细节部分就属于银鬃铁卫…不，应该说是贝洛伯格的最高机密了喔。
Unfortunately, the details are the top secret of the Silvermane Guards — or more accurately — of Belobog.
你和杰帕德关系怎么样？
杰帕德戍卫官是个非常可靠的人——仅指承担公职的部分。
Captain Gepard is a very reliable person... as far as carrying out his public duties is concerned.
其余的部分嘛…我只能用四个字评价：惨不忍睹。大到武器维护、小到仪容仪表，他身上能挑出的毛病简直比筛子眼还多。
As for the other aspects of his life, I can only say he is hopeless. There are so many things he can do better, be it maintaining his weapon or his appearance.
但神奇的是…即便邋遢成这样，他也能给希露瓦提出生活上的建议。那对姐弟的关系…连我这个情报官都无法准确解析啊。
Even as unkempt as he is, he is still, for some reason, able to give Serval life advice. The relationship between these siblings is puzzling even to an Intelligence Officer like myself.
你和希露瓦关系怎么样？
希露瓦当然是我的好闺蜜啦，我们还一起玩乐队呢。她是吉他手兼主唱，至于我嘛…其实是鼓手。
Serval is, of course, my best friend. We've even formed a band together. She's the guitarist and vocalist, while I'm the drummer.
平时下班后我也经常到她的机械屋里玩，如果玲可在的话我也会留下过夜。独居生活就是这样，一个人闷在家里总会无聊的。
I often visit her workshop after work. If Lynx is there, I'd stay the night. As I live alone, there are times I find it boring to stay at home.
那就等你有心情了再聊吧。
I'll leave you to your work.
All right. I should get back to work too.
嗯…谁把《贝洛伯格大事年表》放在这里的？可别让我抓到了……
Who put this Belobog Chronicles here? You'd better not let me catch you...
哼，我就知道你在身后。别想再吓我一跳，你不会得逞的。
Hmph, I know you're standing behind me. I won't let you scare me this time.
腐败铁卫的事情处理得如何？
How's the matter regarding the corrupt guards?
啊，那件事已经被妥善处理了。
Oh, that has been taken care of properly.
被抓到的那几个家伙只是小人物，那天他们招供完就被移交到铁卫军事法庭了。
Those captured are merely small fries. After making their confessions, they were sent to the Silvermane Guard Military Court to be court-martialed.
我已经安排了铁卫协助司法大臣继续侦办这起腐败案件。那位大臣是个手腕强硬的角色，估计要不了多久就能查个水落石出。

I've dispatched some guards to assist the Minister of Justice in the investigation of this corruption case. The minister handles cases with an iron fist, so I suppose it won't be long before they get to bottom of this.
总之…我们已经把该办的都办了，之后就没必要多操心啦。
Anyway... we've done everything we need to do. There's no need to worry about what happens next.
过奖了，这件事能顺利解决也多亏了你的协助，无论如何都要谢谢你才是。
Thanks for the compliment. Your help has played a crucial role in this matter. We really appreciate it.
哈…你可真不谦虚，哪怕装装样子也行呀？
Haha... Modesty means nothing to you, huh?
不过嘛，这件事能顺利解决也多亏了你的协助，无论如何都要谢谢你才是。
Anyway, your help has played a crucial role in this matter. We really appreciate it.
只是，别忘了——能力越大责任越大——以后再有什么麻烦事的话，我可是会第一时间来找你的哦，哼哼。
Still, please bear in mind that with great power comes great responsibility. I'll come to you if I'm in trouble again, hehe.
茉莉小姐在那之后状态如何？
呃，你这不应该直接问她嘛……
Um, shouldn't you ask her directly?
算了…反正我天天都去机械屋，现在和茉莉的关系也不错。
Forget it. I visit the workshop every day, and I've been on good terms with Molly.
我就和你简单说说吧，省得你操心。
I'll tell you how she's faring, so that you don't have to worry about her.
我和她没那么熟，不好意思问。
I don't know her that well, so I find it hard to ask her.
这么冷淡…她可是把你当救命恩人呢。
How indifferent. You should know that she sees you as her savior.
不过既然你这么关心她，我就和你简单说说吧。
But since you're so concerned about her, I'll tell you how she's faring.
I just want to chat with you...
...What do you want me to say!?
What's the problem? Are you unhappy to see me?
哎，行了…我们还是聊回茉莉小姐吧。
That's it... We should just talk about Molly.
自从来到机械屋给希露瓦当助手之后，茉莉整个人明显精神多了。
Molly's looking more spirited ever since she started working as Serval's assistant at the workshop.
以前在技术部的时候，茉莉每天不是在和人吵架就是在去吵架的路上，整个人身上充满了消极的能量。
Back at the Technology Division, if Molly wasn't already in a quarrel with someone, she'd be on her way to one. She was always so on edge.
很高兴能看到她慢慢好起来…当然啦，这部分功劳你也要占大头哦。
I'm glad to see her slowly brighten up... Of course, much of it was thanks to you.
没有和公司签约，你遗憾吗？
Do you regret not signing the contract with the IPC?
是说之前询问我意见的那件事吗？唔...当然不会啦~
You mean the thing you asked my opinion on before? Well... of course not~
虽然贝洛伯格没有被公司并购或接手，但还是有不少员工留驻在了城里。
Although Belobog has not been acquired or taken on by the IPC, many of their employees have remained stationed in the city.
我这里的一份资料显示：自从这些黑衣人驻扎下来后，造物之柱的工程效率整体提升了近<unbreak>40</unbreak>个百分点。
There is a report here that shows productivity on the Pillars of Creation construction project has increased by nearly forty percent since these people in black got stationed here.
如果他们真的愿意把压箱底的技术都拿出来分享，施工速度肯定会翻倍...不，甚至翻上好几番都有可能！
If they really are willing to share their technology unreservedly with us, then production speed will definitely double... No! It could even triple or quadruple!
从数据上看，布洛妮娅大人做出了非常正确的选择。对贝洛伯格的大家来说，这可能就是最好的结果了吧？
Looking at the data, Lady Bronya made a very appropriate decision. This might even be the best possible result for the people of Belobog.
Welcome to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, {NICKNAME}.
我已吩咐过全军对你和同伴多加关照，但还请你务必不要做出逾矩的举动。
I've instructed the soldiers to treat you hospitably, but I do have to remind you to be considerate of your actions.
所谓公事公办——此类行为一经发现，我身为戍卫官也无法保你周全。
Rules are rules — once any such acts are discovered, even I, the Captain, can't guarantee your safety.
不胜感激。希望你能享受此次贝洛伯格之行……
I would be deeply grateful. I hope you will enjoy this trip to Belobog...
或者，以你们对这个世界的称谓来说——希望你能享受此次雅利洛-Ⅵ之行。
Or, as you all call this world — I hope you will enjoy this trip to Jarilo-VI.
大守护者与她的律法当如环绕这贝洛伯格的铁壁，任何事物都不能凌驾于其上。
The Supreme Guardian and her laws are akin to an iron wall around Belobog. Nothing in this place is above them.
身为曾经并肩作战的战友，我不希望看到你身处险境。因此，还望你对我提出的建议多加考虑。
As a comrade who once fought by your side, I do not wish to see harm befall you. Which is why I hope you will reconsider my suggestion.
严肃的话题就先到这里吧。我正准备稍事休息，想聊聊其他的话题吗？
But enough of this stuffy topic. I'm about to go on a break. Do you have something else you wish to talk about?
戍卫官都负责什么样的工作？
你能想到的、银鬃铁卫需要承担的一切职责。
Anything you can think of, the Silvermane Guards are responsible for.
在这之上，戍卫官还要负责调度全体铁卫，以便每个人都能正确地行使自己的职能。
Above all else, the Captain is charged with organizing the Guards, ensuring that everyone performs their job properly.
正如你所想，戍卫官的工作并不复杂。
It is as you imagined, a Captain's job isn't all that complicated.
我——不，我们——不过是贝洛伯格人日常生活的守护者罢了。
I— No, we are but guardians safeguarding the well-being of Belobogians.
城市防务事关重大。其牵涉事项之多，普通居民恐怕难以想象。
City defense is an important duty. It is linked to many matters that your average citizens can't fathom.
但归根到底，我们不过是贝洛伯格人日常生活的守护者——你只需要了解这点就好。
But fundamentally, we are but guardians safeguarding the well-being of Belobogians — that's all you need to understand.
How's your relationship with your big sister?
希露瓦…对于她的种种行为，我只能是睁一只眼闭一只眼了。
Serval... I can only turn a blind eye to her various actions.
对于朗道家而言，姐姐的行为无疑是离经叛道。也难怪我们的管家隔三差五便跑去机械屋，劝谏她找份正经工作。
To the Landaus, my big sister's acts are irrefutably traitorous to the clan. It is no wonder our butler regularly goes to the workshop to persuade her to find a proper job.
I hear Pela is your aide?
是的，但我们的交流基本止于工作——不过她与希露瓦来往尤为密切，因此我们在工作之外的生活中也有所接触。
Yes, but our interactions mostly revolve around work. Though, she is quite close to Serval, which is to say, our lives do somewhat intersect outside of work.
其实，我平时都在尽可能躲着她…我总觉得她身上有种，嗯…压迫感。
In truth, I try to avoid her most of the time... I always feel that she's sort of hmm... overbearing.
曾经有一次，我见她工作繁忙，便提出替她处理某张报表。
There was once when I saw that she was swamped with work, so I suggested helping her finish up a report.
当我将报表交给她时，没曾想她竟一眼从海量的数据中挑出各种错漏，紧接着便对我开始进行条分缕析的批驳……
When I submitted it to her, I didn't think she'd be able to point out so many mistakes at a mere glance, followed by a barrage of detailed remarks...
虽然事后她亲自向我道歉了，我也明白这是自己工作上的疏漏，但这件事还是给我上了一课…最好不要擅自插手佩拉的工作。
She personally apologized to me after that, and I also acknowledged my tardiness, but that matter sure taught me a lesson... It's best not to get involved in Pela's work.
暂时想不到该聊些什么了。
I can't think of what to talk about right now.
无妨，想到哪里就聊到哪里，不必感到拘束。
It's fine. Feel free to speak your mind. No reason to hold back.
Let's end the chat here then.
好。我也该继续工作了，回见。
All right. I should get back to work too. I'll see you later.
又见到你了，{NICKNAME}。想来聊聊天吗？
We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Are you here for a chat?
希露瓦最近有什么动向吗？
What's Serval up to these days?
还是老样子——整日守着她的机械屋，有订单时做工，没订单时就拉着佩拉和玲可一起排练。
Same old, same old. Hunkered down at her workshop, either working on orders or dragging Pela and Lynx to rehearsals.
不过，自从去过永冬岭之后…我好像再没看过她脸上阴郁的表情了。想必她已经解开了自己的心结吧。
But, after that trip to Everwinter Hill, I don't think I've noticed her looking all glum anymore. I reckon she's sorted her troubles out.
这都多亏了你的帮助，{NICKNAME}。我在这里代姐姐向你表示感谢。
And this was all thanks to your help, {NICKNAME}. I thank you on my big sister's behalf.
We're friends, and that's what we do.
谦虚也是一种美德——再加上你的勇气与慷慨…如果像你这样的人能为我们铁卫效力，那将是整个贝洛伯格莫大的荣誉。
Humility is a virtue. And with your courage and kindness... if we had someone like you among our ranks, it would be Belobog's utmost honor.
至于我个人…能交到你这样的朋友也倍感荣幸。
As for me... I am immensely honored to have known a friend like you.
让她做出改变的是你的陪伴。
It was your companionship that changed her.

The requirements are complicated, but I change them all the time. So listen up!
现在的加入条件是…没有跟老巫婆和希儿姐姐告过状，外加十包雪地跳跳糖！
The rules for joining now are... You've never tattled to the old witch and Seele, plus ten bags of snow-white popping candy!
加入鼹鼠党有什么好处？
What are the perks of joining The Moles?
如果你加入了鼹鼠党，就可以和我们一起吃好吃的，玩好玩的…还可以参加我定期组织的大探险活动！
If you're in The Moles, you'll get to eat tasty food with us, and have so much fun... And you can join the great adventures that I plan!
怎么样，很让人心动吧？快把你的伙伴也叫上，一起加入鼹鼠党吧！
How's that? Are you psyched? Get your friends and join The Moles now!
Do The Moles have any archnemeses?
喔——荣誉队员，看来你很懂这地下的规矩嘛！
Hoh... it appears you know much about the rules of the Underground, honorary member!
虽然我们鼹鼠党一直在保护磐岩镇的安全，但总有人在暗地里破坏我们的行动！
The Moles have to keep watch over the safety of Boulder Town, for evil is always thwarting our operations!
这样的人，一共有两个——一个就是诊所的老巫婆，另一个…就是希儿姐姐！
There are two of 'em: The old witch at the clinic, and the other... Big Sis Seele!
唔…不过希儿姐姐偶尔也会陪虎克玩，还会带我到处逛逛。所以鼹鼠党平时不会把她当做坏人啦。
Uh... but Seele sometimes also plays with me, and takes me out shopping. So The Moles don't really see her as a bad guy.
Sure thing, what else do you want to talk about?
就是那个蓝色头发的叔叔吧？虎克当然认识啦！
That blue-haired man? Of course I do!
You haven't been bullied by him, have you?
有吗？虎克只记得自己在欺负他了。那个叔叔对虎克可好啦！
Have I? I only remember bullying him. That man is really nice to me!
那是个坏家伙，别和他玩了。
That's a bad guy, stop hanging out with him.
咦？虽然虎克经常听到「坏家伙」的说法，可那个叔叔对虎克可好啦！
Huh? I do hear a lot about him being a "bad guy," but he's really nice to me!
The great Hook makes friends rather carelessly!
嘿，荣誉队员，怎么说话呢！那个叔叔对虎克可好了！
Hey, watch your words, honorary member! That man treats me well!
磐岩镇的大人好多都不愿意和我们鼹鼠党玩，只有桑博叔叔会带着我们到处兜风——可刺激啦！
Few of the adults in Boulder Town want to play with us Moles. Mr. Sampo's the only one who'll take us out for joyrides — it's wild!
他和别的大人不一样，喜欢笑，还喜欢聊天！桑博叔叔肯定是个好人，荣誉队员你就放心吧！
He's different from the other adults — funny and chatty! Mr. Sampo is definitely one of the good ones. Don't worry, honorary member!
你和娜塔莎关系怎么样？
哎呀，老巫婆每天都要对虎克指指点点，很讨厌啦！
Bah, all that old witch does is chide and berate me. Annoying!
不过，除了禁止鼹鼠党搞大探险，娜塔莎姐姐对虎克还是很好的。每次烧洞螈肉的时候，她都会特意给虎克多夹一点呢！
Though, besides barring us from adventures, Natasha's pretty good to me too. When she's roasting olm meat, she'll always give me bigger portions!
哦——虎克有新点子了！下次大探险，我们就去抓洞螈送给她——这下肯定不会被骂啦！
Ooh, I've just got a new idea! For the next great adventure, let's go catch some olms for her. Surely, we won't get scolded again!
欸，不聊天了吗？嘿嘿，我知道了——肯定是虎克懂的知识太多，把你震惊到了吧！
Oh, done talking? Heehee, I've got it. My overwhelming knowledge must've caused a mental overload for you!
I've got to do something else. I'll get moving first.
找我有什么事吗，荣誉队员？
How can I help you, honorary member?
哟，又见面了，{NICKNAME}！我还以为你们老早就启程去摘星星了呢。
Yo, we meet again, {NICKNAME}! I thought you all left to save the world or something already.
正好，我还欠你们一句感谢的话——多谢你们帮这座城市重新走上了正轨，外来者。
Good timing, I still owe you a thank you: Thanks for getting this city back on the right track, outsider.
在银鬃铁卫完全重新接管之前，「地火」姑且还要管管这下层区的日常琐事。你们如果有什么需要，尽管开口。
Before this place is completely handed over to the Silvermane Guards, Wildfire still has to oversee the Underworld's daily affairs. Feel free to speak up if you need anything.
哦？这么说，你是特地来跟我聊天的？哈哈哈，当然没问题！我就喜欢跟年轻人沟通。
Oh? You've really come to just chat with me? Hahaha, fire away! I like talking to young people.
What have you been up to recently?
帮娜塔莎稳定下层区的民心，执行灾后重建工作——她出脑力，我出体力。跟往常没太大区别，只是心情轻松愉快不少。

Helping Natasha calm any Underworld unrest, performing post-disaster rebuilding work — she's the brains of the outfit, and I'm the brawn. Not much difference from usual, but I'm much happier and relaxed.
另外，我周围有不少年轻人都想趁这个机会离开磐岩镇，去上层区闯荡闯荡。我和他们聊了很多，也算给了他们点生活上的指导吧。

Also, many younger people around me have been taking this chance to leave Boulder Town to try their luck in the Overworld. I've chatted plenty with them, to give them some of life's pointers, I guess.
年轻人嘛，有一腔热血总不是坏事——哪怕以后没能在上层混出头来，回头想想也是一段无悔的经历。
You know young 'uns, it helps that they are brimming with passion. Who knows when they'll make it someday in the Overworld? At least they won't reminisce and be filled with regret.
Were you part of the Silvermane Guards?
那可真是段光辉岁月啊…不谦虚地说，在我的全盛年代，部队里应该没人不知道「快拳奥列格」这个称号。
Those were the glory days... I don't mean to brag, but in the prime of my youth, everyone knew of my repute as "Swiftstrike Oleg."
…好汉不提当年勇，都是过去式了。我这个年纪的人可不能一直沉浸在过去里啊…还是得抓住当下，活得精彩才行。哈哈哈！
...No point waxing lyrical about the past though. One shouldn't be stuck in the past at my age. We should embrace the present and seize the day. Hahaha!
实话实说，{NICKNAME}——「地火」迟早会解散，自从我和娜塔莎建立起它的那天，我们就料想到这个结果了。
Realistically speaking, {NICKNAME}, Wildfire will be disbanded eventually. Natasha and I have been aware of this since the day we established it.
一个健康、正常的下层区不需要「地火」的存在。不过放心，就算组织解散了，还是会有年轻人继承「地火」一直以来的精神的。
A healthy, normal Underworld doesn't need an existence like Wildfire's. Don't worry though, even if we do disband, there'll be plenty of youngsters who will carry on the will of Wildfire.
希儿，还有我那个毛躁的徒弟，他们一定会继续为自己的家园战斗。只要他们的初心不变，我对下层区的未来就无限看好。哈哈哈！
Seele and my rowdy apprentice, they will keep fighting for their home. So long as their aspirations never change, I have nothing but high hopes for the Underworld's future. Hahaha!
布洛妮娅现在是大守护者了。
Bronya is the Supreme Guardian now.
噢，那个姑娘…我第一眼就看出她不同凡响。
Oh, that girl... I knew she was special the first time I laid eyes on her.
某种程度上，我觉得她跟可可利亚年轻的时候很像——相信我，这绝对是在夸她——只是布洛妮娅的身上少了一分阴沉，多了些真诚。
To a certain extent, I feel like she's just like when Cocolia was younger, and trust me, that's definitely a compliment. Except that Bronya's less glum, and more sincere.
我相信她能让贝洛伯格重现封锁前的样貌，甚至做得更好。毕竟那个叫「星核」的玩意已经被你们解决了，对吧？
I believe she will restore Belobog to when it was before the blockade, or perhaps even better. I mean, you all already took care of that Stellaron thing, didn't you?
但只靠一个人是完成不了这么重大的任务的——不管她的能力有多强。好在她的真诚已经打动了很多人，我们都愿意成为她的助力。
A major undertaking can't be accomplished by a single person, regardless of her individual strength. It's a good thing her sincerity has touched so many, and we're all glad to be helping her.
哦，这就要走了？我还没聊够呢，哈哈哈！
Oh, leaving already? I haven't had my fill, hahaha!
去吧，年轻人，去干你们该干的事——希望我们有朝一日还能再见。
Go well, young one. Do what you all need to do. I hope we will meet again in the coming days.
只要你人还在下层区，「地火」就会待你如贵客。有什么需要，尽管开口。
As long as you're in the Underworld, Wildfire will always treat you with utmost hospitality. Never hesitate to speak your needs.
虽然和我的想法不太一致，但布洛妮娅姑娘依旧勇敢地做出了选择，我向她致以敬意。
Miss Bronya made a bold decision and I respect her for it, even though it was not exactly what I believed best.
我猜，她一定找到了更好的办法，对吗？
I imagine she must have found a better solution, right?
将托帕与布洛妮娅合作一事转告给了奥列格……
You told Oleg about Topaz and Bronya's cooperation...
「公司」那样的组织里，居然也有和布洛妮娅姑娘抱有相同理想的人……
There is actually someone in the IPC who shares the same ideals as Miss Bronya...
虽然难以置信，不过能以和平手段解决是再好不过了。
Although it is hard to believe, resolving this situation with peaceful methods is the best-case scenario.
About the clash in the Great Mine...
你担心矿工们会找公司麻烦？别怕，问题已经解决了。
You think the mine workers will be looking for trouble with the IPC? Don't worry. We've already resolved this.
那帮黑衣人后来又拜访了下层区，承诺会为之前的不当行径作出赔偿。矿工们都能分到一笔不小的数目。
Those people dressed in black came to visit the Underworld later and promised that they will pay for their improper actions from before. All of the miners will be receiving a considerable sum.
即便这赔偿不是立即支付，也足以看出公司滴水不漏的做事风格。或许他们真能成为不错的合作伙伴。
Though this repayment will not be made immediately, it shows the IPC's meticulous style of handling affairs. Perhaps they will genuinely become great partners.
不过究竟会走到哪一步，还是要看双方各自的手段。希望布洛妮娅姑娘经得住这份重担。
As for how far this cooperation will go, we will need to see what methods are used on both sides. I hope that Miss Bronya can handle this heavy responsibility.
哎呀，瞧瞧，这不是咱的老顾客{NICKNAME}吗？
Ack, look here — isn't this our old friend {NICKNAME}?
怎么，肚子饿了，想来点磐岩镇特色小吃垫垫胃？

记住，人是铁，饭是钢——欢迎您下次再来！

…没艺术细胞的都给我站稳、听好——

玲可拍了拍自己的脸蛋。
好，我清醒了。你特意跑到雪原里找我是有什么事吗？
All right, I'm awake. What brings you all the way here to the Snow Plains?
I'm just here for a chat...
好呀，正好我今天没有科考任务。你想聊什么？
Sure, I don't have any research tasks today. What do you wanna talk about?
So, you're an extreme environments explorer?
嗯，我是贝洛伯格雪原科考队的队员。
Yup, I'm a member of the Belobog Snow Plains research team.
你可能没有听过这个组织…大守护者可可利亚还在任的时候，我们的工作被叫停，也就从公众视野里淡出了。
You probably haven't heard of this organization... Our job got called off during Supreme Guardian Cocolia's tenure, and we faded out of the public eye.
不过，我们其实在那段时间里还会经常偷偷进入雪原私自考察……
But to tell you the truth, we used to go on unauthorized expeditions into the Snow Plains from time to time back then...
…你可不要和布洛妮娅大人说这些事呀，她会生气的——虽然我们现在已经得到了她的许可就是了。
...Please don't tell Lady Bronya though. She might get upset — even though our work now have her blessings.
What's your relationship with the Landau family?
Well... we don't always see eye to eye, but we're not standing eyeball to eyeball, either.
我很喜欢和姐姐在一起。她性格开朗，多才多艺，我很佩服。
I really like hanging out with my sister. She's so cheerful and is so talented in so many things. I admire that about her.
至于哥哥嘛…他很勤奋，是个非常正直的人——要是他别那么担心我就完美了。
As for my big brother... He's hardworking and extremely righteous... I just wish he didn't worry about me so much.
这些…请你不要告诉他们——尤其是姐姐，她会膨胀的。
Please... don't mention this to anyone, especially not Serval. She'd get all puffed up.
佩拉是我的好朋友。我们在贝洛伯格士官学校读书的时候就认识了。
She's a good friend of mine. We go way back to our days at the Belobog Cadet School.
我们第一次认识是在学校的图书馆里。那时，我捡到了她丢掉的创作——和《奇谭》有关的那种——还给她了。
The first time we met was at the school library. At the time, I happened to pick up her unfinished writing, something like Tales, and returned it to her.
我没想到学校里竟然还有第二个《奇谭》粉丝，就想和她聊聊，听听她对《奇谭》的看法…不过，那时的佩拉很害羞，支支吾吾什么也没说出来。
I was pretty surprised to find out that she was a fan of Tales too, so I was curious about her opinion on it... But Pela was so shy that she didn't really say anything.
至于后来…我们俩再见面的时候，就是在姐姐的乐队里了。
Later on... we met again in Serval's band.
You're a member of the band, right?
「机械热潮」的前一任键盘手是邓恩大哥。他毕业以后军务缠身，就离开了乐队——而我补上了键盘手的位置。
Dunn was the keyboard player for Mechanical Fever before I joined, but he got caught up in military duties after graduation and had to leave the band, so I filled in.
不过，听说在我加入乐队以前，乐队应该还有一个人——那人好像是贝斯手，后来失踪了，据说和姐姐、还有可可利亚大人有些联系……
But from what I heard, there was actually another member before me, a bass player I think? But then they just disappeared, and I heard they had some connection with my sister and Madam Cocolia...
…不过这也是我道听途说来的，不是很清楚其中的细节。你就当是个幻想故事吧，别放在心上。
...But these are just baseless rumors, and I don't really know the details. So, don't take this wild story too seriously.
I don't have any more questions.
唔，好。如果还有想问的，可以随时问我。
Hmm, yeah. Feel free to come to me if you have any more questions.
Then I'll leave you to your research.
路上小心，{NICKNAME}。愿你的旅途里都是晴天。
So long, {NICKNAME}. I wish you a smooth ride ahead.
欸，你来了啊——你也是来雪原里探险的吗？
Oh, you're here, too? Are you here on an expedition just like me?
I'm just here for a chat...
好呀，正好我今天没有科考任务。你想聊什么？

So long, {NICKNAME}. I wish you a smooth ride ahead.
唷，{NICKNAME}！你居然还在下层区，真是好兴致啊！
Hey, {NICKNAME}! Glad to see you here, in the Underworld!
怎么样，要不要上台切磋切磋？
How about a friendly spar! What do you say?
没出场费的比赛我不打。
哈哈哈，不愧是你！早听人说贝洛伯格的大英雄惜财如命，看来关于你的传言不都是毫无根据嘛！
Hahahaha, I knew you'd say that! Rumor has it that the great hero of Belobog is stingy! Looks like those rumors about you are true after all!
I have no interest in bullying someone who's injured.
哈哈哈，你可别小看我！区区小伤，我躺上几分钟就恢复如初了！
Hahahaha, they're just some scratches! I'll be alive and kicking again in a few minutes!
看样子，你现在不在切磋的兴头上啊…可惜，那就下次吧！下次我可不想再听借口了哦！
Such a shame that you're not in the mood for a spar... Fine, let's fight next time! No more excuses, hah!
唷，{NICKNAME}！你居然还在下层区，真是好兴致啊！
Hey, {NICKNAME}! Glad to see you here, in the Underworld!
怎么，想动动筋骨，稍微出两滴汗？
Hmm? Want to get some exercise and break a sweat?
聊天？行啊，当然可以——毕竟跟大英雄谈心的机会可不是每天都有。
Chat? Sure thing! You don't get to chat with a great hero every day!
Are you the champion of the <unbreak>28</unbreak>-time fighting champion?
嗯？哈哈哈，没想到连次数你都记得这么清楚！
Huh? Hahaha! I didn't think you'd remember the number so well!
我觉得这算不上什么，跟你们为贝洛伯格做的事比起来，实在不值一提！
Ah, don't mention it! It's nothing compared to what you've done for Belobog!
我不是为了争夺什么荣誉才参加搏击比赛的…嗐，听着是不是有点故作谦虚的意思？但我真的是这么想的，你得信我！
To be honest, I didn't join the tournament for fame or recognition... Sounds a bit deliberately modest, huh? But trust me, I mean it!
哦…你说的是俱乐部的老板史考特先生吧？没有，我跟他不熟。
Oh... You mean the boss of the club? No, I don't really know him well.
老实说，我不太喜欢他搞的那套规矩，拳手经纪人什么的…我觉得没必要，太浮夸了。我只想靠自己的实力说话，其它的一概不感兴趣。
To be frank, I'm not a fan of his rules, especially the ones about agents and all that... I prefer to focus on my own strength and abilities and not worry about all the fancy stuff.
What's Wildfire been up to lately?
多亏了你们，我们最近的活计都轻松了不少。
Thanks to you guys, our work has been a lot easier lately.
日常的放哨巡逻当然不能落下，偶尔还要帮街里街坊的解决些小矛盾…哦，对了，最近还要配合铁卫搞几场联合演练，这事不能忘。

Of course, we don't slack off on our daily patrols, and sometimes we help the neighborhood resolve conflicts... Oh, and we need to hold some joint exercises with the Silvermane Guards soon. I mustn't forget about that.
啊，你是说我跟史瓦罗大佬的那场比赛？
Ah, you mean the match between me and Svarog?
的确很特别！对我来说，那场比试有很特殊的意义。
It was special indeed! That match had a lot of meaning to me.
我最大的遗憾就是没能赢下来…至少打个平手也行。毕竟我答应过玛……
It's such a shame that I didn't win the fight... or at least tied. I promised Margie that...
…啊，没什么！史瓦罗大佬果然名不虚传，要打败他这个地底最强，果然我还是得勤加锻炼才行！
...Ah, never mind! Svarog is indeed an awesome fighter! I guess I'll have to work harder if I want to best him, the strongest fighter!
哟，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？真是好久不见了。
Hey, if it isn't {NICKNAME}! It's been a while.
费斯曼先生也来帮忙了啊。
Are you here to help, too, Mr. Fersman?
哈哈，造物之柱毕竟是关乎整个贝洛伯格的大工程，我怎么可能闲得住呢？
Haha, as you see, the Pillars of Creation is a big project that concerns all of Belobog. How can I just sit around doing nothing?
别看我身子骨不硬朗，但好歹也在矿场摸爬滚打了几十年，指导指导年轻一辈还是够用的。
While I may not be as tough as I was in my younger days, I've spent decades in the mines, and I'm more than capable of guiding the young'uns.
你好啊{NICKNAME}，虎克这孩子承蒙你照顾了。
Hey there, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for taking care of Hook.
I have a few questions for you.
Oh, you mean last time, right?
之前巴列维过来找到我，说要买下我的「地髓矿脉探针」。
Balaway came to me and said he wanted to buy my Geomarrow Probe.
但我想这毕竟是虎克的心意，就没有卖给他。
But that was a gift from Hook, so I didn't sell it to him.
何况现在星球已经彻底开放，下层区不再需要靠争夺矿脉过活了。
Moreover, with this planet now fully accessible, Underworlders no longer need to fight over veins.
那台探测器本来就是古代遗物，还是把它留给过去吧。
That detector was an ancient relic to begin with, so let's just leave the past in the past.
How is the Pillars of Creation Project going...?
这台机器这么巨大…而且构造这么复杂…就算大家拼了命地干，也不是一天两天就能把它修好的。
As you see, this machine is massive... and its composition is complicated... Even with our best efforts, there's no way we can fix it in just a day or two.
何况现在的这股冲劲未来能维持多久，还真不太好说。
Plus, who knows how long we can keep up this momentum?
不过，至少我这把老骨头又能派上一份用场，这就够了。能为这桩事业贡献一份力量，我也算是不留遗憾了……
At least now this old man can do something useful again, and that's good enough for me. Now that I've contributed to this great cause, I won't have any regrets...
You look like you're in a good mood.
哈哈哈，之前我还以为再也不能活着见到蓝天了呢。
Hahaha, yeah! I thought I'd never see the blue sky again.
如今上下层区重新打通，虎克的将来也不用发愁了。
With all the channels between the Overworld and the Underworld reopened, I no longer have to worry about Hook's future.
我这一辈子，无非就这点盼头，现在都有了着落。这怎能叫人不开心呢？
That's all I've ever wanted in my life, and now it's all happening. How can I not be happy, right?
虎克这孩子，自打呼吸到上层区的新鲜空气后，简直比以前还要活泼了。
Well, she has been livelier than ever since she breathed in the fresh air of the Overworld.
这次她又摆弄起了什么「便携式通讯装置」，还把里面会动的照片给我看...年轻人接受新事物就是快啊......
Recently, she's been tinkering with a "portable communicator" or something, and she has even showed me the moving pictures inside... Young people are always quick to embrace new stuff...
我打算供她上贝洛伯格的公立院校，让她学习知识、开拓眼界。
I'm planning to enroll her in a public school in Belobog so that she can learn more and broaden her horizons.
终有一天，这孩子会离开我的保护，成为一个可靠的大人——这在以前可是不敢想的事。
One day, she'll have to leave my care and become a reliable adult... something I've never dared to imagine before.
也不知道她将来会选择什么道路…啊，要是能考上士官学院就好了！从那地方毕业的，各个都是人才……
I wonder what path she will take in the future... Ah, it would be great if she could make it into Cadet School! All graduates from there have promising futures...
这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，你的手机也出现了卡顿、过热、运行阻塞的情况吗？不如来我这里升级一下系统吧。
Hey, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! Are you experiencing issues with your phone such as lagging, overheating, or system-based stoppages? I can help you upgrade your system.
只要花上一丢丢信用点，你的手机就能脱胎换骨，操作系统将比银河中的星轨更加丝滑……
For just a tiny amount of credits, your phone will gain a new lease on life and its operating system will function smoother than the Star Rail that lines the cosmos...
What kind of upgrade are we talking about?
它涉及一种关乎公司机密的独家技术，这颗星球上只有我一人掌握。
Ahem, it's actually about an exclusive piece of technology from my company, and I'm the only person on this planet who can access it.
因为过于先进，具体细节不方便透露。
I can't reveal too much about it since it's exclusive.
总之，你试试就知道了，不满意不要钱。
Anyway, give it a try and see for yourself. And don't worry. I won't charge you if you're not satisfied.
就是星穹列车行驶的轨道——本地人肯定听说过星穹列车，对吧？就是那群来去无踪的天外来客……
It's the track on which the Astral Express runs. You must have heard of them, right? Those elusive star-seeking travelers...
据说就是他们把「便携式通讯装置」——哦，就是手机啦——带来了这颗星球，但显然他们完全没有顾及到「售后服务」。真是不负责任。
Rumor has it that they were the ones who brought "portable communicators" — known to us as phones — to this planet. But apparently, they don't care about customer service at all. How irresponsible!
而我们，星际和平公司，将会收拾他们的烂摊子！
That's why we of the IPC are here to clean up their mess!
Please help me upgrade my phone.
好嘞。你放心，我已经帮助过二十多个人了。
No problem. I've already helped over two dozen customers.
那么接下来，我将跨越整个银河，调取位于公司总部的数据注入这台终端。
Next, I'll access data from the other side of the galaxy and transfer it straight from the IPC's headquarters into your device.
(Pretending to work hard) Hmmm... Hyaa... Hah! Look, it's done.
然后？然后你只需要尽享这丝滑的操作系统就行了！
And then voilà! Now, enjoy its ultra-smooth operating system!
你看——这界面，这动效，这完美的手指压感和点击反馈……
Just check it out! Look at its interface and these animations, and experience this perfectly designed haptic pressure sensors and tap-feedback system...
…咳，别介意，我之前是负责用户体验改进的，对于这些方面比较在意……
...Ahem, sorry, I used to work in the user experience department, so I'm a bit obsessed with these details...
我就是星穹列车的成员。
Well, I'm from the Astral Express.
Wait, you? This... I mean... You know...
我可没有说你们坏话的意思，我只是...在为本地人提供更可靠的保修业务！
I didn't mean to badmouth you! I'm just... you know... just trying to provide more reliable warranty services for the locals!
这些本地人，弄个密码解锁都得花上半天，要是没有我这样的专业人士指导，他们早就被各种自动扣费业务给吃干抹净了……
These folks take forever to even unlock their phones. Without professional guidance like mine, they'd fall prey to all sorts of sneaky auto-pay services...
你还要继续留在这里吗？
总得有谁向本地人介绍用法嘛。我已经尽可能减少收费了。
Well, someone has to teach the locals how to use these phones. I've already done my best to keep the charges as low as possible.
多亏了我，这里的矿工已经基本掌握了日常操作。难道不是好事一桩吗？
Thanks to me, the miners here are getting the hang of it. Isn't that a good thing?
你好啊{F#女士}{M#先生}。如果还有和手机相关的问题，欢迎随时来找我。
Hey there, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}. If you ever have any questions about phones, feel free to drop by anytime.
你是怎么解决手机问题的？
How did you solve the issues with the phones?
这...呃，我可以告诉你，但你不能跟其他人说。
Well... Fine, I can tell you, but this is just between us, alright?
你应该知道， 现在主流的移动端操作系统都是由公司研发和维护的……
As you know, all the major operating systems are developed and maintained by the IPC...
为了节约算力，太长时间没有更新系统版本的终端会被标记为「已弃用」，这些手机的机主将无法享受最新推出的系统功能和优化……

To save computing power, the IPC has marked devices as "discarded" if their system hasn't been updated in a long time. As a result, the owners of those devices can't enjoy the latest features or optimizations...
本地人觉得自己的手机卡顿、发热、出了问题，其实只是因为他们不知道怎么升级系统而已……
Locals may experience issues such as lagging or overheating on their phones, but it's simply because they don't know how to upgrade the system...
所以你是想靠这个敛财？
So, you're planning to make a fortune out of this?
哎哟，这话不能乱讲！我前面说的可是句句属实…而且就算是简单的系统升级，在这么个偏远星球也算得上独家技术了。
Hey, that's hardly the case at all! I swear I was telling you the truth... And to be honest, even a simple system upgrade can be an exclusive gimmick on a remote planet like this.
那什么，你可千万别跟其他人告状啊…之前在下层区闹事的小队可被托帕总监罚的不轻…何况我只是个修手机的，没做什么伤害居民的坏事啊。
Just please don't tell anyone... Director Topaz threw the book at those troublemakers in the Underworld... I'm just a phone tinkerer who hasn't done anything to put the residents in harm's way.
...要不，这玩意你先拿着？多一事不如少一事，咱们就当交个朋友……
...How about you take this thing for now? The fewer complications the better. Just treat this as the beginning of a new friendship...
别别别，千万别！我们这些小职员混口饭吃不容易啊……
No, no! Please don't! I'm just a small-time employee, and all I want is to make ends meet...
之前在下层区闹事的小队可被托帕总监罚的不轻…何况我只是个修手机的，没做什么伤害居民的坏事啊。
Director Topaz threw the book at those troublemakers in the Underworld... I'm just a phone tinkerer who hasn't done anything to put the residents in harm's way.
...要不，这玩意你先拿着？多一事不如少一事，咱们就当交个朋友……
...How about you take this thing for now? The fewer complications the better. Just treat this as the beginning of a new friendship...
I have some questions about the IPC...
What do you make of Topaz?
托帕总监？我这种底层员工没机会跟她打交道的。
Director Topaz? Well, I'm just a low-level employee, and I don't really have a chance to talk with her.
不过按照大家的话说，她是个热爱工作、善于交际的人，而且还心地善良。
But according to everyone, she's sociable, loves her work, and more importantly, has a kind heart.
在我们部门的<unbreak>11</unbreak>位总监里，她算是最不坏的一个了。
I think she's probably the least terrible among all the eleven directors in my department.
有很多星球欠公司债吗？
Are there many planets indebted to IPC?
我这权限看不了统计数据，还真不太好说。
I can't say for sure, as I don't have access to certain statistics.
不过公司有个部门叫市场开拓部，是专门负责把新星球拉入银河市场的。
However, we do have a Marketing Development Department that focuses on bringing new planets into the galactic market.
有时这些星球会向公司借一笔起始资金，梦想着一两个琥珀纪之后能成为数一数二的贸易枢纽。
Sometimes, those planets will borrow startup funds from us, dreaming of becoming major players in the galaxy in an Amber Era or two.
这样自不量力的星球，最后也往往会成为我们部门的工作对象。
However, these planets bite off more than they can chew, and they often end up becoming targets for my department.
How much do you get paid?
这...不好吧，这可是商业机密。
Hey, you see... it's a trade secret.
对不起，唯独这个真的不能说！
I'm sorry, but I just can't spill the beans on that one!
这是我们公司内部不可逾越的高压线，只要碰了就是死...我是说，开除。
It's a totally off-limits topic within IPC, and whoever breaks the rules will be fried... I mean, fired.
不光是我，你问别人也只会得到一样的回答。
It's not that I'm trying to keep it from you. Go ask anyone else, and they'll give you the same answer.
I have other matters to attend to.
I'll give it a full remodel. I guarantee you'll love it!
Take a gander, and have a look.
贵安，{NICKNAME}，我是凡迪雅，大守护者的钦差特使。
Greetings, {NICKNAME}. I'm Fedora, the envoy of the Supreme Guardian.
这片场地现在归我负责，但我不会干涉你们举办的娱乐活动。
I'm in charge of this venue now, but don't worry, I won't interfere with your entertainment.
我之所以在这，只是为了提醒公司：这里依旧是贝洛伯格的领土。
The reason I'm here is to remind the IPC that this territory still belongs to Belobog.
{NICKNAME}，很高兴再见到你。要是你能马不停蹄去做自己的事，我就更高兴了。
Glad to meet you again, {NICKNAME}. I'd be even happier if you could move on from here and onto your business.
怎么，看见这张桌子就以为我是卖东西的了？
Hmm? You see a desk here and think I'm running a store?
这是我的私人办公区，不是店面。就算你付钱，我也没有东西能卖给你。
This is my private office, not a store. Even if you pay me, I don't have anything to sell you.
What about these tables and chairs in the front?
那些是竞技场的公共设施，一开始就在这里。放心坐吧，它不收费。
They're part of the public facilities in the arena and had been since its installation. Feel free to take a break there for free.
And the sign in the back?
那只是比赛的宣传画，看样子就知道了吧？
That's just a poster for the tournament. You can tell purely from its appearance, I presume?
But this place really looks like a store.
好吧，为了打消你的十万个为什么，我想我还是解释一下比较好。
All right, to cease your seemingly endless confusion, please allow me to explain.
这里确实曾经有一个卖食物的小商贩。后来他回上层区结婚了，这张桌子和位置也就归我了。
There used to be a food vendor here, but he returned to the Overworld and got married. That's why I've taken over this table and spot.
明白了？我没法给你提供任何东西。
So, you understand now? There is nothing I can offer you here.
你应该去参加比赛或做点什么别的，而不是把功夫浪费在跟我说话上。
Your time would be more appropriately used by joining a match or something rather than talking with me.
你就没有什么任务交给我吗？
Don't you have any quests for me?
我很想，但贝洛伯格的参赛选手已经有许多了。
I'd love to, but there are already too many participants in Belobog.
...不过，关于比赛的胜负，我跟佩拉打了个赌。
...But here's the thing: I made a bet with Pela about the outcome of the tournament.
如果你真能取得冠军的话，我可以代表个人给你一些奖励。
If you manage to win the championship, I can give you some rewards on my own behalf.
我已经如约拿到冠军了。
I've won the championship as promised.
的确，就连我一开始也没想到你真的能赢...也许这就是无名客的过人之处吧。
To be honest, I didn't think you would actually win... I guess that's what makes the Nameless so amazing.
Here, the promised reward for you.
All right. See you next time.
再见，记得留心那些黑衣人。
See you next time. And watch out for those shady guys in black.
All right. See you next time.
再见，记得留心那些黑衣人。
See you next time. And watch out for those shady guys in black.
{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！欢迎来到「星际决胜庆典」会场！
Hey, {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the Interastral Tournament Festival!
您想要了解相关信息吗？又或者是前来办理相关手续的？
Need any information? Or just signing up?
不论您需要什么帮助，都请随时告诉我——身为星际和平公司员工兼《以太战线》资深玩家，我随时有求必应！
Anything you need, just let me know! As an IPC worker and a veteran player of Aetherium Wars, I'm always ready to help!
{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！欢迎来到「星际决胜庆典」会场——相关赛事现在已经结束了。
Hey, {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the Interastral Tournament Festival! The tournament is over, though.
不过，您还是可以通过这台综合终端，编辑您的玩家信息和以太灵阵容，与来自全世界的玩家对决——如果您有任何需要就请告诉我吧！
However, you can use this terminal to edit your information and lineup, and compete against players worldwide. Anything you need, just let me know!
Sure thing! What's on your mind?
当然了！要说我和这款游戏的缘分，还得从我的父辈开始讲起呢。
Oh, absolutely positively so! Let me tell you how I started playing this game! Well, it actually started with my father's generation.
我的父亲是一位电子游戏重度玩家——他从小就带着我和我的双胞胎兄弟，培养我们的游戏兴趣：而这《以太战线》就是我们兄弟俩接触的第一款游戏了。
My father was a hardcore gamer who introduced my twin brother and me to gaming at a young age, and Aetherium Wars was the first game we ever played.
虽然我在之后也玩了其他不少游戏，其中也不乏一线厂商的各种工业化大制作，但陪伴我最久的反而是这样一款略显简陋的游戏。
I've tried many other games since then, including blockbusters from top-notch developers, but Aetherium Wars, despite its somewhat dated graphics, has stuck with me the longest.
要说原因…除了这游戏本身足够有趣，又能保证长期更新，我想更多还是因为情怀加成……
As for why... I think the game itself is fascinating and has consistent updates, but more importantly, it holds sentimental value and that's what makes it special to me...
毕竟，这款游戏是我童年不可或缺的一部分——喜欢它也是很自然的吧？哈哈哈。
Anyway, this game was a big part of my childhood, and it's only natural to have a soft spot for it, right? Hahaha.
您是指「星际决胜庆典」的运营吗？那我还是非常乐在其中的。
You mean working as an operator for the Interastral Tournament Festival? Yeah, I do enjoy it.
为自己热爱的游戏贡献一份属于自己的力量，这恐怕是每个游戏玩家都梦寐以求的工作了——您说对吧？
Contributing to a game you love is the greatest dream for any gamer. Don't you agree?
虽然日日夜夜站在这里接待各路玩家，我这身体确实有点吃不消…但考虑到这可是《以太战线》，我也就感觉没那么难受了。
While standing here day and night to greet players does take a toll on my body, but... hey! It's Aetherium Wars! Whenever I think of that, it doesn't feel so bad anymore.
可以聊聊星际和平公司吗？
哈哈，当然没问题！不过总部的消息我也知之甚少，就和您随便聊聊我的工作生活吧。
Haha, sure thing! I don't know much about the headquarters, so let's just talk about my daily work and life.
我自打从欧文利星毕业以后就拿到了公司「战略投资部」的工作——和我的双胞胎弟弟维利特一起。
After graduating from Owenley, I got a job with the Strategic Investment Department, where I work together with my twin brother Velite.
到现在为止，我们大概干了有四年…不对，五年了。这期间甚至还跨了一个琥珀纪呢，哈哈哈。
It's been about four... no, five years since then. Can you believe we've even crossed into a new Amber Era? Hahaha.
我还是挺享受这份工作的：累虽然是累了点，但托帕总监对我们还不错；我那弟弟给另一位总监「翡翠」打工去了，听他每天叫苦不迭，日子貌似挺不好过……
To be honest, I enjoy my job. While it can be exhausting at times, Director Topaz has been treating me well. My brother is now working for another director named Jade, and he's having a hard time...
I don't need anything else. Thank you.
自从决定归还{TEXTJOIN#54}之后，这只扑满的脾性变得更加自由了。即便名义上归属于空间站，它仍会时不时偷溜进列车，仿佛特意寻找你的踪迹。

扑满的鼻子格外敏感，有什么东西正在酝酿......

一个巨大的喷嚏...幸亏以太灵没有鼻涕。

扑满的逃跑天赋同样反映在它身体的各个部位上。你试图抓住它灵巧的耳朵，手速却怎么都不够用。
The Trotter's talent for escape is reflected in every part of its body. You try to catch its dexterous ears, but your hand is just not fast enough.
听见了吗？那是胜利的哼声。

银河中有句箴言：「扑满的屁股摸不得」，即便它又小又可爱。

你的举动让扑满很不满，它也该得到尊重。
The Trotter is very displeased with what you have done. It deserves respect, too.

The little arctic bear cub watches you with its head tilted, flapping its semicircular ears.

Normally, wild animals are alert around unfamiliar things, but this little one doesn't seem to be bothered by your presence.
小熊发出有些殷切的叫声，挥动起又短又圆的前肢，似乎指望你能帮它做些什么。

谁能拒绝一只可爱的小冰原熊的邀请呢？你走上前……
Who could reject an invitation from an adorable little arctic bear cub? You start to approach...
你用双手轻轻抱起小熊，它的重量比你想象得要轻一些。随着十指微微嵌入毛发与脂肪交叠的绵软地带，一阵暖意顺着你的掌心蔓延开来。

You gently pick up the little cub with both hands. It is lighter than you expected. A feeling of warmth spreads across your palms, as your fingers are immersed in the soft area where its fat and fur overlap.

这个你擅长！在你脑补的星穹列车冷笑话大赛中，你以碾压之势夺得了冠军。

...Dang, no reaction. This was clearly one of your proudest dad jokes... It seems that the arctic bear is a species with high standards when it comes to dad jokes. This is a tough crowd.
你清了清嗓子——该到一展歌喉的时候了！

A refreshing mint flavor bursts from the back of your tongue, moistening your throat and vocal cords... That feels great, no wonder Welt's always gobbling sweets! Now, you are ready.

唉，我还听说歌德家也…这里面水太深！

All I can say is, knowing too much can be a mistake...
啥啥啥，你们说的这都是啥？

听说可可利亚那件事有点说法，大家懂的都懂……

有一说一，确实…大家都藏着掖着，肯定有问题……

啧啧，可算让我咂摸出味儿了…这里面牵扯到很多东西啊……

哈，我看不止这点东西！你们哪，再仔细品一品……

那个啥…你们能说人话不？

Lavonne? Don't trust a single word she says!

哈？那我要买东西怎么办？

不开门，经理也不上班啊……

你就把鲜奶油和柠檬汁……

「哞哞」的新品酸奶油太贵了，可我家那小子又想吃薄饼……

这还不简单，我教你自制酸奶油！
That's no good. I'll teach you how to make homemade sour cream!

原来这么简单啊，谢谢你。
Cool, huh? C'mon, give it a try.

妈妈，他们怎么还没到呀？
Mom, why aren't they here yet?

孩子总要发展些兴趣爱好……

女士您看，孩子从小到大总得发展些兴趣爱好……
Look, madam — children will always need a few hobbies as they grow up and develop...
不好意思啊，我不感兴趣……
我太理解您了，可您就要眼睁睁地让自己孩子输在起跑线上吗？

小心别让家里人发现了……
Be careful. Don't let your family find out...
哎，钓个鱼还搞得这么麻烦。

Don't worry too much. You've got us, the Rightful Rights Society for this.

What if — I mean, what if I got exposed...
放心吧，我们肯定帮你打好掩护。
Don't worry. We'll come up with a flawless cover story.
The Ball Peonies in my garden are blooming...
Really? I've never even seen them!
大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.
I've got a friend in the Administrative Department...
他和我说，克里珀堡最近计划精简驾考流程，如果没考驾照的话可以先等等。
He told me that Qlipoth Fort planned on streamlining their driver's licensing program. So if you don't have a license right now, you should wait.
那敢情好啊！我赶紧怂恿女儿考驾照去，这下采购可方便多了。
That's good news! I'll persuade my daughter to get her driver's license, that'll make my future shopping much more laborsaving.
大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.
I've got a friend in the Justice Department...
他和我说，克里珀堡最近出台新法规，以后横穿铁轨可能要重罚了。
He told me that Qlipoth Fort implemented new rules that could lead to heavy fines for jaywalking across railway lines.
那敢情好啊！这贝洛伯格的交通安全是该整顿整顿了。
That's good news! It's time for Belobog's traffic safety to get tightened up.
大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.
不是，你先等会儿…我一直很好奇一件事。
No, please hang on... I've always been curious about this one thing.
How did you manage to make so many friends?
大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.
I've got a friend in the Treasury Department...
他和我说，克里珀堡最近讨论后决定要加大减税力度了。
He told me that Qlipoth Fort had a discussion recently and decided on further cutting taxes.
那敢情好啊！新任守护者年纪虽然小，但确实有点能力嘛。
That's good news! The new Supreme Guardian may be young, but she's capable.
大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.
I have a friend at a publishing house...
他和我说，出版社最近收到风声——《雪国冒险奇谭》最近应该能重新出版了。
He told me, they've received word recently that the Tale of the Winterlands is going into print again.
那敢情好啊！我打小就是《奇谭》粉丝了。
That's good news! I've been a fan of the Tale since I was a kid.
哎，不知道这下能不能鼓舞作者出个续集……
*sigh* Hopefully this'll inspire the author to pen a sequel...
This Rightful Rights Society you mentioned...
我之前看杂志，上边讲这个贝洛伯格有一「正当权益会社」。
I read in a magazine once that Belobog has a Rightful Rights Society.
这个「什么什么权益会社」的成员啊，平时专门帮人翘班……
The members of this "Rightful Whatevers Society" help people skip work...
啊，不对，应该是——「帮助其他会员暂时逃离家庭和责任的束缚」！
Oh, no — I mean, "They help people temporarily escape the bonds of family and duty"!
还有这种莫名其妙的组织？这贝洛伯格真是乱套了……
Does such an organization really exist? This Belobog really is one messed up place...
听着有点意思…那么该怎么加入呢？
Sounds kinda interesting... So how does one go about signing up?
这个杂志上没说，只说了小编也感到很好奇。
The magazine doesn't say. It just says that the editor is also very curious.
...Then why do you bring it up?
我就知道——从你嘴里蹦出来的净是些废话……
I knew it — everything that comes out of your mouth is nonsense...
Ah... that no-good kid never wrote me back...
他去的是后勤部，放心吧。
He went to the Logistics Department. Don't worry.
The top choice in caviar for Supreme Guardians!
Eat for nourishment, and eat for taste!
The Logistics Department's special supply of Belobog Sausages!
A super-value choice for family emergencies!
Plump and juicy meat, with a thin shell!
An all-new petroleum jelly hand cream!
A variety of scents and effective healing!
Top-shelf Olm meat from the Underworld!
Caught and swiftly killed to lock in the freshness!
咖啡什么时候重新供应呢……
When will coffee be back on the menu...
I don't know. I want a cup too.
好像有小说写过这宾馆呢……
I think there's a novel written about this hotel...
Yeah, a pity that it never got finished.
叮叮号好像有段恐怖传说……
I heard there's a legend of horror about the Ding-Ding Tram...
你是说「不存在的车站」吧？

这天气喝茶，就该坐外边……
Drinking tea in this weather should be done outdoors...
Isn't the weather the same across the city?

美食专栏作者出来挨打。

是贝洛伯格学院毕业的吗？

Please bestow your powers of Preservation upon that useless son of mine... And deliver him from suffering...

I did put my luggage here...
本次旅行的目的地是磐岩镇，首先我们要去歌德大饭店办理入住……

暂时还没有…但我相信大家一定会响应我们的号召！

哎，你们听说了吗？无敌大老爹宣布参加这次说唱比赛了！

蓝色头发？不会是那个人吧……

克拉拉小姐又送来了物资。

When was the last time you came home!?

别说得和你要打拳似的！

放工了…咱要不上哪儿逛逛？

您放心，我们有专门渠道。
Rest assured that we have dedicated supply channels.

Recycle old pickaxes and broken ones!
Recycle old shovels and broken piledrivers!

"Amber, Amber, more Amber for thy soul"

咳咳，我来播报今天的新闻……

请广大镇民提高警惕，如遇案情迅速报告「地火」！

What matters is enjoying the game with the ones you love.

You will win, sooner or later.

还是开拓者{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}比较厉害！
I think {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} Trailblazer is a better player!

...It's nothing like that of an automaton.
...We've got to stay vigilant all the time.

I still think my plan is better...

...Will bring us closer to a brighter future.

I just can't afford to lose my treasure.

我应该做工程指挥才对。
I should work as an engineering director.

And there's no one at the workbench.

这个呀，就是一条长得像灯笼的鱼形机巧……
Well, it's a fish-shaped ingenium that looks like a lantern...
…还是长得像鱼的灯笼形机巧？
...Or is it a lantern-shaped ingenium that looks like a fish?
我早就和你说了，要早点买票……
I told you before to buy the tickets early...
你说要是我们买了票，还至于在这儿杵着吗？

我看你个头！你自己看看，这地方能看清楚吗？
"We can watch it from here"... Grow a pair of eyes and look around! You think we can see anything from here?
欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。找我这个老头子有什么事吗？
Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, {F#young miss}{M#young man}. Is there anything an old man like me can help you with?
I'm just here to visit the museum.
呵呵，那你走错了。这里是博物馆的仓库，出门向右，经过前台便是展厅。
Oh hoho, you're at the wrong place. This is the museum's warehouse. Head out then turn right, the exhibition hall is past the reception counter.
I'm here solely to talk with older people.
呵呵，那可真是个特别的爱好。不过，这里毕竟是博物馆——难得来一趟，你不妨去参观看看。从这里出门向右，经过前台便是展厅了。
Hah, what a unique hobby. However, this is a museum after all. Since you're here, might as well have a tour. Head out then turn right, the exhibition hall is past the reception counter.
如果你在游览途中遇到了什么问题，或者对我们的展览有什么意见或建议，都可以来找我聊聊——
If you have any questions along your tour, or if you have any feedback or opinions, welcome to come talk to me...
——我是贝洛伯格艺术学院前任校长，现在的博物馆馆长于尔丹。请多指教了。
...I am Uldan, former dean of the Belobog College of Art, and now the curator of this museum. Pleased to meet you.
欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。找我这位馆长有什么事吗？
Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Is there anything an old curator like me can help you with?
I would like to chat with you...
你说说看，我可以尽量为你解答。
Let's talk, I will do my best to answer your questions.
贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆——顾名思义，就是向公众展示贝洛伯格历史文化的展览馆。
Belobog History and Culture Museum... As the name might suggest, it is a display gallery to showcase Belobog's history and culture to the public.
大守护者可可利亚牺牲后，她的女儿布洛妮娅决定向公众展示冬城七百年来的全部真相，于是这博物馆便成了窗口。

After the Supreme Guardian Cocolia's sacrifice, her daughter, Bronya had decided to open seven hundred years' worth of the Everwinter City's history to the masses, so this museum has become a window to our past.
虽然贝洛伯格历史只有七百年左右，谈不上悠久；况且许多文物已经被风雪彻底掩埋，这博物馆实在没有多少可以展出的内容……

Though, Belobog's history is only seven hundred years old, it's not really that long. Furthermore, many historical relics have already been buried under the snow, so the museum doesn't really have that many things to put up...
…但我们还是绞尽脑汁，试图用所剩无几的史料和艺术品把整个贝洛伯格历史串联起来。就目前的状况而言…我们的目标大约算是达成了吧。

...But we still squeezed all we can in an attempt to string our story together with the little historical sources and art pieces we have. As for our current situation... I guess our goal is somewhat fulfilled.
这是贝洛伯格大学下设的学院之一，专门向大学生们提供艺术教育，并为我们这座城市培养更多的艺术人才。
It is one of the colleges under the University of Belobog. It specializes in providing art education to its students, so that we can nurture more artistic talents for our city.
这座学校是我的母校，也是我宝贵的心血。倒也不是自夸，但在我任校长那会儿，我们学院的办学水平可以说是达到了有史以来的新高峰……

The college is my alma mater, and I poured my heart and soul in it. I don't mean to indulge in self-praise, but when I was serving as its dean, the college's education level was at its historic peak...
…咳，好汉不提当年勇，过去的事情就不谈了。眼下最要紧的还是我们贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆啊。
...Ahem, A good man does not brag about the past, let us move on from this. The more important thing right now is our Belobog History and Culture Museum.
I want to understand your past...
呵呵，没想到你对老头子我的过去感兴趣啊。我只是个普通人罢了，不过既然你问到，那我就简单展开说说吧。
Hehe, you're interested in an old man's past? I'm just an ordinary person, but since you asked, I'll tell you a little bit about myself.
我是贝洛伯格艺术学院的毕业生，那时的我是初生牛犊不怕虎，天真地以为自己和艺术都有改变世界的力量……
I was a graduate of the Belobog College of Art. Back then, I had no fear and naively believed that me and my art has the power to change the world...
结果，正如你所能想到的——我四处屡屡碰壁，活成了小说里艺术家该有的样子…怀才不遇、穷困潦倒，连自己的温饱都解决不了，更别提梦想了。

Well, you can guess the rest... Everywhere I go, I faced rejection. I became the stereotypical image of an artist... No opportunities, poor, starving, all of those. I could barely handle basic necessities like food and shelter, let alone my dreams.
巧的是，正在我准备放下画笔，彻底和艺术告别的时候，我的母校向我抛来了橄榄枝——他们想要我回去做教授，我也就顺水推舟地同意了。

The funny thing is, when I was ready to set down my paint brush and stop doing art for good, but then my alma mater handed me a deal — they wanted me to go back and become a professor, and so I agreed.
于是，我就这么做下去，一直做到了校长的位置上，也带出来不少得意门生——他们中的许多人，在如今的冬城也算是赫赫有名的艺术大师了。
I gave it all I had, and eventually, I climbed my way up to become the dean of the college. I'm proud of all my students — many of which are famous artists in the Everwinter City.
在后来，我的人生便没什么起伏了。我一直做到了退休，后来又接到大守护者布洛妮娅的邀请，才来了如今的博物馆担任馆长。
My life has been pretty smooth sailing ever since. After my retirement, I accepted Supreme Guardian Bronya's invitation and became the curator of this museum.
接下来嘛…就走一步看一步吧。
What happens next? Well, we'll see.
我没问题了，就到这里吧。
呵呵，慢走。祝你享受这趟历史文化之旅。
Heheh, take care now. I hope you enjoy this historical cultural tour.
I'll go ahead and tour now.
呵呵，慢走。祝你享受这趟历史文化之旅。
Hehe, take care now. I hope you enjoy this historical cultural tour.
欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。佩拉小姐已经和我说过了，您可以免票参观！
Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Miss Pela has notified me that you can enter free of charge!
请问，您现在要进入博物馆吗？
Would you like to enter the museum?
哟，你哪位？这儿是博物馆修理间，可没展览给你看哪……
Hey, who are you? This is the restoration room of the museum, nothing here is on display...
我是佩拉小姐派来帮忙的。

我是贝洛伯格的大英雄。

幸会幸会，我是博物馆的文物修复员鲍里斯！刚才没能认出来，实在是不好意思啊。
Pleased to meet you, I'm the museum's artifact restorer, Boris! So sorry for not recognizing you earlier.
哟，你怎么又逛荡到修理间来了？

难不成…你是找我来聊天的？
Are you... looking to have a chat with me?
I want to chat with you...
哈哈，难得啊，有人会来找我这修文物的聊闲天——你想聊点啥？我都可以奉陪！
Hah hah, that's rare, someone wanting to chat with me, an artifact restorer! What would you like to talk about? I'm down for anything!
博物馆嘛，自然就是展览各种文物的地方了。
Well, it's a museum, so naturally, it puts up all kinds of relics and artifacts on display.
至于我们这座历史文化博物馆嘛，展品谈不上多——原因你也知道，寒潮、裂界…它们带走的东西实在是太多了。
This museum in particular doesn't have much in its collection, and you know the reason for it — the Eternal Freeze, the Fragmentum... They took so much from us.
不过，我们还是把能收集来的文物全都翻新了一遍，又把它们送进展柜里。也正因此，这座博物馆看起来还算是过得去。
However, we still collected everything we can and restored them so that we can put them on display. Because of that, the museum is at least somewhat decent.
总之…如果你在参观过程中觉得有些不满，还请你多见谅——这已经是我们能尽到的最大的努力了。
Anyway... please understand — if you feel dissatisfied during the tour — this is the best that we can do.
文物修复员嘛，那工作自然就是修复各种文物了。你现在能在展馆里看到的各种文物和比例模型，基本都出自我的手。

As an artifact restorer, my job is naturally to restore various cultural and historical pieces. Most of the artifacts and scale models that you can see in the exhibition hall were basically restored by me.
说起来，我当年还是贝洛伯格艺术学院雕塑系的优秀毕业生呢——于尔丹喊我来帮忙制作模型，没想到竟然也把修复文物的活计交给我了……

Speaking of which, I was once an outstanding graduate from the Belobog College of Arts back then, specializing in sculptures. Uldan hired me to help create models, and I ended up having a job here as a restorer...
哎，贝洛伯格的专业人才还是太少了啊。
*sigh* There are still too few professionals in Belobog.
我没问题了，就到这里吧。
慢走！好好享受我们的展览吧。
慢走！好好享受我们的展览吧。
欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆！请问有什么可以帮到您吗？
Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Is there anything I can help you with?
您是在游览过程中遇到什么麻烦了吗？我可以为您一一解答！
Did you run into any trouble during your tour? I can try to answer them all for you!
贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆是克里珀堡文化部辖下的、全贝洛伯格最大的综合性博物馆，内容涵盖了历史文化与艺术等不同范畴！
Belobog History and Culture Museum is the largest comprehensive museum in Belobog under the Ministry of Culture in Qlipoth, covering a wide range of history, culture and art!
我们博物馆立志于给每一位来访观众提供最温馨便捷的观展体验。在您参观文物之余，也不妨在休息区小憩一番，或是参加我们不定期举行的主题活动节目！

Our museum is dedicated to providing a welcoming and accessible experience for all visitors. While exploring the exhibits, be sure to take a break in our rest area. And don't miss out on our occasional themed events!
What do you have in your exhibitions?
贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆现共设有三个常设展览馆，包括：综合展馆、工业展馆以及历史文化展馆！
There are three permanent exhibition areas in the Belobog History and Culture Museum, and they are: The General Hall, the Industrial Hall, and the History-Culture Hall!
不同展馆中设有不同种类的历史文物，您可以在此欣赏到贝洛伯格历史文化的不同侧面；此外，我们还将不定期举办专题展览，您也可以随时前来参加！

The three different areas each have different kinds of historical artifacts on display. You can see Belobog from different angles in each of the areas. Other than that, we will occasionally have themed exhibitions that you can check out!
I want to know more about you, Eris...
我、我只是个贝洛伯格艺术学院的学生而已啦…馆长于尔丹先生是我的导师，我跟着先生来这里开展实习……
I... I'm just a student of the Belobog College of Art... Curator Uldan is my mentor, and I'm here to do my internship under him...
总、总之，我只是个平平无奇的普通人而已，没经历过什么值得一听的故事……
I—In short, I'm just an ordinary person, and my stories are as boring as they come...
我、我们还是来聊聊博物馆本身吧？！
L—Let's talk about museum, shall we?
That's all I wanted to know.
请慢走，也祝您享受本次博物馆之旅！
Please take care, and hope you enjoy the tour!
请慢走，也祝您享受本次博物馆之旅！
Please take care, and hope you enjoy the tour!
欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，{NICKNAME}。
Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, {NICKNAME}.
多亏了你，我们的展览才能像这样正常举行——再次感谢你为贝洛伯格的贡献。
Thanks to you, our exhibition is successfully pulled off. We thank you for your service to Belobog once again.
啊…是{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！欢迎来到博物馆……

…对不起，这里应该说全称——欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆！请随意参观哦，{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！
...Sorry, I should say its full name... Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum! Take your time around here, {F#big sister}{M#big brother} {NICKNAME}!
{NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。如你所见，我正在担任志愿导览员……
We meet again, {NICKNAME}. As you can see, I'm currently volunteering as a tour guide...
在最开始的时候，观众们都以为我是来视察展览状况的，根本不敢上前询问…不过，现在大家似乎已经渐渐习惯了——不得不说，这可真是新奇的体验。

At first, visitors thought I was here to monitor the status of the exhibition. They were scared to approach me... But now, it seems like everyone started getting used to it — you know, this is a novel experience.
哈，这不是我的老主顾、兼贝洛伯格的名侦探{NICKNAME}嘛！你也来参观展览啊，真是好兴致！
Ah, isn't this my old pal, the famed detective of Belobog, {NICKNAME}? You're here to visit the exhibition as well? What an adventure!
不瞒你说，我现在正在这儿担任志愿导览员呢——当然，也顺便逗逗那位情报官小姑娘——就让我看看能在她眼皮子底下藏到什么时候吧，嘿嘿。
To be honest, I'm currently volunteering as a tour guide here. Also, I'm teasing the intelligence officer lady over there... Let's see how long I can hide while within her purview, teehee.
哟，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。怎么，你也是来找我要签名的？
Hey, isn't this {NICKNAME}? Why, are you here to get my signature as well?
嗯？你说志愿导览员？你放心，我可没忘记这茬——这不是大家见了我都纷纷热情高涨，我实在招架不住嘛…哎，我也很为难的啦～
Hm? Volunteer tour guide? Don't worry, I didn't forget. It's just everyone was so excited, I can't hold on any longer... it's difficult holding back the passion, y'know~
又见面了，{NICKNAME}。能在诊所之外碰到你，还怪让人不习惯的呢。
We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Meeting you outside of the context of my clinic is a bit hard to get used to.
随意参观吧，如果想了解展品背后的故事也不妨告诉我——身为儿童公社的负责人，我可是很擅长讲故事的哦。
Just take a look around. If you want to find out the stories behind each exhibit, you can come to me. As the person in charge of the clinic nursery, I'm pretty good at telling stories.
哇，是荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！你在博物馆里有没有看到坏人呀？

If you have, you must tell Hook immediately! Hook and Diggertron will chase the bad guys away to make sure the museum visitors have a good time!
欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，{NICKNAME}。我是博物馆的志愿导览员，兼银鬃铁卫戍卫官，杰帕德。
Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, {NICKNAME}. I am a volunteer tour guide of the museum and the Silvermane Guard Captain, Gepard.
如果你有任何问题，都可以向我提问。愿您能有一段美好的观展体验。
If you have any questions, feel free to ask me about it. I hope you will have a wonderful exhibit experience.
{NICKNAME}，欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化……
{NICKNAME}, welcome to the Belobog History and Cul—

这位朋友，你看过《破晓战队》吗？你了解《破晓战队》吗？
Hey friend, have you seen Daybreak Squadron? Are you familiar with Daybreak Squadron?
听你的语气，就知道你对《破晓战队》的了解尚浅。因为你没有表现出听到这个名字以后应该表现出的狂热。
I can tell from your tone that you barely know anything about Daybreak Squadron. Because you're not showing the proper level of fanaticism that name should inspire.
但是没关系，现在入坑也不晚。入坑《破晓战队》最好的机会是十年前，其次是现在！
But that's okay. It's never too late to get into it! The best time to get into Daybreak Squadron was ten years ago. The second best time is now!
这战队的历史都没有十年吧？
This team hasn't even been around for ten years, right?
没错，十年前的二相乐园没有《破晓战队》，所以十年前的二相乐园还远远不够酷！
Exactly! Ten years ago, Planarcadia didn't have Daybreak Squadron, so ten years ago, Planarcadia was nowhere near cool enough!
如果你想要入坑《破晓战队》，欢迎随时来问我，我绝对能给你最明确的入坑指南～
If you ever wanna get into Daybreak Squadron, feel free to hit me up anytime! I can totally give you the ultimate beginner's guide~
如何？想入坑《破晓战队》了吗？
So? Ready to dive into Daybreak Squadron?
I'd like to ask you something.
问吧！只要是和《破晓战队》相关的事，我什么都会回答你的！
Go ahead, ask away! I'll answer anything and everything about Daybreak Squadron!
你知道破晓战队出了什么事吗？
Do you know what happened to the Daybreak Squadron?
不就是输给了星穹列车吗？我不在乎。我对《破晓战队》的喜爱，早就不是那种肤浅的喜爱了。
It lost to the Astral Express, huh? I don't care. My love for Daybreak Squadron has long surpassed that kind of shallow affection.
他们的故事作为一个象征、一个信标，阐明平凡人应该如何成为英雄。
Their story stands as a symbol, a beacon, showing how ordinary people can become heroes.
而他们所代表过的精神，就算只是演员的临场做戏，也不会被磨损。
And the spirit they represented, even if it was just actors putting on a show, will never fade.
…况且，我原本主要喜欢的也是他们出演的虚构故事啦！
...Besides, what I really loved in the first place were the fictional stories they starred in!
Got any tips for getting started?
我个人会建议你从他们出演的虚构故事开始看起。因为都是单元剧，先看哪集都可以。我推荐几集最适合入坑的吧。
Personally, I'd say start with the fictional stories they appear in. Since they're all standalone episodes, you can jump in anywhere. Let me recommend a few that are perfect for newcomers.
首先是《次元怪盗登场》和《次元怪盗归来》，这两集没什么深度，但是视觉奇观非常优秀。次元怪盗先是让世界变成二维，又让世界进入四维，非常精彩。

First up, we've got The Dimensional Thief Appears and The Dimensional Thief Returns. These two episodes aren't exactly deep, but the visual spectacle is absolutely stellar. The Dimensional Thief first flattens the world into bidimensional, then turns it four-dimensional. Totally mind-blowing stuff.
《不被需要的人们》则正相反，沉郁、阴暗，几乎没什么特效场景。但是故事却非常有深度，反派是一群被新技术淘汰的绘师，看到后面，你会很不希望他们输。

Those Who Are No Longer Needed, on the other hand, is the complete opposite. Somber, bleak, barely any flashy effects to speak of. But the story's got some real depth. The villains are a bunch of artists who got replaced by new tech, and by the end... you'll be rooting for them not to lose.
最后还有一集《海兽们的长夜》，讲述海洋中诞生的灾异，与破晓战士们坠入爱河的悲剧故事…唉，你还是自己看吧，这个我每次复述剧情都会哭出来。

Lastly, there's the episode, The Long Night of the Sea Beasts. It tells the tragic story of Aberrations born in the ocean who fall in love with the Daybreak Warriors... *sigh* You know what, just watch it yourself. I cry every single time I try to retell this one.
如果你也喜欢，还可以看一下「海兽前传」三部曲，「湍流」「层流」和「激流」。讲述了海洋灾异为什么会爱上…啊不能再说下去了，鼻头开始酸了。

If you like it, you should also check out the "Sea Beast" prequel trilogy: "Riptide," "Laminar," and "Torrent." It's about why the Aberrations in the ocean fell in love with... Ah, I can't say anymore, my nose is starting to tingle.
总之先把我推荐的这几集看完吧。看完你就算是正式入坑《破晓战队》了！
Anyway, start by watching the episodes I recommended. Once you're done with those, you'll officially be a Daybreak Squadron fan!
Who's your favorite character in Daybreak Squadron?
《破晓战队》的主旨，就是平凡之人所能做到的英雄之事。而在这其中，再没人比灰烬更符合平凡之人的定义了。
Daybreak Squadron is all about the heroic deeds that ordinary people can accomplish. And among them, no one fits the definition of "ordinary" better than Cinderborne.
我觉得灰烬代表了一种意志——不止天选之子才能成为英雄，你在路上偶然遇到的那些叫玛丽、威廉、安妮、杰克的路人甲们，也都可以成为英雄。

I think Cinderborne represents a kind of will: it's not just the chosen ones who can become heroes. Those everyday people you bump into along the way, the Marys, Williams, Annies, and Jacks, they can all become heroes too.
好嘞～如果还想了解《破晓战队》，可以再来联系我。
Sure thing~ If you wanna know more about Daybreak Squadron, just come find me again!
