您好，星穹列车的贵客。我是二相乐园首席执行官真珠女士的秘书，美亚。
Hello, esteemed guests of the Astral Express. I am Mia, secretary to Madam Pearl, CEO of Planarcadia.
原则上来说，与真珠女士面谈需要提前预约。但真珠女士嘱咐过，对于贵方成员的会面请求，她会做到随时响应。
Normally, meetings with Madam Pearl require an appointment in advance. However, she's given strict instructions that whenever your crew requests a meeting, she'll make herself available right away.
尽管如此，但真珠女士近期实在操劳，我以个人名义请求您，如果没有要事相商，请不要过多进出她的办公室。
Nevertheless, Madam Pearl has been working herself ragged lately. I'm asking you this as a personal favor: unless you have urgent business, please avoid frequenting her office too much.
请问您今天有什么事吗？不妨先和我谈谈，如果我能解决，也就不必打扰真珠女士了。
Is there something I can help you with today? Why don't you talk to me first? If I can handle it, there's no need to bother Madam Pearl.
有什么需要我帮助的吗？不妨先和我谈谈，如果我能解决，也就不必打扰真珠女士了。
Is there something I can help you with? Why don't you talk to me first? If I can handle it, there's no need to bother Madam Pearl.
I'd like to ask you something.
秘书的日常工作有哪些？
What are the daily tasks of a secretary?
全银河的秘书应该都做着差不多的工作，无非是为领导协调行程、传达信息、处理各种琐事。
Secretaries from all over the cosmos should all do the same thing. They coordinate the schedules for their leaders, convey information, and deal with trivial matters.
这工作说起来不难，但关键在于「善于观察」。
The job itself isn't hard, but the key is having a sharp eye for detail.
比如从一位客人进门开始，我就是从他的言谈举止中分析这个人的性格涵养，再根据他的约见理由判断事情的轻重缓急。
For instance, the moment a guest walks through the door, I read their character in their manner and speech, then gauge their request to give it its proper place in the priorities.
必要的时候，用体面的说辞拒绝掉一些「可能带来麻烦」的客人。
When necessary, I'll need to offer a graceful exit to guests likely to "cause complications."
总之，秘书的工作价值，就是帮首席执行官把精力放在更重要的事情上。
In short, the whole point of being a secretary is to help the CEO focus on what really matters.
当首席执行官的秘书压力大么？
Is it stressful being the CEO's secretary?
我做了十几年秘书，之前也服务过其他一些大人物，相比而言，在首席执行官手下工作反而是最轻松的。
With over a decade of secretarial work under my belt, and having served my fair share of VIPs, I can say this: working for the CEO has been the smoothest ride of all.
职场常言「领导的心思你别猜」，可作为秘书，又必须要揣摩出领导的「弦外之音」，别提有多累人了。
"Don't try to guess your boss's mind," so goes the workplace wisdom. Yet my entire job as a secretary is to second-guess, to read between the lines. Draining, frankly.
但首席执行官对待下属，怎么说呢…用二相乐园话来说是一个很「直球」的人。
But how the CEO handles her subordinates... well, to put it in Planarcadia terms, she's what you'd call very "straight-shooting."
她说想换掉办公室的盆栽，那就真的只是想换掉盆栽，而不是暗示你「她不喜欢看到你穿绿色的衬衫来上班」。
If she says to replace the office plants, she wants the plants replaced, not a hint that "don't you dare show up to work in a green shirt again."
首席执行官是个什么样的人？
What kind of person is the CEO?
咳咳，「在背后议论领导」可是职场大忌。
Ahem, "talking about your boss behind their back" is a huge workplace no-no.
不过列车组现在和真珠财团是合作关系，为了让合作更顺畅，我可以分享一些个人看法，以便让您更了解她。
That said, given the Express Crew and the Pearluxe Corp are in a partnership now, I can offer some personal context to facilitate a smoother collaboration and a clearer understanding of her approach.
首席执行官的工作能力毋庸置疑，大到星际商业谈判，小到日常公文审批，她永远处理得游刃有余。
There is no doubt about the CEO's executive capacity. From interstellar business deals down to routine document flows, she manages everything with effortless precision.
但她又不是那种没有生活情趣的工作狂，可能你也注意到桌上的绘笔和颜料了。没错，那些都是她的。
But don't mistake her for a joyless work machine. You probably have noticed the brushes and paints on the desk, right? Yep, those are all hers.
一旦有片刻闲暇，首席执行官就会挥笔作画。在我看来，她的绘画水平丝毫不亚于顶尖绘师。
Whenever a break can be afforded, the CEO reaches for her brush. Her work, to my eye, rivals that of any top-tier artist out there.
唉，我时常感叹，首席执行官真是个横跨「政、商、艺」三界的奇才啊。
Time and again, I'm in awe: The CEO is that rare prodigy who commands the mind of a politician, the eye of a merchant, and the hand of an artist.
I'll leave you to your work.
Not at all, happy to be of service.
I'll leave you to your work.
Not at all, happy to be of service.
贵宾您好，欢迎参观珠星本部，需要我为您提供讲解服务么？
Welcome to Pearluxe Corp HQ, esteemed guest. May I offer my services as your docent?
I'd to look around on my own.
没问题，您是贵宾，可以自由参观任何公共区域。
No problem, all public areas are fully accessible to you as our esteemed guest.
当然，您是贵宾，所有参观费用均由珠星本部承担。
Please be assured, as our esteemed guest, all arrangements for your visit will be covered by Pearluxe Corp HQ.
作为珠星本部的资深介绍员，我还是非常推荐您体验一次讲解服务。
Speaking as Pearluxe Corp HQ's longtime docent, I highly recommend you give our guided tour a try.
珠星本部的景点众多，我可以根据您的需求制定十几种不同的游览路线，保证您获得最佳的游览体验。
With the array of attractions at Pearluxe Corp HQ, I can tailor dozens of distinct tour routes to your interests, ensuring your visit is nothing short of exceptional.
不愧是无名客，连游览方式都与常人不同，但「开拓」之道未必在珠星本部适用。
True to the Nameless, even your way of sightseeing is unique. Yet the ways of the Trailblaze don't always apply here at Pearluxe Corp HQ.
给我一条「快速开宝箱」路线。
Give me a quick route to hit all the treasure chests.
实在抱歉…这超出了我的能力范围，我会将你的诉求反馈给客服部。
My sincere apologies... this falls outside my purview. I'll make sure to forward your request to our customer service promptly.
还有一点望贵宾理解，虽然珠星本部的大部分区域都对外开放，但这里毕竟是机铠的研发场所，一些涉及研发机密的「敏感区域」还请止步。

One more thing, esteemed guests, while most of our HQ is open to the public, this is still a mechatron R&D facility. We ask that you kindly refrain from entering any "restricted domains" that involve proprietary research.
最后祝您在珠星本部玩得愉快，有任何需要随时找我。
Finally, enjoy your time at Pearluxe Corp HQ, and please don't hesitate to let me know if you require anything.
贵宾您好，是遇到什么问题了么？
Good day, honored guest. Is there something I can help you with?
There are a few things I'd like to ask you about.
It would be my pleasure to assist you.
为什么用机铠当介绍员？
Why did they put a mechatron on docent duty?
哈哈，许多游客都会问我这个问题。
Haha, I get that question from tourists all the time.
按常理说，介绍员这个职业需要给游客亲近感，机铠冷冰冰的形象确实有些违和。
Common sense would tell you that docents need to come across as warm and approachable, so a cold, rigid mechatron doesn't seem very fitting.
但仔细一想就不难理解，到珠星本部参观的游客，谁不是冲着「机铠诞生地」的名头来的？
But when you think about it, it makes perfect sense. Why else would anyone tour Pearluxe Corp HQ, if not for the whole "birthplace of mechatrons" fame?
既然如此，就应该在每个环节都最大程度地满足游客的期待，换句话说，机铠介绍员本身也是一处景点。
Then it only follows that we should deliver on that promise at every turn. In other words, the mechatron docents themselves are part of the attraction.
介绍员的日常工作有哪些？
What does a docent's daily work involve?
其实介绍员的工作说简单也简单，无非是向游客介绍机铠的发展历史、产品特点、生产流程。
Actually, when you get down to it, being a docent here boils down to three things: walking visitors through the history, key features, and manufacturing process of the mechatrons.
由于我本人就是机铠，而且已经当了十几年介绍员，这方面的工作早已驾轻就熟。
Being a mechatron myself, with over a decade of experience, I know this job like the back of my hand.
但是公司最近提升了服务标准，要求介绍员为游客量身定制游览方案。
But the corp recently upped its service standards, requiring docents to tailor custom itineraries for each visitor.
比如有的游客对愿力着色剂过敏，就要避开「喷涂改造区」；有的游客主要目的是购物，就要多花时间在「商品展览区」。

For example, tourists with Wishpower coloring paste allergies require itineraries that avoid the "Spray Coating Zone," while those focused on shopping should prioritize time in the "Merchandise Exhibition Area."
游客们的需求五花八门，这份工作也没曾经那样好做了。
With tourists wanting all sorts of things these days, the once-easy job scope is long gone.
这你算是问对机铠了，我是这里资历最老的介绍员，每个景点玩什么，怎么玩一清二楚。
Well, you asked the right mechatron! As the most seasoned docent here, I know every attraction inside and out, from the most fun parts to the best routes.
首先必打卡的景点是大厅的「巨型机铠」，它是全乐园最大的机铠，拍照的时候一定记得仰拍，这样才能凸显它的压迫感。

First stop on the must-see list is the "Giant Mechatron" in the main hall, which is the largest mechatron in the entire arcadia! When you take a picture, remember to shoot from a low angle to really bring out that imposing vibe.
如果您动手能力比较强，那我推荐您在「机铠制造区」亲手打造一台属于自己的机铠，我们有绘师提供现场教学。
For those with more of a hands-on streak, a unique highlight is the "Mechatron Assembling Zone," where you can assemble your own mechatron with guidance from our in-house artists.
如果您喜欢机铠对战，可以在「机铠竞技场」尽情展示操作，若有幸胜出，还能获得限定款的机铠模型。
If you're into mechatron duels, the "Mechatron Arena" is your ultimate test. Those who prove themselves in victory will be awarded limited-edition mechatron models.
不过若是您时间充裕，我还是强烈推荐您把所有景点全部体验一遍，绝对不虚此行。
But if you've got the time, I'd totally recommend hitting up every single attraction. You won't regret it, guaranteed!
That's all the questions I have.
那祝您在珠星本部玩得愉快，有任何需要随时找我。
Well then, enjoy your time at Pearluxe Corp HQ, and please don't hesitate to let me know if you require anything.
No worries, you do your thing.
那祝您在珠星本部玩得愉快，有任何需要随时找我。
Well then, enjoy your time at Pearluxe Corp HQ, and please don't hesitate to let me know if you require anything.
咦，这位{F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}，我之前好像没见过你，是新来的吗？
Oh? Hey there, I don't think I've seen you around before. Are you new here?
不错嘛，看你年纪轻轻的，竟然已经能到珠星财团实习了，将来想必也是前途无量。
Impressive. To have landed an internship at Pearluxe Corp at this young age, you're clearly destined for great things.
但容我好心提醒你一句：即便再怎么优秀的年轻人，在初入社会时，也都需要经验丰富的前辈加以指导。
But let me give you a friendly heads-up: Even the brightest young talent could use guidance from a seasoned veteran as they start out in the real world.
不过别担心，今天恰好是你的幸运日——现在站在你眼前的，正是「战略投资部」职级P<unbreak>19</unbreak>的职员——怎么样，要不要交换一下联系方式？
But don't worry. Lucky for you, you're looking at a P<unbreak>19</unbreak> corporate rank employee of the Strategic Investment Department. So, what do you say? Care to connect?
Let me get this straight. Guide who...?
哈哈，不需要我的指导吗？好啊，那让我来考考你：你知道职场生存的七大原则吗？你知道如何轻松背诵每一位领导的生日吗？你知道如何暗算同事吗？

Haha, think you don't need my guidance? Alright then, let's put you to the test. Do you know the Seven Principles of office politics? Do you know how to commit every executive's birthday to memory? Or how to sabotage a coworker without leaving a trace?
怎么样，被前辈问住了吧？没关系，只要你好好跟我学，这些知识早晚也会融会贯通的。
See? Got you stumped, didn't I? No worries. Just stick with me, and this stuff will all click into place before you know it.
嗨呀，当然啦，我知道像你这样的「青年才俊」，不是带点身份、就是有些背景。
Oh, I get it. A "hotshot" like you didn't get here on brains alone. You've got some serious advantages or backing, am I right?
但这珠星财团啊，可不比外面那些小企业，职场的水深着呢…除非你背景硬得像星穹列车那帮无名客，否则要是不懂些人情世故，以后想要往上爬，可就辛苦喽。

But let me tell you, Pearluxe Corp is another world, nothing like those small-time companies out there... Unless you've got backing as solid as those Nameless folks from the Astral Express, you either know how to play the social game, or climbing that ladder's gonna be one heck of a struggle.
哦！原来如此，是我失敬了…哈哈，得了吧，你要是无名客，那我还是「石心十人」呢。
Oh! Gotcha, sorry about that... Haha, that's a good one. If you're a Nameless, I'm one of the Ten Stonehearts.
You don't know who I am?
哦？难道你很出名吗…没关系，现在我认识你了。
Oh? Are you famous or something...? Well, doesn't matter. I know you now.
无意自夸，但前辈我啊，可是曾经全凭自己的本事，成功通过二十轮面试，从几千个竞争者中博得头筹呢……
Not to toot my own horn, but yours truly here managed to ace twenty rounds of interviews and beat out thousands of competitors... all on my own merit, mind you.
更何况我已经在这里工作了五年，经验不可谓不丰富，甚至还曾经有幸在砂金总监手下做过事。
Not to mention, I've been here for five years, which means my experience is nothing to scoff at. I've even had the honor of working under Director Aventurine himself.
先说好啊，我只是看你合眼缘，起了爱才之心。要是换了别人，主动来找我帮忙，我都要考虑一下呢。
Just so we're clear, I'm only offering because I like the cut of your jib and can see real talent in you. If it were anyone else coming to me for help, I'd think twice about it, believe me.
怎么样，{F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}，现在想要我的联系方式了吗？
Well now, have I convinced you? Ready to get my info?
哦，特意来找我聊天，是有什么想要向前辈请教的吗？
Oh, you came all the way to chat with me? Looking to pick my brain about something?
Actually, it was just a coincidence...
哦，「恰好经过」是吧，我懂我懂~说吧，有什么需要我教教你的？
Oh, "coincidence," huh? Sure, I get it~ So, what do you need me to teach you?
Do you hit on people often?
哎哎哎，怎么说话呢你…那哪儿能叫搭讪？我这是在「扩列」，扩充好友列表，懂吗？
Hey, hey, hey, watch your words there... Calling it "hitting on people" is way off-base. This is "friendly networking," building connections, you know?
我这种行为，旨在拓展交际圈，拉进同事间距离，好营造一种和谐友爱、共同进步的工作氛围！
What I'm doing here is expanding my social circle, bringing coworkers closer together, and fostering a harmonious, supportive workplace where everyone thrives together!
所以，那什么…你可千万别和上面打小报告，说我工作时间不饱和什么的啊，知道吗？
So, um... don't go running to the higher-ups tattling about how I'm not working enough hours or whatever, okay?
当然！让前辈来好好教教你，自信是一种成功人士必备的优良的品质……
Absolutely! Allow me to enlighten you: Confidence is the cornerstone of a winning mindset...
You've been here five years but is still a P<unbreak>19</unbreak>...
嘿！你个人，真是白长了张好看的脸，情商怎么这么低呢？！像我这种全凭实力打拼的，能和那种关系户比吗？
Hey! You've got such looks, yet such lack of insight! Are you seriously putting someone who survives on pure merit in the same category as those nepotism hires?
咳…我这叫稳扎稳打！而且能成为珠星财团的员工，我们本来就已经是精英中的精英了，所以最好收起你那不端正的态度！
Ahem... it's called being strategic! Besides, just making it into Pearluxe Corp already puts us in the top tier. So I suggest you fix that attitude, pronto!
你啊…没事少听八卦，先保证自己实习期过了再操心别的，知道了吗？
Listen... forget the office gossip. Your only job right now is to survive the internship. Clear?
Do you... not have any friends?
啧，有一位我很尊敬的前辈——愿琥珀王怜悯他的灵魂——曾经说过一句话：职场生存的最高原则，就是「没有朋友、没有敌人、只有猎物！」
A senior whose memory I hold dear — may the Amber Lord have mercy on his soul — once said, "The ultimate rule of the corporate jungle is this: no friends, no enemies, only prey!"
I think I know who you're talking about...
难道你也认识那位前辈？那你怎么还会问「有没有朋友」这么幼稚的问题？前辈说的话你是一点都不放在心上啊。
You know him too? Then why are you asking if I have friends? It's like you didn't listen to a single thing I said.
实话告诉你，那位前辈在公司有着非常独特的生态位，他走以后，留下了一小块生态位的真空。
To be honest, he had a very specific niche at the IPC. Now that he's gone, there's a bit of a vacancy in that ecosystem.
我认为缅怀他的最佳方式，就是想方设法吃下他的鲸落，替代他曾经的生态位。如果他泉下有知，应该也会欣慰的吧！
I think the best way to honor him is to feast on his "whale fall" and take over the ecological niche he once filled. I'm sure he'd be happy to see someone fill his shoes!
如果你能想通他「猎物论」中的深刻道理，就来跟着我混吧。咱俩好好配合，一起占据他的生态位。在事成之前，我保证不会背叛你。
If you can wrap your head around his "Prey Theory," come work with me. We'll make a great team and claim his niche for ourselves. I promise I won't betray you... until the job is done, at least.
行吧，有什么想要请教的，可以随时来找我。
Fair enough. If you ever need some pointers, feel free to drop by.
Nothing much, just dropping by to say hi.
诶呀，别害羞嘛~仰慕我这种可靠的前辈很正常，不用觉得丢脸~
Oh, don't be shy! It's only natural to look up to a reliable mentor like me. There's no need to feel embarrassed about it~
欸，又见面了！姬子有没有跟你一起过——看来是没有。
Hey, we meet again! Did Himeko come along with... Ah, I guess not.
她有没有让你带什么话给我——看来是也没有。
Did she ask you to give me a message? No? I figured as much.
哎，领航员是这样的，前脚刚和公司的高管聊定合作事宜，后脚还得在列车停靠期间从引擎到散热片全检查一遍。
Yep, that's how navigators are. One minute she's finalizing deals with IPC executives, and the next she's checking every engine part and heat sink while the Express is docked.
能力越大，责任越大嘛。年轻人，忙点也正常，哎，忙点好，忙点好啊。
With great power comes great responsibility. It's only natural for young people to be busy. Honestly, it's better that way.
谁让我们家姬子从小就天资聪慧、才华横溢、乐于助人、正气凛然、诚实礼貌、处变不惊、人美心善……
Our Himeko has always been gifted. Smart, talented, helpful, righteous, honest, polite, and kind-hearted, ever since she was a little girl...
这些话你当面对姬子说过吗？
Have you ever actually said all that to Himeko?
当然！那可是我的宝贝女儿，就是不知道为什么，每次她都会用相当鄙夷的眼神看着我。
Of course! She's my precious daughter. I just don't know why she always gives me this look of disgust whenever I say it.
哎，孩子从小就这一个缺点，不经夸。
Poor girl... she just can't take a compliment.
叔叔你是不是太女儿控了？
Aren't you a bit of a doting father, sir?
怎么会？我们家很严格的。冰淇淋一次不能吃超过五个，漫画书要看完了才能买新的，可以揍鸽川区的混混，但不能骂老师像「陀螺」，至少不该是「旋风陀螺」。

No way! I was very strict with her. No more than five ice creams at a time, and no new comics until she finished the old ones. She could beat up thugs in the Dovebrook District, but calling her teacher a "spinning top," or a "cyclone spinner," was where I drew the line.
不过姬子一直都挺乖的，除了高中的时候在家里组装火箭引擎，差点把宅子炸上天以外，基本没做过什么出格的事情。
But Himeko was always such a good girl. Aside from that one time in high school when she built a rocket engine and nearly blew up the house, she never really did anything out of line.
这么想她，去见本人不好吗？
If you miss her that much, why don't you just go visit her?
幻月游戏开幕、二相乐园变相横生，她有她的责任在身，我不能在这种时候打扰她。
Between the Phantasmoon Games and all the chaos in Planarcadia, she's got a lot on her plate. I can't go bothering her at a time like this.
我历来是个长期主义者，只要我一直在这里，等到她愿意来见我的那天就好…我很有耐心的。
I've always played the long game. As long as I'm here, I can wait for the day she's ready to see me... I have all the patience in the world.
年纪轻轻就跟着星穹列车四处旅行，这一路上，一定吃了不少苦头吧……
Traveling the stars with the Astral Express at such a tender age, you must have endured so much hardship along the way...
来，这是叔叔的一点心意，就当是零花钱了——千万别告诉姬子是我给的。有空了，也给她买点礼物，她会很高兴的。
Here, take this as a little "allowance" from me — just don't tell Himeko it came from me. Buy her a little gift when you can. It would mean a lot to her.
谢谢你们，一直以来陪在那孩子身边。
Thank you for staying by her side all this time.
在找什么吗？校长办公室可不是个「开拓」的好地方。等一切尘埃落定了，给你推荐些更有趣的星球。
Are you looking for something? The dean's office isn't exactly the best spot for "Trailblazing." I'll suggest some much more exciting planets once the dust settles.
如果想找我聊聊，我倒刚好有些时间。
I have some time to talk if you're interested.
我确实有不少好奇的事。
There are quite a few things I'm curious about.
以前的姬子是什么样的？
So, what was Himeko like as a kid?
姬子啊，从小就比别家的孩子懂事、聪明、好学那么一点点。但因为各种缘故吧，姬子和我的关系，一直都有些疏远。
Well, Himeko was always a bit more sensible and studious than most children. But for one reason or another, she and I have never been very close.
也是，突然出现在你的人生中、却又时常消失无踪的血亲，和陌生人又有什么区别呢？
It makes sense, I guess. With a blood relative who flits in and out of your life, what's the difference between that and a stranger?
我所能做的，也只有在寥寥无几的、与她相处的时间里，尽可能地给予我所能给她的一切。
The best I could do was give her everything I had in those rare moments when we were actually together.
但是嘛，也总有例外的时候，只要我讲起宇宙里的故事，姬子就一定会一声不吭地坐到我的跟前，时不时发出咯咯的笑声。
But there were always exceptions. Whenever I started telling stories about the universe, Himeko would sit right at my feet, quiet as a mouse, letting out a little giggle every so often.
我低下头，看向她的眼睛，那里的光比任何一颗星星都要漂亮。
When I looked into her eyes, I saw a light more brilliant than any star in the sky.
你平时的工作是怎样的？
实不相瞒，虽然名义上是校长，但这位置也就是个甩手掌柜的虚职，正事儿都是校董事会在做。
Honestly, I'm the dean in name only, really. The Board of Directors handles all the actual work.
大多数时候，我都在寰宇间奔走，接受不同雇主委托的绘画工作。
Most of the time, I'm wandering the cosmos, taking on painting commissions for whoever wants to hire me.
文明或许会消亡，但智慧生命在这一过程中展露的勇气、荣耀与抗争精神，却值得被时间铭记。
Civilizations might die out, but the courage, glory, and defiance that intelligent life shows before its final moments... those are things time should never forget.
所以，我总会不自觉地期待，接下来会见到怎样的风景。
That's why I can't help but look forward to the next horizon, wondering what I'll see.
那些光怪陆离的世界，与人们的音容笑貌，在将它们最璀璨、美好的片刻描摹下来的瞬间，就连最聒噪的灵魂也能得到片刻安宁。
Those fantastical worlds, those smiling faces... the moment I capture their most brilliant, beautiful instances on canvas, even the most turbulent soul finds a moment of peace.
What have you been up to lately?
隆介突然一改常态，严肃地打量起你，仿佛在考察你是否值得信任。
Ryusuke suddenly turns serious. He studies you with a serious gaze, as if weighing whether you're trustworthy enough for a secret.
其实，我在偷偷画《苍天航路绒绒号》的同人漫画，再过几天就能完工了。
Between you and me, I'm actually working on a fan comic for Fluffy Across the Blue. It'll be finished in just a couple of days.
我不能容忍，有人在姬子的创作上胜我一筹，我才是姬子的头号粉丝！那位马老师根本没有掌握到姬奇猫的萌点！
I simply won't stand for anyone having a better creation of Himeko than me! I'm her number one fan! That Blurry_QR_Colt fellow doesn't even understand what makes Himekat cute!
论及对姬子和星穹列车的了解，我要比他懂上一百倍！
I know a hundred times more about Himeko and the Astral Express than they ever will!
就像著名的领航员，法尔肯•阿蒙森那样，绒绒号的小动物们不断遭遇种种挫折、不幸，在灰暗的宇宙间航行。
Much like the great Navigator Falcon Amundsen, the little animals on The Fluffy face all sorts of hardships and tragedies as they sail through the dark reaches of the universe.
绒绒号如流星般划过夜空，却又永远焕发着光与热，一次次将绝望的世界照亮——绝对会大卖的。
The Fluffy streaks through the night like a comet, radiating warmth and light to brighten one desperate world after another... It's going to be a massive hit!
Have you picked out a pen name yet?
你倒是提醒我了，用真名肯定会被姬子发现，既然原作者叫「模糊二维马」……
You've got a point. If I use my real name, Himeko will absolutely find out. Since the original author is "Blurry_QR_Colt"...
等完本了，请务必做我的第一个读者。
You have to be my very first reader once it's complete.
What do you think of Phantasmoon Games?
即使是阿哈这样不可捉摸的神，悬置如此多的神力以置办一场游戏，注定有其理由。
Even for an unpredictable Aeon like Aha, there must be a reason for committing so much power to organize a game like this.
但祂的真实目的，就不是我们可以捉摸的了。
But THEIR true motives... those aren't for us to ruminate on.
比起给观众逗乐子这样的表象，身为艺术家，我更好奇，最初的幻月，究竟是为何而升起的。
Forget the spectacle of entertaining the audience. As an artist, I'm far more curious about why the first Phantasmoon was created in the first place.
无论如何，两千年前的幻月所照映的人们，也不会像今天的二相乐园这样，充斥着疯狂和讥嘲吧。
No matter what, the people living under the Phantasmoon two thousand years ago couldn't have been as consumed by madness and cynicism as the people of Planarcadia are today.
好啊，往后有什么需要的，都可以来找我。
Sure thing. Feel free to stop by if you ever need anything.
祝你在幻月游戏中拔得头筹。
Hope you come out on top in the Phantasmoon Games.
您好！我猜…您是来重新体验机铠战斗的？
Hi there! Let me guess... back for more mechatron combat?
明白了，我们这就将战斗测试沙盒场地清理出来，您可以再次进行体验。
Got it. We'll clear out the combat test sandpit right away so you can jump back in.
要是能开出去打就好了。
If only I could take this out for a real spin.
这…还请您体谅下，即使是在幻造遍地跑的二相乐园，把一个能自由活动的巨型机铠带到大街上去，仍然还是有一定风险的。
Well... please understand that even in Planarcadia, where imagenae roam free, taking a giant, mobile mechatron out into the public is still a bit risky.
不过，我们还在尽可能优化这个沙盒场地的表现，不管是从匹诺康尼请来知名的怪兽替身演员，还是将大楼被破坏时的碎片做得更碎一些…
That said, we're doing our best to polish the sandpit experience. We've even hired famous monster stunt actors from Penacony and made the building debris more "shattery" for realism!
毕竟，许多孩子们和成…年纪稍大一点的孩子们，为了体验机铠战斗，会特意办理珠星总部的参观年卡，这对我们来说可是一笔不小的收入。
After all, plenty of kids and "older" kids buy annual passes to Pearluxe Tower just for the mechatron combat. It's a huge part of our revenue!
当然，您不需要考虑费用问题，根据真珠女士的指示，您可以随时借用模拟场地。祝您体验愉快！
Also, you don't have to worry about the bill. Per Madam Pearl's orders, the simulation area is yours to use whenever you like. Enjoy!
Don't mind me. I'm just passing by.
Okay then. We look forward to your next visit.
是您啊，想再来体验一次拼装机铠的流程吗？
Hey there! Back for another round of mechatron assembly?
I want to build another one.
了解，我们准备了新的体验用板件，这边请！
You got it. We've got a fresh set of parts ready for you. Right this way!
拼装过程有实际意义吗？
Is there actually a point to the assembly process?
当然，即使相同型号的机铠，基于拼装流程，也会出现性能差异。
Definitely. Even with the same mechatron model, the final performance can vary depending on how well it was put together.
这些差异主要体现在「各组件交界区的牢固程度」上——简单来说，要看「交牢」的水平。
The main difference lies in the "sturdiness of the joints." Basically, it all comes down to your "fitting" skills.
虽说近年来拼装被简化为自动化流程，但诸如装卸时机等差异性仍然存在。只要拼装者坚持不懈地进行体验，交牢水平仍会得以提升。
Assembly might be mostly automated these days, but things like installation timing still matter. If you keep at it, your "fitting" skills will keep getting better.
所以在机铠对战圈子里，流传着一个简单的道理——「爱拼才会赢」。祝您体验愉快。
That's why mechatron pilots always say: "Success comes to those who piece things together!" Have a great time!
Don't mind me. I'm just passing by.
Sure thing. Just let me know if you need anything else.
您好，您是{NICKNAME}大人吧，我是负责这片幽囚狱的司狱赤衣。判官雪衣大人已经向我打过招呼了——她说为了查案需要，您可以自由出入幽囚狱的大部分区域。

Greetings, you must be {NICKNAME}. I am Chiyi, the Jailer overseeing this unit of the Shackling Prison. Madam Xueyi has informed me that you're here to investigate a case. You are free to enter most areas of the Shackling Prison.
不过，我仍然需要提醒您，幽囚狱是罗浮仙舟囚禁重案犯人的所在地，{NICKNAME}大人需要对幽囚狱内所见所闻之事按照保密章程进行守密，请您务必遵守。

However, I am dutifully obliged to remind you that the Shackling Prison is where the Xianzhou Luofu imprisons our most dangerous felons. {NICKNAME}, {M#sir}{F#madam}, we seek your cooperation to keep everything you see and hear in the Shackling Prison to yourself, as laid out in our confidentiality regulations.
按道理来说我不应该进来？
So I'm not supposed to be allowed in here then?
按照十王司规定，想要进入幽囚狱的人员都必须经过严格审查，这也是为了保证幽囚狱正常收押工作。大人既然是为查案而来，必然是得到了许可。

The Ten-Lords Commission imposes a mandatory and stringent assessment on those who wish to enter the Shackling Prison, so that all remand and detention orders within the facility can be performed without disruptions. Since you're here for an investigation, you're naturally granted the relevant permissions.
我听雪衣大人说您是值得信任的仙舟盟友，很少听到那位大人的如此评价，我愿意相信您会将幽囚狱的秘密藏在心中。

Madam Xueyi has mentioned that you are a trusted ally of the Xianzhou. It is rare to hear her offering such a high remark about anyone, so I am happy to trust that you'll keep mum about the secrets of the Shackling Prison.
要是我不小心说出去的话…？
And if I unintentionally tell them to someone...?
幽囚狱正常运行上百年，却遭贼人攻破，其中必然是有人泄露幽囚狱相关结构与路线，导致了大量冥差因公殉职，大人应该知道泄密的严重性。

The Shackling Prison has been operating securely for centuries. If intruders were to infiltrate out of nowhere, it would mean that someone has divulged details of the structural floor plan and routes of the Shackling Prison. Many spiritfarers will end up losing their lives during such an infiltration. I trust you are aware of the grave consequences that come with leaking secrets.
我听雪衣大人说您是值得信任的仙舟盟友，很少听到那位大人的如此评价，我愿意相信您会将幽囚狱的秘密藏在心中。

Madam Xueyi has mentioned that you are a trusted ally of the Xianzhou. It is rare to hear her offering such a high remark about anyone, so I am happy to trust that you'll keep mum about the secrets of the Shackling Prison.
我自然是相信{NICKNAME}大人的，不过我的工作习惯促使我要再次提醒您「幽囚狱并非是一个来去自由的场所」，大人切要小心行事。

I am more than happy to put my trust in you, {NICKNAME}. But it is my professional obligation to remind you, once again, that the Shackling Prison is not a place where people walk about freely. Please be cautious in your investigation here.
幽囚狱环境错综复杂，所收押犯人也是三教九流，若{NICKNAME}大人在这里遇到任何问题，都可以随时找我。{NICKNAME}大人如果没有别的问题，现在我就接着忙去了。

The Shackling Prison has a convoluted layout, and we detain prisoners of various factions here. Feel free to come to me anytime if you need help with something. If you have no other questions, I'll leave you to it, {NICKNAME}.
I have some questions for you...
Please go ahead and ask your question.
我想了解幽囚狱的历史。
I want to learn about the Shackling Prison's history.
我并非是研究历史学者，所以我对幽囚狱的历史并非全然熟悉。这里是罗浮内幽囚狱系统中其中一处，历史悠久，建立的具体年份已不可查。

I am no research historian, so I may not be familiar with the complete history of the Shackling Prison. It has been established eons ago that the exact date of its construction is long-lost to time. The facility we are at is just one unit of the Shackling Prison system on the Luofu.
根据前任司狱大人所说，此处的幽囚狱是由仙舟人和持明族人合作修建的。想来也合理，若不是持明云吟法术，也不可能在海底建造这么庞大的建筑。

According to the previous Jailer, this unit of the Shackling Prison was jointly built by Xianzhou natives and the Vidyadhara. And it checks out because if not for the Vidyadhara's cloudhymn magic, it wouldn't be possible to build this colossal structure underwater.
现如今，持明龙师也会派遣持明族中擅长云吟法术的青年参与冥差工作，协助维持幽囚狱的水障结构…十王司幽囚狱会永远感谢持明族的付出。

Even today, the Vidyadhara Preceptors would send Vidyadhara youths skilled in cloudhymn magic to join the spiritfarers in maintaining the prison's flood barriers... The Ten-Lords Commission and The Shackling Prison are eternally grateful for the Vidyadhara's contribution.
I want to know more about what you do.
简而言之，就是确保幽囚狱内的犯人待在监禁区域。一旦有犯人敢越雷池半步，我会动用一切手段让他回去。

To put things simply, my duty is to ensure all prisoners in The Shackling Prison remain within the prison area. If any one of them were to take even half a step beyond the boundaries of the prison, I am expected to employ any possible measure to force them right back.
狱卒们时时刻刻都在提防着这帮重案要犯，越是与他们打交道，我越是感觉到心力交瘁——他们想要离开这里的欲念就像烙铁一般灼热。

The prison guards have to perpetually keep their guards up around these serious felons. The more I interact with them, the more it grinds down on my mentality — Their desire to leave this facility burns as blazing hot as fiery brands.
司狱大人可以不理会他们？
But you're the Jailer. Can't you ignore them?
曾经的我也天真过，以为自己可以完全不理会他们就把工作进行下去。
I used to harbor that naive thought too, believing that I could just block them out and go about my duties.
我必须要从他们试图掩盖的一切的话语和行为中觉察到他们的意图，与此同时，有一些智商极高思维敏捷的犯人也会利用这点来审视我。

But I need to be able to pick up on their intentions through their words and behavior, which they employ to shield their true thoughts. And while I'm doing that, quick-witted and intelligent prisoners would also use that fact to study me.
我并不擅长与人在智慧上交锋，那种感觉就像是躺在案板上任由持着砍刀的屠夫随意宰割…相信我，你不会喜欢那种感觉的。
I'm not good at battles of wits. Those make me feel like I'm on a chopping board waiting to be butchered by whoever has the knife... Trust me, it's not a nice feeling to have.
幽囚狱中关了太多犯人，不论道德水准，他们的才华和能力都是顶尖的——这也是他们只能被关在幽囚狱的原因。

There are too many prisoners locked away in The Shackling Prison. Morality aside, these people are the cream of the crop in terms of talent and capacities — This is precisely why they have to be locked away in The Shackling Prison.
有没有什么奇葩的犯人？
Are there any particularly strange prisoners?
曾有个身犯多起谋杀案的化外民被押送了进来，根据档案记录，他被称为「勺子」，曾用一柄铁勺子持之以恒地对受害人施害。

There was an outworlder who got sent in for committing multiple murders. According to the records, he was known as "The Spoon" because he once used an iron spoon to persistently cause harm to the victim.
我原本设想这样的囚犯在单独的囚室之中应该不会有事，后来不知道他从哪里弄了一柄铁勺，持续不断敲击着囚室墙壁，最终让隔壁囚室囚犯精神崩溃了。

I had assumed he wouldn't cause any trouble if he was locked away in a solitary cell. Yet he somehow managed to get his hands on an iron spoon that he endlessly tapped the wall of his cell with, eventually driving the prisoner in his neighboring cell into a mental breakdown.
这个过程持续了数十年，我低估了这样若有若无的声音对一个人的影响。从此以后，我也算是积累了一些经验……

The tapping lasted for decades. I shouldn't have underestimated the damage such faintly perceptible noises could do to a person's psyche. I suppose you can say that I gained some experience after that...
That's all I wanted to ask.
好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.
I'll leave you to work then.
好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.
有些鸟儿终究是关不住的，它们生来自由…不过，关不住的鸟，就只好用弓箭对付了。
Some birds are never meant to be locked up in cages. They were born to be free... But those that cannot be locked up will have to be shot down with a bow and arrow.
幽囚狱环境错综复杂，所收押犯人也是三教九流，若{NICKNAME}大人在这里遇到任何问题，都可以随时找我。
The Shackling Prison is a complicated area, and we detain prisoners of all sorts here. Feel free to come to me anytime if you need help with something, {NICKNAME}.
I have some questions for you...
Please go ahead and ask your question.

I want to learn about the Shackling Prison's history.
我并非是研究历史学者，所以我对幽囚狱的历史并非全然熟悉。这里是罗浮上幽囚狱系统中其中一处，历史悠久，建立的具体年份已不可查。

简而言之，就是确保幽囚狱内的犯人待在监禁区域。一旦有犯人敢越雷池半步，我会动用一切手段让他回去。

To put things simply, my duty is to ensure all prisoners in The Shackling Prison remain within the prison area. If any one of them were to take even half a step beyond the boundaries of the prison, I am expected to employ any possible measure to force them right back.

司狱大人可以不理会他们？
But you're the Jailer. Can't you ignore them?
曾经的我也天真过，以为自己可以完全不理会他们就把工作进行下去。
I used to harbor that naive thought too, believing that I could just block them out and go about my duties.
我必须要从他们试图掩盖的一切的话语和行为中觉察到他们的意图，与此同时，有一些智商极高思维敏捷的犯人也会利用这点来审视我。

But I need to be able to pick up on their intentions through their words and behavior, which they employ to shield their true thoughts. And while I'm doing that, quick-witted and intelligent prisoners would also use that fact to study me.
我并不擅长与人在智慧上交锋，那种感觉就像是躺在案板上任由持着砍刀的屠夫随意宰割…相信我，你不会喜欢那种感觉的。
I'm not good at battles of wits. Those make me feel like I'm on a chopping board waiting to be butchered by whoever has the knife... Trust me, it's not a nice feeling to have.
幽囚狱中关了太多犯人，不论道德水准，他们的才华和能力都是顶尖的——这也是他们只能被关在幽囚狱的原因。

There are too many prisoners locked away in The Shackling Prison. Morality aside, these people are the cream of the crop in terms of talent and capacities — This is precisely why they have to be locked away in The Shackling Prison.
有没有什么奇葩的犯人？
Are there any particularly strange prisoners?
曾有个身犯多起谋杀案的化外民被押送了进来，根据档案记录，他被称为「勺子杀人狂」，曾用一柄铁勺子持之以恒地对受害人施害。

There was an outworlder who got sent in for committing multiple murders. According to the records, he was known as "The Spoon Murderer" because he once used an iron spoon to persistently cause harm to the victim.
我原本设想这样的囚犯在单独的囚室之中应该不会有事，后来不知道他从哪里弄了一柄铁勺，持续不断敲击着囚室墙壁，最终让隔壁囚室囚犯精神崩溃了。

I had assumed he wouldn't cause any trouble if he was locked away in a solitary cell. Yet he somehow managed to get his hands on an iron spoon that he endlessly tapped the wall of his cell with, eventually driving the prisoner in his neighboring cell into a mental breakdown.
这个过程持续了数十年，我低估了这样若有若无的声音对一个人的影响。从此以后，我也算是积累了一些经验……

The tapping lasted for decades. I shouldn't have underestimated the damage such faintly perceptible noises could do to a person's psyche. I suppose you can say that I gained some experience after that...
That's all I wanted to ask.
好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.
I'll leave you to work then.
好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.
原来是仙舟外远道而来的老板啊，今天是要来算一卦吗？
Ah, an esteemed customer visiting Xianzhou from afar. Are you here for a divination today?
我见老板您是第一次来，请允许我介绍一下自己——前太卜司天才卜者，现鉴爻轩小掌柜，若月是也。
Since it's your first time here, allow me to introduce myself. I am the genius diviner, formerly of the Divination Commission, now a humble shopkeeper of the Looking Bronze. My name is Ruoyue.
老板您无论是打算择吉避凶、还是想查个生辰八字、或者卜个姻缘、甚至只是求个名字，小店都将竭诚为您服务。
Whether you're seeking fortune or safety, or simply wish to check your horoscope, to find love, or even to request a name for a child, I am humbly at your service.
老板您是要给自己取名字吗？哎呀，这样的需求我还是见的比较少。
Oh, seeking a name for yourself? That is a rare request indeed.
看着客官的面相，我再掐指一算，心中已经有了一个好名字了。
Looking at you, and with a pinch of my fingers, and I've got the perfect name for you.
没毛病啊老板，您这名字已经取得足够好了，我看倒也不必更改。
That sounds just fine. Your name is fine as it is. I see no need to change it.
没想到您仪表堂堂，还有着如此震耳威名。
I wouldn't have known that one with such elegant flair as yours would have such a resounding name.
老板您有所不知，名字是最短的咒语，如果您遭遇危急关头，请大声叫出你的名字——二狗，定会对你有所帮助。
You may not be aware, but a name is the shortest form of a spell. If you're ever in peril, just yell out your name "Noob," and it will surely be useful to you.
您这取名是不是差点儿文化？
You don't think your naming lacks a little sophistication?
二狗二狗，吃喝不愁。二狗二狗，罗浮之友。
Noob Noob, never want for gulp or slurp. Noob Noob, Luofu's friend, always a perk.
老板要是不喜欢的话，还可以付费解锁「有文化的名字」、「非常文化的名字」…小店服务应有尽有。
If you don't like that, how about a fee to unlock "Sophisticated Names" and "Seriously Sophisticated Names"... I have services for all needs.
我想卜算一下凶吉祸福。
I wish to know my fortune.
老板您算是找对人了，这是我们店里的招牌服务「今日运势 」。第一次测试是免费的，我帮您看看……
You've come to the right person. This is our shop special, the "Fortune for Today." The first try's free. Let me see...
坏了，这是仙舟「苍城」覆灭之景，「抱薪救火大皆燃，烧遍三千亦复然」，老板您最近事不如愿，抱薪救火，不如不救啊。

Oh dear, this scene paints the destruction of the Xianzhou Cangcheng: "Fighting fire with woods will only fuel the flames." Your recent affairs haven't been going your way, so instead of remedying them, you should leave them be.
小店提供更改运势的服务，<unbreak>199</unbreak>套餐「避凶驱邪」，<unbreak>299</unbreak>套餐「逢凶化吉」，<unbreak>599</unbreak>套餐「以后都只有好事发生」，还挺划算的，老板觉得如何？

We provide fortune-changing services, like the "Evil Begone" bundle for <unbreak>199</unbreak>, "See No Evil" bundle for <unbreak>299</unbreak>, and the "Only Good Things From Here On Out" bundle for <unbreak>599</unbreak>. All great value! What do you think?
不同套餐的名字好像不太讲究。
It feels like you didn't really think those bundles' names through.
老板您不必计较这些粗浅的词句，看看价格就知道档位了。
Those names are of no importance. The prices speak for themselves!
名字嘛，就是包装而已，随便换，随便换。
Names are just superficial packaging. They can change anytime.
不会是故意帮我求了下下签吧？
Did you make me pick a dire fortune on purpose?
老板您可错怪我了呀，您若不信我，我们再抽一签。您看，还是一样——「如鸟飞投罗网里，相逢能有几多时」。
Oh, you hurt me with your words. If you don't believe me, let's try another one. Look, it's still the same: "Like birds into nets, when will reunion be, one frets".
这运势怎么说改就改呢？
I can change my luck just like that?
运势这种东西也没有那么死板，要是什么都能决定了，岂不是太不自由了吗？
Your luck isn't something set in stone. If everything was already pre-determined, where would one's freedom be?
今日开门迎客，您恰好是第<unbreak>100</unbreak>位，我送老板您一个「避凶驱邪」套餐，权当交朋友了，这是您今天的「转运饰品」，请拿好。
You are our lucky <unbreak>100</unbreak>th customer for the day, so I'll give you an "Evil Begone" bundle as a favor. This is your "lucky trinket" for today. Don't lose it now.
老板您还有什么需要帮助的吗？
Do you have anything else you need help with?
I'd like to ask you a few things...
好啊，老板您尽管问，只是要是问了运势，咱可得收费了呀。
Fire away. But I'll have to start charging if it's to do with your fortune.
你说自己以前是太卜司卜者？
You said you were once a Divination Commission diviner?
原来老板您是在怀疑我的业务水平啊，不用怀疑，我在太卜司里做了小两百年，被符玄太卜亲自赶出太卜司。
So, you have doubts about my professional proficiency. No fear, I worked there for almost two centuries, until I was personally ejected by Master Diviner Fu Xuan.
符玄太卜算到了她以后会把我赶出太卜司，于是就把我赶出太卜司了。
Master Diviner Fu Xuan foresaw that she would remove me from the Divination Commission, so she did.
哪有人会为了未发生之事有着如此笃定的决断呢？就结果而言，我确实离开了太卜司，不过这过程实在是可笑。
How could someone make a decision based off something that hadn't happened yet? Anyway, I did leave the Commission, but the entire situation was a farce.
太卜司不要我，我还可以在这里开家小小的卜算道具商店。化外民老爷们没法在太卜司里求得预言，大可以来到我这里求签算卦嘛。

Even if the Divination Commission didn't want me, I could still run my little old divination paraphernalia shop here. Outworlders who can't get their fortunes at the Commission could come to me instead.
我听人说你这里算得不准？
I've heard that your divinations aren't accurate?
准，非常准，谁说我不准你告诉我。
Of course they are accurate! Who told you that? Give me their name.
…不过嘛，那人也没全部说错，很多时候准和不准纯粹是一种…主观感受。
...Then again, they aren't totally wrong. Many times, the line between accuracy and inaccuracy is... subjective.
一般人嘛，想知道的无非就是自己的吉凶祸福，以求对未来有一种掌控感。确实，人身在命运的洪流里，会有个大致的方向。但吉凶之事……

Most people just want to know about their fortunes and have some sort of control over their future. In truth, everyone moves in a general direction in the great stream of destiny, but when it comes to actual good or ill luck...
那可是谁也无法捉摸的概率暗流。要捕捉如此细微之物，反倒要投入巨量的资源和靠着山一样占卜器械方能成事。
That's a hidden current of probability no one can ever fathom. To capture such an intricacy, you'd have to invest massive resources and rely on devices as huge as mountains to calculate that.
所以太卜司的规矩「三不卜」里其中一条就是「不卜人事」。这也不是有什么禁忌，实际上就是扰动太甚，得不偿失。

So, one of the rules in the Divination Commission's "Three Don'ts" is "Don't divine personal matters." It's not particularly taboo or anything — just that there are too many variables and does more harm than good.
不过我嘛，我有另外的法子。我会尽量用模糊的方式告诉客户占卜结果——反正敝小店也只能算些模糊的走向。
But for me? I've got other ways. I provide clients with the most ambiguous results possible — it's about the limit of accuracy for my tiny shop anyway.
I see a few game tables here as well?
做生意嘛，做占卜也是赚钱，开棋牌馆也是赚钱，不冲突。
I do business. Divination makes money, and so do games of cards and tiles. There's no conflict of interest.
之前在太卜司的时候认识了一位小姑娘叫作青雀，你要是经常来这里，也会经常看到她。她从书库里复原了这个棋牌戏，就叫「帝垣琼玉」。
I knew a girl called Qingque during my time at the Divination Commission. You'll run into her if you come here often. She recreated this game called "Celestial Jade" from old books.
三五朋友聚在一起玩玩牌，多好呀，看着他们玩儿，我心情也好起来了。要是开个棋牌馆就能赚钱，我就不搞收费占卜了。
How nice it'd be to play a few rounds with friends. It lifts my spirits just seeing them play, too. If I could earn a living with a games parlor, I wouldn't be doing any divination.
没有其他想问的事儿了。
I don't have any other questions.
老板您下次再来，要是运势不好，小店是可以帮您转运的。
Come back again, esteemed customer. If you're down on your luck, I'll be here to help you turn it around.
没有其他想问的事儿了。
I don't have any other questions.
老板您下次再来，要是运势不好，小店是可以帮您转运的。
Come back again, esteemed customer. If you're down on your luck, I'll be here to help you turn it around.
哟，这位老板您又来啦？稍等一下，我在看闲书呢，讲的是「预言的自我实现」。
Oh, you're back again? Hold on, I'm reading a book called "A Prophecy's Self-fulfillment."
真没意思，还是跟老板您聊天有意思。今天是要测运势呢，还是要闲聊呢？
Well, that was boring. It's much more interesting to talk to you. Are you here to determine your luck, or just to chat?
就好比，我都不必掐指起卦，便可算到客人少则一周内，多则月余会有一笔小财进账。你说准不准？准得很呐。
For example, I don't even have to pinch my fingers to foretell that you will have a small amount of wealth coming in sometime between this week and this month. Am I right? Of course I am.
就好比，我都不必掐指起卦，便可算到客人少则一周内，多则月余会有一笔小财进账。你说准不准？准得很呐。
For example, I don't even have to pinch my fingers to foretell that you will have a small amount of wealth coming in sometime between this week and this month. Am I right? Of course I am.
The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...
嗐，老板，这可不是个什么好兆头啊。
Tsk, that can't be a good omen.
这几日罗浮仙舟祸乱频出，大家相信云骑军能够处理好大大小小许多事情。
The Luofu has been ravaged by disaster recently. Everyone thinks that the Cloud Knights are capable of solving every problem under the sun, no matter how great or small.
可是这建木长成就不是云骑军能够掌控的范畴了……
But the Ambrosial Arbor's growth doesn't fall within the scope of operations for the Cloud Knights...
现如今这情况，不知道太卜大人算到了吗？嗐，多半是没有算到吧。
I'm not sure if the master diviner has foreseen this? I'm thinking, probably not.
你有给建木这事算过吗？
Have you divined for the Ambrosial Arbor crisis?
当初建木生发的时候我起过一卦，现在我倒没再看过了。我觉得也不必再看了，没什么好惊奇的，既有生发，就必然会停止。
I divined when it sprouted, but I didn't bother to check again later because I didn't think it was necessary. Neither its sprouting or its sudden stop came as a surprise to me.
就像…就像卦有两爻，阴阳二爻一体两面，建木会突然生长，就会突然停止，无论是否有其他变数，落在建木的具体表现上就只有这两种结果。
It's just like... like each sign consists of yin and yang. If the Ambrosial Arbor suddenly sprouts, then it's destined to stop just as suddenly.. This result is bound to happen.
嗐，至于那些什么影响啊，风波啊，那就是太卜大人他们的职责了。我又没公职在身，何必瞎操心，还是研究下晚饭吃什么更重要吧。

As for the impact, I'm not an official, and I don't think it's my job to worry about it. That's what the master diviner is for, right? For me, I'm more interested in figuring out what I'm going to eat for dinner.
这位客官，不好意思打扰你一下，看您的样子应该是化外民游客，有没有什么特别的食材、做法能告诉我吗？
Hello, guest. Sorry to bother you, but I noticed from your attire that you are an Outworld traveler. Do you have any unique ingredients or recipes that you can tell me about?
I don't do my own cooking.
原来如此，这可真是不好意思呀。
I see. Sorry for bothering you then.
都是些家常菜，没有特别的。
It's all home-cooked fare. Nothing special.
这样吗？都怪我我问得有些奇怪了。
Is that so? I guess I'm the one asking a strange question.
Have you heard of interstellar locusts?
吃过…感觉还不太够味儿，谢谢你啊。
I've eaten them before... They didn't taste great though. Thanks anyways.
哎呀，忘了自我介绍……咱是尚滋味的主厨兼老板燕翠。现在餐厅里不太忙，我到这长乐天里休息休息，结果脑子还在想着怎么开发新的菜式。

Ah, I forgot to introduce myself... I am Yancui, head chef and owner of Spices Supreme. The restaurant's not busy right now, so I'm taking a break here in Exalting Sanctum, but couldn't take my mind off developing new dishes.
咱们尚滋味就在附近，您要是感兴趣就到店里坐坐。咱们尚滋味的立命之本就是「亲民」，保准道道菜都便宜又好吃！
Spices Supreme isn't far from here. Please visit us if you're interested. Our motto is to "cook for the people." We guarantee our food is inexpensive and tasty!
哎，一不小心和您说了这么多。这个送给你尝尝吧，以后有机会一定要来尝尝咱们尚滋味哦，包您终身难忘！
Ah, I've chatted so much with you. Here's something for you to have a taste test. You must come to Spices Supreme to try our dishes if you get a chance! It'll be an experience you'll never forget!
怎么？打算和咱再探讨一下美食吗？咱最喜欢和人一起研究美食了。
Hmm? You want to discuss food for a little longer? I love to chat about cuisine with people.
There is something I want to ask you...
好啊，您尽管问。只要不涉及商业机密，咱肯定知无不言。
Go ahead. I'll tell you everything I know, as long as they're not business secrets.
嗯？咱就随口那么一说，还真未见得有什么商业机密……
Hmm? I was just saying that! I don't think I have anything you'd call a business secret...
说来也不怕您笑话，我们仙舟的厨子们都很忌讳将自己做菜的秘诀公之于众，甚至将一些很普通的技巧神秘化……
You might laugh at us, but we Xianzhou chefs are very careful about our recipes being leaked to the public. Some of our most common cooking methods have even been mystified...
就比如说吧，把嫩豆腐切成蚕丝般的细线…这玩意儿说到底就是下苦功夫、笨功夫，勤学苦练而已。
For example, slicing tofu into thin threads as fine as silk... At the end of the day, it's just putting in the time and effort and learning through mistakes.
到了某些厨子的嘴里，就成了「腕子劲儿」、「巧功夫」、「不传之秘」这些让人越听越糊涂的大词儿…咱听着就觉得奇怪。

But spoken from a chef's perspective, it becomes all about the "power in the wrists," "artful skill," "unfathomable secret" — all these pretentious big words that confuse people... Even I'm left scratching my head.
尚滋味决不搞这一套，您要真想知道某道菜是怎么做的，咱都可以细细讲给您听。一次学不会没关系，搜索「尚滋味燕翠」，那有咱的教学视频。

Spices Supreme employs no such tactics. If you really want to know how a dish is made, I'll even give you a step-by-step. Doesn't matter if you don't get it the first time: Just look up "Spices Supreme Yancui" online and my recipes' videos are all there.
您可以先试试脆瓜胡辣鸡丁、鲫香肉丝和陈婆豆腐这些招牌菜。这些都是历经时间考验的名菜，点这些准不会错。

You can try our trademark dishes like the crisped melon and diced chicken, pork slices in fish sauce, and Granny Chen's Tofu to start. These are all famous dishes that have withstood the test of time. You can't go wrong with them.
有不过口味这东西十人十色，咱的推荐未必符合您的胃口。但是咱们尚滋味有千种滋味，总有一款属于您的菜。
Everyone's tastes are different, and my recommendations might not suit your palate. But we've got myriads of flavors, so I'm sure there's one that'll pique your fancy.
您也知道，仙舟人的一生很漫长，所以特别追求各种不同的味觉体验。
You know that a Xianzhou native's life is long, so they are very particular about variety in their pursuit of flavor.
每周四，咱这儿会搞一个「怪味星期四」，出一些特殊口味的「怪味菜」。这也是为了给仙舟的老饕们增加一些变数和乐趣。
Every Thursday, we've got an "Odd-taste Thursday" event, where we serve some dishes with rather interesting flavors. It's to provide some variety and fun for Xianzhou gormandizers.
这些新推出的怪味菜未必会好吃，但是一定可以给您带来难以忘记的全新体验。
These new dishes may not be tasty, but they'll definitely leave you with an unforgettable experience.
说来惭愧，虽然咱是开饭馆儿的，但其实比较挑食。有一些东西我是不吃的…比方说……
I'm ashamed to admit that though I run a restaurant, I'm actually quite picky about my food. There are some things I don't eat... such as...
没办法打败咱的动物，咱是坚决不吃的。
Such as animals who can't defeat me — I'll never eat those!
咱们持明一族历来讲究一个道法自然。万物相生相克、生长不息。所以基于这种原理，如果一个动物无法与咱公平对决，咱也不会以它为食！这就是咱的武道！

We Vidyadhara have always observed the law of natural flow. All creatures are connected to one another, and life is everlasting in its cycle. Based on this principle, if an animal can't defeat me on even ground, I'd never use it as food! That is my martial way!
What exactly are you talking about...
嗐！这就是您不懂了啊！别看咱细胳膊细腿儿，咱可是「云曳旗旌流星拳」的首席大弟子。咱这路拳法可堪称仙舟外家拳之王！
C'mon, that's where you're ignorant! I may look like a pushover, but I am the Cloudbanner Meteor Fist's chief disciple. My fists are unrivaled among the auxiliary martial art schools in Xianzhou!
只不过嘛，咱后来还是去做了餐饮业，没继承武馆，但终归还是留下了不少武人的傲骨呀，嘿嘿。
It's just that I went into the food business in the end, so I didn't take over the martial art school. But I've still retained the pride of a martial artist, heehee.
咱从不吃那些小鱼小虾，也不吃食草动物，更不吃被驯化的猛兽…咱只吃有资格与咱生死对决的动物。
I don't eat small fish and shrimp, nor herbivores, or even domesticated beasts... I only eat animals that I can fight to the death with.
当然啦，这只是咱个人的坚持。咱们尚滋味还是什么食材都肯提供的哈，请您不必担心。
Of course, that's just my personal mantra. Spices Supreme serves everything. Don't worry.
所以…你最喜欢什么菜来着？
扯远了，都忘了这茬了！咱们持明的人口不会自然增长，所以天舶司那边的外派审查也相对宽松一些，咱经常有机会去其他世界进行狩猎。

Oh, I completely forgot your question! We Vidyadhara can't reproduce naturally, so the Sky-Faring Commission's travel reviewers are fairly lenient, which means I've had many opportunities to hunt on other worlds.
有些世界栖息着无数猛兽…我印象最深的是一颗叫塔拉萨的海洋世界……
Some worlds teem with numerous ferocious beasts... My most vivid memory was of an ocean world called Thalassa...
那里有一种巨型的浮空兽，叫做「六眼飞鱼」。咱当时骑在它身上，足足鏖战了两三个时辰，好悬没让它给咱囫囵个儿吞下去！
It had a giant airborne beast called a six-eyed flying fish. I stood on it, and we were locked in battle for hours. It was a miracle it didn't swallow me whole!
「六眼飞鱼」的那个鱼翅，可别提多好吃了！那一份鱼翅煲，是咱平生吃过最好吃的……
The fins of that fish were delicious beyond compare! That fin stew was the tastiest dish I'd ever had...
除此之外，咱还喜欢油爆飞海葵、果木炙烤夏塔恩恐鸟翅根、视肉糖球炒腊肉…哦对，这个视肉虽然个体极小，但会造出可怕的幻觉，极难对付……

Apart from that, I also like deep-fried flying sea anemone, fruitwood-grilled Shantak moa drumettes, viscorpus sugar balls stir-fried with cured meat... Oh right, these viscorpi may be really tiny, but they sure can conjure horrifying hallucinations. What a ride...
哈哈哈哈，不好意思，很少有人问我这些取材经历，不小心讲到兴头上了。
Haha, sorry, very few people ask me about my ingredient-seeking escapades, and I got carried away.
哼哼，咱确实很厉害呀。不仅武功高强，做的菜也很好吃，客官一定要试试看哦！
Heheh, I am quite amazing! Not just at martial arts, but cooking too. You must try my food out!
您是想问咱为什么要开这么一家店吗？哎，这可就说来话长了……
You're wondering why I opened this restaurant? Well, it's a long story...
大概一百年前吧，星际和平公司有个卖陆地履带的子公司，搞了个什么「星际美食家协会」。他们就在银河内，给各种餐厅评定星级。

The IPC had this subsidiary company a hundred years ago which sold conveyor belts, and they had an "Interastral Gourmet Association" that went around and rated all the eateries throughout the whole cosmos.
一星就算是了不起的「星际严选」了，五星则会被称为「银河最佳餐厅」。整个仙舟世界唯一拿到他们五星评级的是朱明仙舟上的一家「龙宫私房菜」。

If you get one star, you're part of the "Interastral Selection." If you get five stars, then you're the "Cosmos's Finest Diner." Across all of the Xianzhou ships, the only place to ever get five stars from them is "Dragon Palace's Kitchen" on the Xianzhou Zhuming.
咱也是持明嘛，心想着持明同胞得到了这样的荣誉，咱高低得去捧捧场…结果去了一看，您敢信吗？喂鸟都不够吃的一点东西，他们竟敢要价几十万信用点！

Being Vidyadhara, I thought I had to go and support the business of my kin, especially when they received such honors... But that place charged hundreds of thousands of credits for portions that won't even be filling for little birds! Would you believe it?
那个主厨还在那里装腔作势地和来吃饭的化外民说：「我们持明生性淡泊名利，就爱吃这一口儿。」哎，真是一言难尽……
That chef even put on this pretentious air and told Outworlders, "We Vidyadhara are indifferent to the trappings of fame and fortune, which is why we eat like this." Ack, that was too much...
从此之后，咱就立志要开一家与他们背道而驰的饭馆：量大管饱、物美价廉！咱们这家尚滋味，就是这个梦想的结晶啦！

That's when I determined to run a restaurant that goes completely opposite to everything they stood for. I want big portions, quality food, and low prices! I'm telling ya, Spices Supreme is that dream come true!
不过说实在话，您今天要是不提，咱都快忘了这些渊源了…现在咱做饭开店，就图一乐儿，别无他念。
But to be honest, if you hadn't mentioned it today, I'd have forgotten about that goal... Now I run the restaurant just to have fun. Nothing else.
行，都行。您啥时候来都行，咱翘首以盼！慢走啊，路上小心！
Fine. Not to worry. Any time! Can't wait! Take care! Stay safe out there!
这次「创意星期四」应该推出哪些菜品呢…咱得看看…大肠刺身、腰子炖汤、红糖芝麻酱、清蒸野牛皮、炭烤黑驴蹄、拔丝臭豆腐……

Let's have a look then. What shall we have for this week's Odd-taste Thursday... Gizzard sashimi, kidney stew, brown sugar sesame porridge, steamed boar skin, charcoal barbecued black donkey hooves, caramel-drizzled stinky tofu...
The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...
当时还在后厨里，咱只听到饭店里的食客们喧哗大作。
I was still working back of house then, and all we could hear was the clattering of diners out front.
咱急急忙忙从厨房里出来，看着那建木缓缓地长起来了。我也算是见过世面了，但也着实是吃了一惊。
I rushed out of the kitchen and watched as the Arbor slowly grew. I had been pretty well-traveled, but I was flabbergasted.
咱光是看着那个东西，就觉得有些毛骨悚然。它不疾不徐地生长起来，从容地仿佛天地之间只有它一棵树一样……
Just looking at that thing made my skin crawl. It grew at this weird, steady pace as if it were the only tree in all of existence...
练了这么多年拳法，咱在这方面直觉还是很准确的…那东西带有过于强大的生命力，几乎可以摧枯拉朽……
After all these years of boxing, my intuition is still dead-on about this kind of thing... That thing is so packed full of vitality that it could almost raise the dead...
所以…您之后也要小心行事啊，我还等着您来咱的店里惠顾呢。
So... You have to be careful in the future. I'm still waiting for you to come and visit us in-store.
Has business been going well lately?
承蒙您关照，咱家店最近生意不错。前几天还上了一个化外民的什么「银河百大黑暗菜肴榜」…哈哈。
Thanks to your sponsorship, my business has been going well. A few days ago, my store was even ranked on the "Top <unbreak>100</unbreak> Darkest Dishes in the Cosmos" made by Outworlders... Haha.
好多人都怕咱生气，不敢跟咱提这茬…其实这有啥的，我高兴还来不及呢！
My friends were afraid to tell me about it because they thought I'd get angry.... but I'm actually happy!
最近每天都有不少化外民专程赶过来，要尝尝咱这「黑暗菜肴」，还有个「黑暗菜肴评议会」要吸纳咱当会员呢！
Recently, I've been getting a lot of attention from Outworlders who come here just to try my "dark dishes." They even formed a "Dark Cuisine Council" and have been asking me to join as a member!
前者咱当然乐见，但后者嘛…咱这一世最讨厌的就是厨师抱团搞什么行业规范，所以就敬谢不敏啦。
I'm glad to have more customers. As for the "Council," however... I hate the idea of chefs grouping together to come up with "industry standards" or something like that, so I've refused their offer.
有空记得来咱这儿好好吃一顿啊…无论这尚滋味有多忙，只要您来，就一定有座位。
Just drop by and enjoy a hearty meal whenever you're free. My store might be busy these days, but I'll always reserve a seat for you!
Finally, the Ambrosial Arbor crisis is behind us...
是啊，总算过去了…其实算算时间也没多久，但总有种熬了很久的错觉。
Yeah, it's finally over... Even though it hasn't been that long, it feels like we've been going through it for a long time.
咱现在还记清清楚楚呢，当时从后厨出来看到建木长出来的画面…建木不再生长之后倒再没出过这么大的动静了。
I still remember clearly that scene, when I was in my kitchen and I came out and saw it growing... I've never seen anything so spectacular since it stopped growing.
这样也好…吃饭就该有吃饭的样子，前些日子大家都乱了心思，来吃饭的人几乎人人心事重重，这碗里的菜肴都没了味道。

This is actually a good thing... A restaurant should feel like a restaurant. Back then, everyone was so troubled and weighed down by their worries that they couldn't even fully enjoy the dishes I had carefully prepared for them.
…这样不好，这样不好…要咱说还是现在这样，大家都安生了才好。看大家吃得香，咱在后厨料理食材才有劲儿。
...That was definitely a terrible time... But now, everyone has calmed down, and I feel happy and motivated to see how they enjoy my dishes.
玩具、门铃、透金镜～展阅、冰箱、油烟机～星槎、玉兆、按摩椅～二手、修理、高价收～
Toys, doorbells, flexible displays!~ Shelves, refrigerators, extractor fans!~ Starskiffs, jade abaci, massage chairs!~ Second hand, or broken, I buy them all!
…唱歌？哦哦…我这哪是唱歌啊，我这是吆喝！
...Singing? Oh... I'm not singing. I'm hawking for business!
玩具、门铃…停停停，你别光顾着拍手了，我这只是卖吆喝。您这一拍手，反倒是变成街头节目了。
Toys, doorbells... Wait, don't just clap along. I'm hawking for business. If you clap like that, people will think it's a street show.
哦对了，我是陈机铺的掌柜，连烟。说是掌柜，其实店里也就我一个人，小本经营。
Oh yeah, by the way — I'm Lianyan, manager at the Oldies Depot. And when I say manager, I mean I'm the only person there. It's just me and my small business.
我这家陈机铺主营的业务，主要是贩卖二手货、修理旧物还有收购古董。但是仙舟人嘛，一个个都活得老长了，对旧物没什么兴趣，也不觉得有什么值得修理……

The Oldies Depot mainly buys and sells second-hand appliances, fixes up old stuff, and buys antiques. But Xianzhou people live so long that they have no interest in anything old, let alone bothering to fix anything...
…这只是个称呼，您爱怎么叫就怎么叫。
...It's just a title. Call it whatever you want.
Do the Xianzhou people only like new things?
话虽不能这么说…但我那家店大部分主顾，还都是化外民。偶尔有仙舟人来，也就是贩卖一些废品赚点小钱，没有人来买旧物或者修东西的。

Not quite... But most of the regulars here are Outworlders. Sometimes we'll get a Xianzhou shopper selling some junk to make a little pocket money, but never anyone buying second-hand goods or repairing things.
我看你也没有带着什么旧物来，怎么，难不成是跟我聊天来了？
You don't seem to have anything old there that needs fixing. Don't tell me you've come for a chat?
That's right. I just want to chat...
还真是和我聊天？你可真有意思…你想聊什么？
Really? How curious... What do you want to chat about?
陈机铺以前是我师父经营的门店。这些年他临近蜕生，便将这些差事一五一十全部交付于我。其实我一开始也是丝毫不感兴趣的。
My teacher used to run it, but he handed over everything to me since it was almost time for him to undergo his hatching rebirth. I never cared for this place in the slightest, to begin with.
师父以前就是个特别严肃、少言寡语的人，只有在处理旧物的时候，偶尔会露出笑容。对他来说，旧物换新颜是件了不得的事情。

My master used to be so darn strict. A man of very few words, only smiling when he was handling antique items. If you ask him, renovating something old is the most amazing pursuit there could ever be.
然而仙舟人的生命像死水一样漫长，但仙舟上的一切物品却又在高速地新陈代谢，就像死水里面朝生暮死的小虫。
But these Xianzhou people live on and on, just like stagnant water. Yet all the stuff aboard Xianzhou metabolizes super-fast — like bugs in that stagnant water, flailing about fleetingly.
他总是讲「天不生无用之人，地不造无用之物。」简单来说就是，没有任何一样事物与人是真正的废弃物。
He always said, "Heaven makes no useless people, and the world makes no useless things." Meaning that, nothing and nobody is ever truly a waste.
所以这家小小陈机铺，就是给人心和旧物的一点自留地。总有一些难以替代的东西需要这样的旧物翻新的服务。
So this little Oldies Depot is a place for people's keepsakes and old things. There's always gonna be something irreplaceable that needs fixing up.
仙舟人为什么不喜欢修理旧物？
Why don't the Xianzhou people like to repair old things?
仙舟上很少有传家宝…或者说，传家宝大多不是什么常用的物件。因为常用的物件寿命总是比仙舟人短很多。
There are hardly any heirlooms aboard Xianzhou... Or to put it another way, heirlooms aren't everyday items. Items used every day would never keep up with the long-lived Xianzhou people.
抛开技术日新月异的新产品不谈，即使是些锅碗瓢盆的寻常物件，它们很少有能够长存的，修修补补也都是徒劳。
Forget about all the hot new tech that comes out every week. Even mundane stuff like pots and pans rarely last forever. Fixing things takes effort.
而这些「坏掉的程度」往往需要卓越的技巧以及高昂的价格…简而言之，修理并不划算，购买新的更加便宜也更加方便。
And their state of disrepair often requires great skill and a high price to get it fixed... Simply put, repairs are not cheap, and buying something new works out cheaper and more convenient.
于是在化外民眼中，有着几百年历史的「古董」就这样随便丢给了「收破烂」的，确实挺令人惊讶的。
That's why it raises eyebrows whenever Outworlders see an antique from centuries ago get discarded without a thought, and being taken in by us as "trash."
你为什么要做这样的营生？
What made you take up this line of business?
你喜欢旅游吗？我挺喜欢旅游的。在办了一大堆的破手续后，我去过一个仙舟外的旅游胜地，叫伊须磨洲。
Do you like traveling? I do. I got through all the paperwork and went to this tourist resort off Xianzhou called Insumousu.
伊须磨洲的人们有一个特性，出生后直到青年时期都是陆生动物，用肺呼吸。但成年后就会变成水栖动物，用腮呼吸。

The people of Insumousu are special indeed. From their birth until their teenage years, they live on land and breathe with their lungs. But once they reach adulthood, they start to live in water and breathe using gills.
在文明尚未完全开化的铁器时代，伊须磨洲人在海底建立了壮观的建筑群。在遗迹的中心有一座巨大的造像，从海底直冲云霄。

Back during the Iron Age, when civilization had barely begun, the people of Insumousu constructed magnificent buildings on the sea floor. Right in the middle of them is a huge statue, rising up out of the sea and stretching into the sky.
我遇到的每个伊须磨洲人谈起那片伟大的遗迹时，都两眼冒光，说那是他们文明的图腾，记录着一个伟大民族的伟大历程……

Every Insumousu local I met lit up in excitement whenever they mentioned that great ruin. They tell me how it's a totem for their civilization, one that records the noble histories of their great people...
后来我才知道，那片遗迹只有四百多年的历史。
I later found out that the ruins were actually just four hundred years old.
换言之，伊须磨洲伟大的先民们修建「文明的图腾」所消耗的时间，远没有我的人生经历长。
In other words, all the time spent by the great ancestors of Insumousu to build this "totem of civilization" was far shorter than my entire life.
…我并不是在贬低伊须磨洲的文明历程，伊须磨洲的海底遗迹，真得特别美，特别壮丽…它比我年轻，却比我的整个人生都要厚重。

...I don't mean to talk down on the Insumousu civilization. Their underwater ruins are exquisite and truly magnificent... It's something that is both younger than me, yet has far more gravity than my life.
That's all. I can see you're busy.
好嘞，下回再见。以后要是有什么修旧物、买二手、卖废品的需求记得来找我。
Alright, catch you next time then. If you ever need anything fixed, or if you want to buy and sell second-hand stuff, come find me.
玩具、门铃、透金镜～星槎、玉兆、按摩椅～二手、修理、高价收～
Toys, doorbells, mirrors!~ Starskiffs, jade abaci, massage chairs!~ Second hand, or broken, I buy them all!
哦，你又来啦。要修理旧物，还是要随便聊聊呢？
Oh hey, you're back. Got something for me to fix? Or just a casual catch-up?
The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...
看到了，之前我还到鳞渊境附近凑热闹来着，被云骑给赶回来了，哈哈。
I saw, and even tried going to nearby Scalegorge Waterscape to rubberneck, but the Cloud Knights sent me back, haha.
其实建木生发不是件好事，但…咱们私下里偷偷说…我特别喜欢建木的外观。
The Arbor's growth isn't actually a good thing... But let's talk somewhere more private... I love how beautiful the Ambrosial Arbor looks.
仅限于外观哦！我也是熟悉仙舟历史的，这可不是什么好东西。
But only how it looks! I've studied my history and this is not a good thing.
但也没有办法，我可能天生就是喜欢这种雄伟壮丽的景观。
But I can't help it. I guess I was just born with a love for majestic landscapes like this.
The Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing...
我早知道了。我一听说建木的风波平息下来了，马上就去凑了凑热闹，毕竟眼见为实嘛。从长乐天那里不就能望见建木吗，我看到了。
Yeah, that's hardly news to me. As soon as I heard about it, I went there and checked it out myself, and I saw from Exalting Sanctum with my own eyes that it had stopped growing.
咳咳…有一件事告诉了您，您可千万别跟人说啊，免得害我到地衡司走一遭…先前有些人卖旧物的时候故意往「建木生发」的事上蹭呢。

Well... I'll tell you a secret, but don't tell anyone, okay? Otherwise I might end up in hot water with the Realm-Keeping Commission... Some curio sellers were using the Ambrosial Arbor's sprouting as a gimmick to attract customers.
一会儿是受了什么异变啊，一会儿又什么建木的落叶啊，我跟你说都是骗人的，你在外面要是见着了也别上当。
Just so you know, they were claiming that their curios were influenced by the anomaly or even came from the Ambrosial Arbor itself. But don't fall for their tricks, okay?
眼下建木不再生长了，我倒讨了个巧，把这些稀奇玩意儿的价格给压下来了，抛开瞎编的故事不说，有些物什还挺有意思的，算是个意外之喜吧。

Now that the Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing, I've seen an opportunity and acquired those curios at incredibly low prices. To my surprise, some of them are actually pretty interesting and not just cheap gimmicks like I thought they would be. A pleasant surprise, don't you agree?
Has business been going well lately?
最近生意好得不得了啊！以前金人巷没什么游客，我做的也都是仙舟人的生意…但仙舟人嘛，你也懂，不太需要我的业务。

It's been amazing! Aurum Alley never used to have any travelers, and I only ever did business with Xianzhou locals... But, well, you know how the Xianzhou folks are like... They don't really need my services.
现在今非昔比啦！金人巷到处都是化外民，他们对仙舟那些成百上千年历史的「旧物」可感兴趣了。
But everything has changed, now! The Aurum Alley is full of outworlders and they love the ancient "artifacts" of Xianzhou.
你们化外民对旧物的价值判断和我们不同，所以周围很多朋友都暗搓搓劝我提高些价格…可旧物就是旧物嘛。
These outworlders value artifacts differently to us, so my friends keep telling me to up the prices but... well, it's just old stuff, isn't it?
我这辈子也没想过发大财，只有一个简单的愿望——「物尽其用」。仅此而已。
I've never dreamed of becoming rich in this life. I have just one simple wish: "to make the best use of everything." That is all.
…这里是书店，要是想看书、选书，直接进店翻阅就好，要结账的时候再来叫我吧。
...This is a bookstore. If you want to read or pick out a book, just go in and browse around. Call me when you want to pay.
我读书不多，可能很难回答你…这样吧，店内前排放着的都是些畅销书，他们成为畅销书肯定是有原因的，你看这些如何？

I don't really read that much, so I can't really recommend anything... Well, the front of the shop is where we keep our bestsellers. There's gotta be a reason why they're bestsellers. Why not start there?
《涯海星槎胜览》，狐族冒险家撰写的异星奇观记录…哦，你本来就是来自异星的游客。稍等，我想想……
"Views of the Universe from a Starskiff" is a record of wondrous exoplanets by a foxian explorer... Oh, you're from an exoplanet anyways. In that case, hang on and let me think...
这本《厌作人间语》如何？这是小店老板写的志怪小说集子。
How about this one here, "Otherworldly Delights"? It's a collection of short supernatural stories written by the boss here.
Boss, you could be a little more enthusiastic.
…书店本来就是这样的销售方式嘛。再说了，我也不是书肆的老板，我只是帮老板看店的杂务，不为书店的销量负责。
...Bookstores are for selling books. Besides, I'm not the boss here. I just help with running a few chores. I'm not in charge of sales here.
话又说回来，那位老板其实也不在意书店生意。关于老板…你看，这是他写的书，叫作《厌作人间语》，是本志怪小说集子。
But then again, the boss here doesn't really give a darn about business at all. Here... This is a collection of short supernatural stories he's written, called "Otherworldly Delights."
书肆老板是我的亲戚，他喜好听人闲聊，说是为了收集灵感，用来作为写书的点子。
I'm a relative of the owner. He likes listening to other people's conversations, saying that it's good inspiration as an author.
你可能在星槎海见过，他在一家叫「不夜侯」的茶馆里说书，自称什么「西衍先生」。
You may have seen him over in Starskiff Haven. He does storytelling in some teahouse called Sleepless Earl or other, calling himself something like "Mr. Xiyan."
I may have met him in Starskiff Haven.
那个人还挺喜欢引人瞩目的，你要是没见到过，我反倒是会奇怪。
He likes getting attention. I'd be truly surprised if you haven't seen him.
怎么仙舟还有人说书啊？
Why are there storytellers aboard Xianzhou?
你在别的世界也见过说书人吗？客人这么问…我想你多半是见过的。
Have you seen storytellers on other planets? When you put it like that... I can tell you've probably already seen it before.
我只是听说过「说书」是一种深具传统的表演形式，具体也不太了解。不过，老板假借说书人的身份，也许只是方便在茶馆里打听志怪故事而已。

All I know is, storytelling is a traditional form of performative art. I don't know much else. But perhaps the boss is using his gig as a storyteller to hang out at the teahouse and hear all kinds of supernatural and weird tales.
真希望他能多上点心在书店这里啊…客人，有什么想要买的书吗？
How I wish he could pay a little more attention to his bookstore business... Ah well. Have you got any books there that you'd like to buy?
I'd like to buy a book.
嗯，买书吗？需要什么，我帮你找找。
Mmm, buying a book? Which one do you need. I'll help you find it.
I'd like to chat with you some more.
行啊，反正客人是看准了我现在无所事事，那就随便聊聊吧。
Okay. Well, as you can see, I've nothing to do, so let's chat.
关于仙舟上的志怪故事…
About supernatural tales aboard the Xianzhou...
书肆老板沉迷于仙舟上的志怪故事，甚至会花费重金去别的仙舟上实地勘察，虽然结果一无所获，但是他本人倒是乐在其中。

The boss here is obsessed with all the supernatural stories told on this ship, and even pays through the nose to make visits to other Xianzhou ships. He never really finds anything, but he has fun along the way.
实际上，这些所谓的志怪故事大多是来自异星生物、或是平平无奇的巧合，仙舟人见怪不怪，根本不值得大费周章。
In fact, most of these stories are just due to otherworldly species or mere coincidence. The Xianzhou people aren't really flustered by any of that, and barely raise an eyebrow.
不过老板说过，无论是什么光怪陆离的世界，人们总是需要故弄玄虚的故事。
But the boss says that no matter how brilliant this world is, people always need to have dark and ghostly stories.
「真实的不太有趣，有趣的不太真实。添油加醋是常事，不清不楚有味道」。这就是他写在腰封上的话。
"Reality isn't interesting, and what's interesting isn't real. Adding flourish is normal, and vagueness adds flavor." He's got this phrase etched onto his belt.
最近有本推理小说很火热，但是我没看过，自然没法向你仔细介绍。不过，你要是对内容感兴趣的话，买了就知道了。
There's a new suspense novel out that's very popular, but I haven't read it yet, so can't go over the exact details. But if you're interested in such stories, just buy it and you'll know for sure.
仙舟上有长生不老的人、有新奇的科技，还有异星的奇人异士…但是大家就喜欢看暴风雪山庄里没有云骑军、没有科技、没有超能力的原始作案手段。

On Xianzhou, we have immortal people, novel technology, and fantastical visitors from exoplanets... But somehow everyone wants to read about primitive crimes conducted in snowbound manor houses with no Cloud Knights, no technology, and no super powers...
我不是很理解，可能这就是推理的魅力吧？
I don't really get it. Perhaps that's the charm of mystery novels?
仙舟的书样式还挺复古…
The appearance of books on Xianzhou all seem kind of retro...
刚到仙舟的游客经常发出这种感慨。
Ah yes, tourists often make this remark.
其实客人要是感兴趣，就将那些书里对应「书签」取下，靠近自己的玉兆，就能下载阅读了。
In fact, if you want, you can take the corresponding "bookmark" you like from the books, hold them close to your jade abacus, and download them to read later.
我自己是习惯将书录入玉兆里。但总架不住有人喜欢「手捧书卷的感觉」。活得越久，人就越喜欢追求所谓的仪式感。

I personally like downloading and reading off my jade abacus, but there's always people who like the feeling of holding paper books in their hands. The longer people live, the more they crave this kind of ceremony.
啧，这些实体书可麻烦了，占着地方，还得每日清理。
Tsk, these physical books are such a pain. They take up space and need daily cleaning.
Away you go, then. Take care.
客人付了钱，把感兴趣的「书签」取下，靠近玉兆，就能下载阅读了。
You pay, then pick out the "bookmark" you like, hold them close to your jade abacus, and download them to read later.
要是没有玉兆，又或者喜欢捧书的手感，店里的书您随便取用。卷轴式、简牍式、开本式一应俱全。总之，要买书的时候再来找我吧。

If you don't have a jade abacus or if you just like the feeling of a book in your hands, just grab one off the shelf. Scroll rolls, bound bamboo strips, printed and bound paper books — we've got all the formats. Anyway, just come see me if you'd like to buy a book.
The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...
你是今天第二十七个问这个问题的客人。
You are the twenty-seventh person to mention this to me today.
看见了，看见了…要是西衍先生，恐怕会对此感兴趣吧。
I see, I see... Mr. Xiyan would probably be interested in this.
但我不过是一介看店小童，只希望这东西别妨碍我做生意就好……
But I'm just a kid helping out here. Hope this thing doesn't impact my work...
Finally, the Ambrosial Arbor crisis is over... What's your take?
Alright! Alright! Just stop with all the Ambrosial Arbor stuff!
今天有五十二个人来跟我说这事，其中有四十八个问我是否有探讨建木生长与停息之秘的书籍到货。

There have been <unbreak>52</unbreak> people who came to talk to me about this matter. Among them, <unbreak>48</unbreak> asked me whether there were readables that discussed the secrets behind the growth and ceasing of the Ambrosial Arbor.
我不过是一介看店小童，写书出书的事我哪能决定…哎…要问就问那些编辑去吧，反正我这里还没到货呢。
As a mere bookstore assistant, I have no say in the writing and publishing of readables... Alas... They should pester those editors instead. Anyway, I have no stock of those readables here.
忽如柳叶随风起，超级无敌我爱你。
Like willow leaves moving at a speed of knots, super duper love you lots.
秋风明月登楼台，谈恋爱要慢慢来。
Autumn winds and moon rises on buildings glow, love can also move as slow.
…这写诗谁不会啊，她怎么就看不上我呢？我差在哪儿啊？
...Writing poetry is so easy. Why doesn't she like me? What am I missing?
全是情感啊，你没听出来吗？我感觉自己和仙舟七诗圣五五开了啊！
It's pure emotion. Can't you hear that? I feel like I'm on equal grounds with the seven sacred poets of Xianzhou.
This poem of yours is terrible...
这几句诗不挺好…？「起」、「你」…你看，我都押上韵脚了。七言绝句了属于是。
You don't like it...? Look, "knots" and "lots"... it all rhymes... four lines of heptameter.
…哎，算了，我也不跟你嘴硬了。说实话，我倒现在都没理解诗这东西到底哪里有意思，也没什么分辨好坏的本事。
...Ah, forget about it. I'm not arguing with you. To be honest, I don't even really get what's so good about poetry, and can't really tell what's good poetry.
看上去你对诗句有一些独到的见解，你说说看，别人写得情真意切，我写得也是真情实感，我到底差在哪儿了？
You, however, seem to have unique insights into poetry. Tell me, other people pour out their love and emotion, and I'm here writing out my true feelings too. What am I doing wrong?
可能是差一些文化品味…
It's missing the sense of culture and taste...
「文化品味」又是什么？你不要发明新词语来敷衍我呀。
Culture? Taste? What's that? Don't just invent new words to trick me.
…可能你确实没有敷衍我。唉，真的就像你说的，我差一些「文化品味」。
...Maybe you aren't tricking me. *sigh* You're right. I'm lacking in culture and taste.
I actually think you write with your own style!
很有风格…谢谢你啊。虽然我分不清楚这究竟是夸奖，还是安慰。
My own style... Thank you. Even though I can't really tell if this is meant as a compliment or consolation.
不过说到底，就算你喜欢，那个人不喜欢，这也没用啊……
But in the end, even if you do like it, she doesn't like it. So it's useless...
哎…说了半天，你是有什么事吗？
I want to chat with you...
好啊，反正我也没什么灵感…你想找我打听什么，工造技术之类的吗？
Alright. It's not like I have any inspiration, is it... What are you after? Is it about artifex technology?
我是工造司的工正，就挺有水平的吧。领导对我很赞赏，他说过「小聪啊，你要是稍微有点情商，百年内就能评上大工正」。

Yeah, I'm an artisan at the Artisanship Commission, and I'm kind of a big deal. My boss loves me and he said, "Cong, if you just work on your EQ a little, you'll be a Master Artisan in another hundred years."
但说真的，他这话我不爱听。什么年代了，还有这种对理工学者「高智商低情商」的刻板印象。
But honestly, I hate hearing that. In this day and era, why are there still stereotyped notions that engineers have high IQ and low EQ?
哎…但说这些都是白扯。要是我写诗的技术能赶上我工造技术水平的一半就好了。我现在就不会这么愁了。
Ack... But that's all a load of bull. If only my poetry were half as good as my artifex skills, I wouldn't be so anxious right now.
话是这么说，但是解决不了问题。哎……
That may be true, but it doesn't fix my problem. *sigh*...
工造技术也能用于写诗。
Artifex skills can also be used to write poetry.
…实不相瞒，我正有此意，正在想办法呢。
...To tell you the truth, that's what I think, too. I'm trying to find a way to do just that.
Why are you so obsessed with writing poetry?
还不是为了那个人…我们还不太熟，也没必要和你说太细。
Well, it's not for her... I don't really know you, so I don't want to say too much.
总之呢，我喜欢一个姑娘。但她不喜欢我这样的男人…她喜欢的男人，能用奇怪的韵律将一些奇怪词汇组合在一起，然后摇头晃脑地吟诵出来……
Anyway, I like this girl. But she doesn't like guys like me... The guys she likes use strange melodies to string together all these strange words, and they just recite them all from memory...
简而言之…那个姑娘喜欢诗人。然而如你所见，我在诗歌上的造诣还略有欠缺。
In short... this girl loves poets. However, as you can see, I'm slightly lacking when it comes to the poetry department.
你还有没有别的文学作品？
Have you tried any other forms of literature?
其实我也试了一下仙舟词牌…你听一下我这个……
Yeah, I tried some Xianzhou sonnets... What do you think about this one?
「山横远翠疑歌黛，彦卿长得没我帅。你好坏，我被你打败，小可爱。」
"Emerald mounts hold a love fledgling, but I'm way more handsome than Yanqing. So annoying, yet you make my heart sing, you pretty thing."
我个人觉得词比诗更适合直抒胸臆，成品效果比写诗好很多。你觉得还行吗？
I feel like sonnets allow me to express myself more freely, and produce a more polished result than poetry. What do you think?
说明咱俩品味比较接近。我给我们领导看，他建议我「把这张纸撕碎了咽下去，永远都不要给别人看」。
That means we have similar taste. I showed it to my boss, but he just told me to shred it up, swallow it, and never show it to anyone ever again.
他好奇怪啊，我们工造司里明明有碎纸的机器。
He's so weird. We already have a shredder in the Artisanship Commission.
你这啥理解能力啊，还在这儿鉴赏诗词呢？
You have such a bad understanding of poetry, and you're trying to appraise poems?
这里提到「彦卿」，是一种叫作「对比」的修饰手法。这是在说我比那个天才剑客还要帅气、还要潇洒、还要优雅……
I mention "Yanqing" here as a literary device. I'm saying here that I'm even more handsome, dashing, and graceful than the genius fighter...
行吗？我怎么觉得有点恶心呢？
Yeah? Why do I feel slightly disgusted?
有点受打击，但是完全能接受。谢谢你的坦诚。
I feel attacked, but totally acceptable. Thank you for your honesty.
写诗可能还是需要一些素养。
I think writing poetry requires some training.
我知道你说的是什么意思。这和工造技术是一样的，诗歌存在着「规范」和「技术」，只要我解决了这些难题，就能达到你说的「素养」。
I know what you mean. This is just the same as developing new artifex tech. Poetry has its rules and techniques. As long as I can solve these problems, then I'll have achieved that level of training.
「规范」说的是仙舟诗依托于语言的特殊韵律，只要将符合韵律的排列组合全部列出来，就能确定「规范」的边界。

The rules refer to the special rhythm upon which Xianzhou poetry relies. As long as all the different permutations that conform to the rhythm can be exhaustively listed out, then we can define the limits of this rule.
其实「规范」非常简单，但「技术」特别难。无论我去询问谁，他们都说「诗歌不能谈技术，这不浪漫」，可是技术也可以浪漫呀？

These rules are a piece of cake, and it's the techniques that're particularly hard. But no matter who I ask, they always come back to me with "you can't talk about technique with poetry. That's not romantic." But can't technology be romantic, too?
比如这句：「棍上金工鸿利摇，白纸飞段救鹅毛」…就是我用机器随机组合中最像人话的一句诗，虽然我也没看懂，但不妨碍我能品出其中的技术优雅感？

For example: "On the staff the goldsmith waves large profit obese, white paper flies stages to rescue the goose"... This is the most humanistic verse I've strung together out of the automated word-combination logarithms. I don't understand what it's trying to say, but can't you sense the elegance of technology here?
对于工造司的工正来说，失败只是成功的必经之路。我准备之后再试试别的办法。
As for artisans at the Artisanship Commission, failure is a required step on the road to success. I'll try some other things out once I'm prepared.
在想出更好的办法之前，还是要自己试着写写诗啊…哎，写诗真的好难。
I'll have to keep trying to write poetry on my own until I come up with a better way... *sigh* writing poems sure is difficult.
I have nothing else to ask.
So long. Catch you again later.
清风明月…捅我心？清风明月…踹我心？清风明月…掐我心？
The breeze and the moon... "poke" my heart? The breeze and the moon... "stomp" my heart? The breeze and the moon... "choke" my heart?
到底该用哪个字啊…今天找我有什么事吗？
Which word to pick... How can I help you today?
The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...
我为此赋了一首诗，你听完我给你吟一下啊……
I composed a poem for this. Listen up. I'll chant it for you...
咳咳…鳞渊境里浪滔滔，一棵大树高又高。你一口来我一口，长得像根大串烧。
Ahem... Scalegorge waters surge and flow; mighty tree you grow and grow; a sip for you, a sip for me; growing like a kebab tree.
怎么样？喜欢吗？…呃，看你表情是不太喜欢…算了，我再想想。
Huh? Do you like it? ...Uh, I can tell by your expression that you're not a fan... Forget it, I'll come up with another.
你是世界尽头的叹息，而我只是一枚小小的螺丝钉。我手足无措，不知道如何修补你的心。哎，静斋……
You're a sorrowful sigh at the end of the world, while I am just an insignificant screw. I'm at a loss, helpless in ways to mend your broken heart. Oh, Jingzhai...
噢，你来了，找我有什么事吗？
Oh, you're here. What brings you here?
I want to chat with you...
好啊，反正我也没什么灵感…你想找我打听什么，工造技术之类的吗？
Alright. It's not like I have any inspiration... What are you after? Is it about artifex technology?
我是工造司的工正，就挺有水平的吧。领导对我很赞赏，他说过「小聪啊，你要是稍微有点情商，百年内就能评上大工正」。

Yeah, I'm an artisan at the Artisanship Commission, and I'm kind of a big deal. My boss loves me and he said, "Cong, if you just work on your EQ a little, you'll be a Master Artisan in another hundred years."
但说真的，他可能说得没错，我情商确实不太高，哎…不过，我听他们说最近我的情商有所进步，如果不是挖苦我的话，就说明我真的成长了。
Frankly speaking, I think he's right, as I really don't have a high EQ... But, I've heard them say that I've gotten better lately. If it's not sarcasm, it probably means I have improved.
Do you still write poems now?
写的，不过这次我不再依赖诗仙机器人了，我想自己写一些。
I do, but I no longer rely on the Poetic Genius Ingenia. I prefer to write the poems myself.
我发现写诗没有想象中那样严肃…我好像爱上写诗了。
It turns out that writing poems isn't as serious a business as I used to think... I've fallen in love with it.
What about those Poetic Genius Ingenia?
我问了它们各自的想法，让它们去做自己想做的事去了。
I talked to them about their thoughts and left them to pursue what they desired.
忧郁诗人有些怪，它说适度忧郁感觉更有安全感，让我帮它再调整了一下。有机会的话，你还是能找到它。
The Gloomy Poet is a quirky one. It told me that the right amount of melancholy makes it feel safe, so it asked me to adjust its settings. You can still bump into it if you're lucky.
忧郁到底是什么呢？忧郁的时候，饱受折磨；不忧郁的时候，又会怀念它。
What exactly is melancholy then, you might ask? When you're experiencing the emotion, you'll be in agony. When you aren't, you'll miss it.
我知道静斋的心意，我不会再去叨扰她。
I know what she thinks, and I will leave her alone.
但是我要彻底说服自己不再追求她，还是需要很长的时间，懂的都懂。
However, it'll take a long time before I can convince myself to give up on her. Anyone who's been through this would understand.
放心，我不会耽误工造司的工作的。
Don't worry. I won't neglect my job at the Artisanship Commission.
I have nothing else to ask.
So long. Catch you again later.
The Ambrosial Arbor no longer sprouts...
是啊，危机总算过去了。对了，我最近从建木危机一事上得到了一些灵感，写了几句诗，你听听——
Indeed, everything is finally over. By the way, I have written a poem with inspiration from the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis. Please listen...
树生树长无定数，似我发丝全干枯。呜呼！莫不是水土不服！
Nothing is certain when it comes to the growth of the tree, just like the dry hair strands of me. Alas, the environment must be to blame!
我感觉写得还蛮好的…呃，你的表情是怎么回事……
I think it's quite well-written... Um, what's with your expression...
能请你往旁边挪一挪吗？
Could you please move over a tad?
你是不是也觉得蘑菇不该说话？
Do you also think mushrooms shouldn't talk?
因为我是一朵正在收集阳光的蘑菇。
But you blocked off the light.
你是不是也觉得蘑菇不该收集阳光？
Do you also think mushrooms shouldn't sunbathe?
Sorry, I didn't mean to offend...
根本没有人会在乎一朵蘑菇的感受。
Nobody cares about how a mushroom feels.
人们都说我是「工造司民用维修单元甲型」。
People say I'm an "Artisanship Commission's Civil Maintenance Unit Type-A."
Oh, now I feel even sadder.
I'll tell you everything I know.
Even though I'm just a mushroom.
What would you say I am?
You still look like an umbrella to me...
蘑菇当然长得像一把伞。
Of course, Mushrooms are shaped like an umbrella.
我想你也对蘑菇有些偏见。
I think you're a little biased against mushrooms.
你有没有可能是个机器人？
Could you actually be a robot?
或许我是一朵机械蘑菇。
Then wouldn't that mean I'm not pure-blooded?
因为我是一朵失败的蘑菇。
Because I'm a failure of a mushroom.
你是不是也觉得蘑菇不该失败？
Do you also think mushrooms shouldn't fail?
Actually, I used to have a master.
他是一名工造司的巧匠。
He was a skilled craftsman at the Artisanship Commission.
My master wants me to help him write poetry.
我说：「可我只是一朵蘑菇。」
I said, "but I'm just a mushroom."
我只不过是朵不会作诗的蘑菇。
I'm just a mushroom who can't write poems.
I don't understand the first thing about it.
You've learned how to give quick answers.
I don't have any more questions.
May your path be filled with many mushrooms.
你平时也会向蘑菇搭话吗？
Do you often talk to mushrooms?
你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?
大约因为我只是一个蘑菇。
It's probably because I'm just a mushroom.
蘑菇只关心大地，不去看高远的东西。
Mushrooms only care about the ground and not things way up at that kind of altitude.
建木停止生发的消息你听说了吗？
Have you heard that the Ambrosial Arbor has stopped sprouting?
蘑菇没听说，蘑菇不在意。
I've not heard about it and do not care.
蘑菇只想转起来，像个旋风小蘑菇。
