I just want to start spinning like a little tornado.
…如果每个人都像你这么想，托蝶幻境这门艺术就要断绝了！如果当年子润老师听了制片人的这些所谓「商业考量」，《外婆桥》根本都不会问世！

...If everyone thought like you did, the art of Butterfly Immersia would be wiped out! If master Zi Run had listened to these so-called "business interests" back then, "The Bridge to Grandma's Home" would've never even been released!
呵，那你就和你的艺术梦想一起去桥洞子底下喝西北风去吧。你当我是为了害你才和你说这些的吗？大家一起赚钱不好吗，你为什么这么犟呢……

Ha, then you can take your artistic dreams and your bridge — and jump off it into a lake! Do you think I said this to cause you pain? Why can't we all make a little money together? Why have you gotta be so pig-headed...
可是…艺术是不能单纯用商业衡量的啊！如果你根本就不尊重艺术，又为什么要在这个行业里以此谋生呢？
But... Art cannot be measured by commercial impact alone! Why would you try to make a living in this industry if you have no respect for art at all?
…你又是什么人呢？拱火我们俩吵架，你又是什么意思。
...And who are you? Egging us on to fight like this... What can you get out of this?
哎…武赫，消停点吧。别让人看热闹了。
*sigh* Wu He, calm down. Let's not put on a show for people.
哎呀，我这…确实不好意思，我们俩是有点儿上头，没注意到周围。
Oh, I... I'm really sorry about that. We kind of went a bit goblin mode there and should've paid more attention to our surroundings.
哎…武赫，消停点吧。别让人看热闹了。
*sigh* Wu He, calm down. Let's not put on a show for people.
你们在这等着，我去找下地衡司。
You guys wait here. I'll go find the Realm-Keeping Commission.
别别别，我们这点儿小打小闹就不麻烦地衡司了。
No no no, please don't bother the Realm-Keeping Commission with this little tiff of ours.
哎…武赫，消停点吧。别让人看热闹了。
*sigh* Wu He, calm down. Let's not put on a show for people.
我和你闹，那还是不是因为艺术创作嘛…那个{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}我来解释一下，我们俩是搞托蝶幻境的，她是制片人南洁，我是导演武赫。
I'm arguing with you out of creative license, right... Let me explain to the {F#girl}{M#boy} here — we're Butterfly Immersia creatives. She's Nanjie, the producer — and I'm the director, Wu He.
就这样打住吧，正好你也冷静冷静。不好意思，让你见笑了。是有什么事情要说吗？
Let's stop there, for you to get calmed down. Sorry to make you laugh. Have you got anything you'd like to say?
难不成是你的影迷，好啊，武赫你多来讲讲。
Is it possible that you've got a fan here? Alright, keep talking, Wu He.
托蝶幻境是一种仙舟特有的艺术形式，使用流传数千年狐族幻术与当代工造技术相结合，可以创造出以假乱真的幻境，让观众全方位沉浸在情景之中。

Butterfly Immersia is a unique art form found in Xianzhou. It combines ancient foxian illusions with modern artifex tech to create an incredibly real dreamland that completely immerses the audience right in the middle of the scene.
其实就是你们的虚拟现实技术罢了。
Actually, it's all just virtual reality tech.
此言差矣！托蝶幻境是仙舟独特的文化和艺术，并不是什么……
Wrong! Butterfly Immersia is a unique cultural legacy and art form found only on Xianzhou, not some crazy...
别说那么复杂，本质就是虚拟现实技术。
Don't make it so complicated. The essence is basically virtual reality.
托蝶幻境和「虚拟现实」能一样吗？幻戏的核心在于「狐术」的应用！
How can Butterfly Immersia be the same as VR? Its core revolves around a base of foxian magic!
充分调动五感，模糊现实和虚拟，享受纯粹的艺术时空，主观视角与客观视角的交替……
It fully engrosses the five senses and blurs reality with illusion creating a purely artistic time in space: The alternation of the subjective with the objective...
So what exactly is the difference, then...
具体…区别…区别就是…这是文化！这是艺术！是艺术你懂吗！
The exact... difference... is that... This is culture! This is art! It's art, you know!
没什么区别，就是虚拟现实。
There's really not much difference. It's basically just VR.
What do you guys do for a living?
我们隶属于「香薷幻娱」，是罗浮上最大的托蝶幻境制作工坊。我是个制片人，他是个导演。
We're affiliates of Elsholtzia Fantasy Entertainment, the greatest Butterfly Immersia production studio in all of Xianzhou. I'm the producer, and he's the director.
最大的工坊？星际和平娱乐已经将巨量的资本轰入幻戏界，建立起了「星和幻娱」，「香薷幻娱」已经完蛋了！

The largest production studio? The IPC has poured vast quantities of capital into the genre, creating their own Interastral Peace Entertainment subsidiary. Elsholtzia Fantasy Entertainment is done for — it's over!
抱歉，他有点情绪激动。…「星和幻娱」只是尝试在仙舟本土试验一种新的娱乐模式——「交感幻戏」，跟我们的传统幻戏不一样。

Sorry, he gets a bit emotional sometimes. Interastral Peace Entertainment is just trying to test out a new kind of homegrown entertainment format called "Empathic Immersia" — which is different from our traditional performing art.
「交感幻戏」会提供一个有多种故事走向的幻境。
Empathic Immersia will provide a dreamworld with multiple different story directions.
I know this. You mean "video games," right?
反正差不多就是那一套肤浅的东西吧……
Actually, it really does use quite advanced tech.
可惜武赫大导演嫌弃人家「交感幻戏不是艺术」。
It's a pity that our director Wu He is such a snob, saying that "Empathic Immersia is not a legitimate art form."
交感幻戏现在不是艺术，是因为还缺乏一个真正的艺术家。如果不是让公司那些目光短浅的人瞎搞，而是我来操刀，也许就能让「交感幻戏」成为真正的艺术……

Empathic Immersia cannot be an art form, because it lacks a true artist in its ranks. If I were contracted to do some Empathic Immersia instead of those suits at the company dilly-dallying, then maybe it could have become a true art form...
所以，现在交感幻戏又是艺术了？
So let me get this straight: Now Empathic Immersia is a legitimate art form again?
我只是担心也许会有一天，人们不会觉得「托蝶幻境」是仙舟狐人的文化遗产，而是公司的一项新发明…一想到这样的未来，我就觉得浑身战栗。

I'm just worried that perhaps there'll come a day when people won't remember that Butterfly Immersia is actually a cultural relic of Xianzhou foxians, but instead just think it's this product invented by the IPC... I can't help but shudder when I contemplate such a future...
你们接下来有什么打算？
So what are your next plans for the future, then?
接下来？继续说服武赫拍一些不会让我们饿死的幻戏。
Next? Keep on convincing Wu He to shoot a few immersia scenes so that we don't starve to death.
饿不死的，别这么短视。我要认真考虑一下要不要投身「交感幻戏」……
We're not starving to death. Don't be so short-sighted. I have to give serious consideration as to whether or not I decide to get into this Empathic Immersia thing...
我知道你是在说气话，但是…这未必不是一个方向。依我看，公司格局还是太小了。不断有新内容产出的「托蝶幻境」，不应该止步于娱乐。

I know you're angry, but... It's not necessarily taking things in a different direction. In my opinion, our company is too small scale. Butterfly Immersia has a constant stream of new content being released, and shouldn't stop at just entertainment.
他们的技术已经可以创造出一个规模庞大的虚拟生活社区，而不是个电子游戏。
Their technology is already capable of creating a large-scale VR community, rather than just some video game.
是我的话，我要创造一个十亿仙舟人愿意生活在其中的托蝶幻境！
If it were me, I'd be hungry to create a Butterfly Immersia in which billions of Xianzhou people would love to live!
你们这些制片，除了钱和人情之外还能不能多接触一点广阔的宇宙？
You producers... Besides money and favors, what else do you know about the ways of the world?
我说，你有没有想过银河中已经存在类似的东西了。比如说，某个叫朋克洛德的星球？
I'm telling you, have you ever considered that something like this already exists out there in the cosmos? Like, on a planet called Punklorde?
不打扰你们了。我没别的事了。
I won't bother you two. I've nothing else to say.
好呀，有时间的话一定要体验一次托蝶幻境。
Okay. Well, if you ever get the chance, you simply have to experience Butterfly Immersia at least once.
…现代传媒将每个具有审美能力的灵魂焚毁、煅烧、熔炼，然后铸造成一条「创意生产线」，再得意洋洋地对我们说：「创意生产线不需要创意」！

...Modern media breaks down, pulverizes, and distills every soul capable of aesthetic beauty into a "creative assembly line" — then has the cheek to turn around and tell us "The creative assembly line doesn't need any more creativity"!
可是谁掌握了创造艺术的资源，谁就掌握了对艺术的话语权…嗯？先停一下…你又是有什么事要找我们吗？
But whoever has the resources to create art also has the right to create art... Uh... Hold on a minute... Are you looking for us? What's up?
……我、我当然知道！但，朋克洛德没有可验证的盈利模式！
...I, I... of course I know! But, Punklorde hasn't validated a profitable business model yet!
嗤，因为在那里，接入元域是免费的。
Pah! Because there, it's free to access the metafield.
你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?
注意到了啊…刚才还和南洁讨论来着。建木重新长出来以前，想拍摄相关内容就必须花钱做特效……
I sure did... I was just chatting with Nanjie about it. Before it started growing, we had to spend budget on visual effects if we wanted to shoot that...
但现在我们可以实拍了，效果又好又能节约成本。
But now we can shoot the real thing — the effects are brilliant and we also save on our bottom line.
可是这大概要请相关部门允许我们去那边拍幻戏吧…听起来就要扯皮很久。
However, we'll probably need permits from all the relevant departments before we can shoot immersia scenes there... And we'll probably have to wrangle with that for far too long.
这种向上公关的麻烦事，不就是制片人的工作吗？
Isn't this public relations hassle exactly the kind of thing a producer does?
合着压力又给到我这边了是吧…不过也好，我确实想在建木上面拍一部武侠幻戏，就叫《决战建木之巅》怎么样？

Passing all the pressure of this partnership over to me once again... But it's cool. I'm actually keen to shoot a martial arts immersia on top of the Ambrosial Arbor. We can call it "Treetop Death Match: Arbor Awakened." Sounds awesome, right?
建木的事你们听说了吗？
Have you guys heard about what happened to the Ambrosial Arbor?
你是说建木不再生发的事吗？早就知道了啊，南洁还劝我趁热度在火速拍几部呢。
Are you talking about the fact that the Ambrosial Arbor no longer sprouts? That's old news to me. Nanjie even advised me to make some immersias about it while it is still a hot topic.
这种机会可不多见，趁大家现在还在念叨这事，可以多编排几部，自带热度还省下不少宣发的费用呢。
Such a great opportunity is hard to come by! You should make immersias about it when the topic is still the talk of the town. In this way, you don't even need to spend much on promotions.
我是觉得没什么创作的必要，我们一是不知道内情，二是又申请不到实地拍摄的机会，牵强附会的东西真没人爱看。
I don't think it's a good idea. Firstly, we don't know the inside story. Secondly, we won't have the chance to shoot on-site. No one would like to watch such contrived stuff.
思路打开点，说建木未必要真到建木跟前去拍，可以拍点地衡司录事啊云骑啊他们的视角，搞多点打戏和特效，渲染得紧张些就行了。

Don't be so rigid. An immersia about the Ambrosial Arbor doesn't have to include scenes of the real tree. We can film it from the perspectives of the clerks and Cloud Knights from the Realm-Keeping Commission. Just throw in some action scenes and special effects to create tension, and the immersia will do fine.
那这顶多算《建木风云：前传》，故事都没讲完呢。
If that's the case, the title of the immersia should be Legend of Ambrosial Arbor: Prequel, since the story is only told halfway.
接下来可以再出一部《密探零零幺》，就说神策府派了一位高手前去调查建木，路上却遇到了几位不着调的人……
Next, we can release one titled Agent 001 about an agent from the Seat of Divine Foresight who runs into some troublemakers on his way to investigate the Ambrosial Arbor...
闹出了些不大不小的笑话，最后发现建木的事本身是一场乌龙。整一个合家欢，大家都爱看。
Some funny incidents take place along the way. In the end, everyone realizes the Ambrosial Arbor crisis is nothing but a misunderstanding. It will be a comedy and a crowd-pleaser.
…算了，你压根就不懂幻戏。我就不该指望你的……
...Forget it. You know nothing about immersias...
这位客人，要买点什么吗…嗯？看您的穿着打扮，既不像囚犯也不像狱卒…稀客啊！
Would you like to buy something, dear customer...? From the way you dress, you don't seem to be a prisoner or a guard... A rare sight, indeed!
客人？这称呼是从何说起啊…
哈哈，看来您确实不太了解我们集团。在这幽囚狱中，人人都是我的客人！
Haha, looks like you're not familiar with our group. In The Shackling Prison, everyone's my customer!
怎么幽囚狱里还有人开店？
Someone opened a shop in The Shackling Prison?
哈哈，看来您确实不太了解我们集团。犯人也是人啊，有人的地方就有需求，有需求的地方就有生意。我们集团的使命就是让幽囚狱没有难做的生意。

Haha, looks like you're not familiar with our group. Prisoners are people too. Where there are people, there would be needs, and needs drive business. Our group's mission is to ensure you can do every sort of business in The Shackling Prison.
忘了自我介绍了，我是阿合马铁窗集团首席执行官——阿合马。您也可以叫我马老板或者老马。
Apologies, I forgot to introduce myself. I'm Arma, chief executive of the Arma Correctional Group. You can also call me boss or shopkeep.
我们集团在幽囚狱经营多年，生产了多款畅销全狱的爆款产品，比如这瓶「铁窗牌沐浴露」，不仅有除垢杀菌的功效，还能保持全身的凉爽舒适......

Our group has been operating in The Shackling Prison for many years. We've produced many bestsellers that are popular throughout the prison, such as this Arma Correctional Body Wash. Not only does it remove grime and kill germs, but it also leaves the body feeling cool and refreshed...
不过，看您这打扮，应该是其他世界派来幽囚狱视察访问的贵客吧？
But, looking at how you're dressed, you must be a distinguished guest from another world sent here to inspect The Shackling Prison?
像您这样的贵客，八成看不上我们集团这些粗制滥造的产品…但监狱里由囚犯们满怀匠心制作的产品，您在其他世界可见不着！
A guest with your esteem probably won't like our group's shoddy products... But we do have products crafted with our prisoners' full ingenuity. You won't find these anywhere else!
不如随便买点什么吧！无论作为旅行纪念品，还是带回家作为伴手礼，都绝对倍儿有面子！
Why not buy something as a souvenir for yourself or a family member? I guarantee it'll be something that raises your prestige back home!
哦对了，我们不收现金——毕竟收了我也用不了。幽囚狱里的硬通货是「奇巧零食」，您拿这个跟我交换就好。
By the way, we don't accept cash here. We can't spend them anyway. The common currency in The Shackling Prison is Trick Snacks, so you can use that to buy things from me.
怎么样？阿合马铁窗集团有什么能为您服务的吗？
How is it? How can the Arma Correctional Group be of service?
I'd like to ask you something.
请您尽管问吧！为客人答疑解惑也是我应尽的义务。
Ask anything you like! Answering customers' questions is also part of my duties.
哎…步离人还能有什么罪啊？「战争罪」呗…但我事先声明啊！我手上可没有过什么血债！
*sigh* What else can a borisin be accused of? War crimes! But let me be clear! I don't have any blood on my hands!
我从小就不喜欢打架，只喜欢做买卖…整个猎群都觉得我是个可悲的笑话，我爹也以我为耻。
I've never enjoyed fighting since young. I only like business... The whole pack thought I was pathetic. Even my father thought I was an embarrassment.
后来有一次，猎群出去劫掠商队时，我爹就把我塞进了兽舰，想让我「手上沾点血，成为一个真正的男人！」
One day while the pack was out looting a caravan, my father forced me onto a beast ship so I would "stain my hands with blood and become a real man!"
结果我还没来得及做什么坏事呢，那艘兽舰就被击落了…醒来的时候，我已经成了幽囚狱里的战犯，这一关就是几百年。
Before I could do anything bad, the beast ship was shot down. By the time I woke up, I was already a war criminal in The Shackling Prison. It's been hundreds of years since then.
哎！我若是当初投胎在仙舟，现在高低是个优秀企业家！
*sigh* If only I had been born on board the Xianzhou! I would be a successful entrepreneur by now!
怎么想到在幽囚狱做生意？
What made you start doing business in The Shackling Prison?
说来也是机缘巧合，刚进来的时候我也一度迷茫，感觉整个人生就要荒废在这个鬼地方了。那愁的我是整日挠头啊，耳朵上的毛都被我挠秃了。

It was purely by chance. When I first arrived, I was totally lost. I thought I was going to rot away here for the rest of my life. I would scratch my head in frustration every day until the fur between my ears fell out.
后来，一只机巧鸟飞到了我的牢房前，扑腾着扔下了几包奇巧零食，说要购买我挠下来的毛。
Then one day, a cycrane flew to my cell and dropped a few packets of Trick Snacks on the floor. It said it wanted to buy the fur I had scratched off.
我问它，要我的毛干什么用？它说步离人毛发特别结实，用它们搓出来的绳子，在这幽囚狱里可是千金难求的好东西。
I asked what it wanted to do with my fur. It said that borisin fur is known to be durable, and that rope made from borisin fur is a rarity in The Shackling Prison.
那一刻我突然意识到，原来万物皆有自己的价值。
That was when I realized everything in this world has its worth.
不久后，我就和这位白鸟老弟一起成立了「阿合马铁窗集团」，专注于用有限的资源为客户提供无限的服务！
Not long after, I established the Arma Correctional Group with Shiratori. Our goal is to provide limitless service to our customers when we only have limited resources!
The prison guards let you do it?
嘿嘿，明面上当然是不允许我们搞这些活动的，但私底下，赤衣大人和我们约法三章，只要听话、守规矩，就默许我们搞一点「小买卖」。

Heh heh! Of course they can't openly allow us to conduct business, but Madam Chiyi made a private deal with us. As long as we follow the rules and obey instructions, she'll turn a blind eye to our "little venture."
按她的说法：「让你们这些无所事事的囚犯们有点事做，也省得你们惹是生非、打架斗殴。」不过我本来也不喜欢打架啦～
As she puts it: "Giving bored prisoners something to do will keep your noses clean and prevent you from starting fights." Of course, I didn't enjoy fighting to begin with.
Borisin know how to do business?
客人您这话说得，好像我们是一群野人似的。这做生意无非讲究一个低买高卖...哦不，互惠互利，有什么难的？
You seem to be implying we're uncivilized, dear customer. Doing business is all about buying low and selling high — I mean, mutual profit. It's not that difficult.
虽然我本来就不喜欢打架啦…但即使是猎群里的那些暴力份子，也时不时地要去和其他猎群、丰饶民，甚至泯灭帮交换些资源的。
I may not enjoy fighting, but even the more violent members of the pack have to go trade resources with other packs' members, other Denizens of Abundance, or the Annihilation Gang.
客人，刻板印象可要不得呀～
It's not good to believe in stereotypes, dear customer.
Where do you get your goods?
幽囚狱的情况您也知道，别说从外边进货，就是连个苍蝇都飞不进来。所以我们集团的商品全部是就地取材，纯手工打造。

I'm sure you're aware of the situation in The Shackling Prison. Even a fly can't make its way inside, so we have to forget about importing goods. All the products from our group are sourced from local materials and handcrafted.
像吃剩的饭、掉下来的牙、甚至是身上搓下来的泥...这些外面人眼里的垃圾，在我这可都是珍贵的原材料。
Things like leftover food, teeth that fell out, or dirt scraped off someone's body... They may look like trash to an outsider, but they're all precious raw materials to us.
您是不知道，我为了把脱落的毛发编织成绳子，付出了多少时间和心血！这东西要是放在外面，那不得卖个艺术品的价格啊！
You don't know how much time and effort I've put into weaving my shed hairs into a rope! If I were selling it outside, it would be sold as a piece of art!
不过最近这市场大环境是一天比一天差了！本来我们集团前景一片光明，不仅交易额节节攀升，集团规模也扩大到了三人……

However, the general market conditions have been on the down lately! Originally, our group had a bright future. Our transaction volume was rising, and we even expanded operations and recruited a third person...
但自从战首越狱后，幽囚狱也加强了管理，集团的销售渠道遭遇了重大打击…赤衣大人让我们最近都消停点，不要在这种时候给十王上眼药。哎，难受。

But ever since the Warhead escaped from the prison, management of The Shackling Prison has become stricter. Most of the group's sales channels suffered a major blow... Madam Chiyi also instructed us to lie low for now and not cause trouble for the Ten Lords. *sigh* How miserable.
不过我相信只要我们集团内部团结一心，持续为客户提供优质的服务，就肯定能挺过这个寒冬！
But I believe that as long as our group stays united and continues to provide premium service to our customers, we'll definitely be able to brave through these harsh circumstances!
感觉你也没做什么坏事。
It feels like you didn't do anything bad.
当初十王司审判我的时候，我也是这么说的啊！可惜判官们说了，无论有何苦衷，参与侵略战争就是错的，必须要为此付出代价。

I said the exact same thing when I was sentenced by the Ten-Lords Commission! But the judges said that no matter what reasons I had, participating in an invasion was wrong, and I had to pay the price.
但那几位判官还是很讲道理的，人家和我说了，只要我能像镜流大人一样立下「十三奇功」，就能给我安排特殊待遇，每周离开幽囚狱，撂地摆摊一天！

However, the judges were quite reasonable. They told me that if I could complete "<unbreak>13</unbreak> Outstanding Accolades" like Madam Jingliu, they would grant me special arrangements and allow me to leave The Shackling Prison once every week to set up shop outside!
Isn't that asking for too much?
我乍一听也觉得太难了，但判官们给我指了条明路——协助十王司工作1次，就算1次「小功」。完成<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「小功」，可以合成1次「中功」。

At first, I too thought that it was way too difficult, but the judges gave me a clear direction — each time I help the Ten-Lords Commission, it would be considered 1 "Small Merit." After accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Small Merits," they can be combined into a "Moderate Merit."
拥有<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「中功」以后，就可以合成1次「大功」；拥有<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「大功」以后，就可以合成1次「奇功」！

After accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Moderate Merits," they can then be combined into a "Huge Merit," and after accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Huge Merits," they can be combined into an "Outstanding Accolade"!
只要攒满了这<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「奇功」，我每周就能离开一次幽囚狱了！唉呀妈呀，越想越激动！太温情了，十王司！

Once I accumulate <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Outstanding Accolades," I'll be able to leave The Shackling Prison once every week! Darn, I'm feeling excited just thinking about it! The Ten-Lords Commission is truly compassionate!
十王慈怀！数学从未如此温情！
Oh merciful Ten Lords! Math has never felt so heartwarming before!
So how many have you accumulated so far?
截至目前，我已经攒了7次「小功」了！
As of today, I have already collected 7 "Small Merits"!
之前越狱事件发生时，我不但自己没参与越狱，还号召集团的两位董事不参与越狱…十王慈怀！判官们说这算3件「小功」，多温暖人心啊！

During the previous prison break incident, not only did I not participate in it, I even convinced our group's two directors to not participate as well... Oh, merciful Ten Lords! The judges said that it would be considered 3 "Small Merits." It really warmed my heart!
I still have something to do, so I'll come back another time.
客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!
I have things to take care of. I'll come back again another time.
客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!
呦，客人您又来了！阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
Welcome back, dear customer! The Arma Correctional Group is at your service!
客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!
之前我跟净砚提过，是不是想办法好好宣传一下地衡司公廨到底有多能干。但是净砚给我列了一下最近小公廨处理的庶务，实在是没有什么可宣传的。

I raised this with Jingyan before, whether we should be better at promoting how good the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery is at what it does. But she gave me a list of all the things we've done recently, and there isn't really anything to be proud of.
等到我们破获了十王司都没能处理好的大案要案时，我得让全长乐天的人都知道，我们地衡司有多了不起…目前这个阶段就低调一些好了。

Once we crack a major case that even the Ten-Lords Commission can't solve, then I'll let the whole Exalting Sanctum know about how great the Realm-Keeping Commission is... Until then, we'll keep things on the down-low.
透露出生活气息的小物件。
Small ornaments that make this place feel alive.
生活气息…别说了，我之前也有这样的考虑。
Make the place feel alive... Actually, I've thought about that.
我这个人喜欢畅饮仙醪玉露，之前在公廨里藏了两瓶「柳林琼浆」，被净砚执事给扔掉了。她说这里是公务空间，被老百姓见着了有失威严。

I'm a big fan of alcoholic nectar and once stashed two bottles of Nectar of Willow Woods at the Chancery, but Officer Jingyan threw them out. She said this is the workplace and it would be undignified if anyone found out.
我这人还喜欢狐人戏伶，在我这办公桌上放了些美女照片，用来振作精神好好努力工作，也被净砚执事给没收了。她说这里是公务空间，这些东西有伤风化。

I also like pretty foxian actresses, so I've put up a couple of their pictures on my desk to perk up my spirits. But Officer Jingyan confiscated those too. She said this is the workplace and those images are indecent.
哎，这地衡司就只有放在地上的快递箱还有点儿生活气息了。
*sigh* The only way the Realm-Keeping Commission feels alive is through all the courier parcels on the ground.
真正在做事的地衡司执事。
A Realm-Keeping Commission Officer who is actually productive at work.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你这话就说得不对了，至少净砚执事是在好好做事的。只要净砚执事还在这里一天，这里就还是名副其实的地衡司。
{F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, that remark is uncalled for. At least Officer Jingyan is doing her work. As long as Officer Jingyan is here, then the Realm-Keeping Commission lives up to its name.
松烟那小子，虽然性格懒散，但是很聪明，我很看好他今后的发展。
That Songyan kid may be lazy, but he's smart. I have high hopes for his future.
当然了，这长乐天要是真出了什么事，我其实也是非常可靠的执事官大叔。
Naturally, if anything actually happens to Exalting Sanctum, you'll find me to be an extremely reliable officer.
现在是考虑这个的时候吗？
Is now really the time to be thinking about that?
对啊，就算我在这里想破头也想不出来。不如下班之后玩几轮帝垣琼玉，边打牌的时候边考虑。
Yeah, I can't figure it out even if I rack my brain. I think I'll play a few rounds of Celestial Jade after work and think it through then.
好了，说回正事吧，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你来找我是做什么的呀？
Alright, let's get down to business. {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, what do you want?
有些事情想要咨询一下。
I've got a few things to ask.
要是太难的，我也回答不上，你去问问净砚执事吧。
I won't be able to answer if it's too difficult. You can ask Officer Jingyan instead.
执事官每天的工作都是什么呀？
What does an officer do every day?
执事官是公廨中的领导者，负责统筹这个辖区的内勤外务——这都是明面上的说法，实际上主要工作是去地衡司总务处开会，传达会议思想。

Officers are managers in the Chancery, responsible for coordinating all local internal and external affairs — that's the surface definition. Actually, the main job involves going to meetings at the Realm-Keeping Commission's General Affairs Office and spreading their ideas.
其实我不是很擅长做这些文职工作。以前我是景元将军手下直属的一个云骑军小队长，没想到吧？让我舞刀弄枪可以，我实在不擅长开会。

Honestly, I'm not very good at these clerical jobs. I used to be the leader for a Cloud Knight squad that reported directly to General Jing Yuan. Are you surprised? I'm like a fish in water when it comes to weaponry. Not when it comes to office meetings.
不过啊，长期征战的士兵比老百姓更容易引发魔阴身，好像是因为什么创伤后应激啥啥啥，我也不记得了，总之就是很危险。
However, veteran soldiers are far more likely than everyday citizens to be stricken with mara — something to do with post-traumatic stress. Anyways, it's very dangerous.
后来，我就被调任到这里来做执事官了。这里虽说没有什么生死别离，但是工作也不算轻松。虽然我不知道自己在忙什么，总之就是很忙。
So they transferred me here to be an officer. There's no life-or-death situations here, but it ain't easy work. I don't know exactly what I'm doing, but I know that I'm busy.
净砚执事好像很能干啊？
她是我见过最全能的姑娘了。无论是什么工作，只要交给她，她都能顺利完成。
She's the most capable girl I've ever met. No matter what the job is, she will get it done.
我以前还在云骑军的时候，她就在做我的下属，后来我调任地衡司了，她就跟着过来了。我把能教给她的都教给她了，她还是没有离开……

She used to be my subordinate back when I was still in the Cloud Knights, and she came over with me when I was transferred to the Realm-Keeping Commission. I taught her everything I knew, but for some reason she chose to stick around...
有时候我也会想，地衡司执事的工作是不是耽误了人家姑娘的大好前程。不过，事到如今我也说不出口，这地衡司公廨已经少不了她了。

Sometimes I even wonder whether this work at the Realm-Keeping Commission is hindering her future career prospects. But I've never actually said it out loud, and she's become an indispensable part of the Chancery.
松烟执事好像很没干劲？
Officer Songyan doesn't seem very motivated?
那小子也不是一直这样的，据说他以前是总务处的王牌精英。因为某次失误之后一蹶不振，就被调任到我们这个辖区来了。

That little punk wasn't always this way. Apparently he used to be an elite at the General Affairs Office — but he became completely demotivated after some kind of setback, and was transferred to our jurisdiction.
他这样游手好闲，要是在别的工作环境上，也许就会被排挤了吧？但是我想再给他些时间，他只是暂时还没有准备好。
At any other workplace, he'd be cast aside for being so lazy, right? But I want to give him some more time. He's just not ready yet.
我们这些局外人没法真正理解他，但是至少能给他「足够的时间」，几十年也好，几百年也好，这就是长生社会少有的好处了。
We have no way of really understanding him, but at least we can give him "enough time," be it decades or centuries. That's one of the few great benefits of living in a long-life society.
当然，我不觉得时间能解决一切问题，如果他自己不做出改变，那么他要面对的问题是不会有改观的。
Of course, I don't think time alone is enough to solve every problem. If he doesn't make changes for himself, then the problems he's facing will never change either.
好呀，我正好得空看看今天的新闻，你去忙吧。
Alright, it's time for me to watch the news anyway. See you later.
要是总务处能少开一些没意义的会，公廨这边的工作肯定会更轻松的…哦，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，你来这里找我是做什么的呀？
Things would be a lot easier around here if the General Affairs Office stopped holding so many pointless meetings... So, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, how can I help you today?
这小小地衡司公廨里，我总觉得还是少了些什么，但又想不起是什么了。你来得正好，帮我来做下排除法，说说看，你觉得这里到底少了些什么？

I always feel like we're missing something here at the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery, but I can never remember what. You've come at just the right time — help me rule out some possibilities. Say, tell me, what do you think our office is missing?
彰显地衡司工作的宣传物料。
Promo materials showcasing the work of the Realm-Keeping Commission.
The disaster is over, are you guys still busy?
托你的福，没有之前那么忙了。但我们毕竟是地衡司，司掌天上天下所有屁大的事，不忙是不可能的。
Thanks to you, we aren't as busy as before. However, as the Realm-Keeping Commission manages basically everything in both the sky and the world, we can never be idle.
组织灾后重建、追捕药王残党、清算趁火打劫…唉，灾难虽然结束了，但该干的工作还没干完啊……
Organizing post-disaster reconstruction, pursuing the Sanctus Medicus remnants, and arresting looters... Alas, there is plenty of work to be done despite the disaster being over...
好在净砚比较能干，松烟…也还行吧，让我现在不至于焦头烂额。
The good thing is that Jingyan is very capable, and Songyan is... doing okay. Thanks to their help, I'm not overwhelmed by the workload.
估计以后还会有不少事情劳烦你帮忙…到时候请千万不要推脱啊，提前向你道谢了。
I think I'll need a lot more help from you in the future... Don't turn me down when the time comes. Let me thank you in advance.
I'd like to ask you something.
请您尽管问吧！为客人答疑解惑也是我应尽的义务。
Ask anything you like! Answering customers' questions is also part of my duties.
哎…步离人还能有什么罪啊？「战争罪」呗…但我事先声明啊！我手上可没有过什么血债！
*sigh* What else can a borisin be accused of? War crimes! But let me be clear! I don't have any blood on my hands!
我从小就不喜欢打架，只喜欢做买卖…整个猎群都觉得我是个可悲的笑话，我爹也以我为耻。
I've never enjoyed fighting since young. I only like business... The whole pack thought I was pathetic. Even my father thought I was an embarrassment.
后来有一次，猎群出去劫掠商队时，我爹就把我塞进了兽舰，想让我「手上沾点血，成为一个真正的男人！」
One day while the pack was out looting a caravan, my father forced me onto a beast ship so I would "stain my hands with blood and become a real man!"
结果我还没来得及做什么坏事呢，那艘兽舰就被击落了…醒来的时候，我已经成了幽囚狱里的战犯，这一关就是几百年。
Before I could do anything bad, the beast ship was shot down. By the time I woke up, I was already a war criminal in The Shackling Prison. It's been hundreds of years since then.
哎！我若是当初投胎在仙舟，现在高低是个优秀企业家！
*sigh* If only I had been born on board the Xianzhou! I would be a successful entrepreneur by now!
怎么想到在幽囚狱做生意？
What made you start doing business in The Shackling Prison?
说来也是机缘巧合，刚进来的时候我也一度迷茫，感觉整个人生就要荒废在这个鬼地方了。那愁的我是整日挠头啊，耳朵上的毛都被我挠秃了。

It was purely by chance. When I first arrived, I was totally lost. I thought I was going to rot away here for the rest of my life. I would scratch my head in frustration every day until the fur between my ears fell out.
后来，一只机巧鸟飞到了我的牢房前，扑腾着扔下了几包奇巧零食，说要购买我挠下来的毛。
Then one day, a cycrane flew to my cell and dropped a few packets of Trick Snacks on the floor. It said it wanted to buy the fur I had scratched off.
我问它，要我的毛干什么用？它说步离人毛发特别结实，用它们搓出来的绳子，在这幽囚狱里可是千金难求的好东西。
I asked what it wanted to do with my fur. It said that borisin fur is known to be durable, and that rope made from borisin fur is a rarity in The Shackling Prison.
那一刻我突然意识到，原来万物皆有自己的价值。
That was when I realized everything in this world has its worth.
不久后，我就和这位白鸟老弟一起成立了「阿合马铁窗集团」，专注于用有限的资源为客户提供无限的服务！
Not long after, I established the Arma Correctional Group with Shiratori. Our goal is to provide limitless service to our customers when we only have limited resources!
The prison guards let you do it?
嘿嘿，明面上当然是不允许我们搞这些活动的，但私底下，赤衣大人和我们约法三章，只要听话、守规矩，就默许我们搞一点「小买卖」。

Heh heh! Of course they can't openly allow us to conduct business, but Madam Chiyi made a private deal with us. As long as we follow the rules and obey instructions, she'll turn a blind eye to our "little venture."
按她的说法：「让你们这些无所事事的囚犯们有点事做，也省得你们惹是生非、打架斗殴。」不过我本来也不喜欢打架啦～
As she puts it: "Giving bored prisoners something to do will keep your noses clean and prevent you from starting fights." Of course, I didn't enjoy fighting to begin with.
Borisin know how to do business?
客人您这话说得，好像我们是一群野人似的。这做生意无非讲究一个低买高卖...哦不，互惠互利，有什么难的？
You seem to be implying we're uncivilized, dear customer. Doing business is all about buying low and selling high — I mean, mutual profit. It's not that difficult.
虽然我本来就不喜欢打架啦…但即使是猎群里的那些暴力分子，也时不时地要去和其他猎群、丰饶民，甚至泯灭帮交换些资源的。
I may not enjoy fighting, but even the more violent members of the pack have to go trade resources with other packs' members, other Denizens of Abundance, or the Annihilation Gang.
客人，刻板印象可要不得呀～
It's not good to believe in stereotypes, dear customer.
Where do you get your goods?
幽囚狱的情况您也知道，别说从外边进货，就是连个苍蝇都飞不进来。所以我们集团的商品全部是就地取材，纯手工打造。

I'm sure you're aware of the situation in The Shackling Prison. Even a fly can't make its way inside, so we have to forget about importing goods. All the products from our group are sourced from local materials and handcrafted.
像吃剩的饭、掉下来的牙、甚至是身上搓下来的泥...这些外面人眼里的垃圾，在我这可都是珍贵的原材料。
Things like leftover food, teeth that fell out, or dirt scraped off someone's body... They may look like trash to an outsider, but they're all precious raw materials to us.
您是不知道，我为了把脱落的毛发编织成绳子，付出了多少时间和心血！这东西要是放在外面，那不得卖个艺术品的价格啊！
You don't know how much time and effort I've put into weaving my shed hairs into a rope! If I were selling it outside, it would be sold as a piece of art!
不过最近这市场大环境是一天比一天差了！本来我们集团前景一片光明，不仅交易额节节攀升，集团规模也扩大到了三人……

However, the general market conditions have been on the down lately! Originally, our group had a bright future. Our transaction volume was rising, and we even expanded operations and recruited a third person...
但自从战首越狱后，幽囚狱也加强了管理，集团的销售渠道遭遇了重大打击…赤衣大人让我们最近都消停点，不要在这种时候给十王上眼药。哎，难受。

But ever since the Warhead escaped from the prison, management of The Shackling Prison has become stricter. Most of the group's sales channels suffered a major blow... Madam Chiyi also instructed us to lie low for now and not cause trouble for the Ten Lords. *sigh* How miserable.
不过我相信只要我们集团内部团结一心，持续为客户提供优质的服务，就肯定能挺过这个寒冬！
But I believe that as long as our group stays united and continues to provide premium service to our customers, we'll definitely be able to brave through these harsh circumstances!
感觉你也没做什么坏事。
It feels like you didn't do anything bad.
当初十王司审判我的时候，我也是这么说的啊！可惜判官们说了，无论有何苦衷，参与侵略战争就是错的，必须要为此付出代价。

I said the exact same thing when I was sentenced by the Ten-Lords Commission! But the judges said that no matter what reasons I had, participating in an invasion was wrong, and I had to pay the price.
但那几位判官还是很讲道理的，人家和我说了，只要我能像镜流大人一样立下「十三奇功」，就能给我安排特殊待遇，每周离开幽囚狱，撂地摆摊一天！

However, the judges were quite reasonable. They told me that if I could complete "<unbreak>13</unbreak> Outstanding Accolades" like Madam Jingliu, they would grant me special arrangements and allow me to leave The Shackling Prison once every week to set up shop outside!
Isn't that asking for too much?
我乍一听也觉得太难了，但判官们给我指了条明路——协助十王司工作1次，就算1次「小功」。完成<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「小功」，可以合成1次「中功」。

At first, I too thought that it was way too difficult, but the judges gave me a clear direction — each time I help the Ten-Lords Commission, it would be considered 1 "Small Merit." After accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Small Merits," they can be combined into a "Moderate Merit."
拥有<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「中功」以后，就可以合成1次「大功」；拥有<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「大功」以后，就可以合成1次「奇功」！

After accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Moderate Merits," they can then be combined into a "Huge Merit," and after accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Huge Merits," they can be combined into an "Outstanding Accolade"!
只要攒满了这<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「奇功」，我每周就能离开一次幽囚狱了！唉呀妈呀，越想越激动！太温情了，十王司！

Once I accumulate <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Outstanding Accolades," I'll be able to leave The Shackling Prison once every week! Darn, I'm feeling excited just thinking about it! The Ten-Lords Commission is truly compassionate!
十王慈怀！数学从未如此温情！
Oh merciful Ten Lords! Math has never felt so heartwarming before!
So how many have you accumulated so far?
截至目前，我已经攒了7次「小功」了！
As of today, I have already collected 7 "Small Merits"!
之前越狱事件发生时，我不但自己没参与越狱，还号召集团的两位董事不参与越狱…十王慈怀！判官们说这算3件「小功」，多温暖人心啊！

During the previous prison break incident, not only did I not participate in it, I even convinced our group's two directors to not participate as well... Oh, merciful Ten Lords! The judges said that it would be considered 3 "Small Merits." It really warmed my heart!
I still have something to do, so I'll come back another time.
客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!
I have things to take care of. I'll come back again another time.
客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!
Martial arts and fitness! Come learn all about it!
这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，健身武术了解一下！…来，你先瞅瞅我们这份传单，我再和您详细讲讲。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, wanna learn about martial arts and fitness? Come take a look at our flyer, and I'll fill you in on all the details.
我不需要，请留给别人吧。
No thanks, please keep it for someone else.
没事没事，又不收钱。我保证很快就讲完的！
No worries, it's free anyway. I promise I'll make this really quick!
Alright, I'll keep this and you tell me about it.
好嘞！就猜到您很感兴趣！我保证很快就讲完的！
Awesome! I knew you'd be keen! I promise I'll make this really quick!
在下是长乐天形虎拳馆的教练——殊妙。我们形虎拳馆啊，专门针对化外民开设，师资力量罗浮第一，延年益寿经验丰富。学员们个个长命百岁、效果显著。

I'm the coach at Exalting Sanctum's Tiger Boxing Gym, Shumiao. We're a custom boxing gym set up for Outworlders, and our coaches are the best on the Luofu with rich experience in immortality training. All our boxers are living out long lives and achieving incredible results.
我们老板说了，开这拳馆不为了赚钱，为的就是让星际间更为广大的旅客们都能接触到仙舟上长生不老的生活方式。
Our boss always says that he didn't open this gym to make money, but rather to let more interstellar travelers access the hyper-immortality way of life found aboard the Xianzhou Alliance.
现在是办理会员卡最好的时间，办理十年赠送五年，优惠力度令人震惊。怎么样，我现在就帮您登记一下？
There's never been a better time to sign up as a member. Just sign up for ten years, and get another five years for free. That's a crazy deal! How about I help you register with us right now?
这么实惠了还考虑什么呀！这位{F#女士}{M#先生}还有什么想知道的，尽管问！
At this price, what are you waiting for? C'mon, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, what else would you like to know? Just ask!
Your boxing gym only accepts Outworlders?
我知道{F#女士}{M#先生}您在担忧什么！您在怀疑我们是不是专门坑蒙拐骗外地人对吧？那您是多虑了。
I know what you're worried about, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! You're wondering, do these guys specialize in swindling Outworlders? I assure you that you're overthinking!
仙舟本地人办的卡都是两百年往上了，您和他们可没有办法比啊，咱这些优惠都是准备给仙舟化外民的。

Xianzhou people get membership cards that last them over <unbreak>200</unbreak> years. There's absolutely no comparison to be made here. These discounts are intended for Outworlders visiting Xianzhou.
再说了，别人不需要锻炼身体就能长命百岁，那就不是咱们的目标客户。您到仙舟罗浮上来，可不能空手而归呀。
In other words, Xianzhou people who can live for centuries without training are not our target market. When you come to the Xianzhou Luofu, you can't leave empty-handed.
来咱们这形虎拳馆练上十几年，保证您长命百岁！
Come to our Tiger Boxing Gym for a few decades, and I guarantee you'll live much longer!
你们不会收了钱之后跑路吧？
Are you just planning on running away with my money?
这是常有的误会，我们这是跟云骑军有合作的，可不敢随便跑路的。
A common misunderstanding. We're teamed up with the Cloud Knights, so we can't just run away from them.
经常有人质疑我们的收费模式，「你们都把钱收到十几年后了，这就是摆明了要跑路啊」，说得可难听了。
People often question our business model, saying horrible things like, "You're only taking ten-year-long subscriptions because you're planning on running away with everything."
很多人没有坚持几天，就再也没来过拳馆。比起担心拳馆跑路，不如多担心下自己到底有没有持之以恒的决心。

Lots of people throw in the towel and don't bother coming back after a few times. Rather than worrying about the boxing gym, they should be worrying about whether they've got the perseverance to see things through.
为了让学员们坚持下去，拳馆才精心设计这样的收费模式。你想，你要是花了钱，却不来锻炼身体，你就会觉得自己很亏，你就会想来锻炼身体。

Our business model is designed to help gym-goers stick to the plan. Think about it — if you spend money without exercising, you'll feel like you're getting ripped off. And you'll come to the gym for training.
拳馆衷心希望您能来，没人会盼着您白花钱的。
We sincerely hope that you can come and join us. Nobody wants to see you waste your money.
只要锻炼就能活上几百岁？
Is it possible to live for several hundred years through training alone?
可不是嘛，您想啊，这仙舟上的人为何如此长寿？
Sure! Think about it, why do the people aboard the Xianzhou ship live for so long?
不会是因为练习拳法吧？
Is it because they practice boxing?
您答对了，很多仙舟人自己根本就没有意识到健身拳法的重要性。
That's right. Many Xianzhou people don't even realize the importance of boxing exercises.
先天的体质固然重要，这后天的巩固那更是重要啊！
Your natural constitution is important, yes. But the way you're nurtured is far more important!
我见过很多仙舟人太懒惰了，疏于锻炼，没有保持住健康的心态，招致魔阴身提前。只要是每日坚持锻炼，就能多出几千年岁月。

I've met loads of lazy people aboard Xianzhou who neglect exercise and don't maintain a healthy attitude. They end up getting early-onset mara-struck sickness. So long as you keep up your daily practice, you can live for thousands of years more.
您看，我说这锻炼身体就能长寿也没有过度夸张的成分对吧？
See, I told you exercising can lead to extreme longevity without getting fast and loose with any facts, right?
Forget about it. Maybe next time.
好嘞！那等您感兴趣了再来看看，我会等您，不过这身体可不会等您啊！
Okay! Take a look whenever you're interested, and I'll be waiting for you. But this body of yours will wait for nothing!
哎呀，您来啦！这次有想好办理会员卡了嘛？
Ah, there you are! Are you ready to sign up for a membership yet?
你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?
这么大一棵建木长起来了，我能注意不到吗？
How could I miss it — the thing's absolutely enormous!
当时我还在外面推广健身武术课程呢，我记得当时是一个化外民老太太，我给她讲，练习咱们这套拳法，可以「枯木逢春」！
I was out on the streets promoting our gym when it happened, and I remember chatting with this old outworlder lady. I told her to train with us for a new lease on life, "just like a tree's regrowth"!
老太太不懂什么是「枯木逢春」，结果「咣」！整棵建木就长起来了，我给那老太太说，「您瞧，这就叫枯木逢春」。
She didn't really get what I meant, when suddenly: "Boing" — the whole Ambrosial Arbor had started actively growing. I pointed and told her, "See — just like a tree's regrowth"!
…不过话分两头说啊，仙舟上的人都知道，这建木再生准不是什么好事，希望我那位在鳞渊境的朋友平安无事。

...But let's break it down into two parts. Everyone in Xianzhou knows that the Ambrosial Arbor's regrowth is definitely not a good thing. I hope my friends down at Scalegorge Waterscape are all doing okay.
Has business been going well lately?
哎呀，多亏了你们几位英雄，现在金人巷越来越繁荣了，我的生意也越来越好了。
Because of you guys, the Aurum Alley has become so much more prosperous, and my business is doing better, too.
说来也讽刺，建木生发之后，罗浮的治安大不如前，倒是让我的拳馆愈发红火。毕竟有点武功傍身，行走江湖也安全些～

Ironically, after the Ambrosial Arbor's growth, the Luofu became a more dangerous place. This situation made my boxing gym more popular than ever. After all, it's always best to know some moves that can help you defend yourself.
您平常也是行走江湖的，应该也免不了和人发生点冲突…以后有机会的话，来我们拳馆练练吧！我给您优惠！
Being out there in the world like you are, you're sure to bump heads with people from time to time... Why don't you drop by my boxing gym and have a session someday? I'll give you a discount!
…不对，我想了一下，我应该没什么能教您的…不如这样吧，以后有机会的话，来我们拳馆代课吧！我给您开高薪！
...Hold on. It suddenly occurs to me that I have nothing to teach you... How about you give a lesson at my boxing gym? I'll offer you great pay!
Why didn't he come by today?
难道…被调到其他辖区去了？
Unless... he's been transferred to another jurisdiction?
一位地衡司勤务。我们的人生本不该有交集，却因一段孽缘纠缠在了一起。
An orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. We never should've even met, but for an ill-fated moment that brought us together.
…不过我和那人可没有什么奇奇怪怪的关系啊，别误会。
...But don't get the wrong idea. We don't have anything strange going on between us.
Surely there's plenty more fish in the sea...
呸呸呸，这都什么乱七八糟的！我和那地衡司勤务可没有什么奇奇怪怪的关系啊，别误会。
Bah, what an absolute mess! There's nothing strange going on between that orderly and me, so don't get the wrong idea.
只是…我与那人已有许久未见，心中难免有些落寞。没了他，我的职业生涯、我的未来仿佛都变得灰暗了。
It's just... I haven't had a chance to see him for a long time, and I can't help but feel a little bit lonely. Without him, my career, my entire future feels... empty.
长此以往，我再出摊还有什么意思？可假使我不出摊，那便是彻底与他断了联系，恐怕此生再没有相见的机会……

If things keep on like this, what's the point of me showing up to work again? But then again, if I don't show up, I'll be cut off from him entirely and I'm afraid I'll never get the chance to see him again...
I want to ask you something...
你问吧。只是我心中有所惦念，未必能对答如流……
Go ahead. It's just that I'm a little distracted with matters of the heart, so I might take a moment to answer...
What do you do for a living?
我只不过是一介小贩罢了，平时就在这长乐天街巷中游走叫卖，若能见得人流交汇的好地方就席地而坐、摊售货物。
I'm just a lowly merchant who usually wanders the streets of Exalting Sanctum hawking my goods. Sometimes I'll sit down if I find a busy place and sell from there.
做我们这行当的都是自雇营生，本小利微，勉强能够吃着。每日进账没个定数，又得和地衡司斗智斗勇，还是很辛苦的。

We're all self-employed in this line of work, and I don't make much at all — just enough to eat. There's no fixed daily income, and we're always squabbling with the Realm-Keeping Commission for this and that. It's a tough life.
Why are you always squabbling with them about things?
这你或许有所不知——其实，在这长乐天行商是要申领牌照的，并非谁人都能来掺和一手。
You might not be aware of this — but you need a permit to sell goods in Exalting Sanctum. Not just anyone can do it.
地衡司虽然允许游商入市，但又规定商贩应在他们规划的位置经营，不得越界。至于划给我的那个位置嘛……
Despite the Realm-Keeping Commission allowing traveling traders like us, they regulate us to specified places and don't let us venture beyond. And as for the place they assigned me...
只能说冷清得很，平时抓个麻雀玩儿都绰绰有余。为了讨生活，我就必须主动出击，四处流窜，兜售我的宝贝了。
Well, it's so deserted that I even have time to feed the pigeons. I have to take the initiative and run all over the place just to make a living.
当然，这个过程中可不能被地衡司的人逮到。不然轻则罚款，重则吊销执照…那生意可就难做得很咯。
Naturally, I can't let the Realm-Keeping Commission catch me while I'm doing this. Otherwise I'll be fined if I'm lucky, or could even lose my license... And then it'll be even harder to do business.
哈哈，倒也有不少人这样问过我。可你也要明白，工作不是说换就换的。
Haha, everyone always asks me that. But you also have to understand that a job isn't something I have the luxury of changing.
虽然这仙舟洞天里长年风调雨顺，不必担心自然环境变化影响生意；但要是能讨到个铁饭碗，谁又乐意成天做这种活计呢？

The climate in the Xianzhou delves is great all year round, so there's no need to worry about the environment impacting business. But if you could find a stable and reliable job, then who'd want to risk doing this kind of work forever?
我这人倒也不是没考虑过转行。只可惜我脑子太笨，始终没能讨到好工作，不得已才来做了小贩。
So it's not that I haven't thought about changing industry one day. I'm just not smart enough to be able to get a good job. That's why I'm a merchant.
不过嘛…干了这么几百年，我倒觉得做个小贩也有滋有味了——智斗地衡司这种好事，也不是谁想做就能做的哩！
But... After all these centuries, I actually think it's fun to be a merchant — matching wits against the Realm-Keeping Commission like this. Not just anyone that can do this job, y'know!
你和那人到底是什么关系？
So what exactly is going on between you and him, then?
仙舟有句老话说得好哇——「棋逢对手，将遇良才」……
There's an old saying aboard Xianzhou, "A match in ability, is a match made in heaven"...
我和那位勤务斗智斗勇了两百年，却始终没能分出胜负…会产生惺惺相惜之情也是在所难免的。

I've been pitting my wits and courage against this orderly for over 2 centuries, but we've never been able to determine who the winner is... Growing to appreciate one another is nothing short of inevitable.
So what's the name of this young orderly, then?
He... I think his name is Guangda.
其实他本不负责这片辖区的事务，两百年前不知因何种原因被调来此地，我们的缘分也就此开始……
Actually, he never used to work in this jurisdiction. He was transferred over for some reason about <unbreak>200</unbreak> years ago, and that's when our fates became entwined...
Is it really just an appreciation for each other that you have?
当然了！不然还能是什么？
Of course! What else could there be?
我与他初见时便已发觉了，这位勤务果真不同凡响——
The first time I laid eyes on him, I knew that this was no ordinary orderly...
他真的是很特别的那种…别的勤务见着我基本都睁一只眼闭一只眼，可他不一样……
He really is one-of-a-kind... All the other orderlies basically turn a blind eye to me, but he's different...
他看起来总是那么漫不经心，仿佛丝毫不在乎自己的本职工作…可就是这样的他，见了我后竟又能不遗余力地要把我捉回地衡司……

He always looked so casual, as if he didn't care about his job in the slightest... Be that as it may, when he saw me he'd suddenly spare no effort in getting me back to the Realm-Keeping Commission...
我明白，他是个天生的捕食者、天生的斗士！这激发了我的好胜心——我对帝弓司命发了毒誓，自己一定要在这场猫鼠游戏中胜过他！

I get it: He's a natural predator, a natural fighter! All of this inspired me to grow competitive — I vowed to Reignbow Arbiter that I would definitely be the winner in this little cat-and-mouse game of his!
没想到，这一交手便是两百年！我们捉对厮杀至今，斗得难舍难分。可我们两人都乐在其中——我们都明白，自己与对方产生了灵魂的共鸣！
I never thought this game would last for <unbreak>200</unbreak> years! We've been going at it the whole time, but we both enjoyed it — we both knew that we had a special connection with each other!
只可惜，最近已有些日子没再见到他了。他究竟去了哪里？莫不是找到了比我更好的对手？我可太愁了……
But it's a real pity... I haven't seen him the past few days. Where could he have gotten to? Don't tell me he found a better rival than me? I'm so sad...
I don't have any more questions.
广大啊广大，我何时才能与你再度交手呢……
Guangda, o Guangda... When will we be able to duke it out once again...
Be patient. He'll be back. I'm off.
He... He hasn't shown up again today, either.
I'm at my wit's end here!
哎，没想到这辈子还能见着这么壮观的景象。
Wow, I never in all my life thought that I'd lay eyes on such a magnificent sight.
不知道，广大看到这番景象，又作何感想呢？
I wonder how Guangda would feel when faced with such a scene?
The Ambrosial Arbor stops growing again...
是啊，总算停下来了…先前长起来的时候别提有多吓人了！
Yes, it has finally stopped... It looked so frightening when it was fully grown!
那时候…地衡司的人忙得都都没空来稽查我的小摊了，不知道…广大什么时候会回来呢……
At that time, people from the Realm-Keeping Commission were so busy that they had no time to inspect my stand. I wonder when Guangda will return...
看你这打扮，破破烂烂的，不像是仙舟人啊。
Looking at the rags you're wearing, I can tell you're not a Xianzhou native.
我懂了，你肯定是个化外民！是不是遇到麻烦了啊？尽管告诉我，我来帮你搞定！
I get it. You must be an Outworlder! Are you in any trouble? Just tell me, and I'll help you get things sorted!
不知道啊，看情况呗。要是实在帮不了，我就把你领到地衡司公廨去——他们就是干这个的。
I dunno. It depends on the situation. If I really can't be of any help, then I'll take you to the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery — this is their specialty.
反正你就是一帮我挣工时的，就别管那么多了。
And this way, you'll be helping me clock some hours, so don't worry about it.
你就这么和第一次见到的人说话吗？
Is this how you talk to people you've just met for the first time?
有什么不对的吗？我在家都是这么说话的，爹娘反应也没你这么大啊。
Is something wrong? This is how I speak at home, and I've never gotten a reaction like yours.
嗐，反正你就是一帮我挣工时的，无所谓了。
Eh, you're just helping me clock some hours for my job, never mind then.
这你都不知道啊？果然是化外民。
Oh, you don't know even this? You really are an Outworlder!
在我们仙舟，要想取得「成年资格」就得参加一系列考核。我现在在做的志愿公益活动就是考核的一环——如果有效工时不达标的话，我可就成不了年了。

Here on Xianzhou, we have to take a series of examinations in order to qualify for our rite of passage. The community service program that I'm volunteering for is a part of this examination — and if I don't clock enough effective on-the-job hours, I won't be considered an adult.
我才说了几句你就急了？我也有难处啊，你就不能体谅一下我吗？
You're offended because of an offhand comment? I have my own worries, can't you put yourself in my shoes?
在我们仙舟，要想取得「成年资格」就得参加一系列考核。我现在在做的志愿公益活动就是考核的一环。
Here on Xianzhou, we have to take a series of examinations in order to qualify for our rite of passage. The community service program that I'm volunteering for is a part of this examination.
如果有效工时不达标的话，我可就成不了年了，懂吗？
If I don't clock enough effective on-the-job hours, then I won't be considered an adult. Do you get it?
I can't deal with your attitude...
你连个忙都不肯帮，我看你才是情商低！
You're the one with the attitude! You won't even help me out with a favor!
在我们仙舟，要想取得「成年资格」就得参加一系列考核。我现在在做的志愿公益活动就是考核的一环。
Here on Xianzhou, we have to take a series of examinations in order to qualify for our rite of passage. The community service program that I'm volunteering for is a part of this examination.
如果有效工时不达标的话，我可就成不了年了，懂吗？
If I don't clock enough effective on-the-job hours, then I won't be considered an adult. Do you get it?
行了行了，不和你扯了，我还得想办法通过考核呢。你要是帮不上忙的话就一边去吧。
Alright, fine, I gotta stop wasting time. I still have an examination to pass. If you're not gonna help me, then get out of my way.
I have a few questions for you.
…二百四十九。干嘛，没见过这么大的未成年？
...<unbreak>249</unbreak> years old. So what, haven't you ever met a kid this old before?
你这话什么意思？噢，我知道了——你果真是来找我茬的！
What does that even mean? Oh, I see — You're just picking a fight!
我这么多年还没成年怎么了？碍着你了吗？你们这群人啊，还有地衡司那帮人，成天就知道管这管那，给我添堵……

So what if I'm still not yet an adult? Is it bothering you? All you people and the people at the Realm-Keeping Commission, just sticking your noses in my business all day, making things tough for me...
对仙舟人而言好像还算年轻。
That's still pretty young for Xianzhou natives.
我也这么觉得，可地衡司的人不这么认为——他们拼命催我参加成年审核，但又就是不给我发「成年资格」……
I think so too. But the people at the Realm-Keeping Commission don't — they keep on urging me to take the rite of passage examination, but they won't let me pass and get my qualification...
哎，气死我了…我看这帮人就是存心给我添堵！成天就知道管这管那的……
Tsk, this is so annoying... These people are just trying to pick on me! All day, just sticking their noses in my business...
Who's picking on you? Calm down.
你这明知道我没成年，还故意来问我年龄，这不就是存心找茬吗？
You know I haven't passed my rite of passage examination yet, but you still ask me my age. If that isn't the definition of picking on me, what is?
噢，我算是知道了——你和地衡司那帮人就是一伙的！成天就知道管这管那，给我添堵……
Oh, I think I get it — you're in cahoots with those guys at the Realm-Keeping Commission! Just sticking their noses in my business all day, making things tough for me...
我在家想要什么就能有什么，怎么到了地衡司就得听你们的？不就是不符合要求吗，凭什么不让我成年？谁给你们这么大权力的啊？

I can have and do anything I want at home, so why should it be any different when I'm at the Realm-Keeping Commission? Why can't I be an adult without passing the requirements? Who gave you the rights?
哎，要是爹娘是地衡司的人就好了，哪会碰上这么多幺蛾子……
*sigh* I wish my parents worked at the Realm-Keeping Commission. Then I wouldn't have to deal with all these time-wasters...
啧…这么仔细一想，说到底还是我爹娘不争气啊！
Tsk... When I say that out loud, my parents have really let me down here!
连我这点小要求都满足不了，真是无能！
They can't even do this one simple thing for me. Useless!
仙舟人怎样才能取得「成年资格」？
How do the Xianzhou people usually qualify for their rite of passage?
具体的我也不太了解，到目前为止都是爹娘替我包办的。
I'm not sure about the details. My parents have been handling that part for me so far.
你要是实在好奇，就去地衡司公廨自己打听吧。
If you really must know, hit up the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery and ask around for yourself.
这种人生大事，你自己都不操心吗？
Aren't you even the slightest bit concerned about such an important occasion?
嘿，瞧你问的这问题！我爹娘都替我办了，我还操心它干什么？
Ha, what kind of question is this? My parents have already taken care of it, so why should I have to be concerned about it?
成年人就得自己承担责任啊。
Adults have to take responsibility for themselves.
哎，这种大道理就甭提了，我耳朵都要听出茧子来了。
Enough with the life lessons! My ears are getting calloused just from all the "life lessons" thrown at me!
再说了，成年人自己承担责任，我这不还是没成年吗？
Besides, only adults have to take responsibility for themselves. I'm not an adult yet, remember?
你难道要靠父母一辈子吗？
So you plan on relying on your parents for the rest of your life?
不然呢？我爹娘这都有胳膊有腿的，不靠他们靠谁啊？
So what? They've got arms and legs to help. Who else could I rely on?
我们仙舟人嘛，不老不死——反正爹娘是乐意管我一辈子的，那我就随他们去呗。
We Xianzhou people, we don't grow old — and anyway, my parents are willing to take care of me for the rest of my life, so I'll just let them.
更何况，如此一来，我也不用再额外费心力思考大大小小的生活琐事了。
What's more, this way I don't even have to think about all those trivial mundane things that happen in life.
爹娘开心，我也省心…就这样吧，挺好的。
My parents will be happy, and I'll be relieved too... It's great, right?
行了，你还有别的问题吗？有事赶紧说，我还得继续挣工时呢……
Alright, do you have any other questions? Hurry up and ask, I still have hours to clock...
搞什么成年资格认证啊，烦死了。爹娘难道就没有法子替我解决这档破事吗？
This stupid rite of passage thing is such a pain. Is there really no way for my parents to just do it all for me?
The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...
可别提这破建木了，一提我就烦。自从这个破玩意儿长出来，爹娘天天就拿这个跟我说事儿。
Enough already about this darn tree. It's triggering. Ever since this thing started growing again, my parents have been nagging me about it every single day.
「唉！建木都重新长大了，我们家阿浮怎么还没长大啊？」每天就在我耳边叨叨这些，烦得我啊！
"Hey! The Ambrosial Arbor is growing up again. How come our darling Fulie hasn't grown up yet?" They babble on and on at me, every day. It's infuriating!
关键是我也想不通他们为什么要这么举例子…建木生发又不是啥好事，我长大了可是好事啊！这也能相提并论？
The point is, I don't get why they have to make this kind of metaphor... The Ambrosial Arbor growing is far from good news, but me growing up is a good thing! What kind of comparison is that?
The Ambrosial Arbor has stopped sprouting...
对啊，这不好吗？这可是天大的喜事呢，啊哟，建木可真是个听话的大宝贝！
Yes. Isn't that great? That's something worth celebrating! Oh, the Ambrosial Arbor is such a nice baby!
先前这消息一出来，我就忙不迭地跟我爹娘说去了，他们老说「唉！建木都重新长大了，我们家阿浮怎么还没长大啊？」

When the news first came out, I couldn't wait to tell my parents about it. "Hey, even the Ambrosial Arbor is growing up again. How come our darling Fulie hasn't grown up yet?" This is what they used to moan about all the time.
现在我说「建木又长回去了，我也能长回去」，他们立刻哑口无言。总算不用再听他们唠叨了，这下清净了。
Now, I never fail to shut them up every time I say "I can revert just like the Ambrosial Arbor." They finally stopped nagging.
...Tsk, just seeing you makes my head ache.
I'm the one who's having a headache.
抱歉，别怪我这人说话直，我是一名医士，我看出了您的症状。经过我的初步判断，您的时日已经不多了。
Sorry, don't blame me for being so blunt. I'm a healer and your symptoms are clear as day. My initial diagnosis is that your time is quickly running out.
我这么说并不是因为长生种的傲慢，就从短生种的寿命长度来看，您也已经半身入土了。
This isn't the hubris of yet another long-life species, but even by short-life species standards, you've already got one foot in the grave.
C'mon, don't freak me out like that!
我没有吓唬你，我只是认真地警告你，仙舟上有句古语叫作「良药苦口」，希望你能听得进去。
I didn't want to scare you. I'm just trying to give you a warning. There's an old adage around here, "Good medicine tastes bitter." I hope you take what I said to heart.
真的有这么严重！你相信我就对了。
It really is that serious! You should trust me.
但是，我必须要告诉您一个好消息——你认识了我，就还不算晚！你还能活很久，一百年、两百年、不对，一千年！你还可以活很久！

However, I've also got some good news to tell you — you're lucky to have met me, because it's not too late! You can still have a long life: One hundred, two hundred — even a thousand years! There is hope for you!
只要你愿意购买我的宝饵堂长生保健产品，你就能和我们仙舟人一样不老不死…用过的人都说好，你要不要来了解一下？

You just have to make a purchase of longevity supplements from NutriTreasures, and you can live forever just like us Xianzhou people... Everyone who uses this loves it. What do you say? Want to learn more?
宝饵堂里值钱的家伙，我没有带在身边…不过你可以随便询问，像是「冥想遗忘治疗仪」之类的王牌产品，闭着眼睛买准没有错。

I don't have any NutriTreasures products on me right now... But you can ask anything you want. Famous products like the amnesic meditation therapy device are so reliable that you can buy them with your eyes closed.
What's an amnesic meditation therapy device?
你肯定也听说过，仙舟人饱受魔阴身的困扰。但很少有人知道，其实魔阴身是可以治愈的！这是十王司不敢公开的秘方，只有在我这里，你才能打听到。

You must have heard about how the Xianzhou people suffer from the curse of mara. But very few people know that there's actually a cure for it! The Ten-Lords Commission will never admit it, so it's up to people like me to spread the word.
魔阴身产生的根本原因，在于无意义记忆的过度累积。仇恨、痛苦、烦躁这些并不被需要的感受和记忆，是让人堕入魔阴身的罪魁祸首！

The root cause behind mara-struck is the excessive collection of meaningless memories. Hatred, hurt, and irascibility are all unnecessary memories and emotions and are the main culprit of becoming mara-struck!
使用「冥想遗忘治疗仪」，可以遗忘掉那些多余的负面情绪，让自己的精神摆脱负担，以达到延年益寿的目的。

With this amnesic meditation therapy device, you can forget all of those excess negative emotions and liberate your soul from all of these burdens. You, too, can achieve the goal of living out a long life.
But I don't have any symptoms of being mara-struck.
没有魔阴身你总有烦恼吧！我们的产品一向注重全银河化思维，任何人都可以活用我们的产品。
You may not be mara-struck but everyday worries definitely plague you! Our products are designed for use throughout the whole cosmos, and anyone can use them.
这都怪我，要是我带着产品来，你再戴上它，体验一下电流从你的神经上剥离负面情绪的体验，你就根本不需要我这费劲的解释了。

That's on me. If only I'd brought it with me, you'd be able to experience for yourself the electric current stripping away all the negative emotions from your soul. You wouldn't need this clumsy explanation of mine at all.
十个人里九个在付款，还有一个在想着成为我的下家，你就放心吧。
Nine out of ten people have become paying customers, and the tenth is definitely thinking about becoming my down line. There's absolutely nothing to worry about.
你这些产品真的不是骗人的吗？
Are you sure there's no tricks involved here at all?
请不要这样，我们从不搞虚假宣传。我们在正式上市之前是有严格的产品测试的，我们找来了一些「体验官」试用。
Please don't say that. We never engage in sham advertising. We hired Testing Officers to conduct rigorous product testing before we launch anything.
使用了我们的产品，两百年过去了，他们依然精神奕奕。别犹豫了，你们化外民来仙舟罗浮不就是为了长生吗？

Two hundred years after testing our product, they're still going strong and in great spirits. Don't delay! Aren't you Outworlders all coming to the Xianzhou Luofu with the express purpose of extending your life?
Are your Testing Officers all long-life species?
…你是不是很喜欢找别人话里的漏洞？
是又如何？长生种才了解长生。「体验官」使用了产品之后都表示「好像又能多活两百岁」，这些感受都是真实可信的，不信你可以去问！

What if they are? Only long-life species can really understand longevity. After using the product, our Testing Officers have all claimed to feel like they "could live two hundred extra years." That's real qualitative data, and if you don't believe it — just go ask them!
我又不是为了长生来的。
I didn't come here to extend my lifespan.
你嘴硬吧！怎么会有短生种不想长命百岁的。
You're a stubborn one, aren't you? How can any short-life species not want to live long?
等到你活到一把年纪，就会发现腿脚也不好用、记忆也模糊了。然后你就会想起今天——这么好的机会摆在你的面前，你却假装视而不见。

Once you live to a certain age, you'll find that your limbs aren't as nimble as before, and your memory gets foggy. Then, you'll think back to today — how such a great opportunity fell right into your lap, but you played it cool instead and ignored your health.
Forget about it. Maybe next time.
那行，您先忙。如有需要，我这边随时可以帮您订货。
Alright, you get back to your business then. I'll be here should you ever need me to help you place an order.
想清楚了吗？我们宝饵堂的长生保健产品，用过的人都说好。要不，我再仔细给您介绍一下？
Have you come around yet? NutriTreasures' longevity supplements are highly rated by people who've used them. Why don't I tell you the more detailed benefits about our products?
你这里都有什么灵丹妙药？
Do you have any cure-all medicine here?
你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?
看到了，看到了。说到建木…要不要来一副「建木正气膏」？
Yep, I saw it. Speaking of which... Would you like a jar of "Ambrosial Arbor Ointment"?
建木生发以后，罗浮人的健康状况急剧恶化，我这才不得不违背族制，将这副「建木正气膏」拿出来贩售。
The Xianzhou people's health has rapidly deteriorated since the regrowth of the Arbor, so I had to bend the race laws a little bit so I could start hawking my Ambrosial Arbor Ointment.
现在预购，只需要三百巡镝，机不可失时不再来啊！
Pre-order now for just <unbreak>300</unbreak> strales. You don't want to miss out!
You don't have any at the moment?
没有就不要吗，嗨，要的人多了去了。
If I don't, does that mean you don't want it? There're plenty of people queuing up for it.
Just let it go if you don't want it.
这建木说不长就不长了…
The Ambrosial Arbor stops growing without any reason...
什么叫「说不长就不长了」，我跟你说，建木不再生长正是水分缺失所导致的。
What do you mean? I'll say, it's the lack of water that causes the Ambrosial Arbor to stop growing.
我们仙舟人的健康意识还是太欠缺了些，建木的现状正好是个反面教材，提醒大家要时刻补水。
The Xianzhou residents' health awareness is still lacking. The Ambrosial Arbor now is a good reminder for all of us to drink enough water.
我认识一位持明医士，他曾为「龙师」，医术深不可测！他告诉我人体每天的水分缺口足足有八百杯水之多，可光靠喝水是不够的，他们持明便有一道秘方……

I know a Vidyadhara healer who used to be a Preceptor with outstanding medical skills. He once told me that we needed to drink <unbreak>800</unbreak> glasses of water daily, so we could never supply ourselves with enough water just by drinking. The Vidyadhara has a secret for this...
可惜此为持明族之秘，亏我晓之以情动之以理，这位大师才舍得将方子传授于我，我依照方子研究出「百倍压缩纯氧水」，旨在造福仙舟。

Still, it was a secret of the Vidyadhara. It was after some persuasive reasoning, did I finally convince the master to share the formula with me, which I followed and developed the Hundredfold Compressed Water to benefit the people on the Xianzhou.
每日只八瓶就能满足全天的含水量，只收个成本费，区区五百巡镝，机不可失时不再来啊！
With just eight bottles a day, you can meet your daily hydration needs. It's only a nominal cost of <unbreak>500</unbreak> strales. You don't want to miss out!
You don't have any at the moment?
没有就不要吗，嗨，要的人多了去了。
If I don't, does that mean you don't want it? There're plenty of people who do.
It's fine if you don't want it.
不要就拉倒，到时候别回来求我。
Just go if you don't want it. Don't come back and beg me for it later.
哎，二百年又二百年…再不升迁，我都要蜕生结卵了……
Ah, two centuries passed, and then two centuries more... If I don't get my promotion, I'll undergo my hatching rebirth soon...
是啊。持明这一辈子，总得当个执事或者录事，尝尝当官的滋味吧？
Yeah. In one of our lifetimes, Vidyadhara have to serve as officers or clerks so we get a taste of what it's like to be a public servant, right?
是啊。可惜只有我们觉得惨没用，得司衡大人也觉得惨才行。
Sure is. Unfortunately, we're the only ones who think it's a real shame. If only management felt the same way.
In your next life, go all out.
哈哈，就怕我下辈子也只是个小勤务。我已经开始怀疑自己上一世的结局究竟如何了。
Haha, I'm afraid that I'll be a lowly orderly in my next life. I've started to wonder how exactly things ended up during my previous life.
哎，罢了罢了，不聊这些伤心事。
Hey, that's enough for now. Let's not linger on such a morose topic.
在下是地衡司的广大，只是个区区小勤务罢了。如果您有什么要事，不妨移步公廨内部……
I'm Guangda, a lowly orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. If you have any issues to handle, I suggest you visit our Chancery offices...
I want to chat with you...
只要不聊工作，我都欢迎。
As long as we don't talk about work, I'll chat about anything.
你真在这地衡司工作吗？
Do you really work here at the Realm-Keeping Commission?
哈哈，这都被您看出来了。
其实我是地衡司的带刀侍卫。平时没别的活，就站在这地衡司门口望风。
Actually, I'm one of the armed guards at the Realm-Keeping Commission. There's usually nothing much to do, so I just stand by the door and keep watch.
你不是说自己是勤务吗？
Didn't you just say that you were an orderly, though?
是啊。我还以为您忘了呢，哈哈。
Yeah, I thought you'd already forgotten. Haha!
所以——地衡司根本没有什么带刀侍卫，而我也其实只是个小勤务。
So... the Realm-Keeping Commission doesn't actually have any armed guards, and I'm just a lowly orderly after all.
I think so too, a real shame.
如果您将来有机会给我们地衡司业务评分的话，还麻烦您给提提意见——就说觉得应该加个带刀侍卫的职位，谢谢。
If you ever get the chance to give us a rating, please can you make this suggestion? That the Realm-Keeping Commission should have some armed guards. Thanks a lot!
哈哈，您对这个有兴趣啊…那我给您说道说道。
Hahaha, so you're really interested in that, huh? ...Alright, I'll tell you.
其实嘛，很简单——说好听点是执行，说难听点是打杂；有活我们扛，有腿我们跑，拿的还是最低的工资……

It's really simple, actually. Diplomatically, we say we carry out executive orders. But really, it's just a bunch of menial tasks. We slog through chores, run errands, and get paid the lowest rank of wages...
您知道吗？仙舟有句老话是这么说的：「既要星槎飞的高，又要星槎少能耗」……
Do you know this old Xianzhou saying? "Starskiffs need to fly high, but not burn energy"...
…这说的就是我们地衡司勤务了。
...This saying sums up the life of us orderlies at the Realm-Keeping Commission.
地衡司是个怎样的地方？
What sort of place is the Realm-Keeping Commission?
哟，您问这个啊。那我得想想……
Oh, that's a great question. Let me think...
明面上，我们这地衡司算是仙舟的庶务管理机构。人口统计、资源配置、生态治理、历法计时…等等之类，都是要经我们手的。

On the surface, we're the department that handles general affairs aboard the Xianzhou. The census, resource allocation, environmental protections, time calibration... We get up to all of these kinds of things.
说穿了不过是打听家长里短，搬运米粮，打扫卫生和报时通知之类的细碎活儿。
To be blunt, it's just a bunch of everyday chores like listening to daily problems, allocating food stocks, cleaning up after people, and notifying the public about the time.
It sounds really lofty and amazing, but...
那你们背地里是做什么的？
So what do you actually get up to on the sly, then?
Hold on! I was just about to tell you.
厉害啊，一语道破天机！您有考虑过应聘太卜司吗？待遇应该比我们这儿好。
Amazing, you've hit the nail on the head! Have you considered applying for the Divination Commission? They should get paid better than we do.
哈哈，开个玩笑。我继续给您介绍介绍——毕竟这也是我们勤务的工作之一……
Haha, just kidding. Let me continue telling you what we get up to — after all, that's also part of our job...
比方咱们这个公廨。日常处理的也就是老百姓生活中会遇到的种种困难琐事。
Take for example our Chancery. It deals with all kinds of difficult details that people run into in their everyday lives.
小到市容市场管理，大到民事诉讼案件…你能想到的所有杂活，要是觉得该找官家办，那来找我们就对了。
It could be as small as the city's appearance, right up to a large civil lawsuit... If you can think of anything that the government should be doing, then come to us.
不过，我个人还是劝您先自己试着解决看看…毕竟等到各种活分配下来，苦的就是我这种小杂役咯。
But I should personally advise you to try solving things first yourself... After all, once all the tasks have been allocated, it's always a lowly orderly like me who has to suffer.
您慢走，我也该接着忙了……
Take care. I'd better get back to it...
办理公务请往公廨内部走，我只是个小勤务……
Please head inside the Chancery office for any official business. I'm just a lowly orderly...
不认识，但我可以想想——虽然未必有印象就是。
I don't know him, but I can think about it — despite not really having much of an impression.
He's a merchant in the Exalting Sanctum.
小贩？哦，我倒是抓过不少。
Merchant, you say? Oh, I've caught quite a few of them.
但有个叫行雪的吗？我不记得了。我想想——虽然未必有印象就是。
But was one of them called Xingxue? I don't recall. But I can think about it — despite not really having much of an impression.
与你灵魂产生共鸣的宿敌…
He's an old nemesis who resonates with your soul...
行雪…是吧。我想想——虽然未必有印象就是。
Xingxue... right? I'll think about it — despite not really having much of an impression.
不好意思，想不到。这人谁啊？你不会是拿我寻开心的吧？
Sorry, I'm drawing a blank here. Who is he? You're not making fun of me here, are you?
去去去，我还有公务在身，你要是没别的事就别给我添乱了。
Go go go, I've still got my official duties to do. Unless you've anything else, please don't cause me any grief.
你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?
可别提了，神策府下了死命令，要我们在建木生发的敏感时间段严防死守，决不允许出现任何次生灾害。

Drop it. The Seat of Divine Foresight put out a mandate demanding that we stand on strict guard duty during this sensitive period of regrowth. We absolutely cannot afford any secondary problems to occur.
唉…可千万别出事，千万别出事…一旦出事我连退休金都别惦记了。
*sigh* Please don't let there be another accident. Please don't let there be another accident... If anything else happens, they'll take my pension away.
…至少在我的辖区内，别出任何要我负责的事……
...Or at least, please don't let there be any accidents in my jurisdiction...
你知道建木不再生发的事了吗？
Do you know that the Ambrosial Arbor no longer sprouts?
怎么会不知道，前几天还拉我们去和云骑军一起配合安抚民众呢。
You bet. A couple of days ago, we were asked to appease the public alongside the Cloud Knights.
累是累了点，不过这累得值啊…忙活了这么久，天天喊着要严防死守的，这下总算能轻松点了。
It is tiring, but it's worth it... After working so hard to protect the peace, we can finally loosen up a bit.
真该好好休息休息了，我脑子里已经计划好放假要做的事了…得抽几天到处逛逛，吃点小吃什么的…光是想想就觉得安逸。

I can really use a break, and I already have plans in my mind for what I want to do during the vacation... I'll spend a few days going on a trip and enjoying good food... just the thought of it puts me in a good mood.
啧啧…啧啧啧…这位{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}真是衣冠楚楚、仪表堂堂啊！
Tsk-tsk... Tsk, tsk, tsk... This young {F#lass}{M#lad} is dressed to the nines and looking fantastic!
咳咳，抱歉！本人还未自我介绍呢。我名为景芳，是罗浮将军景元贤弟，平时没别的爱好，就喜欢与君子交游！

Ahem, sorry! I haven't even introduced myself yet. My name's Jing Fang, and I'm the younger brother of General Jing Yuan from the Luofu. I don't really get up to much, but I love making acquaintance with elites like yourself!
我见{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}器宇不凡，想必是个仗义疏财之人，定能同我意气相投！没想到能与这样的贵人在长乐天偶遇，这正可谓是天赐良机啊！

I can see you have exceptional attitude there, young {F#lass}{M#lad}. I can see you're the kind of person who helps the needy — just like me! I never thought I'd meet such an honorable soul here in the Exalting Sanctum. This is simply a gift from the gods!
择日不如撞日——我景芳想请{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}同去那宣夜大街的「不夜侯」小酌一杯，茶水出账我二你八…不，我三你七，如何？诚意十足吧？

Chance encounters are far better than planned ones — I, Jing Fang, would like to invite you, my {F#lass}{M#lad}, to the Sleepless Earl over on Starwatcher Avenue. I'll even cover twenty percent of the bill... no, how about I chip in thirty percent of the bill? That should be good faith enough, right?
仙舟人都这么搭讪的吗？
Is this how Xianzhou people try to flirt?
哎，这怎么能叫「搭讪」呢——这叫「交游」，叫「邀为同道」！
Oh, I'm not "flirting." This is just making friends between like-minded people!
If you want to leech off others, just say so...
哎，你这人说话怎么这么不中听！我要真心想吃白饭，何必还要摊那三分的账啊，对吧？
Oh, what a mean thing to say! If I was trying to leech off of you, would I offer to chip in <unbreak>30%</unbreak>? No way!
The Sleepless Earl is quite far away from here...
哎，这才多大点事啊！打个计程槎不就完事了？我都夸你夸到这份上了，再多出份槎钱总是小意思吧？
Ah, who cares about that!? We could just hire a taximeter starskiff. I've already given you so many praises, what's a little taximeter starskiff fare to you?
哈哈，我能理解，{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}对我这陌生人有所提防——可我毕竟是将军贤弟，还能诓你不成？不信你就去长乐天打听打听，有哪个不知道我景芳的名号？

Haha, I get it. A young {F#lass}{M#lad} should be wary of a stranger like me — but I'm the dear brother of a famed general, so there's no way I could ever trick you. If you don't believe me, ask around the Exalting Sanctum about me. Everyone knows the name Jing Fang around these parts.
景元怎没和我提过有一贤弟…
Jing Yuan never mentioned any brothers to me...
哈哈，这说明那个叫景元的有眼不识泰山……
Haha, that just means Jing Yuan doesn't realize how famous his dear brother is...
那我就去神策府问问吧。
Then I'll go ask the Seat of Divine Foresight then.
哈哈，不过区区神策府，未必曾听过我的威名……
Haha, sure. a simple Seat of Divine Foresight may not have heard of my mighty reputation...
...Seat of Divine Foresight... Seat of Divine Foresight!?
你…你该不会就是近日随云骑军搜捕恶党的……
Y—You... You're not the one who's been running around with the Cloud Knights, locking up crooks... right?
对、对不住！是…是我有眼不识泰山！刚才说什么将军贤弟，那都是我昏了头说疯话…还请大人不见小人怪啊！

P—Pardon me! I'm the one who didn't realize how famous YOU are! All that stuff I was saying about generals and brothers... I've been feeling dizzy and was just spouting nonsense. Please {F#ma'am}{M#sir}, have mercy on my soul!
Then let me ask you this...
哎…既然您问了，那就和您坦白吧。
Ah... Since you asked, I'll level with you.
其实我原名景亓——倒也没什么显赫家世，就是一普普通通的仙舟民罢了。
My real name's actually Jing Juan, and I'm not from any famous family or anything. Nope, I'm just a normal Xianzhou citizen.
在我们当地语言里，「元」与「亓」形似，平时总有人打趣说我与那将军景元是亲戚。我也灵机一动，想这倒是个混饭吃的法子，便也如此自称了。

In our local tongue, "Yuan" and "Juan" sound kinda similar, so people always joked that I was related to the General Jing Yuan. A light bulb went off in my head, and I thought this might be a good way to scrounge a few credits out of people.
可惜，在仙舟本地薅了一轮羊毛后，那些个店主也就知道我底细如何。为了这项事业可持续发展，我便把「亓」改作「芳」……
Unfortunately, after running a few scams all the shopkeepers had me figured out. I ended up changing my name from "Jing Juan" to "Jing Fang" so I could keep on spinning this side-hustle...
What difference does the change make?
这可问到点子上了——我这改名也不是瞎改，总得让人相信我是将军胞弟不是？
That's the key point — it wasn't a random change, but designed to make people believe that I'm his brother.
在仙舟语言里啊，「元」与「圆」同音，「芳」与「方」同音。这一圆一方，不就像是一家子了吗？
In Xianzhou dialect, "Yuan" means "circle," while "Fang" means "square." A circle and a square... Doesn't it sound like we're the same family to you?
你想啊——仙舟民个个长命百岁，哪会专门记得有过一面之缘的小毛贼？
Think about it — Xianzhou people live for so long. How could they possibly remember some little punk that they bumped into just once in their life?
我把这名字一换便能故技重施…可不就是可持续发展嘛！
By changing my name, I could run the same hustle all over again... And keep on spinning my side-hustle!
哎，只可惜这新名字的信用也快要透支了。我还得想想怎么办才好哩……
Ack, it's just a shame that all the credit I've built up around this name is about to be completely overdrawn. I have to figure out what to do next...
你不会就靠骗人营生吧？
Do you only rely on swindling people to make a living?
您说是「骗」——呃…这我只能说，见仁见智。
You might call it "swindling" — but that's like, just your opinion, man.
对外，我都称自己是个「食探」。简单来说，就是去大小饭馆探店后整理意见，传播出去供众人参考之人。
I like to call myself a "forager." Put simply, it's a person who visits all kinds of restaurants large and small to put together reviews for others' perusal.
然而，如今仙舟上做这行当的人实在太多了。想要脱颖而出，就得在其他方面做文章。
However, there're too many people doing this on Xianzhou now, so if you want to stand out from the crowd, you have to do something else.
那最简单的法子嘛，莫过于给自己树立个与众不同的形象——您想想啊，还有比罗浮将军亲戚更唬人的名头吗？反正我是想不出来。

And the easiest way to do that is to create a different brand for yourself — think about it: Is there anyone that could possibly be more intimidating than the family member of the Luofu's greatest general? Well, that's what I came up with in any case.
反正就这么着，我是填饱了肚子，店家们也通过我免费做了宣传。结果，到头来他们竟然还指责我吃霸王餐！要我说，他们才是狼心狗肺……

Anyway, that's it! I'm just getting myself fed, and the shopkeepers get free advertising out of me. Alas, some of these guys even accuse me of dining and dashing! If you ask me, these are the real scoundrels...
那你怎么骗到我头上了？
Then why did you try and trick me?
嗐，这不是店家都有经验了嘛！我实在没办法，才想着能不能找些其他目标……
O, all the shopkeepers know me now! I couldn't help it, so I had to find some new marks...
Is this not the definition of scrounging...?
哎…您说是那就是。眼下我还是得先想想如何转型，免得没法填饱肚子……
Ack... You're right. I have to focus right now on changing things up so that I don't end up starving...
I don't have any more questions.
您先忙！我就不打扰您了……
Off you go then! I won't bug you any longer...
哟，这不是景元将军的贵客嘛！
Oh hey — it's General Jing Yuan's esteemed guest!
您今天找我…是有什么事吗？
你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?
哪能没看见呢？那么大的一棵树啊！
How could I miss it? It's absolutely huge!
感觉这里面可能蕴含着机遇，能让我找到些新的营生点子。
I feel like opportunities could abound here — perhaps even some new ideas to make a living.
现在的有个初步的想法，以「阻止建木继续生长」为由头来搞一个众筹活动……
I've got this basic idea about crowdfunding under the premise of "stopping the Ambrosial Arbor from growing"...
嗐，我和您说这个干什么…咱们聊点别的，聊点别的。
Hey, why am I telling all of this to you... Let's talk about something else.
你注意到没？建木停止生长了…
Did you notice that the Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing...
别提了，我那「阻止建木继续生长」的众筹活动才刚开了个头呢，前期投资我都砸了不少进去…现在倒真停了。
Don't even go there. My crowdfunding campaign to stop the growth of the Ambrosial Arbor has just started, and I have invested heavily in it... Now, the tree has stopped growing for real.
嗐，我说这建木怎么就这般不懂事，真晦气…要我说帝弓司命干脆把它连根毁了得了，看着就烦人！
Tsk, why is the Ambrosial Arbor so insensible? What a downer... The Reignbow Arbiter should have uprooted it instead of letting it remain as an eyesore!
枯萎的哪里是枝条啊，明明就是我的血汗钱……
What wilts is not the tree branches, but my hard-earned money...
{NICKNAME}，一直久闻大名也没机会好好聊聊。请问你今天来神策府有何贵干？
{NICKNAME}, I've heard so much about you but never had the chance to chat with you. May I ask, how can we help you today at the Seat of Divine Foresight?
Oh nothing, I'm just strolling about.
神策府是军机重地，实在算不得什么散步的好地方。
The Seat of Divine Foresight deals with high-level military secrets. It's really not the kind of place where you could just take a stroll.
了解一下神策府的工作…
I'd like to learn more about the Seat of Divine Foresight's work...
我得提醒你，异邦人想要了解军机重地的工作，一般会被称为「间谍行为」。
I have to warn you, travelers' making inquiries into military secrets is generally known as "espionage."
你要是实在没事做，我印象里浥尘客栈一直缺清洁工…我与老板娘相识，可以写封介绍信，帮你摆脱「游手好闲」的刻板印象。

If you've really got nothing better to do, I think the Petrichor Inn is looking for cleaners... I know the proprietress there and can introduce you. It might just help you shake the stereotype of being a lazybones.
抱歉。我这几百年都忙着应付军队和战争事宜，没什么和闲人交流的经验。多有冒犯，请包涵。
Sorry, I've been dealing with military affairs and wars for so many centuries that I don't really get a chance to communicate with idlers like yourself. I'm sorry for offending you.
我看神策府的工作就挺适合我。
I think working at the Seat of Divine Foresight would really suit me.
抱歉，你可能误会了。我真正的工作内容并不是「与闲人对话，并帮助{F#她}{M#他}消耗时间」。
I'm sorry, you must be mistaken. My job description isn't actually "chatting with an idler and helping them kill time."
现在麻烦你写下介绍信。
Could you please write me a letter of recommendation?
不好意思，我刚才收到最新的消息说「客栈清洁工」不招闲人，看来是我唐突了，差点儿给你安排了一份困难的差事，请包涵。
Sorry, I just got notified that the Inn doesn't just hire any idlers for cleaners. I was too rash and nearly put you in a very difficult situation. Please forgive me.
哎…算了，不逗你了。你好歹也是景元的客人。我是神策府的策士，我叫青镞。
*sigh* ...Alright, fine. I'll let up on you. You're one of Jing Yuan's guests, after all. My name's Qingzu, and I'm a counselor here at the Seat of Divine Foresight.
你要是有要事相商，可以找我谈。
Come find me if you've ever got any important matters to discuss.
I'd like to learn more about the Seat of Divine Foresight...
我必须提醒你，神策府的相关资料大都是仙舟机密…总之，请你问的时候适当掂量掂量，尽量不要问一些机要之事。

Please let me remind you that most of the information we handle here is top secret... Basically, please be careful and considerate with your questions, and try your best not to ask anything too sensitive.
What do counselors get up to?
策士是云骑军里的职衔，负责运筹和梳理信息，帮助长官进行决策。在下不才，忝居策士长一职。

Counselor is a title in the Cloud Knight forces. We're in charge of strategic planning and processing information, helping the Captain make better decisions. I'm no great talent, but humbly hold the position of chief counselor.
不过嘛，景元本人心思细密，洞察幽微。所以大多数时候，我觉得自己更像是一个整理情报的杂工。
But Jing Yuan is a meticulous and insightful general, so most of the time I'm left feeling like a handyman who just passes on intelligence.
你就这么直呼景元大名？
Did you just call Jing Yuan by his first name?
嗯。他说战阵之上讲究讲究上下威严，神策府里不必如此，让我直呼名字即可。我就照做了，渐渐成习惯了。

Yes. He said we have to be strict with our official chain of command during battle, but back here at the Seat of Divine Foresight we can call each other by our first names. Over time, I slowly got used to it.
是不是有点太看轻自己了？
Are you playing down your role a little bit here?
哎…我从小听着景元的传奇长大，不知你听过「云上五骁」的故事吗？
Hey, I grew up listening to the legends of Jing Yuan as a kid. Did you ever hear the one about the High-Cloud Quintet?
扯远了，我花了几百年才走到如今的地位，能在身边辅佐他，也算是圆了这一世心愿。
I'm getting off topic here, but it takes me hundreds of years to get where I am now, and advising his leadership like this is like a life-long dream coming true for me.
但作为策士，清晰地认识自我也很重要。论用智，我们不如景元，尽可能帮到他，便是我们工作的意义。

But as a counselor, it's important to have a clear understanding about yourself. We're no match for Jing Yuan's intellect, but we help him out as much as we can and derive great meaning from this work.
有什么神策府机密可以分享吗？
Have you got any secrets you can share about the Seat of Divine Foresight?
啧。上一个这么刺探的来使，已经在幽囚狱里服刑了。
Tsk, the last guy who came snooping around here with questions like that is still locked up in the Shackling Prison for espionage.
看在你是景元贵客的份上，我可以向你透露一些机密……
But seeing as you're Jing Yuan's esteemed guest, I suppose I can divulge a few in-house secrets to you...
神策府中曾豢养过一头名唤「朔雪」的狮子。景元很是宠爱这头狮子，狮子也终日相伴他左右。
There used to be a pet lion kept at the Seat of Divine Foresight called Snowmoon. Jing Yuan adored it and the lion would spend all day following him about.
且说有一天，丰饶孽物作乱，元帅点兵，命景元亲征域外，澄清玉宇…他这一去，便是三百年。

But one day, while the Abominations of Abundance were raging against us, the Marshal rallied his troops and ordered Jing Yuan to lead an expedition force to purge their territory... Just like that, three hundred years passed.
朔雪不理解仙舟的「巡猎」，只当景元一去不返…它在神策府门口等啊、等啊…这一等，就等了三百年。
