The medicines of Scalegorge Waterscape sound simply miraculous.
是吗？确实有很多化外民都觉得仙舟医学很奇妙。
Really? I guess lots of Outworlders usually do find Xianzhou medicine to be rather wonderful.
比如这些叶子、果实、树皮、根茎…它们大多是建木时代流传下奇特的植物，它们效用很难被寻常分析法理解——效力就像是某种奇迹。

Take these leaves, fruit, bark, and rhizomes for instance... Most are peculiar flora from the Ambrosial Arbor's time, and their effects are difficult for standard metrics to analyze. They just work like some kind of miracle.
毕竟咱也不是丹鼎司的医士，说不出个一二三四五。但是咱听说，这些药材在仙舟外也大受欢迎，不知道是真的假的。
I'm no Alchemy Commission doctor or anything, and barely know the basics. But still, I hear this medicine is really popular beyond Xianzhou. Though I can't vouch for whether that's true or not.
I warmly invite you to visit again next time.
I warmly invite you to visit again next time.
啊啊，我受不了了…这样的日子什么时候是个头啊……
Ahhh, I can't take it anymore! When will this end...
多谢您关心，但我实在是不太好……
Thank you for checking in. I'm really not doing too well...
我怎么了…唉，这可就说来话长了……
What's wrong? Well... It's a long story.
几个月前，我联系不上自己的最喜欢的徒弟了。最近才听说，她加入了药王秘传。
A few months back, I lost touch with my favorite apprentice. But I've just heard that she's been sucked into the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
后来，我听说全城都在搜捕我们丹士长。那时我才发现，丹枢大人加入了药王秘传。
Later, I learned that the whole city was hunting down our chief alchemist. Only then did I realize that Lady Dan Shu had joined up with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
前段时间，我出差走了一段时间，回来发现丹鼎司被查封了。一问才知道，我们这有不少人加入了药王秘传。

I went away for business a while ago, and I came back to find that the Alchemy Commission had been sealed off for investigation. I was told that many of us had been found to be colluding with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
昨天晚上，我点了一份刺毛猪脚饭，饭馆说现在没办法送外卖到丹鼎司。我猜想，是因为猪脚饭也加入了药王秘传吧。

Just last night, I ordered some razorboar trotter rice, but the diner said they couldn't deliver it to the Alchemy Commission anymore. I'm guessing it's because even the trotter rice has joined up with the Disciples.
够了，真是够了，我真*仙舟粗口*受够了。
Enough is enough. This is *Xianzhou profanity* enough!!
哎…算了，我也不跟您释放负面情绪了…我才看出来，您不是星穹列车上的贵客吗？刚才失礼了…您有什么事吗？

Ah... Forget it. I don't want to just dump my traumas all over you... Ha, I've only just realized, aren't you our esteemed guest from the Astral Express? Please forgive my rudeness just now... Is there anything I can do for you?
I have a few questions I wish to ask you...
有事您尽管问。虽然我也刚回本部没多久，未必能答上来就是了。
Ask away, though I've just returned to the headquarters and might not have all the answers.
You don't seem to be in a good mood.
心情确实不太好。这该从何说起呢…唉…我从头给您讲吧。
Indeed. I'm not feeling too good. How should I explain this? Hmm... let me start from the beginning.
我基本上算是在这丹鼎司长起来的。我小时候，周围的大人们就说，这丹鼎司是要衰败了。
I kind of grew up in the Alchemy Commission. When I was little, the adults around me kept saying that the commission was going to decline.
结果过了二百多年，我都做了医士了，这丹鼎司还是涛声依旧，看上去没什么衰败的苗头。
Two hundred years later, I became a healer, and the Alchemy Commission was still busy as ever, showing no signs of going downhill.
再之后啊，司里组织了学术交流团，让一批罗浮丹鼎司的学者出去和域外的学者们交流经验。
Later, the commission organized an academic exchange program. A batch of Luofu scholars would be sent off to interact with Outworld scholars.
当时领导可是允诺的，在学术交流团里混够了资历，回来高低能评上个医士长。所以我就跟着去了。
At that time, the leader promised that whoever gained enough experience in the academic exchange program would very likely be promoted to chief healer. So, I joined the program.
我在方壶仙舟交流了一百五十多年，又在博识学会的哈米特空间站交流了一百五十多年，最后在公司的法特森星际医院交流了一百多年……

I spent about <unbreak>150</unbreak> years on the Xianzhou Fanghu, and another <unbreak>150</unbreak> years at the Hamet Space Station of the Intelligentsia Guild. And finally, I was at IPC's Fedson Interstellar Hospital for over <unbreak>100</unbreak> years...
最后我终于混够了资历，发够了论文，回到丹鼎司总部等着升迁。结果还没过几个月呢…您猜怎么着？丹鼎司造反啦！都加入那什么「药王秘传」啦！

After I had finally gained enough experience and published enough articles, I came back to headquarters, waiting to be promoted. Guess what happened just months after my return? The Alchemy Commission revolted and joined the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!
到了这份上，我就别惦记着评医士长了…只希望抓那些药王秘传的时候可不要牵连到我……
At this point, I should forget about becoming the chief healer... I just hope that I won't be implicated when they're hunting down those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...
你和那些药王秘传很熟吗？
Are you close with those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?
您这问得我都不敢答了…怎么说呢，毕竟确实很多信徒都是丹鼎司人士，和其中一些…我还挺熟的……
I don't dare to answer such a question... After all, many of the disciples also worked at the Alchemy Commission. So, I'm quite close with some of them...
就比如说我那个徒弟…司里给她外派到法特森星际医院的时候，她才四十多岁。我带了她五十多年，后来她先回了罗浮，还一直和我有书信往来。

Take my apprentice as an example. She was only in her forties when she was sent to the Fedson Interstellar Hospital where I trained her for about fifty years. She returned to the Luofu before me and kept in touch with me through letters.
结果几个月前联系不上了…等我到了罗浮，去她家问她的下落，她家人也说，这孩子下落不明了。
I lost contact with her a few months ago... It was only when I was back at the Luofu and visited her home when her family told me that she had gone missing.
再后来就是听说她持械袭击云骑，让人家给当场击毙了。直到那时候，我才知道她走了邪路。
Later, I learned that she was killed during an armed attack against the Cloud Knights. Only then did I know that she had gone astray.
当时我是真不想继续干这个鬼差事了，真不想干了。难过，心里恨得慌。可是恨又能怎么样呢？我日哭夜哭，能哭死寿瘟祸祖吗？
At that time, I lost all my desire to stick with this lousy job. I was upset and overwhelmed by resentment. But what could I do? Could I destroy the Plagues Author by crying day and night?
这么一想，我觉得还是应当回到丹鼎司，继续做这个破医士。也许我什么都做不了，但总比什么都不做要强。
At that thought, I decided to remain a healer at the Alchemy Commission. I might not be able to accomplish anything huge, but it's better than nothing.
唉…借您吉言吧。您也多保重……
*Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...
唉…借您吉言吧。您也多保重……
*Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...
唉…接下来可怎么办才好啊…哎呀，您来了？今天有什么事吗？
Sigh... What should I do next... Hey! What brings you here today?
I have a few questions I wish to ask you...
有事您尽管问。虽然我也刚回本部没多久，未必能答上来就是了。
Ask away, though I've just returned to the headquarters and might not have all the answers.
You don't seem to be in a good mood.
心情确实不太好。这该从何说起呢…唉…我从头给您讲吧。
Indeed. I'm not feeling too good. How should I explain this? Hmm... let me start from the beginning.
我基本上算是在这丹鼎司长起来的。我小时候，周围的大人们就说，这丹鼎司是要衰败了。
I kind of grew up in the Alchemy Commission. When I was little, the adults around me kept saying that the commission was going to decline.
结果过了二百多年，我都做了医士了，这丹鼎司还是涛声依旧，看上去没什么衰败的苗头。
Two hundred years later, I became a healer, and the Alchemy Commission was still busy as ever, showing no signs of going downhill.
再之后啊，司里组织了学术交流团，让一批罗浮丹鼎司的学者出去和域外的学者们交流经验。
Later, the commission organized an academic exchange program. A batch of Luofu scholars would be sent off to interact with Outworld scholars.
当时领导可是允诺的，在学术交流团里混够了资历，回来高低能评上个医士长。所以我就跟着去了。
At that time, the leader promised that whoever gained enough experience in the academic exchange program would very likely be promoted to chief healer. So, I joined the program.
我在方壶仙舟交流了一百五十多年，又在博识学会的哈米特空间站交流了一百五十多年，最后在公司的法特森星际医院交流了一百多年……

*Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...
唉…借您吉言吧。您也多保重……
*Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...
这到底是怎么回事啊，怎么就乱成这样啦？
What in the world is going on? Why are things in such a mess?
一回来连个认识的人都没见到，就莫名其妙地升职成丹士长了，哎……
I didn't even get to meet anyone I knew when I got back, and I just got promoted to chief alchemist all of a sudden. *Sigh*...
...Are you asking me? I—I have no idea too!
Hang on. Forget what I said.
咦，你来这里是有什么事吗？
那个，我得先说清楚——我才回罗浮不久，对这里的一切还不太熟，你要是想问路或者打听什么，我未必能帮到你，到时候你可别怪我。

Just so you know, I've only been back for a short while, and I'm not very familiar with things around here in Luofu. If you want to ask for directions or about the latest happenings, I might not be very helpful, just so you know.
我听说药王秘传残党在闹事？
I heard that the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are causing trouble here.
哎，在回来的路上我就听说啦，没想到你也知道啊？
Oh, I heard about that on my way back. I'm surprised you know about it too.
说是有这么回事，然后云骑军封锁了部分地区，正在缉拿乱党呢。
It seems to be true. The Cloud Knights have sealed off some areas and are hunting them down.
但具体是怎么闹起来的，这些事我倒是不知道了……
Still, I have no idea about the details...
你怎么就成为丹士长了？
How did you become the chief alchemist?
我也不知道啊，我本来在外面出差呢，医术研讨会还没开完，就突然收到消息说我升职了。
I have no clue. I was participating in a medical conference outside the Luofu when I was suddenly notified of the promotion via a message.
收到消息之后，这会我都开不下去了，赶紧收拾行李回来交接，结果一回来，就连安排交接的人都见不着。
I left the conference halfway and quickly packed my bags. When I got back, not a single soul was there to arrange the handover.
说是出了什么大事，云骑军正在排查，一切事项都得延后，哎，我就被晾在这儿了。
I was told that something huge had happened, and the Cloud Knights were doing an investigation, so everything had to be put off. So, I'm left here, clueless.
Do you have the lowdown on the situation?
啊？「内幕消息」？又出什么事了？我怎么什么动静都没听到。
Huh? Lowdown? What happened again? How come I didn't hear anything?
到底什么事啊？呜呜，为什么都没人告诉我——你要是知道的话记得第一时间跟我分享分享。
What on earth happened? *Sob* Why has no one told me about it? If you find anything, please share it with me as well.
How come you don't know anything?
我也不知道啊！啊，不对，我的确什么都不知道啊！
How should I know!? I really don't know anything!
我这才出差了多久，怎么感觉一回来整个世界都变了，这还是我认识的丹鼎司吗？ 到底发生什么事了……
I wasn't even away for that long! Why do I feel like the whole world has changed? Is this still the Alchemy Commission I know? What happened...?
算了，我没什么想问的了。
Forget it. I don't have any more questions.
丹枢大人她真是…世事难料啊……
About Lady Dan Shu... Life truly is unpredictable...
算了，我没什么想问的了。
Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

哎，是你啊！怎么样，丹鼎司里有什么新消息吗？
Ah, it's you again. Anything new with the Alchemy Commission?
Why are you asking me? Aren't you the chief alchemist?
哎，我是丹士长又如何，连任命通知都是回来的路上突然收到的，至今都没搞清楚这儿发生什么事了，哎……
So what? I only received my appointment notice suddenly on my way back. I still can't make heads or tails of the situation here. *Sigh*...
Um, I was just passing by.
那也比我强，我才回罗浮不久，别说罗浮的近况了，就连丹鼎司上下的事，我也是一头雾水。
That's better than me. Since I've just gotten back, I know little about the Alchemy Commission's affairs, let alone the latest happenings on the Luofu.
好吧，那你找我是有什么事吗？
Now, what can I do for you?
那个，我得先说清楚——我才回罗浮不久，对这里的一切还不太熟，你要是想问路或者打听什么，我未必能帮到你，到时候你可别怪我。

丹枢大人她真是…世事难料啊……
About Lady Dan Shu... Life truly is unpredictable...
How's your life as the chief alchemist?
开始勉强找到一点丹士长的感觉了…但还是不太行啊，我这人不适合当领导啊。
I'm more familiar with the job now, but I still don't think I can handle it. I'm just not cut out to be a leader.
啊，受不了了，每天唯一的想法就是想逃跑，想逃到外星球去……
Ugh, I just can't take it. I spend every day thinking about how to escape to another planet...
但是我还是不能逃走。你知道的，出了这样的事情之后，人们对丹鼎司的评价在不断下降，但是我知道大部分医士和丹士并非邪教徒，他们需要有人支持。

But I can't do it. As you know, the public image of the Alchemy Commission has been greatly undermined after what took place previously. I know most healers and alchemists aren't cultists, and they need my support.
虽然前路不易，丹鼎司定会重新建立起信任的。
Although the future is challenging, the Alchemy Commission will regain the people's trust.
我有种预感：今天一定能逃出去！
I have a premonition: Today is going to be the day I escape!
{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你来的正好，我即将成为第一个靠技巧逃出幽囚狱的人，帮我见证下这个伟大时刻。
You've come at the perfect time, {F#girl}{M#boy}! I am about to be the first person to ever escape The Shackling Prison using my skills alone. You must be my witness to this great moment!
要是有摄像机就好了，这样就可以把越狱全过程拍个纪录片，片名就叫《白鸟的救赎》，肯定卖爆。
If only we had a video camera, then I could record it and make it into a film called: Shiratori's Redemption! I just know it would go viral.
你和那些鼠目寸光的囚犯一样，只会说风凉话。等着瞧吧，我准备了无数个日夜，这次万无一失。
You're just like those narrow-minded prisoners, brushing me off and being sarcastic. Just you wait. I have been preparing for this for countless days and nights. Nothing can go wrong.
收手吧，外面全是金人武卒。
Just give up. The place is surrounded by aurumaton soldiers.
你不会相信那些金属脑袋能战胜我聪明的大脑吧？那些金人傻乎乎的，行动轨迹早被我摸透了。
You don't believe that those bolt-brains could ever compete with my great mind, do you? Those aurumatons are simple and dim-witted. I figured out their patrol routes a long time ago!
白鸟扑棱着翅膀一顿操作……
Shiratori begins to flap his wings and...
哎呀呀…又失败了，为什么会这样，这已经是第一千三百八十一次失败了。
Ow-ow-owww... I failed again? How? This is my <unbreak>1,381</unbreak>st failure...
呜呜呜…明明应该没问题了啊，到底是哪一步做错了？
Waaaa... I thought I had taken care of every problem! Where could I have gone wrong?
啊哈哈哈…有趣，幽囚狱实在是太有趣了。这才是监狱该有的样子，相比之下我之前蹲过的那些监狱简直就是菜市场。
Ahaha... Interesting! The Shackling Prison truly is fascinating. This is what a real prison should be like. It makes all those other prisons I've served time in look like open-air markets!
我已经搞清楚问题出在哪了，只要稍微改良下方法。先这样，然后再那样…下次一定可以成功！
I have already ascertained where the problem was. I just need to slightly amend my approach... First I do this, then this, then this... I know I'll make it next time!
我怎么可能有事呢，我现在好得不得了。一想到自己正在破解的是全银河最复杂的监狱，我浑身上下都充满了斗志。
Why would I not be okay? I've never been better! Just knowing that I am in the process of cracking the most complex prison in the entire cosmos fills my whole body with fighting spirit!
你这么明目张胆没人管么。
Does no one care that you're so obviously trying to escape?
那些狱卒早就见怪不怪了，有时候我都在怀疑他们是故意不管我的。
Those prison guards have seen everything. Sometimes I suspect they're deliberately leaving me to my own devices.
我和那些时刻想要搞破坏的危险份子不一样，我是技术流。除了扇翅膀的声音有点大，造不成什么危害。

I'm not like those dangerous criminals who are always trying to destroy stuff to escape. I prefer to use my skills. My wings may make a lot of noise when I flap them, but they can't cause any real damage.
会不会是十王司的圈套。
What if it's a trap set by the Ten-Lords Commission?
我才不管是不是圈套呢，只要让我有机关和谜题破解就行。不得不说十王司确实有两把刷子，每次都把我绕得七荤八素的。

I don't care if it's a trap. I'm happy as long as I have some mechanisms or puzzles to crack. I have to hand it to the Ten-Lords Commission, though. They really leave me scratching my head every time.
不过我现在有些累了，休息下再战吧。
I'm a little tired now though. I'll get some rest before trying again.
对了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，我之前没见过你啊，你是刚进来的么。年纪轻轻就进了幽囚狱，可以啊你。
By the way, {F#girl}{M#boy}, I haven't seen you around before. You fresh round here? Getting put into The Shackling Prison at such a young age... That's some impressive work.
我来办事，刚好问你点问题…
I'm here for business. There are some things I wanted to ask you...
是说你看起来不像犯人。闲着也是闲着，就陪你聊聊吧。
I didn't think you looked like a criminal. Well, I've got nothing else to do. We may as well chat for a while.
你是犯了什么事被关进来？
What did you do to get locked up in here?
具体什么事…呃，我自己都记不清了，但我一不会偷二不会抢，所以肯定犯的不是大事。
Ah... I don't really, uhhh, remember. But I'm not a robber or a thief, so it can't have been anything serious.
但我这人吧，进了局子就不老实。刚开始他们把我关进地衡司的治安所，那里实在是太无聊了，我没忍住就跑了出来。

But I just can't sit still. It was when they locked me up that I started misbehaving. At first, they had me locked up in the Realm-Keeping Commission penitentiary, but I was bored to tears, so I had to escape.
这不就喜提越狱罪了么，他们便给我找了看守更严密的监狱。但那地方也没有趣多少，我一没忍住又跑了出来。
Obviously, that got me arrested for jailbreaking, so they got a prison with tighter security for me. But that place was just as boring. I couldn't help but escape again.
就这样我的罪名就像滚雪球一样越滚越大，滚着滚着就被送进了幽囚狱。这次我要是再跑出去，估计就真没地方可以去了。

That's how my criminal record just started to snowball, and it kept snowballing until I found myself in The Shackling Prison. If I actually do manage to make it out of here, I don't think they'll have anywhere else that can hold me.
You seem to enjoy breaking out of prison?
人嘛总得有点兴趣爱好，有人贪财有人好吃，我这人喜欢的东西有点奇特——越狱上瘾。
Well, everyone needs hobbies and interests. Some go in search of money, others like fine food, but I'm a little unique... I am addicted to breaking out of prisons.
那种破解难关时的妙趣横生，躲避抓捕时的紧张刺激，重获自由时的酣畅淋漓。啊！世界上还有比越狱更美妙的事么。
The fun of solving a challenging problem, the excitement of escaping the guards, the joy of regaining your freedom... Ah! Is there anything more wonderful in this world than escaping from prison?
正所谓「越狱一时爽，一直越狱一直爽」，越着越着还搞出了一些名声。有人称我是越狱大师，还抢着要我当我徒弟。

I have a saying: "Break out of jail once and you get a moment of joy, spend your life jailbreaking and you'll be happy forever!" I've actually become quite renowned for all my escapes. Some call me the "jailbreak master," and some are even begging to be my disciples.
不过又所谓「真正的大师永远怀着一颗学徒的心」，我这不是也来幽囚狱学习深造了么。
Although, it is also said that: "A true master always maintains the heart of an apprentice." That is precisely why I have come to The Shackling Prison — to further my craft.
你为什么是一只机巧鸟…
这你就不懂了，越狱是个危险活，我总得给自己找个替身嘛。而且在空中飞得高看得远，更容易发现一些安全破绽。

You wouldn't understand. Breaking out of prison is a dangerous game. It's best to find myself a substitute body. Plus, being able to fly allows me to see much further, which makes it easier to see gaps in security.
至于这玩意从哪来的…可能是狱卒们废弃的吧，反正我找到的时候它已经破成一坨废铁了，为了修好它废了不少力气。
As for where I got this thing from... I imagine one of the prison guards chucked it out. Either way, when I found it, it was just a pile of scrap metal. I had to put a lot of work into fixing it.
Then where is your real body?
在机巧鸟身上附身久了，搞得我经常以为这只鸟才是我的本体。至于真正的本体在哪，我自己都忘了。
I've been possessing this cycrane for so long that I often start to believe that this is my actual body. I don't even remember where my real body is anymore.
不过这不重要，我感觉现在的状态蛮好的，让我回归本体我还不乐意呢。
But that's not important. I am happy with how I am at the moment. Going back to my real body now wouldn't bring me any joy.
其他犯人看到你的样子不奇怪么？
Do the other prisoners not think it's weird that you look like this?
幽囚狱里的奇葩还不够多么，什么可以变成其他囚犯样子的变形怪，能思考会说话的玉兆之类的，我这都算是小场面了。

There's enough weird stuff going on in The Shackling Prison. A shapeshifter that can transform into other prisoners, a Jade Abacus that can think and talk... What I do is not a big deal at all in here.
再说了，我还有一个身份，就是阿合马铁窗集团的首席物流官。犯人们从阿合马那买的东西，还得眼巴巴的等着我给他们送过去呢。
Plus, I have another role — I'm the chief of logistics for the Arma Correctional Group. Prisoners have to rely on me to deliver whatever they bought from Arma.
哦，你是刚来的，可能不知道阿合马铁窗集团。没关系，后面你就慢慢知道了，在幽囚狱总有需要集团的时候。

Oh. You're new here, so you probably don't know about the Arma Correctional Group. It's fine. You'll come to understand that, in The Shackling Prison, there will always be times when you need the Group.
有什么越狱秘诀可以传授么？
Do you have any jailbreaking tips you can share with me?
其实也没么什么秘诀，最关键的就是坚持。有些犯人尝试个一两次就放弃了，而我能为破解一道锁研究好几年。

Honestly, I don't have any tricks or anything like that. The key is perseverance. Some convicts give up after just one or two attempts, but I can spend years researching how to break just a single lock.
其次就是注意观察，哪怕是再固若金汤的监狱也一定存在破绽，只是有的监狱的破绽很隐秘。
Another thing is careful observation. Even the most tightly guarded prisons will have weak spots, but some of them are better hidden than others.
就拿幽囚狱来说吧，虽然这里的安全措施已经复杂到令人发指的程度，但那个步离人不是照样跑出去了么……
Take The Shackling Prison for example. Even though their security measures are so complicated they can drive a man insane, that borisin still managed to escape, no?
What are The Shackling Prison's weak spots?
你这个问题问的，我要知道的话不早跑出去了么。
Well, if I knew that, then I'd have escaped a long time ago, wouldn't I?
不过凭我多年的经验，我觉得幽囚狱最大的安全保障在于环绕四周的水障。要是有精通御水之术之人帮助我，可能会更容易逃出去。

But, my many years of experience tell me that The Shackling Prison's greatest insurance is the surrounding moat. If only I had someone proficient in water magic with me, my escape would be a lot easier.
步离人越狱的时候你在场？
Were you here when the borisin escaped?
是啊。那天我正好在送货，远远的看到一群步离人冲杀了出去。
I was. I happened to be on a delivery that day, but I saw a group of borisin fighting their way out in the distance.
当时场面一片混乱，很多犯人乘机逃了出去。哼，浑水摸鱼算什么好汉，有本事就靠自己的技术出去。

The entire place was in chaos. Lots of prisoners used it as their chance to escape. Hmph, what kind of hero tries to capitalize on an advantage like that? If you've got the skills, then you should rely on nothing but yourself!
I don't have any more questions.
Then I'll get back to my jailbreaking.
I've got to go. I won't disturb you.
Then I'll get back to my jailbreaking.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你又来了啊，正好正好，我刚研究了一种越狱方法，你要不要看看？
You're back again, {F#girl}{M#boy}. Perfect timing. I've researched a new way to escape this place. You want to see it?
…除非是太卜大人亲临，否则其他人等一律止步。我再次声明，卜算推演之外的事，不清楚，不了解，不感兴趣。
...Except for the master diviner, no one else has access here. Once again, I'd like to emphasize that I have no knowledge or interest in things unrelated to divination.
重申一遍，现在是元会算法运行期间，闲杂人等请勿打扰。
Please note that the meta algorithm is running at the moment. Unauthorized personnel should not disturb the process.
人情也要看场合，该有的分寸可不能丢。
Well, it all depends on the situation. I merely act accordingly.
Can't you have a little chat with me?
那你要聊什么呢？若是和卜算一道有关，我自然是欢迎的，闲聊的话还是免了。
What do you want to talk about? If it's about divination, I'd be happy to have the conversation. Count me out if you just want to chitchat.
我只是路过的，你别凶我呀。
I'm just passing by. You don't have to be so mean to me.
我并不是在凶你，只是我正准备推演卦象，容不得外人干扰，请见谅。
I'm not being mean. I just can't be disturbed when I'm preparing for a hexagrammatic inference. Please don't be bothered by it.
我还有不少事务要处理…你若是有事，不妨直说。
I have a lot of things on my plate... Could you be more concise with your question, if you don't mind?
What do you want to know?
你对谁都是这个态度吗？
Are you like this to everyone?
你要是觉得我是故意的，那我恐怕让你失望了。就算是太卜大人亲临，我也是这样，不会有什么改变。
I'm afraid you'll be disappointed if you think I'm doing this on purpose. I'd act the same way even if you were the master diviner.
我既身为卜者，应当不骄不躁，不卑不亢…这些话，我时刻记在心中。
As a diviner, I should remain humble and well-composed. I always keep these words in my mind.
我现在负责打理穷观阵的一处阵法，至于具体的内容…无非是推衍卜算，记录涨落幅度之类的事务。
I'm now in charge of a matrix at the Matrix of Prescience... My jobs include making divination inferences and recording the changes.
至于阵法的细节，涉及太卜司机密的事…恕我无可奉告。
I'm afraid I can't disclose the details of the matrix as it involves confidential information about the Divination Commission.
有点好奇，同僚是如何评价你的？
I'm curious about what your colleagues have to say about you.
这种无关紧要的事，没必要知道，也没必要打听。
There's no point in asking about meaningless things like that.
他们爱怎么说怎么说，只要阵法一切正常，其他的事都不值一提。
They can say whatever they want. As long as the matrix works smoothly, other things don't matter.
I don't have any more questions.
Well, I'd better leave you alone then.

Well, I'd better leave you alone then.
我来办事，刚好问你点问题…
I'm here for business. There are some things I wanted to ask you...
闲着也是闲着，就陪你聊聊吧。
Well, I've got nothing else to do. We may as well chat for a while.
你是犯了什么事被关进来？
What did you do to get locked up in here?
具体什么事…呃，我自己都记不清了，但我一不会偷二不会抢，所以肯定犯的不是大事。
Ah... I don't really, uhhh, remember. But I'm not a robber or a thief, so it can't have been anything serious.
但我这人吧，进了局子就不老实。刚开始他们把我关进地衡司的治安所，那里实在是太无聊了，我没忍住就跑了出来。

But I just can't sit still. It was when they locked me up that I started misbehaving. At first, they had me locked up in the Realm-Keeping Commission penitentiary, but I was bored to tears, so I had to escape.
这不就喜提越狱罪了么，他们便给我找了看守更严密的监狱。但那地方也没有趣多少，我一没忍住又跑了出来。

I've got to go. I won't disturb you.
Then I'll get back to my jailbreaking.
"Only one divination per day"! I must bear this in mind!
抱歉，刚才在想别的事情，没有注意到您…哎，今日我不适合占算，就此作罢好了。
Sorry, my mind was elsewhere just now, and I didn't notice your presence... Well, today is not a good day for divination. Let's do it some other time.
What does "only one divination per day" mean?
卜者都是要解决具体的问题，面对占卜要始终保持客观、理性、冷静、平和的方式去处理它，否者占卜就会变成主观臆断。
Diviners deal with specific issues. We have to maintain an objective, rational, and calm approach to prevent the result from becoming our subjective opinion.
Why isn't today a good day for divination?
今日我心神不宁、集中不了注意力…这实在是不妙。
I feel restless and distracted today... This is bad.
卜者应该相信客观事实，过于情绪化只会影响占算结果…您倘若不能理解，我问您一个问题您便清楚了，人为什么想要占卜第二次呢？

Diviners should believe in objective facts, so being too emotional will affect the result. Let me ask you a question, and you'll be able to understand it. Why would people want to do divination for the second time?
Because they have doubts about the first result.
不错，这正是占卜第二次的直接原因。
我想要验证第一次的结果。
Because they want to verify the first result.
说得好听，不就是对第一次占卜结果产生了怀疑了吗？
It's just a nice way to put it. Doesn't it show that they have doubts about the first result?
Because they want to change the previous result.
占卜只是在描述「未来的事实」，再次卜算也改变不了，您只是在怀疑罢了。
Divination only describes upcoming facts, which can't be changed by another divination. They just refuse to believe the result.
曾经一位好友曾如此告诉我「对占算结果充满怀疑，企图二次占卜，这是卜者的大忌」。
A friend of mine once told me that it is taboo for diviners to doubt the results and try to divine twice.
但可笑的是，她却因为准确的卜算离开了太卜司，实在是令人唏嘘。
Ironically, she left the Divination Commission because of her accurate divination. This is really saddening.
不好意思，我有些离题万里了…我认得您，您是符玄大人委以重任的英雄，一点见面礼，不成敬意。请问还有什么事情找我吗？
Forgive me for going off-topic here... I've seen you before. You are the hero whom Master Fu Xuan regards highly. Here is a small gift for you. Is there anything else I can do for you?
I'd like to ask you a few things...
您尽管问，不过我知道也有有限，太复杂的事情，就麻烦您去问问几位卜官大人了。
Ask away, though I don't know much. If it's about something too complicated, I'm afraid you'll have to ask the Managing Diviners.
想问问您那位朋友的事…
I'd like to ask about your friend...
那位卜者叫作若月，您可能在长乐天广场上见过她的占卜店「鉴爻轩」，从太卜司里离职之后，就回去继承家业了。

Her name is Ruoyue, and you've probably passed by her divination shop in the Exalting Sanctum Plaza called the Looking Bronze. After leaving the Divination Commission, she went back home to take over her family business.
建木之灾前她就算出「卦象涨落在艮、坎之间，其势大凶」，然而突如其来的卜卦结果既没能指出时间因由，也无法重现，没有卜官能够采信她。

Before the disaster in Ambrosial Arbor happened, she already saw the trigram vacillate between the Mountain and Water trigrams to a terrible degree. Yet, the sign that came suddenly didn't point to a specific time and reason and couldn't be shown again. Therefore, no diviners took her divination seriously.
若月后来也因为各种原因离开了这里，她说自己满足于现在的生活，哎，我不知道这话里有几分真心。
Later, Ruoyue left the Commission due to various reasons. She said she was satisfied with her current life, but I'm not sure she meant it.
预测不是立即做出改变的保证。
「而是提供人们做出更明智决策的基础」，我明白，我只是…有些遗憾。
"It's to provide a basis for people to make a wiser decision." I understand, but... I just feel somewhat sorry for it.
说不定离开这里也是一桩好事。
Perhaps, it's a good thing to leave here.
究竟是不是好事，我不知道。
但我看她离职之后眼睛里有光，是比不少眼神涣散的卜者要健康不少的。
But I can see her eyes sparkling after quitting her job. She seems healthier than those diviners who always look lethargic.
如果当时司部收到了报告，又会是怎样的结果呢？哎，卜者不应谈论「如果」。
What would happen if the commission received her report back then? Alas, I shouldn't be talking about the what-ifs as a diviner.
太卜司的职场环境好像有点…
The Divination Commission as a workplace is so...
哈哈哈哈，您是想说「严峻」对吗？那是您多虑了。
Hahahaha, do you want to say "harsh"? That's not really the case.
三位卜官大人的想法人尽皆知，太卜大人也没有挑明，只有他们仨还以为别人不知道…看他们在职场上明争暗斗也属实是一件有趣的事。

Everyone knows what's on the minds of the three Managing Diviners. As the master diviner doesn't address the issue directly, the three still assume that the competition between them is a secret... It's quite amusing to see them scheming against each other at work.
至于若月，听说她被符玄大人算出「她会离开太卜司」，于是便让她离开了。
About Ruoyue, I heard that Lady Fu Xuan had predicted her departure from the Divination Commission before, so she allowed her to leave.
若月有关建木之灾的卜测报告让三位卜官脸上挂不住，说不定「离职」是太卜大人的一种保护方法…当然，这只有太卜大人自己才知道了。

The Managing Diviners were left ashamed because of Ruoyue's divination about the Ambrosial Arbor disaster. Perhaps, letting her go is the master diviner's way to protect her... Of course, no one can be sure about this except the master diviner herself.
听说你们和工造司的人不对付？
I heard that you guys are not on good terms with those from the Artisanship Commission.
不利于团结的事情还是不要说了。
Let's not talk about things that will undermine the spirit of unity.
他们建木受灾还得靠太卜司协助做清算，这说明我们之间关系还是挺好的。
We helped them to calculate the damage after the Ambrosial Arbor disaster. This shows that our relationship is fine.
不过我还得适当地批评一下他们，他们那些匠人老在外面传「太卜司工作清闲、喝喝茶水一天就过了」……
Still, I must criticize them for telling everyone that working in the Divination Commission is a breeze, and we spend most of the time enjoying snacks...
世界上哪有这种好事！这种话，我们自己调侃一下自己就算了，有一天我收到朋友发来信息问我「卜者真的有么清闲吗」，我真是无言以对。

There is no such thing in this world! When we say that about ourselves, we mean it as a joke. One day, I received a text message from a friend asking me whether diviners were really so free. I was speechless.
还得是他们工造司项目多、收入高，随便搞个发明就能躺在专利费上舒舒服服地混上几十年，这不比太卜司好多了？

Those at the Artisanship Commission handle lots of projects and are paid well. With just one invention, they can live off the royalties for decades. Isn't it much better than the job at the Divination Commission?
没有其他想问的事儿了。
I don't have any other questions.
没有其他想问的事儿了。
I don't have any other questions.
要是若月在这里就好了，她倒是比我能掐会算……
If only Ruoyue was here... She's a better diviner than me...
您来了，请问还有什么事情要找我吗？
There you are. Is there anything else I can do for you?
I'd like to ask you a few things...
您尽管问，不过我知道也有有限，太复杂的事情，就麻烦您去问问几位卜官大人了。
Ask away, though I don't know much. If it's about something too complicated, I'm afraid you'll have to ask the Managing Diviners.
想问问您那位朋友的事…
I'd like to ask about your friend...
那位卜者叫作若月，您可能在长乐天广场上见过她的占卜店「鉴爻轩」，从太卜司里离职之后，就回去继承家业了。

Her name is Ruoyue, and you've probably passed by her divination shop in the Exalting Sanctum Plaza called the Looking Bronze. After leaving the Divination Commission, she went back home to take over her family business.
建木之灾前她就算出「卦涨落在艮、坎之间，其势大凶」，然而突如其来的卜卦结果既没能指出时间因由，也无法重现，没有卜官能够采信她。

Before the disaster in Ambrosial Arbor happened, she already saw the trigram vacillate between the Mountain and Water trigrams to a terrible degree. Yet, the sign that came suddenly didn't point to a specific time and reason and couldn't be shown again. Therefore, no diviners took her divination seriously.
若月后来也因为各种原因离开了这里，她说自己满足于现在的生活，哎，我不知道这话里有几分真心。
Later, Ruoyue left the Commission due to various reasons. She said she was satisfied with her current life, but I'm not sure she meant it.
预测不是立即做出改变的保证。
「而是提供人们做出更明智决策的基础」，我明白，我只是…有些遗憾。
"It's to provide a basis for people to make a wiser decision." I understand, but... I just feel somewhat sorry for it.
说不定离开这里也是一桩好事。
Perhaps, it's a good thing to leave here.
究竟是不是好事，我不知道。
但我看她离职之后眼睛里有光，是比不少眼神涣散的卜者要健康不少的。
But I can see her eyes sparkling after quitting her job. She seems healthier than those diviners who always look lethargic.

The Divination Commission as a workplace is so...

不过我还得适当地批评一下他们，他们那些匠人老在外面传「太卜司工作清闲、喝喝茶水一天就过了」……
Still, I must criticize them for telling everyone that working in the Divination Commission is a breeze, and we spend most of the time enjoying snacks...

还得是他们工造司项目多、收入高，随便搞个发明就能躺在专利费上舒舒服服地混上几十年，这不比太卜司好多了？
