十王司请我来，你要赶我走？
The Ten-Lords Commission has invited me here. Are you chasing me off?
资料已确认。{NICKNAME}，此前未能辨认出你的身份，金人勾魂使四卅七号向你致歉。
Information verified. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> hereby apologizes for failing to identify {NICKNAME}.
I would like to ask you some questions.
请问。金人勾魂使四卅七号将尽可能回答。
Please do. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> will do its best to answer your questions.
我是金人勾魂使四卅七号。金人勾魂使是一种金人型号，而四卅七号则是我的编号。
I am Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak>. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy is an aurumaton model, and No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> is my serial number.
金人勾魂使的职责是协助各位判官和冥差进行调查审判。我们没有做出判断的能力，但可以凭借庞大的资料库，协助他人做出正确的判断。

The role of an aurumaton spectral envoy is to assist the judges and spiritfarers in investigation and trial. We do not have the capability to make judgment, but we can assist others in making the correct judgment with our extensive database.
如果你在协助十王司进行相关工作时，遇到了未知的情况，请随时与四卅七号或其他金人勾魂使沟通。我们的记忆玉兆中很可能有你需要的信息。
If you have questions when assisting the Ten-Lords Commission, please approach No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> or other aurumaton spectral envoys. Our jade abacus may contain the information you need.
推测你想询问的是「不赦十恶」。
I assume you are asking about the Ten Unpardonable Sins.
「不赦十恶」是仙舟联盟律法中最为严重的十条罪名，以下内容引自《十王刑统》：
The Ten Unpardonable Sins are the ten most serious offenses in the Xianzhou Alliance's law. The following is quoted from the Ten Lords' Penal Code:
「一者，令堕长生。二者，贪取不死。三者，迷乱心智。四者，诱陷魔阴。五者，残杀胞族。」
"One, Involuntary Immortalization. Two, Immortality Theft. Three, Beguilement. Four, Mara Ensnarement. Five, Phratry Murder."
「六者，窃夺机要。七者，破狱释囚。八者，离间盟契。九者，造作兵祸。十者，倾覆仙舟。」
"Six, Illicit Espionage. Seven, Prison Break. Eight, Sowing Discord. Nine, Incitement to Riot. Ten, Capsizing Xianzhou."
这十种罪行都是动摇联盟根本的大奸大恶，也必将招致严酷的惩罚。
These ten offenses are the greatest sins that could shake the very foundation of the Alliance, and offenders must be severely punished.
Who exactly are the Ten Lords?
无法回答。金人勾魂使四卅七号向你致歉。
Answer not found. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> sincerely apologizes for it.
What does the Ten-Lords Commission do?
以下内容引自《十王刑统》：「一司，秉烛守夜，勾摄魔邪。二司，威罚罪囚，靖平域内。三司，业报公允，天年有尽。」

The following is quoted from the Ten Lords' Penal Code: "The first division keeps vigils at night and evils at bay. The second division punishes the criminals and pacifies the territory. The third division ensures fairness in the Karmic Wheel and life expectancy."
简而言之：接引魔阴身、处理恶性犯罪、管理生死秩序。
In short, it guides those who succumbed to mara, deals with vicious criminals, and manages the order of life and death.
I don't have any other questions. See you next time.
请多保重。金人勾魂使四卅七号为你祈福。
Take care. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> prays for you.
That's all. See you next time.
请多保重。金人勾魂使四卅七号为你祈福。
Take care. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> prays for you.
你好，欢迎光临「广云袖」，店内现在装修，不方便入内，请问有什么可以帮到你？
Hello, welcome to Cloudbreadth Sleeves. Our shop's interior is undergoing renovation at the moment, and isn't available to customers. How may I help you?
有什么人气单品，可以介绍一下吗？
Do you have anything popular you can recommend?
看你有些面生，应该是刚来仙舟不久吧？我们「广云袖」是仙舟上最负盛名的服装店，就连景元将军也得给店里的设计师一个面子。

You look somewhat unfamiliar. I trust that you haven't been on Xianzhou long? Cloudbreadth Sleeves is Xianzhou's most prestigious place of couture. Even General Jing Yuan himself has to respect our tailors.
本季的高级定制是「流云浮生」，这个系列主打的单品是{F#镶边襜褕}{M#大袖深衣}，这是最地道的仙舟风格。
Our tailored line for this season is "Floating Clouds." The trademark outfit for this line is the {F#embroidered jacket}{M#sleeved robe} — a hallmark of the native Xianzhou style.
客人呐，别怪我说话直，「广云袖」虽是高定，但贵有贵的道理。化外民来了仙舟，基本上都到咱们店里定制服饰，感兴趣的话我帮你订几件成衣？

Forgive me for being blunt: Cloudbreadth Sleeves may be haute couture, but our prices are justified. All Outworlders who come to Xianzhou order their clothes here. Could I interest you in ordering a few custom-made pieces?
怎么样，你感兴趣的话，我拿几件来给你瞧瞧？
How about it? If you're interested, I could pick out a few for you to try.
Can I try one on first?
噢，是这样子的，我们店的高定都是限量款，没有付款的话是不可以试的。
Oh, about that, our shop's haute couture has limited quantities. You have to pay in advance to try them out.
而且这是新款，目前也没有任何折扣的，您这边确定可以接受吗？
And this is a new item, so we don't have any discounts available. Are you fine with this?
不订了，有没有普通成衣？
I'll pass. Do you have ordinary ready-made clothes?
普通成衣？最受化外民欢迎的是「仙舟经典花纹」成衣系列，目前已经断货了哦。
The ready-made ones? The most popular among Outworlders is the "Classic Xianzhou Floral" series. But we're sold out right now.
说实话，量产成衣花色陈旧，只有化外民会喜欢，采买量少，短期内不会补货。
Honestly, mass-produced and ready-made lines are outdated and preferred only by Outworlders. We don't stock many of those, and we won't be re-supplying on short notice.
喏，如果您不做高定，小店现在很难抽出时间接客，请您自便。
Well, if you aren't looking for haute couture, we're pressed for time to entertain you. Please see yourself out.
你就拿这种态度招呼景元老兄？
Do you greet Jing Yuan with this attitude as well?
那怎么会，景元老兄…呃，景元将军是我们「广云袖」的贵宾，享有贵宾礼遇呢。
Of course not, Jing... ahem, General Jing Yuan is an esteemed guest of our Cloudbreadth Sleeves. It's only natural he be treated as one.
我现在就去问问景元老兄。
I'll just go ask my bro Jing Yuan about this.
啊这…你，不对，您，您认识景元将军？！
Oo-er, wait, you... no, you-you know General Jing Yuan!?
今时今日这种服务态度是不行的！
In this day and age, the service presented here is unacceptable!
停停停，我从业几十年了，我所说的一切都是从顾客的角度提出的专业建议。
Hold it, hold it. I've been in this business for decades. Everything I say has always been in the customer's best interests.
可能你有些听不惯，就算是景元将军来定制礼服，我也是这个态度。
You may think it's a slight to you, but even if General Jing Yuan himself comes to tailor his attire, I would address him similarly.
好哇，我现在就去问问他。
All right then, I'll ask him right now.
且慢，你，哦不对，您、您认识景元将军？！
Hang on, you, no wait- esteemed customer, you know General Jing Yuan!?
抱歉！原来您是景元将军的朋友啊！误会了呀！我不让您试成衣，那都是因为店内只有普通货色，实在是配不上你这张{F#俏脸}{M#俊脸}，不看也罢！

Ooh, please forgive me! You're a friend of General Jing Yuan's! This is all a misunderstanding! I wouldn't let you try ready-made clothes because they're all run-of-the-mill fashion lines. How could they be a match for someone who looks as {F#gorgeous}{M#dashing} as you! Away with them, I say!
哎，您误会啦！我刚刚说的那些衣服啊，都是普通货色，实在是配不上你这张{F#俏脸}{M#俊脸}，不看也罢！

Oh no, you're mistaken! Those clothes that I just mentioned, they're all run-of-the-mill fashion lines. How could they be a match for someone who looks as {F#gorgeous}{M#dashing} as you! Away with them, I say!
在「广云袖」，我们会安排设计师来量体裁衣招待贵宾，从来不敢怠慢。我们给您准备了小礼物，请您笑纳，咱们和气生财嘛。
At Cloudbreadth Sleeves, we arrange for tailors to serve our esteemed guests without fail. We've prepared a small gift for you. Please accept it, and let us put all this behind us.
刚才多有不敬，稍等，我这里有些小礼品，您先拿着，不用客气！
If I have offended you in any way just now, please, have some of our gratuity here. Just take them! Don't need to be shy!
您看您方便的话，留个地址和时间，我帮你预约一下呗？放心，已经给你安排了「特快通道」，怎么样，您还有什么别的需求吗？

高定和成衣有什么区别？
What's the difference between haute couture and ready-made?
高定，顾名思义就是高级定制，由设计师亲自打版制作，限量发售。需根据每个客人的体型，在已有成品上再做微调。

高定系列走的都是仙舟风格，我们不会盲目跟风，每个系列都有专门的主题与单独包装。
Our hauteur lines are all styled in Xianzhou designs. We're not the bandwagon type — each series is specially themed and packaged.
成衣比高定便宜很多，这是最庸俗的玩意，压根称不上什么时尚。设计师只会把过时的花样与款式丢过去，还美其名曰「经典款」。

Ready-made clothes cost much less than haute couture clothes. Plebeians, if you will, and can't be considered trendy. Tailors will slap on out-of-style patterns on these and hail them as "classics" of the heyday.
有时候他们甚至懒得设计，直接在衣服上印满了店名，偏生在化外民之间大受欢迎，听说二手都炒到天价了…这简直是在亵渎这个行业！

你有什么推荐的服饰吗？

Pick a simple style, and never blindly go for the complicated. Our shop's advice is to stay away from the gaudy when buying haute couture pieces. Get the more obscure ones instead. That is the style befitting Xianzhou's elegance.
具体来说，就是从面料和颜色入手，选那些亲肤材质、中性色调的衣服，比如羊绒材质的、黑棕杏三类色泽的衣物。
To elaborate, when it comes to picking fabric and color, pick items that are skin-friendly and of neutral tones, such as wool-made ones, in colors like dark, brown, and almond.
真正懂行的仙舟人，就是只买对的，不盲目追求贵的。
A true mark of a Xianzhou native is to buy the right one, not the most expensive one.
景元真的光顾过你们店？

像您这样的贵宾光临，简直是我们「广云袖」的荣幸啊！您下次再来，提前跟我说一声嘛，我们可以闭店清场，专门接待您！

Madam Qingzu of the Seat of Divine Foresight previously made a tailor's appointment with us, but when General Jing Yuan arrived, he just picked the cheapest ready-made clothes before trying to leave.
在青镞大人的好言相劝之下，他勉强接受了咱们设计师量体裁衣。结果一边量衣一边制版的时候，将军大人还闭上眼睛睡着了。
Persuaded by Madam Qingzu, he reluctantly let our tailors measure him. But while we were fussing over him, the general closed his eyes and fell asleep...
原本想联系神策府士兵护送将军离开的，结果云骑军大人们一到，将军就精神奕奕地离开了，刚才的倦意就像不存在一样。
We arranged for the Seat's soldiers to help the general head back, but as soon as those Cloud Knights arrived, the general became energized and quickly left, as if the weariness were never there.

Since I'm not good at combat, I am assigned to the Interrogation Division and tasked to deduce and interpret the Karmic Tome under the Ten Lords' supervision. …不重要了，我们姐妹曾因魔阴之孽犯下极大罪过，深自懊悔。得蒙十王垂怜，我为自己和姐姐换来一次驻留还阳的机会。
...Never mind about that. We sisters had been stricken by mara and committed a great offense. We were regretful. Thankfully, the Ten Lords took pity on us and granted us another chance.

我们是阴冥使者，我们是必然的死亡，我们为所有长生种带去有尊严的结局。
We are the emissaries of the afterlife, we are the inevitable death, and we offer all long-life species a dignified ending.

Have a good think about it, sweetie. You're welcome back, any time.
嗯，亲亲多考虑考虑，欢迎随时光临。
Have a good think about it, sweetie. You're welcome back, any time.
哈哈哈哈，这样吧，您只要接入罗浮的网络，搜索「玲珑斋说玉」，那上面有我上传的「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」的评测影像，那里说得比较详细。
Hahaha. Alright, just link up with the Luofu internet and search for "The Iridescent Parlor Talks Jade." You'll find some very detailed videos I've uploaded that review the Auspicious XV.
亲亲要是想现在做决定也可以，我这边也准备好了体验用的玉兆。
If you're ready to make a decision now, darling, I've got a test unit set up here too.
I can't believe the Ambrosial Arbor is growing...
是啊！不过亲亲的消息好像有点滞后呢，建木已经静止下来了哦，这可是官方最新消息。
Exactly! But I'm afraid that's old news, darling. According to the latest official update, the Ambrosial Arbor has already stopped growing.
亲亲对建木这么感兴趣，是不是想观察建木，又担心离太近了会有危险呢？那亲可要看看咱们这款「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>加」了。

Dear, you seem very interested in the Ambrosial Arbor. Do you want to observe it, but worried that getting too close might be dangerous? Well, I'd advise that you take a look at our Auspicious XV+, sweetie.
「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>加」，镜头采用最新的「菜卡微粒子撞击镜头」，越远越清晰，手可触星辰。
The Auspicious XV+ comes with the latest Reica micro-particle impact lens that can produce clearer images from greater distances and allow you to even easily observe the sky.
怎么样？亲不火速入手一台，在安全距离尽情远观建木盛景吗？
What do you think, honey? How about buying one and using it to enjoy the marvelous view of the Ambrosial Arbor from a safe distance?
I don't think I need it...
好的呢亲，有什么其他需要随时找我聊啊。
Sure thing, dear. Just talk to me if you need anything else.
There may be a few things.
这位客人您来得正是时候，赶得早不如赶得巧，今天「赎珠阁」剩下的绝当押货都是些好东西。
Dear guest, you have arrived just in time. Better in luck than out of it: We have some amazing leftover goods for you.
不瞒您说，注意到刚才离开的客人了吗？我就没告诉他咱这里有什么好东西。
Let me be frank — see that customer who just left? I didn't mention any of those trinkets to him.
The Jeweler's Pagoda engages in preferential treatment of customers?
客人你有所不知，有些人是奔着做生意来的，小店管这叫顾客。有些人奔着别的目的来，小店也接待不了。
You may know this, but some come here to do business — I call them customers. Some come with other things in mind. Those I don't entertain.
对顾客，小店都是一视同仁的。对不是顾客的人，那小店也不必用接待客人的方式对待。
If you're a customer, I treat all of you equally. Otherwise, I am not obligated to treat you as such.
掌柜是不是觉得我特有钱？
You think I've got deep pockets?
哈哈哈哈，像客人这样不爱显山露水的人，不是大富大贵，也即将是大富大贵。早点结交认识，以后小店也好做生意嘛。
Hahaha, for one who shies away from attention, even if you're not wealthy now, you soon will be. I merely have future businesses in mind by befriending you now.
不过，客人还是误会了。刚才那位客人啊，不是来做生意的，所以我也没告诉他咱这里有什么好东西。
But, you are nonetheless mistaken. That customer just now did not come for business, which is why I did not tell him about my goodies.
你肯定跟每个人都这么说。
I bet you say this to everyone who walks in.
哈哈哈哈，客人这么说就见外了。我一向出言谨慎，审词琢句。
Hahaha, surely, you jest. I'm known for my caution, and weigh my words with great care.
客人可千万不要误会了呀。刚才那位客人啊，不是来做生意的，所以我也没有把好东西留给他。
Please do not misunderstand. That customer just now did not come for business, which is why I did not tell him about my goodies.
如何识别来者是客，还是另有所图，其实也是有点儿小技巧的。客人要是感兴趣的话，我可以介绍一二…客人要是对典当有兴趣，小店也随时为您服务。

The power to distinguish between a customer and a troublemaker is a particular trick of this trade. If you are interested, I could reveal a thing or two... I can also be of service if you are interested in our pledges.
一般来我们店里的客人有两种，一种是带着东西来的，他们大多会把想要典当的东西小心包装，这是来店里周转济急的。
There are two types of customers who come in. The first has something on them, and will wrap with great care what they wish to pawn. They come in search of salvation.
另一种客人，他们会关心那些过了典当期限的宝贝，根据自己的喜好挑挑拣拣。
The other type only care about Curios that have sat on the shelf for too long, and they browse at their fancy.
刚才那位客人，上来就问我「最贵的宝贝是什么」，我心中暗叫不好，暂时缓住了他，等到您朝这边走来，他便扭头走开了。
That customer just now opened with "what is the most expensive item you have here." It did not sit well with me, after which I delayed him. When you came over, he turned and went away.
您就算不买东西，我也得留着您在这里聊上一会儿呀。
Even if you aren't buying anything, I have to keep you here for a chat.
原来你把我当避风港了呀？
So you're using me as an excuse?
刚才那位客人血气方刚，不知道会干出什么。
That customer just now had a reckless air about him. I did not know what he would've done.
客人愿意帮我，麻烦事在没发生之前就能结束，小店自当感激不尽。
If you could help conclude a trouble before it started, I would very much appreciate that.
小便宜都让你给占完了。
I got the short end of the stick.
It was all thanks to your kindness.
客人愿意帮我，麻烦事在没发生之前就能结束，小店自当感激不尽。
If you could help conclude a trouble before it started, I would very much appreciate that.
别别别，您就当行行好，再多聊一会儿。我远远见着那人就快失去兴致了。
Please don't do that. See it as a good deed and stay a while longer. I can see from the corner of my eye that he will quickly lose interest.
客人愿意帮我，麻烦事在没发生之前就能结束，小店自当感激不尽。
If you could help conclude a trouble before it started, I would very much appreciate that.
我早就看出你的小心思了。
I already knew what you were trying to pull.
哈哈哈哈，一见面我就知道客人慧眼如炬，小店也不便卖弄了。
Hahaha, I knew at a glance you had a keen eye. I shall refrain from my shenanigans then.
客人看透了前面的客人心怀叵测，还专程来与小掌柜的如此攀谈，江湖救急不言之中，小店真是感激不尽。
That you notice the sinister intent of the customer and specially approached to chat with me. I will be ever-grateful for your lending hand.
要不这样吧，这是小店的一点儿心意，希望客人能够收下…客人要是对典当有兴趣，小店也随时为您服务。
How about this: Here's a token of our shop. I hope you will accept it... If you have any interest in pawned items, I shall be fully at your service.
I wish to chat with you a little longer.
客人说这话就客气了，谈生意嘛，先谈才有生意，我也愿意和客人聊聊。
You're too polite. To conduct business, one must first engage in chat. I am willing to chat with you.
I wish to hear some amusing stories about this profession.
趣事谈不上，说起来曾经有客人来店里与我打招呼，希望我能把店里珠宝当物的价格尽量往高了抬，我大概理解了他的意图，随即同意了下来。

I'm not sure if I'd call these events amusing, but there was once a customer who came in and hoped I would raise the prices of the jewelry pieces in the shop. I gathered his motive, and agreed instantly.
过了一会儿，他就带着女伴来店里了。我也尽量给每一枚珠宝当物讲了一个传奇故事，把价格抬到了他根本承担不起的程度。
After a while, he came in with his lady friend. I tried my best to weave wonderful tales for each and every jewelry piece, and raised their prices beyond what he could afford.
随后，我们便在欢声笑语中完成了交易，皆大欢喜。
Later, we laughed gaily as we completed the trade, and ended the affair on a happy note.
Where did this Mr. Moneybags come from?
哈哈哈哈，那位客人也不是什么财主，只是好面子而已。
Hahaha, he is no wealthy man, just a prideful one.
我好像知道发生什么了。
I think I know what happened.
I was merely playing along with a customer's act.
放心，实际结账的时候，那位客人只支付了原价。
Don't worry. When the time came to pay, he only had to pay the original price.
实在谈不上。我这「赎珠阁」开张数百年，就没有遇到什么暴利的机会，全是小本生意，只够勉强营生。
Not at all. The Jeweler's Pagoda has been open for hundreds of years, but I've never had a chance to make a killing. It's all slow and steady, and I can barely make ends meet.
客人有所不知，在仙舟上古玩的概念总是很模糊，古玩的价值则很含糊。换句话说吧，抛开文化的价值，客人以为仙舟人觉得古玩重要吗？

You may not know this, but antique collecting on Xianzhou has always been a vague market, as are the prices of antiques. Cultural value aside, do you think that Xianzhou natives consider antiques important?
遗憾的是，大部分仙舟人对一件上百年的瓶瓶罐罐不感兴趣。要是典当客人不觉得古物值钱，那我们也不便高价典当不是？

What's saddening is that most Xianzhou natives are dismissively uninterested in centuries-old ornaments. If a customer here did not think an antique valuable, it wouldn't be appropriate for us to pawn them at exorbitant prices, would it?
还得多亏了咱们各位化外民老爷，古玩还是古玩，文物还是文物，小店也能赚到一些蝇头小利。
I have you honored Outworlders to be thankful for — antiques and cultural artifacts all belong where they are, and I can still earn a little off the top.
Do you have any interesting collaterals?
有的有的，这位「招财猫尊」快过了当期，无人交当。
Of course! This Supreme Fortune Cat is about to reach its maturity date, and no one has redeemed it.
古语说「猫洗面过耳则客至」。所以，咱们开当铺的都得准备一位「招财猫尊」刮耳洗面，图的就是生意兴隆的好兆头。
There's an old saying that "a cat bathing itself heralds a customer's arrival." That is why we must have a Supreme Fortune Cat in our pawnshop — to herald tidings of good fortune.
要是客人对开店经商感兴趣了，可以考虑给自己的小店备一尊。
If you are interested in opening a shop, you can consider preparing one.
客气了，欢迎客人下次光临惠顾。
You're too kind. You're welcome back any time.
想要置换一些东西。（打开商店）
I want to buy some things. (Open Shop)
实在谈不上。我这「赎珠阁」开张数百年，就没有遇到什么暴利的机会，全是小本生意，只够勉强营生。
Not at all. The Jeweler's Pagoda has been open for hundreds of years, but I've never had a chance to make a killing. It's all slow and steady, and I can barely make ends meet.
所谓的珍玩，除物品「稀有」一事所含的价值外，无非是靠历史、传奇为之增色溢价。
Apart from the value derived from any inherent rarity, these so-called "treasures" can only raise their worth with relevant histories, tales, or fables.
但对仙舟人而言，化外民所认知的古玩不过是些过时的破烂罢了。谁又会将自己出生时代的旧物当成珍宝呢？
But to a Xianzhou native, what Outworlders deem ancient artifacts are but expired rubbish. Who would treat items made during their life as treasures?
Why not sell the other way round then...
...You mean selling old items to Outworlders?
将「旧物」装成典质品出给化外民？反其道而行之也不是不行。但有二不可——
Present old items as ancient pieces and sell them to Outworlders? Well, that's possible, I suppose, except for two things:
一则，这些「旧物」遍布仙舟，垂手可得，人家也犯不着从我这儿购入。
Firstly, Xianzhou's filled with this "old stuff." It's not even hard to find them. People don't have to buy it from me.
二则，如此营生能来一时快钱，但天长日久难免遭拆穿，无异饮鸩止渴。
Secondly, it may bring in a quick short-term profit, but this scheme would be thwarted by other locals in the long run, and I'd be left with nothing.
所以我想通啦，这爿小店能周转有趣之物，收支平衡就行。
So, I've made up my mind: I'm satisfied as long as this little shop can peddle in fascinating things and make ends meet.
价值不过是人心中起伏的波澜，我能在这儿看看形形色色的人生，看人心潮起潮落，也就足够了。
Value is all but determined by fluctuations of the human impulse. How I can meet people from all walks of life and observe the ebb and flow of their hearts is already enough.
客气了，欢迎客人下次光临惠顾。
You're too kind. You're welcome back any time.
「算盘书字银洋，件件要精，五者缺一，吃亏非小……」
"Abacuses, books, and silver, all of the finest quality. Taking one without the others would be such a shame..."
客人打算典当还是闲聊，小店也随时为您服务。
Whether you have something to pawn or just wish to chat, I am always at your service.
客人若是有别的打算，小店也随时为您服务。
If you have other plans, I am always at your service.
I wish to hear some amusing stories in your line of work.
说起来，曾有位客人闯进我的店里，言明想要用自己的一只手，来换取三十年寿命。
Now that we're on the topic, there was a customer who barged into my shop and declared that he wanted to trade his own hand for thirty years of his life.
我笑着问他是不是看了什么讲妖魔当铺的话本故事，误信了小说家言。这爿小店只能以物换钱，或是以钱换物。
I laughed and asked him if he'd read some nonsensical story about demon pawnshops and actually believed it. This shop only exchanges items for cash, or vice versa.
他自斗篷底下露出自己的右手，让我仔细观瞧。这是一支由活水银铸造的手臂，肌肉纹理细腻如生。他向我演示了这支手臂变化成刀、剑、弓、枪的奇景。

He then showed his right hand from under his cloak and asked me to scrutinize it. It was an arm forged of living mercury, its muscle contours artistically detailed. Next, he demonstrated the wondrous sight of turning his arm into a saber, a sword, a bow, or a spear.
那位客人受活水银侵蚀，命在旦夕，希望以自己身躯的一部分换来苟延残喘的三十年光阴。不知怎地，他得知有人曾在我这儿典当了一剂逆化灵药。

This customer had been poisoned by living mercury, and his life was in grave peril. He had hoped to relieve himself of this part of his body in exchange for thirty years of health. He somehow knew that someone had pawned a vial of reversion elixir here.
Did you agree to the deal?
我拒绝了。我给了他丹鼎司的地址，医士们或许对这种奇怪绝症感兴趣。
I declined. I gave him the Alchemy Commission's address. I figured the healers there would be interested in his rare condition.
Do you have any interesting pledges?
有位猎人打扮的化外民游客在我这儿典当了一把样式古旧的猎枪。
A hunter dressed like an outworld traveler pawned an old hunting rifle here once.
他说将这把枪瞄准目标曾驻足的地方，扣动扳机，能跨越光阴一枪击杀猎物。
He said that if you aim this gun where the target once was and pull the trigger, you could traverse time and kill your target with a single shot.
我也不知真假，所以在他走后不久，我心血来潮冲他站的位置放了一枪。
I couldn't tell if it was true either, so not long after he left, I fired a shot on a whim at where he once stood.
The pawnbroker suddenly breaks out into a toothy grin.
不知道这件物品至今没被赎回，是不是在下的罪过。
I still wonder if it was my fault that this item hasn't been redeemed.
先前的风波…掌柜能赚不少吧？
You earned a great fortune from the previous crisis, didn't you?
客人您说笑了，要是一般的危机，在商言商，那的确是个低买高卖的好时间，何况仙舟上最不缺的便是时间……

You must be teasing me. If the crisis had been an ordinary one, it would indeed have been a perfect time to buy low and sell high. We all have plenty of time on Xianzhou to wait for prices to rise, after all...
可这建木之事非同凡响，闹得人心惶惶的，咱们当铺也不例外，我也是土生土长的仙舟人嘛，这阵仗还是第一次见。我甚至一度考虑要不要关门大吉窝家里躲着去。

But the Ambrosial Arbor is no ordinary crisis. It put everyone on edge, and my pawn shop was no exception. Even as someone born and raised on Xianzhou, it was the first time I have seen something as serious as this. I even considered closing my shop to hide at home.
好在这事总算过去了，建木不再生长，咱们的生活也重回正常。至于客官您这话，我就当是您给咱们小店的诚挚祝福吧。

To everyone's relief, the crisis is now over. The Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing, allowing our lives to get back to normal. As for your words, I will take them as your sincere blessing to my shop.
曲木达直终必弯，夸谈戏言求真难。假作真时真亦假，听我说书得交钱。

Curved wood must be bent again to reach straightness, and finding truth from exaggerations and lies takes knack. When the real is fake, the fake is also real, and you need to toss a coin to hear my spiel.
在下是这「不夜侯」的说书人西衍。这位客官要是想听点儿成本大套的长篇，你可得在这儿等一会儿了。
I am Xiyan, a humble storyteller at the Sleepless Earl. If you'd like to listen to a few novel-length tales, you might have to wait here for a while.
…话又说回来，虽然说书场时间未到，但要是能买点儿茶饮，听上一会儿小曲儿，也不算浪费这须臾功夫，您看如何呀？
...Then again, though there is still time for the story sessions, if you were to sip some tea and listen to a few tunes, it wouldn't be a complete waste of time, would it?
你这说书人还管茶楼生意？
You are a storyteller, but also involved with running the tea house here?
这位客官，您看你这话说的。这茶楼生意好，来喝茶的客官就多，这喝茶的客官多了，我这也能观众老爷们套套交情，赚点儿小钱嘛。
{M#Good sir}{F#Madam}, don't talk like that. If the tea house has business, then more patrons will come to drink tea. With many patrons, I then can make friends and earn a little money for myself.
再说了，我看这「不夜侯」的茶品不错，您要是愿意听在下推荐，点上一壶「狩原毛峰」尝尝滋味，保准满意。
Besides, the tea at the Sleepless Earl isn't too shabby. If you'd like some recommendations, I'd say order a pot of Hunter Maofeng tea. Satisfaction guaranteed.
Great. I was just about to order some tea.
那您就来对地方了。这「不夜侯」是罗浮仙舟首屈一指的品茗胜地。别看老板娘年纪轻轻，在「铫煎黄蕊」上的研究可真是无人能出其右。

Then you've come to the right place. The Sleepless Earl is the premier tea spot aboard the Xianzhou Luofu. Don't let the innkeeper's young age fool you. Her research on how to simmer tea leaves is unrivaled.
您要是愿意听在下推荐，点上一壶「狩原毛峰」尝尝滋味，保准满意。
If you wouldn't mind my humble opinion, order a pot of Hunter Maofeng tea. Satisfaction guaranteed.
有一些懂得茶道的客人经常来「不夜侯」高谈阔论，在下虽然不才，也偷听到了一些门道，可以给您卖弄一下。您看怎样？

Some guests are tea aficionados, and often pontificate about all kinds of expert tea lore at the Sleepless Earl. I'm not a smart man, but I have memorized some facts and can show them off. Would you be interested?
别光说这茶了，你说说书吧。
Don't just tell me about tea. Tell me one of your stories.
…这可为难在下呀。说书的没有什么本事，只准备了几个本子，要是都讲完了，接下来就只能喝西北风了。
... You put me in a difficult spot. Storytellers don't have much except a few books stored in our heads. I'll become a pauper if I ever told them all.
客官您要是愿意听点儿闲言碎语，我倒是可以给您讲讲。
If you're willing to listen to a bit of gossip, then I can certainly fill you in.
Tell me more about tea, then.
那我讲讲这「鳞渊春」吧。「钟鳞渊之灵禀，擅飞云之秀气」，一品茗香，卧看星海。
Let me tell you about the Whale-Tide Spring tea, then. They say "one cup of Whale-Tide Spring invigorates the sense and brings the beauty of clouds." Lay back, imbibe, and watch the starry seas.
据传持明龙尊引得古海潮动如雷，淹覆鳞渊境洞天。又数十年余，持明后裔在一座浮岛上找到了一株盛放茶树，标枝秀立，芽叶如玉。

It's said that the Vidyadhara high elder roiled the ancient seas like thunder, and submerged the Scalegorge Waterscape delve. Dozens of years later, the Vidyadhara descendants found a flourishing tea tree on a floating isle — its sturdy branches were beautiful, and its leaves lush like jade.
哎呀，一想到这亦真亦假的造化故事，茶汤就仿佛多了一道韵味，您不会这么觉得吗？
Ahh... thinking over such half-truths and legends really lends the tea some extra texture. Don't you think?
想听听仙舟的传奇故事。
I want to hear about the legends of Xianzhou.
在下可以讲一下被称为「无罅飞光」云骑剑首…但奈何篇幅过长，仅是讲讲苍城仙舟被游星罗睺摧毁之事，便要上三天三夜。

I could tell you of the Cloud Knight Sword Champion known as the Transcendent Flash... but it's far too long. Just the chapter about the Roaming Star Rahu destroying the Xianzhou Cangcheng takes three whole days and three whole nights.
仙舟人自是毫不介意…在下看客官是化外之民，不好虚掷光阴，这里就不展开谈了。
The Xianzhou natives don't mind this story at all... but seeing as you are an Outworlder, I don't want to waste your precious time — so I will spare you from it.
啊不过…您要是赏脸来赶上说书场，那就权当另说。
Ahhh, but... if you would flatter me by coming to my show, then that's another matter entirely.
想知道你和老板娘的关系。
Tell me more about your connection to the owner here.
嗨，客官目光敏锐，实在瞒不住您。
Well well well! You have a keen eye. I can't hide that from you.
这小老板娘的父母与在下是旧识，他们将这一方小小茶楼留于小老板娘当作考验。
Her parents are old friends of mine, and they left her this teahouse here as a kind of a test.
狐人商家的本事大多是这样历练出来的。在下受小老板娘父母之托，来这里帮衬帮衬她的生意，暗中指导一二。
Most foxian traders learn their skills this way. I was asked by her parents to help her run the business from behind the scenes, offering a little guidance or two.
不过小老板娘天资聪颖，想必很快就能独当一面了。
But she is incredibly talented and intelligent. Soon enough, she'll be able to take charge of everything by herself.
I don't have any other questions.
行，等客官什么时候方便，我们再来聊聊。
Okay, let's chat again when you have the time.
怎么仙舟上还有说书人呀？
哈哈哈哈，经常有化外民问起这个问题——「你们仙舟上科技水平还挺高的，怎么还有人说书呀？」
Hahaha, I hear this from Outworlders all the time: "Xianzhou is so technologically advanced. Why do you still have storytellers?"
我明白这话外之意，无非就是在说「仙舟上娱乐方式那么多，怎么还在搞这老一套的东西？」，甚至还有人觉得我特别俗气，不应该出现在星槎海这里。

I know what the question's really asking though. They want to say "there's so much to do on Xianzhou, yet there's something as old-fashioned as this?" Some even consider my presence tacky, that I'm out of place on Starskiff Haven.
说书啊，确实是一门没落的艺术，后继无人算是一个问题，没有地方登台表演问题更为严重——无论是说书、相声，这都是要面对观众的手艺。

Storytelling is indeed a declining art. Few wishes to carry on this tradition, which is a problem. Far more serious is the lack of a stage — be it storytelling or crosstalk, these are art forms that require an audience.
我认识一些靠卖艺维生的曲艺人，戏台子早就没了，想唱戏也没地方…一门艺术就这样消亡了，我还挺舍不得的。
I know of artistes who rely on their performance for a living. The theater is a thing of the past, and there's nowhere to sing opera... An art form meeting its demise just like that... a true pity.
所以你看我，一个说书人管什么茶水生意啊？要不是这小老板娘提供这块场地、给咱赏饭吃，我们这些老艺术家也没地儿吃饭了。
And so you see me and ask: What's a storyteller doing, manning a teahouse? If it weren't for the little owner providing me with a venue and food, us old artistes wouldn't be able to feed ourselves.
I don't have any more questions.
行，等客官什么时候方便，我们再来聊聊。
Okay, let's chat again when you have the time.
势利交怀势利心，斯文谁复念知音。台上说书台下友，结缘便值万两金。
Snobs they come and snobs they go, and good friends and manners are hard to come by. A storyteller on stage and a friend below, an acquaintance is worth more than thousands of gold.
话这位客官您还是来得不巧，节目可能还需要等等。但是客官要想听我论茶的话，我还能小小地卖弄一下。
Unfortunately, you're still far too early for the show. But stick around if you don't mind listening to me chat about tea.
给我讲一段「云上五骁」吧。
Tell me something from the High-Cloud Quintet.
既然是客人要求，那我就讲一段「饮月君」的故事。
If the customer wishes for it, then allow me to regale you with a tale from the Imbibitor Lunae.
咱们得先讲到幽囚狱，这一天，关押了一名异星来客，因为当街击杀了七八名云骑士兵，作为重犯被押至牢狱深处。

We must first speak of the Shackling Prison. On this day, a visitor from another star was jailed for slaying seven or eight Cloud Knights Soldiers, and was thrown into the depths of the prison for this heinous crime.
这囚徒体格惊人，身高过丈，腰大十围，独大体胖，方面大耳，天生金甲覆身，刀枪不入…为了抓它，十王司还派了几名判官协同抓捕。

This prisoner's physique was shocking, standing over ten feet tall with a girth of over five feet. Everything was huge about him: His weight, visage, and facial features. His body was covered in natural golden armor, and impervious to weapons... To capture him, the Ten-Lords Commission had to dispatch its Judges to assist.
「这里就是牢狱最深处？」这铁皮囚犯声音低沉，就好像是观光游客向当地人打听景点信息，丝毫没有锒铛入狱的荒颓样儿。

"Is this the lowest depths of the prison?" This iron-skinned prisoner's voice was deep, his tone akin to a sightseer asking about the scenery. There was not a hint of desperation from one just thrown in prison.
「闭嘴！」一旁负责押送的云骑军对这铁皮囚犯十分不满，他刚才在抓捕行动里折了两根肋骨，现在还隐隐作痛。
"Shut up!" A Cloud Knight transporting him barked, obviously upset. He had had two ribs broken during the capture operation, and could still feel the throbbing pain.
「这里就是牢狱最深处？」这铁皮囚犯声音更加低沉地再问了一遍。这一问不打紧，一位在阴影之中饮茶的青年注意到了这名囚犯。
"Is this the lowest depths of the prison?" This iron-skinned prisoner asked again, his voice lowered another notch. With this question, a youth sipping tea in the shadows had noticed this prisoner.
(This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)
「…算了，再问你们也没有用，不如我自己下去探探。」这铁皮囚犯话刚说完，两名云骑军就像是被一双有力的大手捏住了喉咙，顿时昏了过去。

"...Forget it. It's pointless asking you a lot. I'll just have to explore down below myself." Just as this iron-skinned prisoner finished his sentence, the two Cloud Knights were instantly knocked out, their throats seemingly strangled by a pair of powerful giant hands.
定睛一看，云骑军的覆面铁甲已经完全变形。这异星而来的铁皮囚犯能够用意念控制金属，这两名云骑军根本不是他的对手。于是他再次向青年发问——

Upon closer observation, the iron visors that the Cloud Knights wore were completely mangled. This iron-skinned prisoner from another star could use his will to control metal, and these two Knights were definitely not his match. And so, he once again asked the youth —
"Is this the lowest depths of the prison?"
饮茶人背后的手铐、脚镣、脖锁、刑枷各种刑具开始铮铮作响，铁皮囚犯已经用他的御铁之术包围了饮茶人。
The myriad of cuffs, shackles, chains, and spikes hanging behind the tea drinker began to rattle, for the iron-skinned prisoner had already used his iron-wielding skill to entrap the youth.
而这位饮茶人，不慌不忙地再倒了一杯茶，并将茶杯举起，像是在邀请铁皮囚犯一般，他的声音清冷，但又引人生畏——
Yet this tea drinker poured himself another cup without missing a beat, then raised his cup, as if inviting the iron-skinned prisoner over. His voice was clear and cold, yet intimidating...
「看来你对控制金属颇为自信，我只用一杯茶水如何？」
"It appears you're rather confident of your metal manipulation. How about I just use one cup of tea?"
(This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)
瞬间，茶杯中茶水便活了过来，化作一团小小的水球浮在半空之中。铁皮囚犯瞬间反应过来，丁零当啷，小小走廊里所有铁器就兀自飞起，冲向饮茶青年。

The tea in the cup came alive in an instant, forming a small watery orb floating in midair. The prisoner reacted in kind, and in a clattering cacophony, all the iron objects in the narrow corridor hurtled towards the tea-drinking youth.
这一杯茶水游若蛟龙，以极快的速度弹开了所有飞行刑具，弹射力道之强劲，足以将碎裂的铁具深深嵌进墙内。
The tea swirled like a serpentine dragon, batting away all the iron pieces with such inhuman speed and force that they were wedged in the walls from the powerful deflections.
随后这杯茶水再次汇集，再次化作一团小小的水球。铁皮囚犯大惊失色，心说不好，下意识里想要择路而逃。此时这团茶水再次动作，封住了囚犯口鼻。

Then the tea gathered and formed into a watery orb once more. The prisoner, taken aback, thought to cut his losses and retreat. But the tea made its move again, sealing the prisoner's nostrils and mouth shut.
「咕咚」一声，这铁皮彪形大汉就倒在地上昏迷不醒了。
With a "thud," the towering iron-skinned figure fell to the ground, unconscious.
饮茶青年缓缓吐出「这里还不是最深处」，便消失在阴影之中。
The tea-drinking youth evenly muttered, "This is not the lowest depths," and disappeared into the darkness.
给我讲一段「云上五骁」吧。
Tell me something from the High-Cloud Quintet.
既然是客人要求，那我就讲一段「无罅飞光」的故事。
If the customer wishes for it, then allow me to regale you with a tale from the Transcendent Flash.
咱们得说到那一年云骑征兵日，校兵场上人头攒动。云骑士兵将场地中央的擂台围了个里三层、外三层，可以说是水泄不通。

We have to start off with that day of the year when Cloud Knights draft soldiers. The parade square was bustling with movement. Rows upon rows of Cloud Knights Soldiers surrounded a boxing ring in the middle of the square, forming a veritable moat.
这座擂台足有一丈五尺多高，擂台上站着是一位凶神恶煞、面带伤疤的擂官。这人来历非凡，和台下的入伍新兵截然不同。
This ring towered over fifteen feet and in it stood a ringmaster, his visage scarred and brutish. This man was tempered in battle, a stark contrast to those greenhorns below the ring.
「各位将士们！在下是擂官哞阿，原本是想来仙舟罗浮参加剑首大会，不料算错了星际时间，所以特设此擂台，希望能和将士们一分高下。」

"Soldiers! I am ringmaster Mou'A. I intended to come to the Xianzhou Luofu to partake in the Sword Champion summit, but I miscalculated the intergalactic time. So, I have specially built this ring, in which I hope to compare my might to you soldiers."
原来这彪形大汉，穿越星门而来，只为在刀剑功夫上争个高低。历代剑首大会上都有域外剑客参战，他们大多武艺高强、身怀绝技。

This burly fellow had traversed the interstellar portals merely to pit his skills in a martial competition. There would always be such foreign swordmasters in past Sword Champion summits who would participate in duels, and many of them would be extremely skilled.
「这刀剑无眼，当着云骑军众将士的面，我若是击杀打擂人，不合礼数，必然偿命。」大汉指着擂台上一尊陨铁靶人说道，「我就比谁的一剑更厉害！」

"The blade is blind. If I were to slay any challengers before the Cloud Knights, it does not fit decorum and I would be forfeiting my life." The man pointed to the meteoric alloy dummy in the ring and proclaimed, "Therefore, I want to see whose sword skill is the better!"
「若是我占得上风，请云骑将军赏我个一官半职！」一位银发将军坐在台下，笑眯眯地看见这擂官，懒洋洋地说着「无妨」。

"If I were proven to be the better, may the Cloud Knight General confer unto me an official title!" A silver-haired general seating beneath the ring smiled as he looked at this ringmaster, lazily proclaiming "That can be arranged."
(This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)
无论是云骑新兵、还是入伍多年的老兵，对着这块异星金属打造的靶人都无可奈何——强壮的士兵能一剑斩出剑痕，而稍弱的士兵甚至留不下痕迹。

None was a match before this target dummy forged from alien meteoric alloy, be it newbie Cloud Knight or even the most experienced veterans. The stronger soldiers could leave a mark on the dummy, but the weaker ones could leave nary a scratch.
这彪形大汉对云骑士兵的剑术连连摇头，再次开口「这百人试剑结束，竟无一人伤得了这小小靶人，看我一剑——」

This burly fellow kept shaking his head at the Cloud Knights Soldier's swordsmanship, and spoke again: "Thus ends the hundred-men sword trial. To think none could harm this meager dummy... Watch my blade!"
好家伙，这疤面大汉拿起云骑军的钝剑，瞬时间一道寒光闪过，这陨铁靶人被他生生地一分为二了。校兵场上欢呼声雷动，很多新兵第一次见到这样的场面。

'twas a sight to behold. This scarred man took up a Cloud Knight's blunt sword, and with a silvery flash, this meteoric alloy dummy was instantly cleaved in two. The parade square roared with cheers, for it was the first time many recruits had seen such a feat.
「这校兵场内如果没有高人打擂，我可不仅要这一官半职，还得要抹粉戴花、游街示众了！哈哈哈……」
"If there are no more skilled challengers in this parade square, I would ask for not just an official title, but to be wreathed in flowers and paraded through the streets for all to see! Hahaha..."
云骑军一名小队长仰面向台上看了看，未等这疤面剑客说完，双脚点地，飞身蹿上擂台，朝着靶人就是一剑，那两半靶人应声变成了碎块。

A Cloud Knights captain eyed the ring, and before the scarred swordsman could finish his sentence, the captain pushed himself off the ground with his feet, sprang up to the ring, and flashed his sword at the broken dummy, turning the dummy into pieces.
这一剑着实让疤面剑客脸色一青，他并未想到云骑军中有此等高手，但他佯装镇定「这位队长确实有些水平……」
The scarred swordsman's face paled at that single strike. He had not expected such talent among the Cloud Knights, but he feigned composure: "This captain does have some skills..."
「但是没有讨教到『无罅飞光』，我还不能从这擂台上撤下，哪位好汉是『无罅飞光』，快来让本大爷长长见识。」
"But I can't leave this ring without having learned a thing or two from the Transcendent Flash. Who among you is the Transcendent Flash? Hurry up and let yours truly witness your strength."
士兵们议论纷纷，谁也没去阻止他。新兵们虽然对这人赖在擂台不下心生不满，却也想知道「无罅飞光」的剑技究竟如何。
The soldiers murmured among themselves. No one confronted him. The recruits were unhappy about this man's shamelessness, but they also wished to know the power of the Transcendent Flash.
此时，一名白发剑士缓缓登上擂台，整个校兵场瞬时安静了下来——就像一缕孤高的月光拂过，众人不禁屏息凝神。

Right then, a silver-haired soldier steadily climbed onto the ring, and the entire parade square immediately fell silent — as if beholding a lofty moonlight streak whisking past, everyone held their breaths.
"Those who wish to see my sword, come and see it."
(This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)
可是这靶人已经变成了碎块，怎么才能看出这一剑的威力呢？白发剑士，取出好友相赠的宝剑，朝着校场上空挥了一击。
But this dummy has been shredded into pieces. How would one be able to judge the strength of a blade? The ivory-haired soldier unsheathed the prized sword gifted by a friend and swung it at the air.
在那一霎，整个校场似乎阴阳倒错、晨昏颠倒。在众人回过神时，「无罅飞光」已经收剑入鞘，失重一般的眩晕感却仍在持续。

In an instant, it was as if day turned into night over the parade square, and time itself had reverted. When everyone came to their senses, the Transcendent Flash had already sheathed the blade, but the dizzy feeling of vertigo persisted.
校兵场上所有人不禁在心中浮现出一个共同的想法——这一剑削去了时间。
Everyone in the parade square was thinking of the exact same thing — this strike had sliced through time itself.
静静缓缓流动的时间，原本如同流水一般持续不断，而「抽刀断水」之事更应该是无稽之谈…但这一剑，却实实在在地削去了时间。

Time, flowing slowly and silently, is supposed to trickle steadily like water, and it should have been impossible to deliver a "Water-Severing Strike"... but this slash had indeed pierced time itself.
只此一剑落下，擂台上的胜负已经无关紧要了。
With this decisive strike, the result in the ring had become inconsequential.
先生的话本该更新了吧？
It's time for you to update your story, isn't it?
是啊，在下的不少评书话本也要跟着更新了…以前那些「建木断绝数千年，至今再未复生」之类的桥段，在下全都要改了。
Yes, many of my stories have to be updated soon... I have to amend those parts that talk about how the Ambrosial Arbor has never resurrected for millennia.
唉…这种查缺补漏的工作真的是大工程…要一不小心说走了嘴，底下观众可真不给钱！
Alas... it's a very tedious process to spot and rectify all these errors in the stories... If I say anything wrong, my audience seriously won't tip me!
说来也是有趣，这建木竟然以这样的方式，对在下的工作造成了显著的影响…这估计寿瘟祸祖本尊都想不到吧，哈哈。
Who would have thought the Ambrosial Arbor would significantly affect my work in this way... I bet even the Plagues Author couldn't have expected this, haha.
欢迎光临不夜侯！客人几位，想要喝点儿什么茶？我是小店的主人梦茗，有什么吩咐您随时告诉我。
Welcome to the Sleepless Earl! How many of you are there? Which tea would you like today? My name's Mengming, and this is my teahouse. Let me know if there's anything I can do.
今日惠风和畅，很适合试试应季新芽的「狩原毛峰」，这茶我们店里从来不敢怠慢，要求上午采，下午制；下午采，当夜制…保证客人喝到最新鲜的。

There's a gentle breeze today, so it's a good time to try our fresh Hunter Maofeng which is in season. We never neglect this tea in our shop, making sure we pick fresh leaves every morning for the afternoon's brew, and afternoon leaves for the evening... ensuring you only drink the freshest.
不过按照茶馆的规矩，还得先问问客官的口味，您是喜欢喝茶汤浓的，还是喜欢喝一些清淡的呢？
But in this teahouse, we like to ask the customer's preference. Do you like your tea thick and strong, or mild?
那我推荐您试试「仙舟红茶」，虽说茶水浓淡与个人口味和感受有关，但要是浓苦的茶，咱们店也是端不出来的。
Ah, then may I suggest the Xianzhou Black Tea? The strength of the tea depends on personal tastes and sensations, but we refuse to serve tea that's too strong and bitter.
喝茶享受，可不是来找罪受的，而客人喜欢稍浓一些的茶汤，这「仙舟红茶」汤色红，入口微涩，对您来说是再合适不过的。
Drinking tea is for pleasure and not a torment. Since you like it rather strong, then this Xianzhou Black Tea with its red color and slightly astringent taste should suit you perfectly.
那我推荐您试试「丹鼎素针」，用盖碗泡着喝，沸水冲泡，快速出汤，这茶汤不浓不苦，鲜香醇厚正正好。

Then I recommend you try our Vegetations in the Alchemy Cauldron variety. Brew it quickly in a covered cup with boiling water and you'll soon enjoy some tea that's neither thick nor bitter. The flavor is just right.
俗话说，清水出芙蓉，天然去雕饰。好喝的淡茶呢，并非寡淡无味，而是淡而不薄，客人来两壶品品就明白了。
As the saying goes, the freshwater hibiscus is Nature's perfect sculpture. A good mild tea is not bland and tasteless, but mild and not thin. Try a couple of pots and you'll know what I mean.
来小店里最挑剔的客人也老爱说这句话。
That's what our fussiest customers are always saying.
那咱们就来品品新茶，试试口味。这应季新芽的「狩原毛峰」初展肥壮嫩芽，入杯冲泡，滋味醇甘，香气如兰。
Okay, let's try sampling a new tea then. This season's new buds of Hunter Maofeng have begun to ripen up. Brew it for a mellow sweet flavor and rich floral bouquet.
Sorry, I'm not here for tea.
明白了，要是想来不夜侯听人说书，现在可还不是时候，先生他呀还没有准备好。要不，您点壶茶，在店里坐一会儿怎么样呢？
I see. If you've come to the Sleepless Earl to hear some stories, you're too early — Xiyan xiansheng isn't ready yet. How about a pot of tea to while away the time?
顺带一提，客人如果着急公干商谈的话，现在店里也有提供瓶装带走的冷萃饮品。
By the way, if you're on business and in a hurry, we stock a range of cold bottled beverages for you to take away.
You've really got the gift of the gab.
哪里哪里，我也是才学着做生意，说话笨，有什么不合适的地方还望客人多多包容，这茶楼里每一位客人都是我的老师，您也不例外呀。
You're too kind. I just started studying commerce and am not good at talking shop. Please forgive me if I ever behaved inappropriately. Every customer here is my teacher, and you are no exception.
茶汤的讲究、饮茶的规矩…样样都是学问，还望老师不吝赐教。
Brewing tea, rules of the tea ceremony... it's all knowledge. Please be generous with your tips and tutelage.
老板娘不会在欺负我不懂茶吧？
You won't bully me for not understanding anything about tea, right?
岂敢岂敢，我这小店从父母那里继承而来，来店喝茶的客人大多是行家里手，梦茗可没有什么能够卖弄之处，还得向客人老师们多多取经。
You flatter me! I inherited this store from my parents, and most of our customers are experts. I don't have any particular skills to show off. Rather, there's much I can learn from our guests here.
茶汤的讲究、饮茶的规矩…样样都是学问，还望老师不吝赐教。
Brewing tea, rules of the tea ceremony... it's all knowledge. Please be generous with your tips and tutelage.
客人要是想聊，还得到里面坐坐…嗯，客人难道还有别的事儿要问梦茗吗？
If a customer wants to chat, they have to sit inside... well, is there anything else that you'd like to ask me?
Just a couple of more things.
哎，客人这是看准了小店现在不忙。那行，客官有什么不清楚的礼节执贽，都可以问问我，我也向您讨教讨教这做生意的本事。
Ah, you spotted that we're rather quiet right now. Alright, if there are any aspects of etiquette that you don't understand, ask me, and I'll pick your brains about doing business.
饮茶都有些什么讲究啊？
What are the rules in tea appreciation?
要是这茶饮讲究全都讲起来未必有点太长，我们就讲「选茗」、「蓄水」这两个规矩吧。
It would take forever to explain all the rules. I'll just talk about tea selection and water retention for now.
说到「选茗」，就拿我们店的狩原毛峰举例吧，不夜侯只选采其中最珍贵的凤舌品种，芽尖如峰，银毫披身。
Speaking of tea selection, take our Hunter Maofeng tea as an example. The Sleepless Earl only picks the most precious buds, usually long, pointed, and covered in fine hairs.
再说这「蓄水」，茶客们常说「乳泉石池之水」最佳，但这鳞渊境的波月古海之水才是真正的善水，炼丹煮茶，没有比它更好的了。

As for water retention, tea merchants always say that mineral water is the best — but the clear and ancient water in Scalegorge Waterscape is the best. There's no better water for tea and alchemy than this.
我也是有样学样，说得不对的地方，还请客人多多批评。
I'm also only learning and invite you to call me out if anything I've said is wrong.
怎么想到在这里开一家茶馆的？
What made you want to open up a teahouse here?
客人误会了，这家小店是家父开的，不夜侯在宣夜大街上也有四百余载啦！
My parents opened this teahouse, not me. The Sleepless Earl has been on Starwatcher Avenue for over four hundred years!
家父当时想着临近港口，过路的行人旅客需要歇脚休息。这茶水生意肯定能红红火火，得各位客官照顾，才有了今日之成就。
Dad wanted to be near to the port, with all the tired and thirsty people nearby. It was always sure to be a booming business, and we owe all our successes to the kindness of our customers.
小老板娘做生意有模有样的。
You are the model of a good young business owner.
我…我不小了！这本就是该当家作主的年龄了。虽然世人常道「狐人天生会行商」，但事实上是这都是磨砺出来的。
I'm... not young! I'm just at the right age to take over the family business. People may always say we foxians are naturals when it comes to business, but really it's all practice.
家父说是要考验考验我的本事，便留下一座茶楼，和家母四处云游去了。这做生意的门道，我也还远远没到登堂入室的程度。
Dad said that he wanted to test me, so he left me the teahouse and wandered off traveling with mom. I'm still a long way off from being proficient in doing business.
现在许多问题我还是得请教西衍先生，客人要是也有心相助的话，请不吝赐教。
Even now, I still have to ask Mr. Xiyan lots of questions. If you're willing to support me, please be generous with your criticism.
I don't have any other questions.
无妨，等客人得闲的时候，再来光顾。
It's okay. Come back when you've got more time to spare.
无妨，等客人得闲的时候，再来光顾。
It's okay. Come back when you've got more time to spare.
一回生二回熟，客人再度光临不夜侯！您今天想要喝点什么？
It's you again, welcome back to the Sleepless Earl! What can I get for you?
啊…我明白了，客人这是还有别的事儿要问梦茗，请讲吧。
Ahhh... I see. You've got more questions for me, do you? Go on.
I'd like a cup of tea.
The Ambrosial Arbor Crisis has blown up big time...
是啊，先前建木生发之时，我就在想，以前父母总跟我说，要化危机为机遇。既然这建木生发是一场危机，那必然也是能转化成机遇的吧？

Totally. Before the Ambrosial Arbor's growth happened, I had been thinking about my parents, who always told me to turn a crisis into an opportunity. Since the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth was a crisis, I thought I would be able to turn it into an opportunity.
如果能将它变成机遇，不就可以让茶楼经营得更好了吗？所以，我就去找西衍先生商量这件事了。
If I succeeded, it could be a great boost to my tea house's business. So I went to Mr. Xiyan to discuss it.
结果西衍先生却说「绝对不应当惦记着用这种事情获利」，然后教育了我一顿……
In the end, Mr. Xiyan told me off and said that I shouldn't have thought of profiting from the crisis...
我还没想清楚该如何应对这危机，转眼之间，建木的危机又平息了。唉，世事瞬息万变，教人如何反应得过来。经商之道可真难啊…看来我还有很长的路要走呢。

And the crisis ended in the blink of an eye before I could come up with a plan to make use of it. *sigh* Things are ever-changing in this world, and it teaches us to be adaptive to changes. Running a business is tough, and I still have a long way to go.
这位朋友，你那个星舰长得挺别致啊。怎么样？需要新船员吗？
My friend, that starship you've got there, it's gorgeous. How about it? Fancy a new crew member?
别这么说嘛。站在你面前的可是特级星槎驾驶员、保险定损甲级专家、乙级护卫舰维修师、特级厨师、星际和平公司C级销售员、甲级玉兆修理工——旭霞！

Don't be so hasty. Standing before you is an S-ranked starskiff pilot, A-ranked damage assessment expert, B-ranked ship mechanic, S-Ranked chef, C-ranked IPC sales associate, and A-ranked jade abacus fixer: Xuxia!
哼哼，说出来吓死你。站在你面前的可是特级星槎驾驶员、保险定损甲级专家、乙级护卫舰维修师、特级厨师、星际和平公司C级销售员、甲级玉兆修理工——旭霞！

Heheh, you'll be shivering in your boots when I announce my accolades. Standing before you is an S-ranked starskiff pilot, A-ranked damage assessment expert, B-ranked ship mechanic, S-Ranked chef, C-ranked IPC sales associate, and A-ranked jade abacus fixer: Xuxia!
我们的车上装不下那么多人…
We can't fit that many people in our ride...
什么啊！这都是我旭霞一个人！你去全银河打听打听，「仙舟万事通」说的就是我旭霞。
Wha-! It's all just one person! Xuxia! Me! Go ask around the cosmos! Everyone knows that "The Multifaceted" is me!
You'll have to ask the conductor about this.
什么？你不是管事儿的吗，虽然我一看就知道。那行，我想想办法，找个机会问问你说的列车长。
What? Aren't you in charge around here? It was rhetorical anyway. Fine, I'll think of something and ask that conductor of yours when an opportunity arises.
列车欢迎不同世界的乘客。
The Express welcomes passengers from any world.
乘客？你们那儿没有我能做的工作吗，那就算了，我对你们这艘星舰不感兴趣了。
Passenger? Have you got nothing around here that I can do? Forget it then. I'm not interested in this starship of yours any longer.
…哎，不为难你了。仔细想想，我现在也没有急着要立刻出发。
...*sigh* I won't impose then. Come to think of it, I'm not in a rush to leave right now anyway.
我在休息，顺便等待下一个远行的机会。
I'm taking a break, and waiting for a chance for a voyage while I'm at it.
仙舟是不允许长生种的永久迁徙舟外的，好像是生态灾难之类的说法，我也不懂…所以，想要出门远行，就必须找到一份可以合法外驻的工作。

Xianzhou prohibits long-life species from dwelling beyond the ship. Something about ecological disasters, I'm not too sure either... So if you want to embark on a voyage, you need to find interstellar work.
为了实现这个目标，我考了特别多的职业资格证，刚才我提到的只不过是九牛一毛。
To reach that goal, I took plenty of professional qualification certifications. The vocations I just mentioned were some of many.
来，这个送给你，这是我在外面旅行时发现的东西。不过，你可能见过很多类似的东西了吧。
I'll give you this: Something I found while traveling outside. Though, you must've seen plenty of these.
哎，在规划好下一次的远行之前，我都会暂时留在仙舟，要是想聊天的话，随时欢迎。
*sigh* Before the next voyage, I'll be hanging around on the Xianzhou. You're welcome to chat anytime you want.
I want to ask you about something else.
好啊，正好我蛮闲的。你想知道什么？
Sure, I'm bored as it is. What do you wish to know?
Have you been to many places?
坦白说，我觉得和那些短生种的旅行家比起来，我去过的地方绝对谈不上特别多。毕竟长生种离开仙舟并不是很容易。
Frankly speaking, compared to travelers with short lifespans, I don't think I've been to that many places. It's hard enough for long-life species to leave Xianzhou as it is.
不过毕竟我的年纪也比短生种长，要是我说自己去过的地方特别少，也显得有点儿不够真诚。
But seeing that I've lived longer than any of the short-life species, it'd be a little patronizing to say I haven't been to many places.
这些年，我考取了很多职业资格证，就是为了能够在任何船队的任何岗位有空缺时挤进去。
Over the years, I've taken plenty of professional certifications to fill up any vacancies a crew might have.
让我想想看，这些年我跟过…体育代表团、学术访问团、曲艺团、马戏团、外交使团…还有……
Let's see, over the years I've followed... sports representative associations, academician visitations, folk troupes, circuses, diplomatic missions... and...
你别以为我没听说过，他们全都是些祸害银河的坏东西。
Don't assume I don't know about them. They're all bad eggs who bring doom to the cosmos.
那是什么团啦！听起来就不是什么好鸟！我可是守法公民，从没做过任何非法的事情。
What sort of group is that? That doesn't sound like anything nice! I'm a law-abiding citizen who has never harmed a fly.
…合唱团！我可想起来了，我唱的是中音的位置。
... Choirs! I remember now, I sang alto.
简而言之，我会的本事越多，能去的地方就越多，现在我已经去过很多地方了，但是这还不够，我还想去更多地方。
Long story short, the more I knew, the more I could travel. And now I've been to many places, but that's not enough. I want to travel even more.
留在仙舟遇到什么不顺利了吗？
Are things not going well for you on Xianzhou?
谈不上不顺利吧。我从小就是坐不住的性格，十二岁时拿到「狐人大鼓一级演员」资格，十八岁成为「特级厨师」。
I wouldn't say that. Since young, I've always had a hard time sticking around. I was a certified "Foxian Grade 1 Grand Drum Actor" when I was twelve, and then an "S-Ranked Chef" at eighteen.
对仙舟大部分人来说，这张资格证就决定了至少四百年的生活。可万一我不喜欢这工作了呢，你能想象吗？不喜欢的工作做个四百年。

To most Xianzhou natives, this certification grants you at least four centuries of livelihood. But what if I didn't like the job? Can you imagine? Slogging away at a gig you hated for four hundred years?
我无法忍受，我绝对无法忍受。
I can't, and I never will.
虽然说狐人可以活个几百年，但是在仙舟这样死气沉沉的环境中，活一年、十年、一百年、一万年，有任何区别吗？反正每天都一模一样。
Foxians live for centuries, but living for one, ten, a hundred, ten thousand years, in such a drab place like Xianzhou... what's the point? It's all the same mundane monotony day in, day out.
所以我才无论如何都要到外面的世界去旅行。在充满变数和刺激的生活中，即使只有一昼夜的生命，也好过一亿个昼夜。
That's why I had to head out to travel, no matter what it took. In a life full of unknowns and thrills, one day of that beats a lifetime of such predictable doldrums.
回到仙舟一般做些什么？
What do you normally do back on Xianzhou?
跟家人聚一下，再拜访一下朋友…你听说过仙舟的「纸鸢」吗，我就像是飞上天的燕子，而这些我惦记的「家人朋友」就是那根线。
Hang out with family, visit friends... Have you heard of Xianzhou's paper kites? I am like a swallow that soars to the skies, and my friends and family are the string that anchors me.
我会把找来的宝贝卖给「赎珠阁」的瀚典掌柜，我们俩私交甚好，他对我不遮不掩，能当着面指出我高价买到的宝石是「远古玻璃球」。

I will sell the treasures I bring back to Pawnbroker Handian at the Jeweler's Pagoda. We get along well, and he never hustles me either — he'll tell me straight to the face that the priceless gem I bought is an "ancient glass ball."
哈哈哈，这种安心感的感觉，除了回到仙舟，在哪里也都找不到。
Hahaha, that sense of homely comfort, you can't find it anywhere else but Xianzhou.
再接下来，就是在仙舟上到处逛逛，谋划下次旅行的机会吧。
Next up, it's time to walk around Xianzhou and plot my next chance at a voyage.
无意冒犯，我可能比你多活数倍，要是生活不如你精彩，这不是很可笑吗？我要活得比你精彩百倍！
I didn't mean to offend. I've probably lived much longer than you — it would be a travesty if my life was that less exciting than yours! It's almost imperative that I lead a more interesting life!
That's all the questions I have.
嗯嗯。如果有什么适合我的外驻工作，记得推荐给我哦。
All right then. Don't forget to drop my name if you find any interstellar work suitable for me.
Nothing. Sorry, I have to go.
嗯嗯。如果有什么适合我的外驻工作，记得推荐给我哦。
All right then. Don't forget to drop my name if you find any interstellar work suitable for me.
好巧啊，又见面了，看来我们颇有缘分呐。
What a coincidence; we meet again. It looks like our fates might be intertwined.
今天我还去了司辰宫一趟，问了问熟人有没有外派工作需要人手，等来的只有「近期没有，再等等。」
I even went down to the Palace of Astrum today and asked an associate there if there were any interstellar vacancies. All I got was "not recently, wait a while longer."
你要是知道什么有什么适合我的外驻工作，千万别忘了我呀。对了，你找我有什么事情吗？
Don't forget to drop my name if you find any interstellar work suitable for me. Oh right, you wanted to find me for something?
建木生发又静止，真是神奇。
The Ambrosial Arbor grew then stopped. It's a miracle.
看过了，其实感觉没啥意思…一是那边戒严，不让靠近。二是这东西本身也没什么看头。
Having seen the tree, I'm not too impressed. Firstly, the place is heavily guarded, and people can't get too close to it. Secondly, there's nothing special about it.
你见过帕忽热里克的铬树林吗？参天大树似的铬柱，像真正的树林一样遮天蔽日。而且那可是真正的自然造物，真正的鬼斧神工！而不是什么莫名其妙的星神遗产。

Have you been to the chromium forest in Pakhurik? Towering chromium pillars that resemble massive trees block out sunlight like the canopy of a real forest. That forest is a fantastic creation of nature, a true miracle of the world! Instead of some mysterious legacy of an Aeon!
强烈推荐你有机会时去看看，绝对比这个建木壮丽千倍万倍——还不会害人。
I strongly recommend that you take a trip there. It's definitely much more magnificent than the Ambrosial Arbor, and it isn't dangerous.
鱼尾已经完全失去胶质了，即使再选用宁蜇去熬煮勾兑，也只是徒增烦恼……
The fish tail has completely lost its chewiness. Even if you stew it with jellyfish to blend the texture, it will only add to your troubles...
算了算了，我居然还在认真回想这饭菜口味，要是再想下去，我就得当众呕吐出来了。
Forget it. To think I even seriously reminisced on this dish's taste. I think I'd throw up on the spot if I gave it any further thought.
话不用说得这么难听吧？
That's a bit harsh, isn't it?
这就难听了？我还有更难听的。
THAT'S harsh? I've got even worse comments.
星槎海简直就是罗浮仙舟上的美食洼地，全银河失业的厨师都来这里找到了工作。
Starskiff Haven is where the art of cooking goes to die on the Xianzhou Luofu. All the unemployed chefs across the cosmos have found jobs here.
到底是哪一家不好吃啊？
我建议星槎海的所有厨师聚在一起办一个厨王争霸比赛，输了的一律不许开店。
I'd suggest for all the chefs in Starskiff Haven to compete in a culinary showdown. Those who lose must close their restaurants.
那个侥幸赢了的，必须再跟我来比一场，我亲自把这里的厨师一个不剩地赶出去。
The ones who win through sheer luck will have to pit their skills against me. I will personally drive all the chefs here out.
也算是吧，不过今天我只是普通的食客。
Sort of. Though I'm just a regular customer here today.
我不太愿意在这里说自己是一个厨师。毕竟，是个人、会烧水就能在星槎海做厨师。
I don't really like telling people I'm a chef here. I mean, you can get a cooking job at Starskiff Haven as long as you have a pulse and know how to boil water.
我这人自怜自爱，因此必须跟他们划清界限，希望你理解。
I both pity and love my passion, which is why I must draw the line with these amateurs. I hope you understand.
你误会了，我只是个偶尔烧菜的食客罢了，今天是专程来星槎海涨学问来的。
You misunderstand. I am but a foodie who sometimes cooks. I have specially come here today to widen my culinary horizons on the Starskiff Haven.
正常人怎么都想不出来，要怎么做，要加什么东西，才能这么难吃。所以，他们肯定有什么秘密调料我还没有学会。
Ordinary folks could never figure out how to make such terrible dishes even if they tried. Therefore, they must have some secret condiment that I have yet to learn.
…不是咸不是淡不是辣不是甜，是一种难吃的极意，是凡人到达不了的境界。
...It's not salty, nor bland, nor spicy, nor sweet — it is the epitome of "yuck." It is not a culinary state that mortals can attain.
我叫作高唐，在仙舟开有一家小小的私房菜馆，名曰「至味盛苑」。虽然一座难求，但是比起星槎海，小店依然保有对顾客的基本尊重。

I am Gao Tang, and I own a private kitchen in Xianzhou called the Garden of Gourmet. It may be a hole-in-the-wall restaurant, but compared to the rest of the Starskiff Haven, my humble restaurant respects all its customers.
如果你现在肚子稍微有些饿的感受，我建议你立刻另寻他处，以免被饥饿感绑架，被迫在这里的餐厅受苦。毕竟，这实在是不值得。

If your tummy is even the least bit hungry, I suggest you find another place this instant, or you will be hostage to your hunger, and you will be forced into suffering in this place. It is simply not worth it.
是不是你的标准太高了？
Could your standards be too high?
你误会了，我已经记不得我有多少次在星槎海因为难吃而痛苦愤怒。这是因为我的标准太高了吗？不对，这是一种本源的、生理的排斥。

You are mistaken. I have long forgotten the number of times I've lost my temper from the terrible food at Starskiff Haven. Is it because my standards are high? Nay, it is a raw, visceral reaction to their food.
你试试就明白了——啊不对，为了你着想，你还是不要试了。
You'll understand once you try... ah, that's not right. It's best if you don't try.
难道说你做得就很好吃了？
What, so the food you make is tasty?
我常常在担忧，在烦恼——我做得这么好吃，对星槎海的厨师真的公平吗？他们不会因为我的存在而惭愧吗？
I've always struggled with this notion: Is it really fair that my food tastes heavenly compared to Starskiff Haven's chefs? Would they not be ashamed in light of my existence?
不好意思，又自顾自说了这么多。千言万语不如你直接去我的店里尝尝，从现在开始预约，估计两年后就能吃到了。
I'm sorry. I'm tooting my own horn again. Instead of throwing words at you, why not pop over to my restaurant for a taste? If you make a reservation now, you'll get a table in about two years.
我看你对美食也有一定的兴趣，有什么想问的，随时欢迎。
I see you have some interest in the arts of culinary persuasion as well. You're welcome to ask me anything.
I want to have a chat with you.
哦，尽管问，只有谈及美食，我还算是颇有心得的。
Oh, ask away. I have much to share, as long as it's about food.
说真的，星槎海没有美食吗？
Is it true? That there's no good food in the Starskiff Haven?
严格来说，星槎海的食物足以果腹，但还谈不上是什么美食。
Strictly speaking, Starskiff Haven's food is enough to sate your hunger. Whether it tastes good is another matter.
没有严格挑选的食材，没有充分思考的处理，这样随随便便做出来的东西我是不会认可的。
Without stringent selection nor prudent handling of ingredients, I refuse to accept food that has been made haphazardly.
不过你放心，星槎海这里的食物不能代表仙舟美食，在仙舟上仍然能找到对美食有所追求的餐厅。
But don't worry. Starskiff Haven's food does not represent Xianzhou's culinary landscape. You can still find restaurants dedicated to the craft here.
别的不说，你要是吃过「至味盛苑」的菜品，估计你对这些劣质的食物也没有什么兴趣了。
If nothing else, once you've tried the dishes at the Garden of Gourmet, I'm sure you will lose interest in this subpar fare.
What kind of food does the Garden of Gourmet serve?
最近餐厅在做翔鲟公，这鱼五十年一跃，是「安河五君」中最重要的食材。
The restaurant's been making sturgeons recently. This type of fish returns once every fifty years, and is a key ingredient in "Five Lords of Anhe River."
「至味盛苑」就只取其尾部最脆的三根肉骨，吊煮百草高汤沃沐，再取鲜羊凝油化浆，油煎慢炸，直至肉骨焦酥。

In the Garden of Gourmet, we extract the three crunchiest bones from the tail, boil them in a broth of myriad herbs, then grill them using fresh goat's fat paste. At the final stage, we slow fry them till the meaty bones are caramelized and crisp.
这个过程里，有任何一步不满意，我都不会上菜。这也是为什么「至味盛苑」没有菜单，一天只能接待一桌客人。
Any step that's not up to snuff in this process, and I'll dump the dish entirely. This is also why the Garden of Gourmet has no menu — we only serve one table a day.
食不厌精，脍不厌细。仙舟上人活千年，饮食之道上必须这样讲究。
No such thing as food too fine, or meat too minced. Those of Xianzhou have lived for a thousand years, we must be meticulous with what goes in our mouths.
你谈到料理的时候好尖锐。
You speak with such passion when discussing cuisine.
人在一定程度上是被食物塑造的。所以，你能接受自己被粗制滥造吗？
We are all, in some way, shaped by our food. You wouldn't want to be made shoddily, would you?
I'm not exactly a role model to begin with.
我看你是化外民，一生能吃的餐食也是有限的，就更得谨慎选择了吧。
I notice you are an Outworlder. Your food tapestry must be limited, so you must make wiser choices.
对食物要求严格，就是在对「人之所以为人」严格。
To be strict with what you eat is to be strict with the "reason why we are people."
I'll ask you about something else next time.
哎，不会做就酱爆的就不要写酱爆了，直接写清炒什么都行。
*sigh* Don't say it's "bursting with juices" if you can't cook it this way. Just write "stir-fried" or something.
哎呀，我看这星槎海也算是块风水宝地，味觉失灵的厨师都在这里找到了新的人生。
Hmm, the way I see Starskiff Haven, it's a sort of promised land. Even chefs who've lost their taste buds can find new beginnings here.
{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}又碰见你了。想吃点什么，记得去「至味盛苑」预定一桌吧，别在星槎海浪费时间了。你找我是有什么事儿吗？

{F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, fancy bumping into you again. What'll you have? Don't forget to make a reservation at the Garden of Gourmet, and stop wasting your time at Starskiff Haven. What can I do for you?
建木的事，你应该也知道吧？
I suppose you know what has happened to the Ambrosial Arbor?
没有冒犯你的意思，但我对这个话题没什么兴趣。它长起来能怎么样呢，它停止生长了又能怎么样呢？吃饭才是人生的头等大事啊。
No offense, but I'm not interested in this topic. So what if it grows or not? Filling up my stomach is at the top of my priority list.
对所有吃饭和做饭以外的话题，我都没什么兴趣，咱们还是聊聊美食吧。
I'm not concerned about things other than eating and cooking. So, let's talk about food.
嗯！不好意思，我们之前认识吗？
那我就放心了，原来我们是不认识的人啊，真是不好意思打扰了。
Then we're strangers — and I'm relieved. I'm really sorry for bothering you.
…不过嘛，现在开始认识也不赖。我叫锦余，很高兴认识你。
...But we can start to get to know each other now. My name's Jinyu. Nice to meet you.
Have you already forgotten who I am?
啊！看来我们两个之前是认识的。抱歉啊，我已经彻底忘记你了。
Ah! We know each other, do we? I'm sorry. I've totally forgotten about you.
虽然我们可能认识过，就把这次当作第一次吧。我叫锦余，很高兴认识你。
Even though we may know each other, let's treat this as us meeting for the first time. My name's Jinyu. Nice to meet you.
I'm {NICKNAME}, and the pleasure is all mine.
哈哈哈，原来你是一个容易害羞的人啊。
Hahaha, so you're a real shy one, huh?
不愿意告诉我你叫什么名字？明白了，反正我也记不住。
You don't wish to tell me your name? I see. Not like that I'll remember it anyway.
呼——虽然这么说有些唐突，我其实一直在躲避无数个前男友、前女友的「追捕」，我还以为你是他们其中的一位，不过你应该不是。
Phew... This may be out of the blue, but I'm actually evading the pursuit of my countless ex-lovers. I thought you were one of them, but apparently not.
你有无数个恋人？也太花心了吧！
You have had countless lovers? Such a player!
你误会了，我其实很专一的。喜欢上一个人，就很难喜欢别人了。
You're mistaken, my heart can only belong to one. When I like someone, it's hard to like another.
但是这些恋人都是我的前世、前前世、以及前前前世的恋人，我不认识他们，但是他们认识我。
But these lovers are from my past reincarnations. I don't know them, but they know me.
你怎么知道我不是其中的一员呢？
And how do you know I'm not one of them?
你要是他们中的一员，你肯定就知道我是什么病情了。但是看着你天真无辜的小脸蛋，我很确信，你根本就不知道。
If you were, you'd surely know what illness has stricken me. But with that sweet, innocent face of yours, I'm certain you have no clue.
你要是知道了我的特殊疾病之后，你很快就理解了。
If you know what rare illness I have, you would understand very quickly.
太好了，我们现在就开始吧。
Great, then let's get started now.
爽快呀！不过，在我们两个确定关系之前，我想提前说清楚一件事。
Yippee! But before we make things official, I want to make something clear first.
你要是知道了我的特殊疾病之后，再考虑是否拒绝也没有关系。
Once you know about my condition, it's okay if you decide to reject me.
我们持明族通常生活个数百年就会蜕鳞逆生。身体的损伤会在蜕生过程中重新修补，但记忆也会被完全抹去。
We Vidyadhara usually stay young by molting after living for centuries. Any damage done to the body will be repaired during the molting process, but our memories are completely wiped.
而我呢，生了怪病，这样五六百年的过程被缩短到了一个月里。一个月之后，我就会忘记我们俩在这里相遇的事情，当然我们的恋爱经历也会消失。
As for me and my condition, well, my body compacts this five or six-century process into just one month. After one month, I'd have forgotten about our meeting here and now — and this love story, too.
怎么样，听完这些，你理解了吗？这一世恋人我没找到，说不定我们俩就挺合适的。
How about it? Do you understand after hearing me out? I haven't found a lover in this life, and perhaps we're just right for each other.
…可能是有些唐突，不过，你要是知道了我的特殊疾病之后，你也会理解的。
...This might be a little rude, but I'm sure you'd understand if you knew about my particular condition.
想再多了解一些你的经历。
I'd like to know more about your past.
失忆前也是这么浪漫的性格吗？
Were you always as romantic as this before you lost your memory?
我记不得失忆前是什么性格。不过认识我的人说我无论蜕鳞逆生多少次，我都是这个性格。再说了，如果记忆只有三十天，你也会跟我一样纵情去爱的。

I can't remember a thing about what I was like before I lost my memory, but those who know me say I remain the same way no matter how many times I molt. Besides, if you only had memories for thirty days, you'd be as spontaneous with love as me.
…好像因为前世的我总是热烈地去追求别人，所以我经常遇到一些擅自说着「永远爱我」的人。虽然不好意思，但他们是谁我都记不得了。
...It seems that since I was so passionate about romance in my previous lives, I am always meeting people who claim to love me "forever." I'm truly sorry, but I just can't remember who they were.
也许我确实爱过吧！不过那个「我」和现在的「我」根本就是两个人嘛，我才不要去扮演前世去满足别人，假装恩恩爱爱。我要寻找今生今世的最爱！

Maybe I really did find love! But that version of me is completely different from who I currently am. I don't want to pretend that I'm still that person and to fake my love for others. I'm looking for my true love in this life that I'm living right now!
这么短的记忆，肯定不方便吧。
It must be a real hassle having such a short memory.
说实话，确实不太方便。所有的朋友，所有的回忆在一个月之后就全部忘记了，好像被全世界抛下了一样。
To be honest, yes. All my friends and memories just get completely wiped after a month, as though the whole world had abandoned me.
不过，短暂的记忆也并不全是坏事。美好的记忆大多数都很短暂，就像是聚会总是短暂——聚会结束后独处的落寞才会更为长久。
But having a short memory isn't all that bad. Most of our best memories are brief, just like parties are all destined to end. It's the loneliness between those moments that feels like forever.
要是我像其他仙舟人一样，要面对几百年的孤独和重复…我不敢想象，我这样的性格肯定是受不了的。
If I had to face centuries of loneliness and repetition just like everyone else aboard Xianzhou... well, I can't imagine someone like me lasting very long like that.
难道说你也有在写日记？
Are you keeping a diary of all this?
正经人谁写日记啊。你写日记吗？我不写日记。
Who keeps a diary? Do you write in a diary? I don't.
过去的「我」没有留下什么日记，现在的「我」也不想把日记留给未来。即使一身风流情债难以解释，那也没有什么关系。

The person I was in the past never kept any diary, and present-day me doesn't really want to leave anything for the future. Even if my debt of love is impossible to explain, I still don't really care for it.
我对每一段感情肯定都是真挚而热烈的，这就已经足够了。如果缘分是真实的，那么就来再次相爱呗，我始终张开怀抱。
I'm definitely sincere and passionate about every relationship. That's enough for me. If destiny is a thing, then let's fall in love once more — my arms are always open.
We'll meet again if destiny permits it.
好呀，总觉得我们还会再见面的。
Sure, I feel like we'll meet again anyway.
We'll meet again if destiny permits it.
好呀，总觉得我们还会再见面的。
Sure, I feel like we'll meet again anyway.
等等，你的脸好熟悉…虽说我的记忆只有一个月，但我对你好像还有点儿印象。
Hold on, you look familiar... I may only have memories from a month ago, but I have vague recollections of you.
就算我的记忆只有一个月，你愿意和我来谈一场说走就走的恋爱吗？你要是想再考虑考虑也行哟。
Even if my memory only lasts a month, are you still willing to forge a spontaneous romance with me? If you need more time to think it over, that's fine.
哎，小仙只是追求过一阵子新鲜刺激的生活，何至于沦落至此啊……
*sigh* As a celestial, all I wish for is a refreshing, exciting life. How did it end up this way...
嗯？被人听到了啊…真是丢死个人，本仙我…咳咳，是…是谁偷听我自言自语？
Hm? I was overheard... How embarrassing. I... Ahem, who... who's eavesdropping on my monologue?
好些年没有回仙舟了，原来偷听的人都这么理直气壮吗？
I haven't returned to Xianzhou for some years. Do eavesdroppers now have no shame?
我只是一时间还没改过口来，请你不要再提起了。
It was a slip of the tongue. Please do not remind me.
咱们说话小声点儿吧，那边的官老爷们也不太希望我还跟人闲聊的…毕竟，现在小仙我只是一介罪人罢了。
We should lower our voices. The guards over there don't want me to be chatting with others... I'm nothing but a lowly criminal now.
嘘——我都说了，让你小声点儿，这也不是什么光彩的事情。
Shh! I already told you to lower your voice! It's not something I'm proud of anyway.
小仙我偷偷地逃出仙舟，在外面的世界生活了几百年，才刚被云骑军给抓回来。
I stole away from Xianzhou and lived for a few centuries in the otherworlds. I was recently captured by the Cloud Knights.
跑去别的世界是很严重的罪吗？
Is it such a serious offense, running off to other worlds?
你肯定是没有护照偷渡了吧！
I bet you absconded without a passport!
要是人人都像你这样天真就好了。
If only the world was as naive as you.
在仙舟，未经天舶司的审核，擅自前往其他世界可是重罪。对你这样的化外民来说可能有些难以理解，你听说过「丰饶之民」对吧？

On Xianzhou, leaving for other worlds without the Sky-Faring Commission's permission is a serious crime. It may be hard for you Outworlders to wrap your heads around, but you've heard of the Denizens of Abundance, right?
那是受过「丰饶」赐福，到处劫掠、繁衍的长生种联军。他们已经摧毁转变了许多世界。
Blessed by Abundance, they are allied armies of other long-life species who engage in wanton pillaging and reproduction. They have destroyed and transformed many worlds.
仙舟不允许丰饶孽物滋生，因此也定下了严格的律法，约束长生种的行为。
Xianzhou forbids the propagation of the Abominations of Abundance, and laid down strict laws to restrain the long-life species' behavior.
所以你想再聊一会儿吗？反正我在这儿等着也等着。
So you wish to chat a while longer? It's not like I've got anything else to do around here, besides waiting.
好了好了，那边的云骑开始瞪咱俩了，咱们就小声点聊聊，估计他们也懒得管。
All right, the Cloud Knights over there are starting to stare at us. We should talk more quietly, then they won't be bothered with us.
想再深入地和你聊聊天。
I want to know more about you.
嗯嗯，我知道你这样的化外民肯定有些好奇的。
Sure, I know you Outworlders are always curious.
想听你聊聊异世界经历。
I want to hear your stories of other worlds.
…咳，这几百年来，我确实遭遇了很多的事情。至于故事有没有趣，全看你怎么想了。
...Ahem, I've had many encounters these past centuries. Whether they are interesting is for you to decide.
我刚逃出仙舟，选了一个文明开化不到一千年的世界。为了避免云骑军的追查，我开着最小型的逃生鞘降落地表。

Back when I just fled from Xianzhou, I chose a civilization that was not even a millennium young. To evade the Cloud Knights' queries, I drove the smallest escape sheath I could find to descend on the surface.
救命啊，这种蠢事我再也不干了。逃生鞘差一点点就砸到了有人居住的村子。
Gosh, I'll never do such a dumb thing ever again. The escape sheath almost crashed into a village full of people.
轨道迫降，这种事情应该没人想来第二次。落地时我几乎四分五裂，如果是短生种，当场丧命那是确定无疑了…仙舟人的身体还真是强韧。

I had to force a landing from the orbit, an experience I bet no one would ever wish to have twice. I was almost smashed to bits when I landed. If I were a short-life species, I'd definitely have been killed on the spot... Good thing us Xianzhou physiques are quite tough.
唔，村子里的人把我给捡了回去。当时联觉信标因为和神经突触间的结合松脱了，在休养了好一阵后，我才搞懂当地的语言。

Mmm, the villagers brought me back to their village. The Synesthesia Beacon had been dislodged from my synapses, so it wasn't until a long time after my recovery that I could finally understand their language.
他们相信从天而降的我是仙人，叫我「神女」的时候，我觉得吃这点苦算是有回报了吧。
They believed I was a celestial fallen from the skies, and when they called me a "goddess," it felt like fair reward for my ordeal.
我以前只是丹鼎司的一个丹士，做研究能力有限，做医士能力也有限。比我有本事的人，几百年前就显山露水，爬上高位了……
I was a measly alchemist at the Alchemy Commission, mediocre at both research and medicine. Those more capable than me had already made their marks several centuries ago and climbed the ranks...
在仙舟这种日复一日没啥变化的地方，难道我还有出头的可能吗？
In a place like Xianzhou where nothing changes, how would I ever get the chance to succeed?
像我这样的人，在仙舟上遍地都是，干着没滋没味的工作，几百年一晃眼也就过去了，然后等着魔阴身发作前，十王司的冥差前来接应。我不想这样啊！

There were plenty of individuals like me on Xianzhou, laboring away at mindless jobs. Centuries would fly by in the blink of an eye, then you just wait for the Ten-Lords commission's spiritfarers to claim you before you get mara-struck. I don't want any of that!
然后我就想起我平时读的一些闲书，什么转生成为异世界之王之类的。主人公生前有多窝囊，转生后就有多风光，我实在羡慕得不行。

I then recalled those novels I used to read about reincarnating into a king of some alien world and such. The protagonist would always be a bum in their previous life, but become all-powerful when reincarnated. I truly envied their lives.
所以我想到了一件事——虽然我在仙舟上是个糟糕的丹士，但是在异世界里生活的话，我有着便利的玉兆，还有些做药本事，我还会平平无奇吗？
So I thought of something — I was a terrible alchemist on Xianzhou, but if I lived in another world, with my trusty jade abaci and talent in medicine, would I still be mediocre?
你真的是犯下了大罪了吗？
Have you really committed a serious crime?
也不算大罪吧？要不然十王司的审查怎么会排了三个多月都没轮上我。可见我也没做什么大不了的事情。
I haven't committed a major crime, have I? It's been over three months and it's still not even my turn for the Ten-Lords Commission's investigation. It's obvious that my misdeed was insignificant.
想想也是，我不就是让几只动物会说人话，教当地人种改良的星芋，治好了几个糖尿病患者——虽然他们最后还是土法炼丹害死了自己……

In hindsight, all I did was make a few animals talk, teach the locals how to plant modified startaros, and cured a few diabetics — though they still ended up killing themselves with primitive alchemical practices...
这么一算，我压根也没干啥嘛！
All in all, I technically didn't even do anything!
就是这样！我不认为自己是什么重犯，本仙只是在追求自己的幸福罢了！要是能在仙舟过上好生活，谁会想去什么低文明的穷乡僻壤生活啊？
That's right! I'm not some hardened criminal. I just want to pursue my own happiness! If I could live out the good life on Xianzhou, who would even think of slumming it in some lowly civilization?
为什么囚犯会出现在这里？
Why would a prisoner be here?
实际上，我也接受审问好些次了…你听说过仙舟俗语「罄竹难书」吗？他们就是这样形容我的，「作案前后跨度过大」，直到现在还没处理完。

Actually, I've already been interrogated multiple times already... Have you ever heard of Xianzhou saying "one-too-many"? That was how they described my crimes — "great disparity before and after my crimes." They have yet to finish processing my misdeeds.
再加之，这段时间仙舟上出了一些情况，我这样的案件就被暂时延后处置了。
Something happened in Xianzhou during this time as well, resulting in a processing delay in my case.
所以，我只是在云骑的看管下来星槎海放放风，等收监时间到了，我还得被十王司的人来押回去。
Anyways, I can only come to Starskiff Haven for a breather under the Cloud Knights' supervision. When it's time for lock-up, I'll still be escorted back by the Ten-Lords Commission.
不聊了，云骑开始瞪我们了。
We should stop here. The Cloud Knights are starting to glare.
哦…确实，你快走吧，别到时候连你也被抓走扭送十王司了，哈哈。
Oh... so they are. You should hurry up and go, or you'll end up in the Ten-Lords Commission too, haha.
所以呢，我就找了个星图上都无人问津的世界，找机会私自溜了上去了……
And that's why I found a world so desolate that nobody even visited it on the astral charts, and took the chance to steal away...
不聊了，云骑开始瞪我们了。
We should stop here. The Cloud Knights are starting to glare.
哦…确实，你快走吧，别到时候连你也被抓走扭送十王司了，哈哈。
Oh... so they are. You should hurry up and go, or you'll end up in the Ten-Lords Commission too, haha.
我也纳闷儿呢，十王司的冥差怎么还不来啊。
I'm puzzled too. Why aren't the Ten-Lords spiritfarers here yet?
万幸，我还没走呢，十王司的冥差还没来接我。
Thank goodness I'm still here. The Ten-Lords spiritfarers haven't come for me.
哎…你有什么事吗？还是单纯想找本仙…我是说，找我聊两句？抓紧说吧，你也知道，我时间不多了。
So... is something the matter? Or do you simply wish to chat with your honored celestial... I mean, me? Hurry up then. You know I don't have much time left.
想听你聊聊异世界经历。
I want to hear your stories of other worlds.
本仙…不好意思，咳。这几百年来，我确实遇到了很多有趣的事情。不过最难忘的还是这件事……
I am... Ahem, sorry. Over the centuries, I have encountered many interesting happenings. But the most memorable one is this...
当时，那个村子附近的小镇上，有一个有钱人。我喊他叫老周。老周有钱，但是人很善良，乐善好施。
Once, there was a wealthy man in a small town near the village. I called him Old Zhou. He had money, yet he was also kind and helped others in need.
可惜他命不好，生个儿子是天生的智力残障人士。搁仙舟这儿被称为「天缺者」…咳，扯远了。
A pity that he wasn't very lucky. He had a son who was intellectually impaired. They are what us Xianzhou people call "Incomplete Ones"... Ahem, I digress.
老周听到了我的事，就办了三牲大礼来求我。我一瞧，乖乖，这么隆重的嘛，心里就有些高兴，但仙人嘛，总得端个架子，就说「本仙可以一试」。

Old Zhou heard of my story and held grand sacrifices with livestock to beg me to help him. I thought, darn, such fanfare! I was secretly very happy, but you know, us celestials have to put on some airs. So I replied, "I shall give it a try."
我心说老周人挺好，得想办法治治他儿子。
I knew that Old Zhou was a good man, so I had to try to find a way to cure his son.
据说在建木存在的时代里，有不少丹士为了能获得一手资料，会用一种叫解语丹的药物给自己的实验对象提升智力，询问动物感受。

It's said that in the era of the Ambrosial Arbor, many alchemists — in order to gain knowledge — would feed what's called a Freelingo Pill to their own experimental animal subjects to increase their intelligence, then inquire the animals on their emotions.
You weren't worried about any side effects?
How's that even the same thing?
我心说，人嘛，也就是一种动物。我就拿了几丸解语丹给他的傻儿子。结果那孩子突然开窍叫他爸爸，把老周可高兴坏了。他三请五请，非要供养我。

Well, humans are also a type of animal. So, I took a few pills to his son, then that child suddenly came to his senses and called out the word "father." Old Zhou was overjoyed. He offered so many times to have me live in his house, all expenses paid.
于是，我就搬到了他家里，和他一起生活了…很多年。老周和我都不喜欢和人交际，于是我就把院里的母鸡和黄狗都变成了「能言走兽」，陪我们两个解闷儿。
So, I moved into his home and lived with him... for many years. Both Old Zhou and I disliked socializing, so I turned the yard's hens and dogs into talking beasts to help us tide over the boredom.
和老周一起生活的那些年，我每年都比上一年更怕他走。直到他活到一百岁的时候，我才意识到，自己做过头了。
With every year I spent with Old Zhou, my fear for his death grew and grew. It wasn't until he lived to a hundred years old that I realized I had overdone it.
那时我当然是和现在一模一样，但是老周已经苍老得像是一块蜷缩的木头…他攥着我的手，和我说：「够了，够了。」
I, of course, looked just as I am now, but Old Zhou looked more like withered wood than flesh... He took my hand and said, "Enough. Enough."
此后我用了三十年，才重新学会了怎么一个人生活。
I spent thirty years after that learning how to live by myself all over again.
哎！那边那个！聊两句差不多得了。
Hey! Over there! That's enough talk.
你看他警告咱们了，别的故事有机会再讲给你听吧。
They're warning us already. I'll tell you about other stories when we get the chance.
想听你聊聊异世界经历。
I want to hear your stories of other worlds.
你拿我当故事会了？不过我倒是没意见啦…这次就给你讲一个比较好玩的故事吧。
Do you take me for some storyteller? Not that I mind... I'll tell you something more fun this time.
事迹传开后，很多人来找我看病。有些病我能治好，有些病我只能缓解症状，有些病凭我手头的工具根本无能为力。但不管怎么样，大家都信了我这个仙人。

After word of my feats got out of the town, many people came to me to treat their illnesses. Some I could cure, some I could only relieve, but some I couldn't do anything about with the tools I had on hand. It didn't matter though, for everyone believed in me.
俗话说得好，浮名惹祸啊。几年后来了个地方官，想查清我到底是什么来路。
As they say, "fame invites trouble to your door." A local official came by a few years later to investigate my origins.
我本来打算糊弄过去，就请他看看打火机和幻戏。这人倒也厉害的，压根不信什么神仙法术，坚称是我使了障眼法，派兵拘走了我。

I initially intended to dupe him, so I just showed him a cigarette lighter and some immersia. This man was a tough sell though, and he didn't believe a word of it. He insisted that I resorted to illusive trickery, and had his men arrest me.
我不想伤人，也不敢伤人，就随他去了衙门。他就审我，到底是从哪儿来的什么人。
I didn't want to hurt anyone, nor did I dare to, so I followed him to the magistrate's court, where he interrogated me on my background.
我很害怕啊，就把实话都和他说了。我说我是天外来客，来自一艘在天上航行的大船，我们这些船上的人都不会死……
I was so afraid, so I told him the truth about me being a visitor from beyond, that I came from a star-faring ship in the sky, that those on the ship wouldn't age...
他听完，气得暴跳如雷，觉得我还在嘴硬。不过，这人倒是个挺好的人，也没打我板子，只是把我关进了牢里，让我「好好想想自己是谁」。

When all that was done, he was steaming with anger, thinking I was being facetious. But he was a good man. He didn't dish out any physical punishment, just imprisoned me and told me to seriously think about who I was.
这可是个了不得的哲学问题…
Now, that's a profound philosophical question...
你老实交代了他也不信…
He didn't believe you even when you told him the truth...
在牢里我越想越生气，觉得这人真是欺人太甚，我明明说了实话，却还是要把我抓来关。
I got angrier during my time in prison. This man was a bully! I had already told him the truth, but he still threw me in a cell.
所以我就远程启动了当初带来的两个金人。那地方也没处维修金人，我搬到镇上以后就一直存在老周家的仓库里，舍不得用。

So, I remotely activated the two aurumatons I originally brought here with me. There was nowhere to maintain them, so I just kept them in Old Zhou's storehouse after I moved into town. They were too valuable.
但这次实在没办法了，我启动了金人。那两个金人过来，面对着传统工艺制造的监狱，赤手空拳就给它拆掉了。
But now I had no choice but to activate them. They marched into the prison and tore the primitive bars open with their bare hands.
我大摇大摆走出去的时候，看到无论是那些卫兵，还是匆匆赶来的地方官，都惊恐地看着我，不敢上前阻拦。哈哈哈，想起来就想笑。

As I sauntered my way out, both the guards and the local officials who scurried over to investigate looked upon me with terror, but they dared not stop me. Hahaha, just thinking back on that scene tickles me.
再后来，我在县里的威望越来越强，甚至算是实质上的地方统治者。有一年，那个帝国的皇帝还来找我，求我给他的长子治病。这算是我的高光时刻了。

Later on, my reputation in the county rose to new heights, to the point where I was the undisputed local governor. There was even a year when the land's Emperor sought me out to treat his eldest son. That was the highlight of my time there.
唉，现在想想，这段人生历历在目，真过瘾。就可惜好景不长啊。
*sigh* Now that I think back on those vivid memories, that part of my life was truly exhilarating. Alas, good things never last.
哎！那边那个！聊两句差不多得了。
Hey! Over there! That's enough talk.
你看他警告咱们了，别的故事有机会再讲给你听吧。
They're warning us already. I'll tell you about other stories when we get the chance.
想听你聊聊异世界经历。
I want to hear your stories of other worlds.
你给我买杯茶去呗？星芋啵啵就行。虽然难喝，但离乡太久，难喝的东西也变得有滋有味嘞。
How about buying a cup of tea for me? Startaro bubble tea works. It tastes terrible, but I've left home for so long that I appreciate even the most terrible drinks here.
让我想想，这回给你说说我生涯中最危险、最接近死亡的一次冒险好了。
