Let's see... I'll tell you about my most harrowing experience this time, when I was closest to death.
其实我降落的那个世界里，外来者不只有我这个冒牌仙人。丰饶孽物当然也不会放过那些没有开化，没法保卫自己的世界。
When I crash-landed on that world, there were already other charlatan celestials there. The Abominations of Abundance would never overlook primitive worlds that had no means to defend themselves.
你听说过「步离人」吗？那是丰饶民中最强悍善战的一支，生有发达的犬齿和利爪，据说与狐人系出同源。仙舟在古代和步离人打过好几场战役呢。

You've heard of the borisin? They are the most battle-savvy among the Denizens of Abundance, born with full sets of fangs and talons. It's said they share an origin with foxians. Xianzhou and the borisin waged a few wars against each other in ancient times.
那个世界，也有步离人出没。不知是战败的流寇，还是想在那儿实现什么阴谋的斥候，我发现他时，他已经在山里筑起了一个堡垒。
There was a borisin in that world. I don't know if he was a straggler of a lost war, or a scout plotting some conspiracy, but when I noticed him, he'd already built a stronghold in the mountains.
这家伙拿百姓当实验品，肆意改造，什么令人发指的事情都做尽了。可我只有一个人，压根拿他没法子啊。话说回来，就算带了武器，我也是不敢上的。

That scumbag used common folk for experiments, modifying them with no regard to their dignity, and did every horrible act you can think of under the sky. But there was only one of me and there was nothing I could do about him. Even if I was armed, I wouldn't have dared to cross him.
思前想后，最后我还是决定豁出去了。要是连相信自己的老百姓都保护不了，那「仙人」还不如留在罗浮做个缩头乌龟好了。所以我……

I thought long and hard before I decided to give it my all. If I, as a celestial, couldn't even protect the villagers who put all their faith in me, I might as well have stayed behind on the Luofu as a coward. So I...
You raised the flag of rebellion!
呸呸呸！我都说了我打定主意豁出去了！
Hey! I already said I decided to give it my all!
我潜入步离人在山间筑的巢城，然后给装上了一个发信器。
I stole into the borisin's mountain city and installed a signal emitter there.
那玩意儿的能量只够发报一次，本是我给自己留的后备方案——真要是搞出什么乱子，还得让云骑军来收场。这下可好，用上了。

That thing only had enough power for one transmission. I had intended to use it as my last resort — if anything untoward happened, at least the Cloud Knights can get here to clean it up. And now, I had a chance to use it.
要不了多久，云骑军的巡狩部队就来了。他们几乎将那座山的山头削平，确保步离人没逃出去。
Not long after, the Cloud Knights' hunting squad arrived. They practically leveled the mountain, ensuring the borisin couldn't escape.
我是挺高兴的，但心里隐隐觉得，自己的仙人生涯怕是要到头了。云骑军但凡精细一些，必定能顺着线头抓到我的。唉，果不其然。

I was pretty pleased with myself, but I knew it was probably the end of my time as a celestial. If the Cloud Knights were any good at their job, they would follow the trail and capture me. *sigh* And so they did.
…你看这「罗浮」仙舟上这太卜司的卜算啊，虽然准是准，但那是有规矩的。
...Check out this prediction from the Divination Commission of the Xianzhou Luofu. It may be accurate, but there are rules around this stuff.
没错，俗话说「太卜司有三不占」嘛！
Yep! As the saying goes, "the Divination Commission has three taboos"!
"Don't touch the board; don't touch the frame; don't touch the net."
怎么太卜司到您这儿就变成体育运动了。人家说的那是「不诚不占、不义不占、不习不占。」
Why are you making the Divination Commission sound like a sport? They actually say, "No insincere divination, no unjust divination, and no unpracticed divination."
你就别嘚吧嘚了，咱俩往这里一站，大家伙儿看看谁才是太卜司的卜者。
Quit your nagging. Let's just stop here and leave it up to everyone else to decide who's the real Divination Commission diviner.
…哟，合着您是太卜司的卜者？我可真没看出来。
...Hang on, you're a Divination Commission diviner? Wow, I had no idea.
你看出来我不就露馅儿了嘛。
If you could tell, that would give away the game.
我昨日算到风雨将至，结果半夜起风了。你说咱这不就是太卜司卜者的证明吗？
I predicted a storm was coming yesterday, and just like that, a gale started blowing in the middle of the night. Isn't that proof enough that I'm a Divination Commission diviner?
什么叫有点儿风，这风可大了，整整刮了一宿啊！
What do you mean by "just a little wind" — it was gale force, and it kept on blowing for the whole night!
How come I didn't feel any wind?
没有风，您是睡在地窖里吗？这风可大了，整整刮了一宿啊！
No wind? Do you sleep in the basement? It was gale force, and it kept on blowing for the whole night!
咱那神策府门口有几尊石狮子，你记得吗？
Do you remember how there are several stone lions outside of the gates of the Seat of Divine Foresight?
记得，我之前还拍过一张照片，怒目圆睁、仰天啸啸，看上去非常威严。
Yes, I even took a picture of them before: Big round eyes, roaring at the sky... they look majestic.
昨晚风可太大了。我本来还在睡觉呢，只听着神策府那边儿传出了哐哐砸地的声音。早上我到星槎海一看，哎哟，有一尊石狮子被风给刮到港口来了。

The wind last night was roaring. I was asleep, but then I heard the sounds of something being smashed over at the Seat of Divine Foresight. And when I came to Starskiff Haven this morning, gosh, a stone lion had been blown by the wind all the way to the harbor.
那石狮子能被吹到星槎海？
A stone lion blown to Starskiff Haven?
这我能说瞎话吗？你要不信，你问他去。
What, you think I'm exaggerating? Go ask him if you don't believe me.
隔着洞天，狮子是怎么过来的？
How'd the lion come over with a delve in between?
嗨，昨天风不是很大吗？那星槎也被吹走了，这石狮子搭上星槎就来了这里。
Gah, there were gale-force winds yesterday, yes? That starskiff was also blown away, and this stone lion was carried here by the skiff.
你肯定以为我是在说瞎话是吧？你要不信，你问他去。
You definitely think this is a bunch of hogwash, don't you? Go ask him if you don't believe me.
您说这风能把石狮子刮到这里吗？
You say the wind carried the stone lion all the way here?
像话吗！那石狮子那么重那么沉，能让你刮阵风就给吹到星槎海来了吗？
Nonsense! That stone lion's heavy as a boulder. How could the wind have possibly carried it to Starskiff Haven?
你把这马褂儿给我脱下来吧！
哎！你不是说你不要了吗？你别急啊。那石狮子是神策府的石狮子，有灵性，天冷一刮风，自己就知道换个地儿取暖了，所以它来咱星槎海了嘛。

Hey! I thought you said you didn't want it! Simmer down, that stone lion belongs to the Seat of Divine Foresight, so it's sentient. When it gets cold from the bellowing winds, it knows how to find a warmer place. That's why it came to Starskiff Haven.
您的理解能力可真是高啊。
Your ability to comprehend things really is incredible.
这马褂儿可真方便，我也得来两件。
It's a good story. I should use it one day.
没有的事儿，全是胡说八道，这马褂儿给你啦。
Nah, it's impossible. The whole thing's a bunch of bunk.
那这么大的狮子现在又在哪儿呢？
And where is this huge lion right now?
哎哟，这不是风停了嘛，它呀又回神策府上班去了。
*sigh* The wind has stopped, hasn't it? So it went back to the Seat of Divine Foresight to do its job.
谢谢您来跟我俩接茬儿，我叫阿来，他叫阿往，在这儿港口上练习相声呢。您是找我俩有事，还是要咱再给您说一段？

Thanks for coming to join us. My name's Back'n — and he's Forth. We come to the harbor here to practice our crosstalk comedy. Are you looking for something from us, or do you want us to do another skit for you?
Alright, give me another skit worth my penny.
I can give something worth a bit more than that.
I'd like to hear another skit.
说到咱这儿星槎海，就不能不提司辰宫，提到咱这儿司辰宫啊，就不能不提驭空大人。
You can't talk about Starskiff Haven without mentioning the Palace of Astrum, and you can't talk about the Palace of Astrum without mentioning Madam Yukong.
我以前见过驭空大人手持弯弓「云鸢铣珧」百步穿杨，那场面真是……
I once saw Madam Yukong with her Cloudkite Resplendent Longbow, shooting with tremendous accuracy from a hundred feet away. Truly a sight to—
你等等，「百步穿杨」？你说我站在离驭空大人一百零一步的地方，可以用手接住飞箭吗？
Hang on, "a hundred feet"? Are you saying if I stood <unbreak>101</unbreak> feet away, I could just pluck her arrows out of the air?
「百步穿杨」就是一个文学概念，通常来说驭空大人的箭就算飞行<unbreak>1500</unbreak>米也具有十足的威力。
It's a figure of speech. Generally speaking, Madam Yukong's arrows are a threat from even <unbreak>5000</unbreak> feet.
那我在<unbreak>1501</unbreak>米能用手接住飞箭吗？
So you're saying if I stood <unbreak>5001</unbreak> feet away, I could catch her arrows.
你*仙舟粗口*为什么非要接那一箭？
*Xianzhou profanity* — why do you have to catch her arrows???
你俩来这里练习说相声？
Are you guys practicing your crosstalk here?
嗨，咱俩都是港口工人，得闲了才来这里练习练习，在别处也不方便。
Hi! We're both port workers, so we just come here to practice whenever we find the time. It's not really convenient elsewhere.
平时咱们俩都忙，时间老对不上，得亏这个港口也不远，能练上一段是一段。这些本事都是越练越得心应手。
We're usually really busy and can never find the time. Luckily, the port is close by, so we can squeeze in some practice. It's the kind of thing you get better at by practicing.
说起来，「不夜侯」的西衍先生赏识我们，所以我们有时候也能在茶馆里说上几段，钱赚得不多，主要是赚个经验。
Speaking of which, Mr. Xiyan over at the Sleepless Earl is a fan of ours, so we sometimes perform a few skits at the teahouse. We don't earn much money, but the experience is priceless.
咱俩以后还得登上更大的舞台呢这不是。
We are gonna head to some bigger stages for our skits in the future. Right, my bro?
将来你俩就成大明星了。
You guys are gonna be stars in the future.
The artist's path is long and difficult.
那我得抓紧机会给你签个名，以后还有机会可以升值。
Then I'll have to give you an autograph while I can. Who knows how much it'll be worth in the future?
那成，听我俩说这么久，您也受累了，下次再见！
Alright, you must be tired after listening to us for so long. Catch you next time!
我来说一段报菜名。蒸羊羔、蒸羊羔、蒸羊羔、蒸羊羔……
Let me show you what I can do recounting a restaurant menu. Steamed lamb, steamed lamb, steamed lamb, steamed lamb...
合着您这儿就一道菜啊？
So your shop only has one dish?
哎哟，咱们的观众老爷来了。是找我俩有事，还是要咱再给您说一段？
Ah, here comes our esteemed audience! Are you looking for something from us, or do you want us to do another skit for you?
建木的事，有什么内幕吗？
Do you know the inside story about what happened to the Ambrosial Arbor?
啊？不是，{F#姐}{M#哥}，您拿我俩逗闷子呢？
Huh? Hold on, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Are you making fun of us?
就是，这就有点不地道了，别人可能不知道，但我俩老早就见到过您来找那位——那位谁来着，顶漂亮的狐人姑娘。
It isn't very nice of you to do that. Others may not know it, but we have long seen — uhm — the gorgeous foxian girl you came to look for earlier.
噢，是停云姑娘，那可是天舶司的接渡使。
Oh, that's Miss Tingyun. She's not just anyone. She's the Sky-Faring Commission Amicassador.
要我说真有内幕，那也合着也该是您和那停云姑娘门儿清。
If there were any inside stories, you and Miss Tingyun would know it better than anyone else.
您要是方便，不妨跟我们也透透底儿，甭担心泄密的事儿。我俩嘴严着呢！
You can tell us a little about it if it's fine with you. Don't worry about us leaking the secret! We'll stay tight-lipped!
关于金人巷的相声录音…
About the Aurum Alley crosstalk comedy recording...
啊对，这事儿我们俩还没来得及好好谢谢您呢。
Ah, yes. We haven't thanked you properly for that.
我俩能力一般、水平有限，原本发个录音就当做是玩闹了。
We weren't any good as crosstalk comedians, so we only recorded our performance for fun.
谁曾想，嘿！反响还真不错！这些日子已经有好些人过来听我们说相声，完事儿以后说是在高阿姨那儿知道我们的了。
As it turns out, people love it! Many have come these days to enjoy our performance and told us they found out about us through Tall Auntie.
照这样发展下去，我们哥儿俩马上就能摆脱「爱好者」的身份，跻身主流相声界了！
If things go on at this rate, we'll soon be able to turn pro and be one of the mainstream crosstalk comedians!
Back'n, I think you're getting a little carried away.
Am I? Hee-hee, I'm sorry about that.
{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，你这是…我明白了，你是来向我引以为傲的肌肉许愿的吧？
Hey there, {F#lass}{M#lad}. What can I... Oh, I know. You're here to wish upon my marvelous muscles, aren't you?
{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，你看着它的完美的弧线，坚毅的线条，怎么会说恶心呢？
Just look at these beautiful curves and solid lines, {F#lass}{M#lad}. Why would you ever call them gross?
啊，没错！你想象一下自己最理想的模样吧，认真向肌肉许下愿望，会实现的！
That's right. Visualize your ideal physique and then make a wish upon these muscles. It'll come true for sure!
不小心搭话而已，我现在就走。
Uh, I wasn't trying to start a conversation. Gotta go!
诶？这可不行啊，{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}！
肌肉不会说谎，你会下意识地走到我面前，正是肌肉在渴求运动的结果。
Muscles don't lie, my friend. Your body moved quicker than your mind and sent you to me because your muscles crave a workout.
你看！肱三头肌，肱二头肌，斜方肌！挺胸，提臀，腹肌燃烧，再来十组，筋肉力全开！
Behold! Biceps, triceps, traps! Now focus on the form and engage the core! ...Alright, ten more sets! Let's go! Unleash the power of muscles!
俱缓陶醉在肌肉的魅力之中。
Juhuan has lost himself in the revelry of bodybuilding.
我曾经阅读过学者们对「命途」的讨论，他们说，总有凡人于有意或无意间踏入由「星神」执掌的命途，被称为「命途行者」。

I once read a scholarly discussion about Paths. They postulate that there will always be mortals that, intentionally or otherwise, set foot on Paths presided over by Aeons. These people are known as Pathstriders.
最原初的人们手无缚鸡之力，但他们锻炼了肌肉，从此便能承受重量，改造自然！你有想过吗，要是在筋肉的命途上走得足够远，人们能做到什么吗？

The ancients were frail. To overcome that, they trained and built their muscles, eventually gaining the power to bear heavy burdens and reshape nature! Now, have you ever wondered what humans can achieve if they keep advancing on the Path of Brawn?
改造自然的也不是肌肉吧？
I doubt nature was reshaped by muscles.
看来你脑中的肌肉还不够，还没有领悟到肌肉的境界。
It seems your cognitive muscles aren't developed enough to appreciate the beauty of brawn.
还能做到什么？改变宇宙规则？
Hmm, rewrite the laws of the universe?
当然了！只要在这条筋肉之道上走得足够远，就能够改变宇宙规则、逆转时空！
Absolutely! If we push far enough along the Path of Brawn, we could even rewrite the laws of the universe and reverse time!
银河里真的有「筋肉」命途吗？
Is there really a Path of Brawn in the cosmos?
也许，眼下是还没有，但是没有人能保证未来它也没有。
There isn't one yet, but who can say for certain that there won't be one in the future? It's not impossible.
我锻炼至极致的筋肉，就像是一颗黑洞，周围所有的物质都会被它的筋肉引力场吸引，越是强大的肌肉，就越会被束缚在其中。
Having honed my body to perfection, my muscles are now like a black hole that exerts a gravitational pull on everything around me. The stronger the muscles, the tighter the shackling.
当这股筋肉场达到临界点，我便将开辟全新的筋肉命途，我将成为「筋肉祸祖」！
When this muscle gravitational field reaches its peak, I shall forge the Path of Brawn and become the Brawn Author!
对了，既然肌肉的引力场在吸引着我们二人，不如我将珍藏多年的独家健身餐配方交给你。这样的话，你也可以一边吃着健身餐，一边锻炼了，就像我一样。

Since the muscle gravitational field has drawn you to me, I'll be glad to share the recipe for my special workout meal with you. This recipe is something that I've treasured for years. With it, you will be able to train while maintaining a diet suitable for bodybuilding, just like me.
那些伟大的事业，在最初的时候总是被视为「疯狂」，我不在乎他人看法！
The greatest feats are often seen as mania in the beginning. People can think of me however they want.
I want to embark on the Path of Brawn too.
筋肉会回应所有锻炼者的呼唤，等我开启了筋肉命途，你的肌肉会感应到共鸣的。
Muscles always respond to the call of the bodybuilder. Once I pave the Path of Brawn, your muscles will surely resonate with it too.
所以，向肌肉许愿吧！肌肉会回应你，我也会回应你的！
So, make a wish upon my muscles! They will answer your call, as will I!
向肌肉许愿吧！我将开启新的命途！
Make a wish upon my muscles! I will blaze a new Path!
这股强烈的筋肉引力，果然是你，我的肌肉又开始亢奋了。
This strong gravitational pull... I knew it had to be you! My muscles are getting pumped up again!
Tell me about the Path of Brawn.
筋肉祸祖会满足每一颗肌肉细胞的愿望，问吧，肌肉会告诉你一切的。
The Brawn Author will fulfill the wishes of every muscle cell. Ask away, for the muscles hold all the answers.
仙舟人的体质决定了，无论我们怎么运动，长出的肌肉都会缓慢消失，回到最初的状态。但这只是表象。

The bodies of the Xianzhou people are built in a way that we eventually lose any muscle mass we build. Our muscles will gradually revert to their original state, no matter how much we exercise... Or so it seems.
没有东西会凭空消失，肌肉更是如此，它们不过是囤积在了命途海洋的底部，等到肌肉填平了海，筋肉命途就会诞生。

Nothing disappears for no reason, my friend, especially muscles. The truth is that they're all collecting quietly at the bottom of the Path's ocean. Once the ocean is filled, the Path of Brawn shall emerge.
就在不久前，我还做了个梦，有一个{RUBY_B#漆黑的大日}漆黑的无底洞{RUBY_E#}挂在天上，消失的肌肉都飘进了空洞里。
Just a while ago, I had a dream where a {RUBY_B#Pitch-Black Great Sun}pitch-black, bottomless hole{RUBY_E#} hung in the sky, and all the muscles that had disappeared were drifting into it.
我相信，那肯定就是我在筋肉命途登神的前兆。
I believe that to be a sign of me ascending to the Path of Brawn.
How can I embark on the Path of Brawn?
健康的生活方式，平衡的日常饮食，这些都是老生常谈的东西。但真正的秘诀，只有一条——坚持锻炼。
Old-timers often recommend a healthy lifestyle and a balanced diet, but the true secret lies in one thing: regular exercise.
肌肉不会因为短短一天的努力就出现，能挡住炮弹轰炸的胸大肌，背后一定是久经磨炼的肉体。
Muscles can't grow overnight. To build strong pecs capable of withstanding cannonball attacks, long-term regular training is essential.
在饭前深蹲，在床上卧推，不要放过任何的空闲时间，哪怕是睡觉，在梦里也要用硬拉和长跑接力。
Do squats before meals, bench presses in bed... Make every second count. Even when you're asleep, make deadlifts and marathons a part of your dreams.
来吧，让我们一起，筋肉的明天在向我们招手！
So, join me! A future where muscles shall shine beckons!
What brings you to the competition?
因为我感受到了，筋肉的共鸣。筋肉有自己的灵魂，它们渴求更强的对手，我只是顺应它们的愿望来到这里而已。
Something resonated with my muscles. You see, muscles have a soul of their own, and mine crave bigger, more demanding challenges. I'm simply responding to their call.
环绕在竞锋舰的凝聚态筋肉粒子，它们渴望对战和交流，通过碰撞提升自己的筋肉力。
The condensed muscle particles surrounding the Skysplitter... They crave violence and action. They yearn to clash and collide with others to take their strength to the next level.
哪怕是现在，我的胸大肌和肱二头肌，也在一刻不停地拉扯我的身体，驱使我寻找其他的筋肉引力场。
Even as we speak, my pecs and biceps are relentlessly compelling me to move, urging me to seek out other muscle gravitational fields.
我想，这或许就是筋肉命途对我的束缚。
I suppose this is the inevitable destiny of those bound to the Path of Brawn.
别忘了坚持运动，肌肉是不会背叛你的。
Don't slack off on your training. Remember, muscles will never betray you!
I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.
别忘了坚持运动，肌肉是不会背叛你的。
Don't slack off on your training. Remember, muscles will never betray you!
「宁可三日无粮，不可一日无茶。」也就是说，仙舟人就算饿着肚子也必须喝茶，我也喝过一些茶，全都没有什么热量，这种说法可真是有点儿意思。

"I'd rather have three days without food than go one day without tea." I mean, the Xianzhou natives have to drink tea even if they're starving. I've drunk my fill of tea, too — and zero calories, too. It's a pretty interesting turn of phrase.
丹鼎素针、鳞渊春、荫山绿、狩原毛峰…嗯，到底要选什么好呢？
Vegetations in the Alchemy Cauldron, Whale-Tide Spring, Emerald Hills, and Hunter Maofeng...
要问我的话，就选鳞渊春。
If you ask me, Whale-Tide Spring's the best.
鳞渊春是吗，稍等，让我查一查茶饮典故。
Whale-Tide Spring? Hold on, let me look up some good quotes about tea.
「鳞渊春茶芽细嫩，炒成后干茶条索紧结，白毫显露，色泽银绿，冲泡之后杯中白云翻滚，清香袭人……」

"Whale-Tide Spring buds are tender. Bake-drying results in knotted strips as fine hairs appear with a silvery green hue. Brew to create swirling clouds in your teacup. Its mild fragrance is striking..."
全是我看不懂的仙舟话术，不过没事，点一杯鳞渊春也无妨。
It's all in unintelligible Xianzhou words. But that's okay, no harm in ordering a pot of Whale-Tide Spring tea.
Actually, I don't really know much about tea.
哈哈哈哈，我看出来了，你也是对仙舟文化好奇的化外民。
Hahaha, I can tell! You're an Outworlder with a curiosity for Xianzhou culture.
在仙舟想要点杯茶可真不容易，生怕是错过了什么文化典故。不过，这只是我个人的坏习惯，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你大可不必效仿我。
Ordering tea aboard Xianzhou isn't the easiest thing, and you might not get all the cultural allusions going on. But that's just my own bad habit, {F#m'girl}{M#boy} — you don't have to be like me.
我看这鳞渊春就不错，暂点一杯也无妨。
This Whale-Tide Spring is awesome, and I'll sit on a pot of this for a while.
闭着眼睛选一杯不就好了吗？
May as well just close my eyes and pick out one at random, right?
{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}也和我一样是个化外民吧。虽然话说的倒也没错，不过这样做实在是有伤风雅。
{F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you're an Outworlder just like me. You're not exactly wrong, but it's really quite rude.
仙舟茶饮有历史有文化、有礼仪有规矩，要是随随便便畅饮一杯，总感觉有点「焚琴煮鹤」之嫌……
Xianzhou tea drinking is steeped in history, culture, decorum, and rules. If one were to glug it down like some common ruffian, it would sully the tea's heritage...
我看这鳞渊春就不错，暂点一杯也无妨。
This Whale-Tide Spring is awesome, and I'll sit on a pot of this for a while.
我叫霍华德，是星际和平公司的贸易专员，这次来仙舟也是为了一点技术交流的缘分，幸会。
The name's Howard. I'm a trade specialist for the Interastral Peace Corporation, or IPC. I've come here to trade tech with Xianzhou. A pleasure to make your acquaintance.
It's a pleasure to meet you, I'm {NICKNAME}.
你好像很喜欢仙舟文化。
You must be quite a fan of the Xianzhou culture.
哈哈哈哈，原本我还在母公司的时候就对仙舟文化略知一二，现在有机会外驻了，便提前调查了一下。
Hahaha, I already knew a little about Xianzhou culture back at HQ. Now I have the opportunity to be stationed here, I have prepared ahead.
这不调查不打紧，越调查越感兴趣…虽然同事们已经叫我「仙舟通」了，但是我了解的还不过是仙舟文化的九牛一毛而已。
The more I studied it, the more fascinated I became... despite everyone at work jokingly calling me "Mr. Xianzhou," my knowledge about Xianzhou culture really is just a drop in the bucket.
感觉你已经比我懂得更多。
I think you already know far more than I do.
这是你太客气了。我知道，这就是所谓「谦逊」对吧，「天不言己高，地不言己厚」。
You're too kind. I know this is the famous "humility," right? "The dragonfruit never sings about its sweetness."
感觉仙舟上处处都藏着绝世高手，但却都装作自己平平无奇，真是个有趣的现象。
It feels like there are secret masters hidden throughout Xianzhou, each pretending to be super-normal. What a fascinating phenomenon.
我与{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}相谈甚欢，要是有什么想问的，我肯定「知无不言言无不尽」，权当是交个朋友了。
I've had a great time chatting with you, {F#m'girl}{M#boy}. If there's anything you'd like to know, I'll definitely tell you everything. Consider me your new friend.
哈哈哈哈，你我见面是缘，送你一个小礼物，「礼轻情意重」，请您千万不要客气。
Hahaha, fate has brought us together. Take this small gift. "Small gifts in place of vast appreciation," as they say. Please accept it.
呃，我又拽仙舟成语了，这是我的坏习惯而已，请不要介意。虽然联觉信标能跨越语言的藩篱，但成语就像潜藏在不同语言里的谜题，令人费解啊。

Oh, there I go again spouting Xianzhou proverbs. It's a bad habit of mine. Please forgive me. The Synesthesia Beacon may be able to overcome the language barrier, but proverbs are like riddles hidden in different languages — a convoluted quandary.
喔！我听说过，星穹列车又再次启程了对吧？公司的信息简报上提到过这件事了！
Ooh! I've heard that the Astral Express is starting up again? The IPC's bulletin mentioned this!
想跟霍华德先生闲聊一下。
I want to chat with Howard.
别客气，那我们聊点儿什么呢？
Don't be a stranger. What is it you want to talk about?
想打听一点儿仙舟趣闻。
I want to ask you about some Xianzhou trivia.
我倒是听说了一件趣事，这还是我从那位天舶司主司大人那里打听而来的。
I heard an interesting rumor from the head of the Sky-Faring Commission.
我去天舶司与仙舟商业代表洽谈的席间，看到驭空大人的爱弓，那真是一柄十足的好武器，不过凑近一看那也并非真正的弓箭。

I went to a meeting between the Sky-Faring Commission and the Xianzhou traders' representatives, and I saw Madam Yukong's beloved bow. It's really a fine weapon. But upon closer inspection, I discovered it wasn't a real bow.
她那箭矢可以自动制导索敌，开弦不过是为了满足某种古代射术的仪式感。
Her arrows are actually self-guided auto-aim ones, and drawing the bow is just used to give a sense of antiquity.
仙舟人喜好用一些手段隐藏实力，可能这就是所谓「藏锋守拙」的文化吧。
The Xianzhou natives like using a few tricks to mask their strength, and it's probably connected to their propensity for humility.
公司来仙舟的贸易活动…
You came to Xianzhou on a trade mission for the IPC...
哈哈哈哈，这可不兴打听呀。
Haha, that's not something we can talk about.
实不相瞒，公司给仙舟自傲的技术开出了合适的价码，但是实际上具体的洽谈不太顺利……
Well, to be honest, we offered a handsome price for some of Xianzhou's proud technological achievements, but negotiations didn't actually go so well...
不过，我相信仙舟不是一个保守的地方，「功夫不负有心人」，事情总会有突破的。
But I trust that Xianzhou isn't a conservative place. Hard work always pays off — and breakthroughs are always possible.
我就只能说到这种程度了，希望你见谅，哈哈哈哈。
That's about as much as I can say on this. Hope you forgive me! Hahaha.
有没有给化外民的建议…
Have you got any advice for an Outworlder?
我刚到仙舟的时候，收到了一本小册子叫《化外民也能学会的地道仙舟俗语<unbreak>100</unbreak>句》，虽然标题取得不怎么样，内容还是不错的。
I was gifted a manual when I first got here, called 100 Common Xianzhou Proverbs for Outworlders. It's a lousy title, I know, but the book itself is great.
书里面提到了很多仙舟人平时会用的谚语、俗语，非常实用，你要是对仙舟文化感兴趣，可以把它当做一个切入口。
The book is really practical, mentioning tons of proverbs and sayings that the Xianzhou natives commonly use. It's a fantastic window into Xianzhou culture if that's something you're interested in.
「息土不耗减，掘之益多」…仙舟真的有这等好东西？
"Soil that does not deplete, but self-replicates." ...is there really such incredible tech aboard Xianzhou?
哟，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}来了，想跟我聊聊，还是有什么别的事情？
Ah, our {F#girl}{M#boy} is back. Have you come to chat with me, or is there something else?
不知道你有没有听说过，叫作「息壤」。按照古籍的说法，这是指神话里自己生长、膨胀的土壤。
Have you ever heard of something called "Fallow Earth"? The ancient texts claim that it's a kind of legendary soil that grows and expands by itself.
「息土不耗减，掘之益多」…这样土壤不仅挖不尽，不断挖还有更多。
"Soil that does not deplete, but self-replicates"... so you never run out of soil, but instead always end up with more.
你相信有这种东西存在吗？巨大的建木就矗立在仙舟之上，仿佛一切神话故事都能在这里找到存在的证据。
Do you believe there's really such a thing? The giant Ambrosial Arbor grows aboard Xianzhou, as if all myths and legends can find evidence of their existence here.
仙舟的「息壤」也必将造福于银河…前提是，仙舟人愿意的话。
Xianzhou's Fallow Earth can benefit the entire cosmos... that is, so long as the Xianzhou natives are willing to share it.
想打听一点儿仙舟趣闻。
I want to ask you about some Xianzhou trivia.
不知道你有没有听说过，仙舟有一种材料名为「息壤」。按照古籍的说法，这是指神话里自己生长、膨胀的土壤。
I don't know if you've heard this before, but have you ever heard of something called "Fallow Earth"? According to ancient texts, it's a kind of legendary soil that grows and expands by itself.
「息土不耗减，掘之益多」…这样土壤不仅挖不尽，不断挖还有更多。
"Soil that does not deplete, but self-replicates"... so you never run out of soil, but instead always end up with more.
你相信有这种东西存在吗？我知道天才俱乐部中曾有人构想过类似的东西，「以利亚萨拉斯探针」。那是一种会利用环境，自我增殖、自我修复的机器。

You think such a thing exists? I know someone in the Genius Society once conceptualized something similar with the Elias Salas Probe. It was a machine that could self-propagate and self-repair by utilizing the environment.
但所有现存的类似设计全都在一定的复制周期后停转，或者说「死亡」了。也许息壤也是类似的东西吧？
But all similarly existing designs have been halted, or rather, "died" after a certain number of replication cycles. Perhaps this Fallow Earth is the same?
要是能证明它比公司所用的纳米机器更有效…仙舟的「息壤」也必将造福于银河。前提是，仙舟人愿意。
If we can somehow prove that it's more effective than the IPC's nanomachines... Xianzhou's Fallow Earth could certainly benefit the cosmos if the Xianzhou people agree to it.
建木到底是什么材料做的？
What exactly is the Ambrosial Arbor made of?
我也好奇，不对，打住打住！
I'm also curious about that... Wait! Stop right there!
在仙舟这可是顶级机密，先前那棵巨木长起来的时候你没见着吗？巡逻的云骑，还有地衡司的人…严防死守的。
It is a top secret on the Xianzhou. Didn't you see how things were when that giant tree grew? It was heavily guarded by people from the Realm-Keeping Commission and the Cloud Knights were on patrol.
我听闻这建木是星神造物，虽不知是真是假，但看仙舟严阵以待的架势，我劝你可别把主意打到建木上去，免得犯了他们仙舟人的忌讳。

I heard that the Ambrosial Arbor is an Aeonspawn. I'm not sure whether it is true, but seeing how seriously Xianzhou treats the issue, I suggest that you stay away from the tree and don't dabble in their taboo.
「要尊重当地人的风俗规矩，否则后果自负」每次出差前，公司同事都这么叮嘱我，出门在外，你也小心些吧！
Before every business trip, my colleagues always remind me to respect the local customs, or be ready to bear the consequences. You should be careful with your actions when travelling, too!
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你也是神仙吗？为什么你看起来和其他神仙不一样？
{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, are you a celestial too? Why do you look different from the rest of them?
咦？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}不是神仙吗？那你一定也是和我一样，来找神仙的吧？
Huh? You're not a celestial? Then you must be seeking celestials, just like I am?
对呀，这里可是九天之境，在这里生活的都是神仙！咦？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}不是神仙吗？那你一定也是和我一样，来找神仙的吧？
Yes, this is the Novenus Empyrea, where all celestials reside! Huh? {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, you're not a celestial? Then you must be seeking celestials, just like I am?
真的吗？恕冬生愚钝，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}并没有那种仙人气质……
Really? Forgive my dullness, but {F#big sister}{M#big brother}, you don't exude that celestial air...
噢噢，忘了说啦，咱叫冬生，是跟着一位神仙姐姐来这里的。不过…神仙姐姐不知道这事儿。
Ooh, I forgot to introduce myself. I'm Dongsheng. I followed a celestial lady here. But... she doesn't know that.
神仙姐姐就是…就是那个特别特别神、特别特别仙的大姐姐。
She is... a lady who is both heavenly and celestial.
村里的老人们都说，天有九重，上面有宫殿，宫殿里住着容颜不老的仙人。咱原来以为都是哄小孩子的故事，没想到这都是真的！

The older folks in the village say there are nine layers of heaven, with a palace at the very top where the eternally youthful celestials live. I thought it was just a fairy tale, but it's actually true!
冬生也想成为神仙，但爹说，只有修道有成的人才能去到仙宫，跟神仙一起喝桂花酒，吃大鸡腿！

I want to become a celestial too, but Dad said only those who have reached the pinnacle of cultivation may enter the Celestial Hall, drink osmanthus wine, and feast on chicken drumsticks with the gods!
冬生不懂修道是什么，本来以为自己这辈子都没有吃大鸡腿的福分了。结果这一晃眼，咱就来到仙宫里啦！
I don't know what cultivation is, so I thought I'd never get the chance to eat chicken drumsticks, but here I am at the Celestial Hall!
只是，自从到这里后，就再也没找见神仙姐姐。心里有些难过。{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，还有什么事情吗？
It's just that I haven't found the celestial lady since I arrived, and that makes me sad. {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, is there anything else you want to ask?
现在我到处都找不到神仙姐姐，只好暂作歇息。{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，还有什么事情吗？
But now I can't find her, so I'm having a breather. {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, is there anything else you want to ask?
您的打扮也和这里的男仙人女仙人差太远啦。冬生实在没法将{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}当作神仙看待。
You look so different from the celestial men and women here. I just can't see {F#Miss}{M#Mister} as a celestial.
神仙姐姐才不是迷信哩！在咱们那里，无论男女老幼都认得神仙姐姐，见她亲自施展过仙术，救了咱一村子的人！
She's not some old wives' tale! Everyone knows who she is where I'm from! I even saw her using celestial magic to save my entire village!
对呀，这里可是天外仙境，听说这里生活的都是神仙！
Oh yeah — This is an otherworldly realm. They say that all the celestials live here!
I want to have a chat with you.
好呀，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}有什么想聊的话题吗？
Sure! {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, what do you wish to talk about?
Tell me about this celestial lady.
神仙姐姐？咱从小就听着神仙姐姐的故事入眠的。说来话长……
The celestial lady? I grew up with her stories as bedtime tales! It's a long story...
咱们村紧挨着一个叫赤泉山的地方。大家的日子都过的苦哈哈的，一年里吃不到一次大鸡腿。
Our village is next to a place called Redspring Peak. Our lives were really hard. We'd go an entire year without eating a single chicken drumstick.
穷乡僻壤嘛，一年到头，不是种些蔫巴巴的庄稼，就是去林子里打点兔子野鼠什么的，勉强糊口。
We were some backwater village. The only thing we did was plant crops that don't get enough water to grow, or hunt for hares and rats to keep ourselves fed.
偏生就是这样的苦日子，山里面还有妖孽横行，简直就是往苦水里怼盐巴，叫人活不下去哩。
On top of this tough life, we also have demons rampaging in the mountain. It's like rubbing salt in the wound. It made life really really difficult.
据说在咱出生前很久，有一年，天空里最北边的星星的位置突然亮了起来，据说当时照的夜空像白昼。
Legends say that long before I was born, the northernmost star in the sky suddenly shone so brightly that it turned night into day.
村里懂些天象的老人说，这是有星宿要下凡，来惩治妖孽哩。后来过了五六年，有一天，天上突然掉下一个蛋来！
Some older villagers who knew about the stars said a constellation was about to descend to rid of evil. And then, five or six years later, an egg suddenly fell from the sky!
故事里说是蛋，应该就是蛋了。这蛋裂开，里面就跳出了个可漂亮的姐姐哩。
The story said it was an egg, so it must've been an egg. This egg cracked open, and out came a beautiful lady.
是啊。这蛋裂开，里面就跳出了个可漂亮的姐姐哩。
Yes. This egg cracked open and out popped a beautiful lady.
来旺说，他家太爷的太爷当时正在林子里打猎，第一个撞见了那景象。那颗蛋在地上生生犁出一条几十里长的山沟沟来，整片林子都烧起火来。

Laiwang said his great-grandfather's great-grandfather was hunting in the woods that day and was the first to see the scene. The egg cut out a ravine on the mountain that extended a few dozen miles, and the whole forest caught on fire.
村里人都觉得神仙姐姐漂亮可亲，就是脑袋有些问题。刚到村子里的时候，她连句整话都说不利索。当时村子里读书最多的长老给她起了个名儿……

Everyone thought the celestial lady was beautiful and nice, but there was something wrong with her head. When she first arrived, she couldn't even talk in a complete sentence. The most well-read elder gave her a name...
…叫「蛋生」。后来有一天，神仙姐姐突然能开口说人话了，她说，你们还是管我叫「沐芳」吧。大家怕亵渎了仙人，就改口叫她「沐芳神女」啦。

...Eggborn. Then one day, the celestial lady suddenly began to speak like a human. She said, "you can call me Mufang." Everyone was afraid of offending a celestial, so they called her "Goddess Mufang" instead.
呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲讲神仙姐姐其他的故事吧！
Phew... Storytelling is tiring. If you want to keep listening, I'll tell you more stories about her next time!
How did you get to Xianzhou?
Xianzhou? You mean the Celestial Hall?
有一天咱在山上砍柴。瞧见一艘大船——不是水上漂的那种，是…是飘在空中的，跟鸟毛一样轻——飘向咱们给神仙姐姐立的生祠那儿去了。

I was cutting wood in the mountains one day when I saw a giant ship. Not the type that floats on water, but... but one that floats in air like a feather. It floated towards the temple we built for the celestial lady.
咱寻思着一定是天上的仙人来接神仙姐姐啦！咱就跑啊跑，咱瞅见那艘船停着，船底开了个洞。
I thought it must be other celestials here to take her back! So I ran and ran, and saw that the ship had landed, and there was a hole at the bottom.
怪事，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，底下有洞的船还能开吗？不管这些啦，总之冬生就钻了进去。结果一觉醒来，就被带到了仙宫！
It's weird — {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, how can a ship still sail with a hole in it? Anyway, I climbed in and fell asleep. The next thing I knew, I was here at the Celestial Hall!
How could you even have fallen asleep?
I was tired from all that running.
Your life is truly intertwined with the celestials...
嘿嘿，是吧。娘也说，冬生脑门子大，福气旺！
Heehee, isn't that right? My Ma even said that fortune favors me because I have a giant forehead!
再后来，有几个穿着盔甲的天兵发现了咱。他们给咱扎了一针，咱突然就能听懂仙人仙话啦。
And then, some celestial soldiers in armor discovered me. They gave me a poke with some needle, and I could suddenly understand celestial speech.
他们问了我几个问题，又给我换了身新衣裳。嘿嘿，这衣裳没洞洞，也不打补丁，真好看……
They asked me a few questions, and then dressed me in new clothes. Heehee, these clothes have no holes or patches on them. So pretty...
你在这里怎么照顾自己？
How do you take care of yourself here?
你别看咱小小年纪，咱可是经历过旱灾涝灾的！冬生可厉害了，三天不吃饭也饿不着。
I'm young, but I've lived through plenty of droughts and floods! I'm so awesome that I can go for three straight days without food!
不过这仙宫里的好心神仙，冬生有吃有住。那位「不夜侯」的说书先生听咱讲故事便愿意周济咱，真是慈悲心肠呀。
But thanks to the kind celestials in this Celestial Hall, I have food and a place to live. That storyteller mister at Sleepless Earl gives me money for listening to my stories. He's so good!
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}别担心，咱听说「天上一天，人间一年」，时间紧迫，等咱找到神仙姐姐，讨到仙药之后，就得赶紧回去了。
Don't worry, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}. I heard that one day in heaven is a year on land. Time is running out. I'll go home once I find the celestial lady and get celestial medicine from her.
再见！咱继续去找神仙姐姐啦，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也一定能在仙舟上实现愿望的！
Bye-bye! I need to keep searching for the celestial lady. {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, your dreams will certainly come true as well in Xianzhou!
I have nothing else to ask.
再见！咱继续去找神仙姐姐啦，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也一定能在仙舟上实现愿望的！
Bye-bye! I need to keep searching for the celestial lady. {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, your dreams will certainly come true as well in Xianzhou!
Tell me about this celestial lady.
好啊。很久很久以前，据说比神仙姐姐来之前还要久的时候，咱们村紧挨的赤泉山里据说住着一头叫「山君」的妖孽。
Sure. A long long long time ago, even before the celestial lady got here, the Redspring Peak next to my village had a demon called the Mountain Lord.
他发起怒来，土地都要裂开，泉眼儿也不出水。为了取悦他，乡亲们年年供奉，为他掘山开矿，还要献出亲生儿女充作山君的侍僮哩。

When he got angry, the earth would split open and springs go all dry. The village gave him tribute every year to appease him, work in mines for him, and even offered their children as the Mountain Lord's servants.
据说山君带走的那些孩子，都被变成了吃人的狼怪供他使唤。赤泉山周遭的几条村子的青壮汉子都想尽法子要除掉山君。

The kids that the Mountain Lord took away were turned into man-eating wolf monsters that answered his commands. All the grown men in the villages around the Redspring Peak were all bent on getting rid of the Mountain Lord.
但那家伙毕竟是妖怪。力大无穷，站起来足有三四个人高，铜铃般的眼睛，火灼灼的，一身铜皮铁骨。大家伙儿就算一齐上，也不过是白饶了许多性命。

But he was a demon after all. He was inhumanly strong, taller than several adults, with eyes big as bronze bells that flickered like fire, and really tough skin. Even if everyone attacked him at the same time, people would still get killed by him.
乡亲们都在那家伙的压迫下，过了很久的苦日子。后来嘛……
The villagers suffered for a long time under that demon. And then...
这也跟神仙姐姐没关系。
This has nothing to do with the celestial lady.
后来神仙姐姐降临凡间。长老们就求她展示神通。好个神仙姐姐，听到乡亲们受苦拍案而起，提剑就进了赤泉山。

And then the celestial lady descended to our world and the elders begged her to use her divine magic. Lo and behold the celestial lady! Up she went with her sword when she heard about how the villagers had suffered, and she went into Redspring Peak.
过了一阵子，有一天大家突然瞧见赤泉山顶有电闪雷劈，风呼啦啦吹。要不了多久，整个赤泉山的山头突然塌了，以后都改叫「平顶山」了。
After a while, we suddenly saw a thunderstorm with terrible winds on Redspring Peak. Then the peak just completely collapsed, so we now call it "Flat-Top Peak."
从那以后，山君就再也不出来作祟了，大家也过上了一段时间的安生日子。
The Mountain Lord never came out to make trouble again, and everyone lived happily for a while.
怎么样，这个故事精彩吧？神仙姐姐的神迹可不止这些喔。
How is it? Was this story exciting? The celestial lady has done a lot more than this.
呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲其他神仙姐姐的故事吧！
Phew... storytelling is tiring. If you want to listen, I'll tell you more stories about her next time!
Tell me about this celestial lady.
好！虽然咱年纪不大，可是知道很多神仙姐姐的故事哦。咱想想，嗯…讲这个故事吧。
Sure! I'm young, but I know lots and lots of stories about the celestial lady. Let's see, hmm... I'll tell you this one then.
镇上有个富商，因为很喜欢做善事，大家都叫他周大善人。可是，老天爷不开眼，周大善人的孩子却是个天生的呆瓜，脑袋比牛好不了多少。
There was a wealthy merchant in town. Everyone called him Kind Zhou because he always helped people. But fate was mean to him. His son was born a dummy and had difficulties doing everything.
周大善人到处寻医问药，但是都没有人能治好他儿子。最后他听说了神仙姐姐的事迹，就求到了咱们村子里。
Kind Zhou asked everywhere for help, but no one could cure his son. Then he heard about what the celestial lady could do, and he made his way to our village.
神仙姐姐本来不打算帮忙，但她听了乡亲们的求告，又知道周大善人乐善好施，最后还是生了慈悲心。
She didn't want to help him at first, but she listened to everyone who put in a word for Kind Zhou about how he helps everyone, so she had mercy on him in the end.
据说她腾云驾雾回到那颗蛋掉下来的地方，炼了丹药，交给大善人，命他按时用药。
People say she flew on a cloud and returned to where the egg fell, made a medicine, gave it to the kind man, and told him to take it on time.
那个丹药果然不同凡响，周大善人家的傻孩子吃了不久，突然会开口叫爸爸了，后来长大还考取了功名。
That medicine was a miracle. After Kind Zhou's son took it, he suddenly said the word "Father." And when the son grew up, he even passed his exams with flying colors and became an official.
不仅如此，据说周大善人母鸡和大黄狗偷吃了那丹药，都变成了会说话的灵兽，也活了好多好多年！
Not just that, people say that Kind Zhou's chickens and dog stole the pellet, and became divine beasts that could talk. They even lived for many many years!
爸爸妈妈一直教咱，要像周大善人一样多做善事，这样咱和咱的阿菜都可以得道成仙！哎，也不知道阿菜现在怎么样了…阿菜是咱养的狗狗啦！
My parents always taught me to do lots of good deeds like Kind Zhou. That way, Veggie and I could become celestials too! Oh, I wonder how Veggie's doing... Veggie's my dog!
嘿嘿，神仙姐姐的故事是不是特别特别神奇？呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲其他神仙姐姐的故事吧！
Heehee, aren't the celestial lady's stories so amazingly? Phew, storytelling is hard work. If you want more, I'll tell you other stories about her next time!
Tell me about this celestial lady.
好的呀！虽然咱年纪不大，可是知道很多神仙姐姐的故事哦。唔…给你讲一个咱爸爸小时候的故事吧！
Okay! I'm young, but I know lots of stories about her. Umm... I'll tell you the story from when my Dad was little!
神仙姐姐当时住在镇上的大宅子里，经常给大家看病。很多人病得特别特别重，谁都治不好，但是神仙姐姐轻而易举就治好了。
The celestial lady was living in a big manor in town and treated lots of people's illnesses. Some of them were really really sick and no one could cure them, but she cured them really easily.
后来，也有很多很多其他地方的人跑来找神仙姐姐治病。他们走了很远很远的路，就是为了求神仙姐姐的一副仙药。神仙姐姐也从不让他们失望。
Then, lots and lots of people from other places came to see her for their issues. They'd walk for so long just to get medicine from her, and the celestial lady never disappointed them.
神仙姐姐的名气越来越大，连官府也知道了。当时有一个很坏很坏的县官，去逼问神仙姐姐仙药的秘密，神仙姐姐当然不会告诉他。他就把神仙姐姐关了起来。

She became so famous that even the government officials knew about her. There was a very very bad county official who tried to force her to tell him the secrets of her celestial medicine. Of course she wouldn't, so he locked her up!
当天晚上，有两个金甲门神突然出现在县衙前，轰隆隆转眼就把监狱给整个拆掉了！那些卫兵看到这一幕，根本不敢上前阻拦！
And that very night, two golden-armored door guardians suddenly appeared in front of the magistrate's court, and tore apart the entire jail! The guards who saw this were too scared to do anything!
神仙姐姐大摇大摆地走出了监狱，回到了家。从此以后，再也没人敢找她的麻烦了。
The celestial lady casually walked out of jail and went home. No one dared to trouble her again.
再后来，连县官都要听神仙姐姐的命令，连皇帝都要来镇上找神仙姐姐求药。咱就是在皇帝来为太子求药的那个冬天出生的！所以叫做冬生！

Then even the county official had to listen to the celestial lady. Even the Emperor came to town to ask for her miracle medicine for the crown prince! That's the very winter when I was born! My name, Dongsheng, means "winterborn"!
嘿嘿，神仙姐姐的故事是不是特别特别神奇？呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲其他神仙姐姐的故事吧！
Heehee, aren't the celestial lady's stories so amazingly? Phew, storytelling is hard work. If you want more, I'll tell you other stories about her next time!
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，又见到你啦！是有什么事要找咱吗？
{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, we meet again! What can I do for you this time?
哎，这仙舟中处处都是历史的痕迹，可仙舟民却不知道它们的价值。哎……
Ah, there're traces of history everywhere you look aboard Xianzhou, but Xianzhou natives don't even know these things' true value. *sigh*...
哎…说了你也不懂…嗯？这装束…你也是化外民吗？那倒是可以跟你说道说道。
*sigh* ...You wouldn't get it even if I told you. Your outfit... are you an Outworlder too? Then I guess we can talk a little about it.
仙舟民不知道它们的价值，哎…
The Xianzhou natives don't even know its true value, sigh...
到底是谁在学我说话？哦，我看你这化外民装束，我明白了，你也受不了仙舟民了对不对？
Who's copying how I talk? Oh, you're wearing Outworlder clothes. I get it, I get it... You can't bear these Xianzhou natives either, right?
对啊！仙舟民自恃长寿，对历史文物丝毫不懂得珍惜…等等，你不会是在套我的话吧？哎，算了，我也不与你计较。

Right!? Because of their longevity, they don't even have the smallest care about historical relics... hang on, are you trying to pump a confession out of me? Ack, forget about it. I don't have any beef with you.
我还以为遇上了同道中人，结果就只是遇见了一位复读机。算了，我也不与你计较了，我是在说仙舟历史文化的事情。
I thought I met a kindred spirit, but you're just a bot who repeats everything. Forget about it. I don't have any beef with you. I'm just talking about the history and culture of Xianzhou.
仙舟民和我们不一样，随便找几个人问问都是活了有几百岁。所以化外民心中久远的历史，不过是人家心目中的「童年回忆」。
The Xianzhou natives are different from us. Ask any of them, and you'll find they've lived for centuries. What we Outworlders consider ancient history is actually just a childhood memory for them.
这也就导致仙舟上的「历史学」和我们短生种理解中的「历史学」根本不是一个东西…我就这么说吧，他们缺乏对历史的敬畏心！
This means the study of "history" on Xianzhou is completely different from what we consider as "history"... or put simply, they lack respect for the past!
通常考古学家们得从旧时代的器皿、碑铭中推测联想过去发生了什么，这仙舟上各种东西更新换代太快了，几百年的东西说扔掉就扔掉，真是孰不可忍！

Archaeologists often speculate on the past by studying utensils and inscriptions from antiquity. But on Xianzhou, everything is perpetually being upgraded. They simply chuck out centuries-old antiques... it's just awful.
怎么？你也对仙舟史研究感兴趣，忘了自我介绍了，我是博识学会的陶德，要是对仙舟史感兴趣，咱们可以再探讨探讨。

Huh? You're also a keen student of Xianzhou history? Apologies, I haven't even introduced myself yet: I'm Todd from the Intelligentsia Guild. We can discuss things a little more if you're interested in Xianzhou history.
聊天？好啊，我正好歇歇脑子。况且和仙舟上不同的人聊天也算是我研究的一部分。
Chat? Alright, I can use a break now anyway. Besides, chatting with different people aboard Xianzhou also forms part of my research.
What does the Intelligentsia Guild do?
我虽然是博识学会的学者，但是我对博识学会的描述也是片面的，不客观的。这一点，我希望你能把它当作前提来看待。
I may be a student there, but my opinion of the Intelligentsia Guild is bound to be biased. So take this with a grain of salt.
简而言之，博识学会是与星际和平公司共生的学术组织。倡导的理念是：「一切知识必须如货币般流通」。
Put simply, the Intelligentsia Guild is an academic organization in symbiosis with the Interastral Peace Corporation. Our motto is "All knowledge must be circulated as freely as currency."
学会的学士们遍历宇宙，搜集一切有价值的知识，然后用所得知识与其他学士们交换知识，为的是寻求真正的无价之宝。
Our scholars traverse the universe collecting all knowledge of value, and trading learnings with other scholars in the hope of attaining priceless wisdom.
说这么多你也理解不了，你只用知道，我们便是交易知识取得真知的团体就行了。
It's hard to explain, but basically, all you need to know is that we're a group that trades knowledge to gain true wisdom.
Don't the Xianzhou natives research history?
倒不是不研究。只是仙舟人所谓的「历史学」，和我们短生种所谓「历史学」根本就不是同一个概念。
It's not that they don't study it. It's just that what they call "history" is a completely different concept from what our short-life species consider to be history.
道理也很简单。你会把你小时候去过、长大后被荒废的剧场，当做「考古学」的遗址吗？对于仙舟人来说，我们眼中久远的历史，不过是他们的童年回忆罢了。

It's a simple concept. Would you consider the abandoned theater that you used to visit as a child as some kind of archaeological ruin? What we consider to be ancient history is merely a childhood memory for the long-lived Xianzhou natives.
所以，仙舟人不太珍视他们的古迹，就如同我们不太珍视自己城市里的旧房子。他们也不太重视整理成文史，因为「历史」还活在每个当事人的脑中。

That's why the Xianzhou natives don't really value their own cultural relics, just as we don't really care about dilapidated buildings back home. They also don't really get the concept of written history, because "history" still lives within their memories.
但是万物终有尽头，仙舟人也不例外。作为博识学会的历史学家，我岂能坐视不管，他们不在乎，我在乎，我来为银河灿烂星史执笔。

But everything must come to an eventual end one day, and the Xianzhou natives are no exception. As a student of the Intelligentsia Guild, how can I sit idly by? They don't care, but I do — so I'm here to record the magnificence of our cosmos's history.
你做这些的意义是什么？
What's your purpose behind doing all of this?
你怎么说话跟我读书时的导师似的？哎，搞得我又想起以前，每次都要给我关心的学术课题编一个实际作用……
You sound just like one of my tutors! *sigh* That reminds me of school and having to find a practical purpose for every academic topic I wanted to write about...
咳咳，哼…不过，研究仙舟史当然是有用的。毕竟我们都知道，仙舟上藏着永生的秘密。即便仙舟人可以守口如瓶，但「历史」始终是不会沉默的。

Cough, ahem... but of course, it's useful to study the history of Xianzhou. After all, we all know that the secret of immortality lies hidden somewhere here. The Xianzhou natives might be able to keep their secret, but history shall never be kept silent.
只要能从断壁残垣和废纸残章里拼凑出足够多的蛛丝马迹，也许就能引领我们找到这件仙舟上最大的秘密……
So long as we can piece together enough clues from the rubble and scraps around us, perhaps it'll lead us to finding that legendary secret here on Xianzhou...
That's all, I can see you're busy.
嗯，我们各忙各的去吧。如果你看到了什么有趣的历史遗存，记得通知我一声。
Yes, let us part ways here. If you see any interesting historical relics, give me a holler.
It's nothing, really. I can see you're busy.
嗯，我们各忙各的去吧。如果你看到了什么有趣的历史遗存，记得通知我一声。
Yes, let us part ways here. If you see any interesting historical relics, give me a holler.
是你呀？看你这张脸就能感觉出来，咱俩都是劳碌命。
It's you. I can tell just by looking at your face that you're a workaholic — just like me.
我现在要么被巨量的一手资料淹没，要么就在仙舟上到处调查走访，风里来雨里去，好不容易才能休息这么一会儿。
I'm either swamped by primary sources or running around everywhere on Xianzhou for research purposes. With my hectic schedule, it's a miracle that I ever find time like this to rest.
博识学会的规矩是用知识交换知识，你最好准备了些我感兴趣的东西。所以，今天有什么事要找我吗？
The Intelligentsia Guild always trades knowledge for knowledge, and that's our guiding principle. You'd better prepare something interesting for me. So what can I do for you today?
您好，鹤运速递为您服务，请问您预约了寄件吗？
Heron Express, at your service! Have you made a delivery booking with us?
我是鹤运物流专员，梓桥。
I'm Ziqiao, a logistics specialist from Heron Express.
没错，寄件请预约鹤运速递～我是鹤运物流专员，梓桥。
That's right. For deliveries, please book a courier with Heron Express. I'm a Heron Express Specialist — Ziqiao's my name.
您如果有要寄送的货品，请提前在智能终端上打开鹤运物流的应用，输入寄件信息。上门收件的话等物流机巧鸟通知，出门寄件的话就带着货品来这里。

If you've got a delivery to send, please enter your shipping info via our Heron Express app. If you're waiting to receive a delivery, please wait for our courier cycranes' notification. If you'd like to send a delivery, please bring it to our office.
仙舟上到处都是物流机巧鸟。
Courier cycranes are everywhere aboard the Xianzhou.
哈哈，仙舟上现在已经离不开鹤运物流了，吃饭点餐、网络购物、同城速递…可以说，要是没有咱们鹤运物流，这仙舟多半是难以运转了。
Haha, Xianzhou relies heavily on Heron Express Specialists: Delivering meals, online shopping, within-city deliveries... It'd be very difficult to operate Xianzhou without Heron Express.
你别看很多人说自己可以待在家里大门不出、二门不迈，要是没有快递和外卖，你说他能待得下去吗？绝对待不下去的。
Don't listen to all those claims about being able to stay indoors here. Without courier deliveries, do you really think anyone could stand staying in? Nobody could.
在路边看到了很多的快递箱。
I saw a lot of parcels outside.
这件事让我一直有些头疼，有一些是因为机巧鸟故障中途暂时搁置，有些则是因为用户填写了错误的寄件信息，再也联系不上寄件人，暂时搁置的。
This always gives me a headache. Some were put on hold due to cycrane failure; some were because the customer filled out their contact details incorrectly, so we couldn't get in touch with them.
虽然说处理这些废置的快递箱也是我的工作，但是实在是太多了，如果实在找不到失主，我们也只能慈善处理了。
It may be my job to deal with these abandoned parcels, but there're just too many. If we can't track down the owner, we end up donating things to charity.
话又说回来，我其实还在工作呢。您要是没什么想要寄的，就记得咱们鹤运物流的服务啊。我们的口号是「鹤运速递，啥都能寄」。
But then again, I'm still on the clock right now. If you don't have anything to send right now, keep Heron Express in mind for next time. Our slogan is: Heron Express — We Mail Anything.
要是你没什么别的事儿，我就接着忙了。
If there's nothing else, I'm getting back to work.
There're still some things I'd like to talk about.
好啊，就只是聊聊工作的话，我不太介意。
Alright. I don't mind if we're just talking about work.
What do you usually get up to around here?
其实很多人都会问我这样的问题。毕竟仙舟上到处都是鹤运物流的机巧鸟，又需要人力去做些什么呢？
I get asked that a lot, actually. After all, with this many cycranes aboard the Xianzhou, what do you need manual labor like me for?
实际上，鹤运物流的很多工作依然需要人来进行。譬如检查货物、调配机巧鸟线路、定期检修机巧鸟，再说你也看到街边那些快递箱了……
In actual fact, much of our work relies on human workforce: Inspecting goods, deploying cycrane routes, cycrane maintenance... plus all those pesky abandoned boxes you've seen on the streets...
对了，还有一项工作是必须由人类来负责，且几百年内不会改变的，那就是受理客户投诉。
Oh yeah — there's another job that can only be done manually, and that's never going to change: Handling customer service complaints.
Is it true that you can really mail anything?
当然了。我们的口号就是「鹤运速递，啥都能寄」，不过最终的解释权还得在我们这里。
Sure. Our slogan is "Heron Express — We Mail Anything," but we reserve the right of final interpretation.
如果您需要运送的物品特别敏感或者特别重要，我们通常不建议您使用物流机器人，我们这里建议您寻找一个镖局——带有武装押运的物流企业。
We usually recommend that you avoid using robots if you're sending anything fragile or important. Instead, we recommend that you hire an armed escort service.
您如果有什么想邮寄的东西，正式下单之前，请阅读寄送规范。
Before you finalize your order with us, please make sure you read our shipping regulations.
仙舟的物流真是方便呐。
Logistics on Xianzhou is really something else.
对吧？从你们化外民的视角来看，比仙舟民本身要清楚得多。我老是听一些本地老害说「仙舟是一成不变，死气沉沉的」，我可不同意。
I know, right? You Outworlders have a much clearer perspective on this stuff than the Xianzhou natives. I'm always hearing old cranks say "Xianzhou is lifeless and never changes," but I disagree.
最直观的感受，就是近二百年来我越来越繁忙了。您能想象吗？在一百五十年前，星槎海的繁华区，每天只会飞过六千四百多架次货运机巧鸟。

It's just a hunch, but I've grown busier and busier these past two hundred years. Can you imagine? Around <unbreak>150</unbreak> years ago, down at the busy Starskiff Haven zone, we'd only be able to handle over <unbreak>6400</unbreak> cycrane deliveries per day.
而就在昨天，星槎海的繁华区上空飞过了…我看一下数据…七万架次——昨天还是工作日。而这只是短短一百五十年间发生的变化。
But just yesterday, there were... let me see... over <unbreak>70,000</unbreak> deployments over Starskiff Haven! And that's on a work day! Such a huge change in just <unbreak>150</unbreak> years.
不留心看不见，你可真仔细。
That's easy to miss if you're not paying attention. You've got quite the eye.
物流行业真是越来越重要了。
The logistics industry is becoming more and more important these days.
您一定也能发现了，城市越发达、生活越便捷，就越是依赖货运系统的支撑。如今的仙舟可根本承受不起物流系统停摆，咱的责任也更重了。

You must also find that the more developed and convenient a city becomes, the more its citizens come to rely on logistical support. Today, Xianzhou can't afford to pause onboard logistics, and our burden is even heavier.
仙舟是一个巨人，物流系统是她的血管，我们物流专员负责维系她的心跳。只要想到这里，我就充满了「活着」的充实感。
Xianzhou is a massive giant, and our logistics system is its blood vessels. Our couriers keep its heart beating. Whenever I think of this, I'm filled with the feeling of being truly alive.
That's all. Keep up the good work.
您路上小心。请记住我们的口号，「鹤运速递，啥都能寄」。
Be careful out there, and remember — our slogan is "Heron Express — We Mail Anything."
